As a rule when you are awake you do not know your sleeping self; you know your neighbors far better, so your sleeping self appears mysterious indeed. When you are awake, as Ruburt himself has written, you cannot find the dream locations that have been so familiar to you only the night before.
quotes.translation: 人格的所有层面确实都是意识层面。它们只是以隔间的方式运作，因此自我的一部分常常不知道其他部分。通常当你清醒时，你不知道你的睡眠自我；你对邻居的了解远胜于此，所以你的睡眠自我确实显得神秘。正如鲁柏自己所写，当你清醒时，你找不到昨晚还如此熟悉的梦境地点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This, temporarily, is something like what happened to you, Joseph. The inner self is aware of other realities. It is aware of the ego. Remember here the difference between consciousness of self and the ego, for the difference is important. The ego is but part of the self, part of the conscious self, but focused in one direction.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，这暂时有点像发生在你身上的情况。内在自我觉察到其他实相。它觉察到自我。记住这里自我意识与自我的区别，因为这种区别很重要。自我只是自我的一部分，是意识自我的一部分，但聚焦在一个方向上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Again, the nature of space and time is glimpsed more clearly as it appears to the sleeping self, for in the dream state reality is to a large measure uncamouflaged, and the personality appears in a freer state. It should also be borne in mind that all aspects of the personality are part of the whole self. As such there is an overall communication between the various aspects of the self, although the separate aspects of the self may not be aware of the communications.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，当空间和时间的本质呈现在睡眠自我面前时，会被更清晰地瞥见，因为在梦境状态中，实相在很大程度上是不加伪装的，人格以更自由的状态显现。还应该牢记，人格的所有方面都是整个自我的一部分。因此，自我的各个方面之间存在整体性的沟通，尽管自我的各个独立方面可能没有意识到这些沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This self is also a director of dream activities. It is in some ways an intermediate self. You realize that all these terms are basically artificial, for simplicity's sake. There are no real divisions to the self, though you may feel at times self divided.
quotes.translation: 这个自我也是梦境活动的导演。在某些方面它是一个中间自我。你意识到所有这些术语基本上都是人为的，只是为了简便起见。自我并没有真正的划分，尽管你有时可能会感到自我分裂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Your self is all this, as well as the selves that you would call future selves. I wanted to make it clear that the self at any moment, while being no one thing, being indeed a series of simultaneous happenings, so to speak, is however far from meaningless, containing within it full inner comprehension of its various portions.
quotes.translation: 你的自己就是这一切，也包括你所谓的未来自己。我想澄清的是，任一时刻的自己虽非单一实体，实为一系列同时发生的事件（姑且如此说），却绝非毫无意义，其内在蕴含着对各部分的完整理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Any gap of assimilation here can be most unfortunate, and sometimes disastrous. Consciousness of self, if you recall, is self-consciousness that still retains self as a part of action, self that perceives its existence within action. Ego, originally a part of this consciousness of self, splits off as previously explained, and attempts to dissociate itself from action, indeed to view action as a result of itself; that is, to view action as a result and not a cause.
quotes.translation: 此处任何同化上的断层都可能极为不幸，有时甚至酿成灾难。请回忆，自我意识是仍将自我视为行动一部分的自觉意识，是感知自身存在于行动中的自我。自我（ego）原属自我意识的一部分，如先前所述分裂而出，试图与行动分离，甚至将行动视为自身的结果——即把行动当作结果而非原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The self, then, is far from limited even on your own plane. I mentioned, or hinted however that the influence of the self, and therefore the self itself, also had reaching effects in realities that did not consist of a space-time continuum. This would have to follow if my statement that the self is truly limitless is true.
quotes.translation: 因此，即便在你们自己的层面上，自己也远非受限之物。我曾提及或暗示，自我的影响力——因而自我本身——也在不构成时空连续体的实相中产生延伸效应。若我所说"自我真正无限"属实，此理必然成立。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is also true however that this lack of boundary allows for possibilities of development and expansion that would be impossible with a limited self. The self is not nebulous. Action changes itself, as we have described. Any self, therefore, is never the same self, but action contains within itself its own comprehension.
quotes.translation: 但同样真实的是，这种无边界性为发展与扩展提供了可能，这是有限自我所无法企及的。自我并非虚无缥缈。如我们所述，行动改变自身。因此任何自我都绝非恒定不变，但行动本身包含其自身的理解力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In other systems this is not necessarily the case. The time system within them is entirely different than your own. In these the inner self is aware of itself as more than one ego. (Pause.) The inner self can play more than one role at once, consciously in other words. Simply as an analogy, it would be as if within physical reality you lived, say, the life of a rich man of great talent, the life of a poor man with entirely different talents, and the life of a mother and career woman. You would be aware of yourself in each of these three roles, and find qualities being developed in each of the separate lives.
quotes.translation: 在其他系统中情况未必如此。其中的时间系统与你们截然不同。在这些系统中，内在自我意识到自身不止一个自我（ego）。（停顿）内在自我能同时扮演多个角色——换言之，有意识地如此。打个比方，就像在物质实相中，你同时过着天才富商的生活、天赋迥异的穷人的生活、以及母亲兼职业女性的生活。你会意识到自己在这三个角色中的存在，并发现每个独立生命都在发展不同特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The soul or entity is always in a state of flux, or learning, and of developments that have to do with subjective experience rather than with time or space. This is not nearly as mysterious as it might sound. Each of my readers plays a game in which the egotistical conscious self pretends not to know what the whole self definitely does know. Since the ego is definitely a part of the whole self, then it must necessarily be basically aware of such knowledge. In its intense focus in physical reality, however, it pretends not to know, until it feels able to utilize the information in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 灵魂或存有始终处于流变、学习与发展的状态，这些发展关乎主观经验而非时空。这并不像听上去那么神秘。每位读者都在玩一个游戏：自我意识假装不知道整体自我确知之事。既然自我（ego）无疑是整体自我的一部分，它必然在根本上知晓这些知识。只是因其强烈聚焦于物质实相，便佯装不知，直到它觉得能以物质方式运用这些信息为止。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now you have indeed been doing well. And I do congratulate you. You are too impatient both with your own development and the development of others. You want your destination now and you want to get to that destination as quickly as possible, 8595 miles a minute, you see. You have given yourself several traffic tickets. Now, you have learned a good deal, and I know that you have tried. It does no good to understand issues intellectually, however, or even to understand them intuitively unless you understand them so thoroughly that they become a part of your daily life. Much that you know you have made a part of your life, but you still wish to use your knowledge for your own conscious purposes. You are still not willing to say let me develop as I should develop. You are still saying let me develop as I think I should develop. The I being a highly egotistical I. You are still saying, let me develop as I want to develop. You are still saying I want this person or I want that person or that thing. Therefore shall I use this ability and this knowledge to gai，，n it. And that is why you have given yourself a traffic ticket now and then。What you are learning is a technique for self development. You cannot use it, therefore, to attain those things that do not pertain to your own self development and the techniques will not help you get something that you were not meant to have nor that you have before decided as an entity that you should not have. I will leave specifics for later. Nevertheless, the facts remain that your own inner self and your own entity have given you challenges that you have accepted. Now you know these challenges; subconsciously you are aware of them. Consciously you do not want to accept them and this is one reason why you have had difficulty with the pendulum. This is not out of the ordinary. This happens to many personalities. It is nothing to blame yourself for. You are certainly in the midst of a certain line of development. You cannot blame yourself for not being further along the line. The very fact that you are here this evening, the very fact that you are trying as hard as you have been shows that you are indeed developing and that you are indeed learning. There must be an open-minded, an openhearted attitude here. You must not try to use what you have learned in a narrow, limiting way. This hampers your own development. It closes your eyes to many possibilities that will be important to you. It is natural, perhaps, to want to use what you have learned, this information, as a technique to achieve what you at any particular time think desirable, a particular person, a particular thing. But what is important is the inner development. If this is taken care of, it will automatically lead you to the person that is best for you and to the circumstances that will help you develop. To insist that a specific individual or a specific goal be attained through these methods is limiting. There must always be the acknowledgement that you do not consciously as yet realize the depths of yourself, the goals you have set and the challenges, and this material should be used to open up your inner horizons and to lead you in those directions toward which your inner self has already set you. If you then egotistically, say--No--this particular situation is what I want, then you may be blocking the inner direction which has been meant for you. I said I would discuss some particular material and so I shall shortly. But the inner attitude is far more important. I suggest, Joseph, that you take a break and I shall continue.
quotes.translation: 你确实做得很好。我由衷祝贺你。你对自己和他人的发展都过于急躁。你希望立刻抵达目的地，并以最快速度到达那里——每分钟8595英里，你看。你已经给自己开了好几张交通罚单。你学到了很多，我知道你努力过。然而，光靠理智理解问题并无益处，甚至直觉理解也不够，除非你理解得如此透彻，以至于它们成为你日常生活的一部分。你所知道的大部分内容已成为你生活的一部分，但你仍希望将知识用于自己有意识的目的。你仍然不愿说：让我按照应有的方式发展。你仍在说：让我按照我认为应该的方式发展——这个“我”是高度自我中心的“我”。你仍在说：让我按照我想要的方式发展。你仍在说：我想要这个人，或我想要那个人，或那件事。因此我要用这种能力和知识去获得它。这就是为什么你时不时给自己开一张交通罚单。你正在学习的是一种自我发展的技巧。因此，你不能用它来获得那些与你自身发展无关的东西，这些技巧也不会帮你得到你本不该拥有、或你作为存有之前已决定不应拥有的东西。具体细节我稍后再谈。然而事实是，你内在的自己和你的存有给了你挑战，而你已经接受了。现在你知道这些挑战；潜意识里你意识到它们。有意识层面你不想接受它们，这就是你在使用摆锤时遇到困难的原因之一。这并非异常。许多人格都会遇到这种情况。你不必为此自责。你当然正处在某条发展路线上。你不能因为自己尚未走得更远而自责。你今晚能在这里，你如此努力尝试的事实本身就表明你确实在发展，确实在学习。这里必须有一种开放的思想、开放的心态。你不能试图以狭隘、局限的方式使用你所学到的东西。这会阻碍你的发展。它会让你对许多对你重要的可能性视而不见。也许，想要把你学到的东西——这些信息——作为一种技巧，用来获得你在任何特定时刻认为可取的东西——某个特定的人、某个特定的事物——是很自然的。但重要的是内在发展。如果这一点被照顾好了，它会自动引导你走向最适合你的人，以及能帮助你发展的环境。坚持要通过这些方法获得某个特定个体或特定目标是局限性的。必须始终承认，你尚未有意识地认识到自己的深度、你设定的目标和挑战，这些材料应该用来打开你内在的视野，引导你走向内在自我已为你设定的方向。如果你随后自我中心地说——“不”——这个特定的情境就是我想要的，那么你可能正在阻挡为你设定的内在方向。我说过我会讨论一些特定的材料，我很快就会讲。但内在态度要重要得多。我建议，约瑟夫，你休息一下，我稍后继续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (I thought it a good idea that this be the end of the session, however, Seth came through again at 10:30 as the three of us sat talking about various things. A humorous repartee followed, with Seth answering our questions on a variety of subjects. Two serious notes: Alice Butts, who died last week, has already visited my father. And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: Therefore speaking in physical terms only, the self is not bounded. It is not independent nor self-contained. It needs for its survival nutrients that come from outside of the skin. Not only this, but in all cases its own excretions are needed for nourishment of what is not-self, or by what seems to be not-self.
quotes.translation: 因此，仅从物质层面来说，自己是没有边界的。它不是独立的，也不是自足的。为了生存，它需要来自皮肤之外的养分。不仅如此，在所有情况下，它自身的排泄物也是滋养非我——或看似非我——所必需的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: To this degree Dunne was correct. But the important point, if you will forgive a pun, is that these moment points are all intensities, electrical realities, and traveling through such dimensions involves a transformation of energy from one intensity to another. The whole self, or the entity of which I speak, is composed of all of these selves, but it must be realized that all divisions between these selves are illusions, basically speaking. For the sake of discussion we separate them, but in doing so we almost manage to change the very nature of that which we attempt to study.
quotes.translation: 在这个程度上，邓恩是正确的。但关键点在于——请原谅我玩个文字游戏——这些时刻点都是强度，是电性实相，穿越这样的维度涉及能量从一种强度到另一种强度的转化。整个自己，或者我所说的存有，由所有这些自己组成，但必须认识到，这些自己之间的所有划分，从根本上说都是幻象。为了讨论方便，我们将其分开，但这样做时，我们几乎改变了我们试图研究之物的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The ego is only one layer of the self that has self-consciousness. Being self-conscious, the ego attempts to be conscious only of itself. Self-consciousness results in an intense, but necessarily limited focus. It necessitates boundaries. It depends upon some sort of inner psychological decision as to what will be considered self, and therefore accepted by consciousness, and that which will be considered notself, and not accepted by consciousness.
quotes.translation: 自我只是具有自我意识的自己的一层。由于具有自我意识，自我试图只意识到自身。自我意识导致了一种强烈但必然受限的聚焦。它需要边界。它依赖于某种内在的心理决定，即什么将被视为自己，从而被意识接受，什么将被视为非我，而不被意识接受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The inner self is acquainting itself with reality as it exists there. In many cases it is emerging into a new world. Since the learning process is involved, there are errors. Any faulty constructions however are used by the inner self in a feedback system and as a part of the learning process. Your system is not the most elementary, but it is one of the most elementary, and it is a way that the inner self acquaints itself with certain basic facts.
quotes.translation: 内在自己正在认识存在于那里的实相。在许多情况下，它正在进入一个新世界。由于涉及学习过程，会有错误。然而，任何有缺陷的构造都会被内在自己在反馈系统中使用，并作为学习过程的一部分。你们的系统不是最基本的，但它是其中之一，它是内在自己认识某些基本事实的一种方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We are speaking of course here of the ordinary physical environment. The chemical, biological, electrical and psychic functions of the self are directly connected to the physical universe as a whole. Theoretically the influence of a particular given self is endless, and not only in so far as your own physical camouflage time universe is concerned. The influence of any given self reaches also into realities that are not bounded by space and time.
quotes.translation: 我们这里当然是在谈论普通的物质环境。自己的化学、生物、电性和心灵功能直接与整个物质宇宙相连。理论上，某个特定自己的影响是无穷无尽的，而且不仅限于你们自己的物质伪装时间宇宙。任何特定自己的影响也延伸到不受空间和时间限制的实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Hypnosis is one method of examining dreams. Our method is perhaps the best one. The inner self constantly changes its focus. I have said that consciousness is merely the direction in which the inner self focuses at any particular time. In order to examine the reality of dreams it is necessary to change the focus of the inner self to those directions in which the inner self moves, when the ego does not limit its scope to camouflage reality only.
quotes.translation: 催眠是检视梦境的方法之一。我们的方法或许是最佳途径。内在自体不断转换其焦点。我曾说过，意识不过是内在自体在特定时刻聚焦的方向。要检视梦境的实相，必须将内在自体的焦点转向其移动的方向——当自我不再将视野局限于伪装实相时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: They changed it in their own individual ways, and not in your ways. But this will be discussed at a much later time. Yet all of this occurs, basically, within the blinking of an eyelid, so to speak, yet all with purpose and with meaning, and based upon achievement and responsibility. Each portion of the self, while independent to some considerable degree, is nevertheless responsible to every other portion of the self, and each whole self, or individuality, is responsible to all others while it is still largely independent as to activity and decision.
quotes.translation: 他们以各自独特的方式改变它，而非依循你们的方式。但这将在更晚的时机讨论。然而，这一切的发生，基本上就在眨眼之间，却皆具目的与意义，且建立在成就与责任之上。自体的每个部分虽在相当程度上独立，却仍对自体的其他部分负责；而每个完整自体或个体性，在活动与决策上大体保持独立的同时，也须对所有其他个体负责。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: (With emphasis:) Reincarnation simply represents probabilities in a time context (underlined) -- portions of the self that are materialized in historical contexts. Period. All kinds of time -- backward and forward -- emerge from the basic unpredictable nature of consciousness, and are due to "series" of significances. Each self born in time will then pursue its own probable realities from that standpoint. Again, each such self is immediate.
quotes.translation: （强调语气：）转世仅代表时间脉络中的可能性（下划线）——自体在历史脉络中物质化的部分。句号。所有类型的时间——向前与向后——皆源于意识本质上的不可预测性，并归因于"系列"意义。每个诞生于时间中的自体，都将从此立足点追寻自身的可能实相。再次强调，每个这样的自体都是当下的。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 683
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I am, again, not minimizing the practical necessity for the conscious self as it appears to be. But man is much more than the conscious self, and what he calls the conscious self is merely the whole self as seen through the direction in which the whole self chooses to direct its energies and focus.
quotes.translation: 我再次强调，并未贬低意识自体表面上的实际必要性。但人类远不止于意识自体，他所称的意识自体，不过是透过完整自体选择引导能量与聚焦的方向所见的整体自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Sensual data is not basically--underlined--dependent upon the physical body. The individual can receive sensual data in other ways. The senses are indeed often used by the inner self as a constant method of acquainting it with circumstances pertinent to the survival and interests of the physical body, but the inner self is not entirely dependent on them for its entire data by any means. The mind can bypass the senses, and receive its data in a more direct manner, translating what it perceives as automatically as it translates sensual data.
quotes.translation: 感官资料本质上（下划线）并不依赖肉体。个体能以其他方式接收感官资料。内在自体确实常将感官用作持续了解与肉体生存及利益相关情境的方法，但内在自体绝非完全依赖感官获取全部资料。心智能绕过感官，以更直接的方式接收资料，并将其感知自动转化为如同处理感官资料般的形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It turns beams of attention off and on. It has many facets and many volumes and many dimensions. It acts out roles, but the whole self is entire, and every individual innately knows and is intimately familiar with the intents and purposes of the whole self. And in dreams and in intuitions and unspoken thoughts, the individual comes to terms with the whole self, of which it is merely one portion, and not necessarily the dominant portion.
quotes.translation: 它开启与关闭注意力的光束。它拥有众多面向、众多卷册与众多维度。它扮演各种角色，但完整自体是完整的，每个个体天生知晓并深切熟悉完整自体的意图与目的。在梦境、直觉与未言明的思绪中，个体与完整自体达成和解——个体仅是完整自体的一部分，且未必是主导部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The entity, the true multidimensional self, is aware of all of its experiences, and this knowledge is to some extent available to these other portions of the self, including of course the physical self as you know it. These various portions of the self in fact will eventually (in your terms) become fully aware. Period. This awareness will automatically alter what now seems to be their nature, and add to the multiplicitude of existence.
quotes.translation: 存有，即真正的多重次元自体，知晓其所有经验，而这份知识在某种程度上也能为自体的其他部分所获取，当然包括你所知的物质自体。事实上，这些自体的不同部分最终（以你们的时间观而言）将完全觉醒。句号。这种觉知将自动改变它们目前看似本质的东西，并增添存在的多重性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When this occurs you will be able to use your normal abilities in addition to other abilities used while in the dream state itself. You will be certain of your identity. You will realize that your physical self is sleeping, or in a dream state, and that the inner self is fully awake. Now this represents a definite increase in the scope of consciousness, and a considerable expansion over the usual limitations set by you upon the self.
quotes.translation: 当这种情况发生时，你将能在梦境状态中运用正常能力之外的其他能力。你将确知自己的身份。你会意识到你的物质自体正在睡眠或处于梦境状态，而内在自体则完全清醒。这代表了意识范围的明确扩展，以及对你通常加诸自体上的限制的显著超越。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: "Love your neighbor as yourself." Turn this around and say, "Love yourself as you love your neighbor," for often you will recognize the goodness in another and ignore it in yourself. Some people believe there is a great merit and holy virtue in what they think of as humility. Therefore to be proud of oneself seems a sin, and in that frame of reference true affirmation of the self is impossible. Genuine self-pride is the loving recognition of your own integrity and value. True humility is based upon this affectionate regard for yourself, plus the recognition that you live in a universe in which all other beings also possess this undeniable individuality and self-worth.
quotes.translation: "爱邻如己。"请反过来这样说："爱己如爱邻"，因为你常能认出他人身上的善，却忽视自己身上的善。有些人认为他们所谓的谦卑具有极大的功德和神圣美德。因此，以自己为荣似乎成了罪过，在这种参照系下，对自体的真正肯定是不可能的。真正的自尊是对自身完整性与价值的慈爱认可。真正的谦卑建立在这种对自己的深情尊重之上，加上你认识到自己生活在一个所有其他存有也都拥有这种不可否认的个体性与自我价值的宇宙中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The conscious self does not perceive, or the so-called conscious self does not perceive, the equally valid dream constructions. You will discover that the whole self is composed of many so-called conscious selves. But neither of those conscious selves are aware of the existence of the others.
quotes.translation: 意识自体并不感知——或所谓的意识自体并不感知——同样真实的梦境建构。你会发现整体自体由许多所谓的意识自体组成。但这些意识自体彼此都不知道对方的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

source_raw.title: （As Seth states, Jane did have a dream about the idea the following night, September 11,1963. She recalls it quite easily. However she has no written record of the dream, since this was before she had cultivated the habit of keeping a dream notebook. As mentioned many many sessions ago, however, her poem The Fence, written in May 1963, clearly foreshadows the Seth material, dealing with [but not always by outright name] such subjects as reincarnation, dreams, unperceived worlds, etc. [See the poem on page 28, Session 5, in Volume I of The Early Sessions]

quotes.text: The whole self is obviously the sum of these characteristics, and more. After the final incarnation, the physical, sexual type of creativity is simply no longer needed. You do not need to reproduce physically, in other words. In simple terms the whole self contains male and female characteristics, finely tuned together, blended so that true identity can then arise -- for it cannot, when one group of characteristics must be emphasized over the other group, as it must be during your present physical existence.
quotes.translation: 整体自体显然是这些特征的总和，且不止于此。在最后一世之后，物质性、性别化的创造力类型就不再需要了。换句话说，你不再需要以物质形式繁衍。简单来说，整体自体包含男性和女性特征，它们被精细地调和、融合，使得真正的身份得以浮现——因为在你们当前的物质存在中，必须强调某一组特征而压抑另一组，真正的身份便无法产生。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: On one hand, basically, the self is limitless, both electromagnetically and because of the nature of action, which affects all other action. The self does not however proceed along straight lines, from a birth to a death. This is only the self that the ego perceives. Action cannot remain inactive or motionless, though the motion may not always be apparent.
quotes.translation: 一方面，自体基本上是无限的，无论是从电磁角度，还是因为行动的本质——行动会影响所有其他行动。然而，自体并非沿着直线从出生走向死亡。这只是自我所感知的自体。行动无法保持静止或不动，尽管其运动可能并不总是显而易见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The dreaming self as you conceive of it, however, is but a shadow of its own reality, for the dreaming self is a psychological point of reference and, in your terms, [of] continuity, that brings together all portions of your identity. Of its deeper nature, only the most developed are aware. It represents, in other words, one strong uniting facet of your entire identity. Its experiences are as vivid and its "personality" as rich -- in fact richer -- in context as the physical personality you know.
quotes.translation: 然而，你所理解的做梦自己只是其真实性的一个影子，因为做梦自己是一个心理上的参考点，用你们的话说，是连续性的参考点，它汇聚了你身份的所有部分。只有最进化的人才能意识到它的深层本质。换句话说，它代表了你整个身份的一个强大统一面向。它的体验与你们所知的物质人格一样生动，其“人格”同样丰富——事实上，在语境中更为丰富。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now, no psychological structure is easy to describe in words. Simply to explain the nature of personality as it is generally known, all kinds of terms are used: id, subconscious, ego, superego; all of these to differentiate the interweaving actions that make up the physical personality. The dreaming self is just as complicated. So you can say that certain portions of it deal with physical reality, physical manipulation, and plans; some with deeper levels of creativity and achievement that insure physical survival; some with communication, with even more extensive elements of the personality now generally unknown; some with the continuing experience and existence of what you may call the soul or overall individual entity, the true multidimensional self.
quotes.translation: 现在，任何心理结构都难以用语言描述。仅为了解释通常所知的人格本质，就使用了各种术语：本我、潜意识、自我、超我；所有这些术语都是为了区分构成物质人格的交织行动。做梦自己同样复杂。所以你可以说，它的某些部分处理物质实相、物质操控和计划；某些部分处理更深层次的创造力和成就，以确保物质生存；某些部分处理沟通，以及现在通常未知的更广泛人格元素；某些部分处理你所谓灵魂或整体个体实相、真正多维自己的持续体验和存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: According to the intensity of the situation, now, another also desirable solution may be worked out in a probable reality. On an unconscious level you are aware of your probable selves, and they of you. You share the same psychic roots, and your joint yet separate dreams are available to "all of you." This does not mean that you are dreaming someone else's dream, any more than it means that twins, for example, do. It does mean that your probable selves and you share in a body of symbolism, background, and ability. The multistructured nature of the dream state allows for dream dramas in which probable selves do appear. They may appear as symbolically representing strong characteristics upon which they have focused, though you have ignored them.
quotes.translation: 根据情境的强度，现在，另一个同样可取的解决方案可能在可能性实相中被制定出来。在无意识层面，你意识到你的可能性自己，他们也意识到你。你们共享相同的灵性根源，你们共同却又分离的梦境对“你们所有人”都是可用的。这并不意味着你在做别人的梦，就像双胞胎不会做彼此的梦一样。这确实意味着你的可能性自己和你共享一套象征、背景和能力。梦状态的多重结构允许出现可能性自己出现的梦境戏剧。他们可能象征性地代表他们专注的强烈特质，尽管你忽略了这些特质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 687
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: In your terms, consciousness of self did not develop because of any exterior circumstances in which your species won out, so to speak. In fact, that consciousness of self in any person is dependent upon the constant, miraculous cooperations that exist between the mineral, vegetable, and animal worlds.3 The inner intent always forms any exterior alteration. This applies on any scale you use. Consciousness forms the environment. The environment itself is conscious (forcefully). Atoms and molecules themselves operate in their own fields of probabilities. In their own ways, they "yearn" toward all probable developments. When they form living creatures they become a physical basis for species alteration. The body's adaptability is not simply an adjusting mechanism or quality. The cells have inner capabilities that you have not discovered. They contain within themselves memory of all the "previous" forms they have been a part of.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话说，自我意识的发展并非因为你们物种在外部环境中胜出。事实上，任何人的自我意识都依赖于矿物、植物和动物世界之间存在的持续、奇迹般的合作。内在意图总是形成任何外在改变。这适用于你使用的任何尺度。意识形成环境。环境本身是有意识的（有力地）。原子和分子本身在其自身的可能性场中运作。以它们自己的方式，它们“渴望”所有可能的发展。当它们形成生物时，它们成为物种改变的物质基础。身体的适应性不仅仅是一种调整机制或品质。细胞具有你们尚未发现的内在能力。它们自身包含它们曾参与的所有“先前”形式的记忆。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 705
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... You identify a highly evolved self-consciousness with your own species development, and with your own kind of perceptive mechanisms. You apply these as rules or conditions whenever you examine any other kind of life. In your system of probabilities there are no reptilian men or women, yet in other probabilities they do indeed exist. I mention this only to show you that the evolutionary system you recognize is but one such system. (Intently:) The physical basis rests latently within your own cellular structure, however. You think that evolution is finished. Its impetus, however, comes from within the nature of consciousness itself. It always has. In some quarters it is fashionable these days to say that man's consciousness is now an element in a new kind of evolution -- but that "new consciousness" has always been inherent. You are only now beginning to recognize its existence. Every consciousness is aware of itself as itself.5 Each consciousness, then, is self-aware. It may not be self-aware in the same way that you are. It may not reflect upon its own condition. On the other hand, it may have no need to.
quotes.translation: 给我们一点时间……你将高度进化的自我意识与你们物种的发展以及你们自己的感知机制类型等同起来。当你检查任何其他生命形式时，你将这些作为规则或条件应用。在你们的可能性系统中，没有爬虫人男女，但在其他可能性中，他们确实存在。我提到这一点只是为了向你表明，你们所认识的进化系统只是这样一个系统。（专注地：）然而，物质基础潜伏在你们自己的细胞结构中。你认为进化已经完成。但它的动力来自意识本身的本质。它一直如此。在某些领域，现在流行说人类的意识是新进化中的一个元素——但那种“新意识”一直内在于其中。你们现在才开始认识到它的存在。每个意识都意识到自己就是自己。因此，每个意识都是自我觉知的。它可能不像你们那样自我觉知。它可能不反思自己的状况。另一方面，它可能没有这个必要。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (From the 242nd session for March 16, 1966:) The ego is not the most powerful or the most knowledgeable portion of the self. It is simply a well-specialized part of the personality, fully equipped to operate under certain circumstances21 ... When those conditions no longer exist [after "death"], then other layers of the self take over the dominant position, and the personality realigns its psychological components. The ego does not disappear, however; it merely takes a back seat in some respects, as your own subconscious does during physical existence. The ego is under the control of what may loosely be called "the inner self." The survival or nonphysical personality has somewhat the same relationship to the ego as the dreaming personality has to it in physical life.
quotes.translation: （摘自1966年3月16日第242节：）自我不是自己最强大或最博学的部分。它只是人格中一个高度专门化的部分，完全装备好在特定情况下运作……当那些条件不再存在（“死后”），那么自己的其他层次接管主导地位，人格重新调整其心理成分。然而，自我不会消失；它只是在某些方面退居次要位置，就像你们在物质存在期间自己的潜意识那样。自我受所谓“内在自己”的控制。生存或非物质人格与自我的关系，有点像物质生活中做梦人格与自我的关系。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: (11:41.) These strands are like double dreams that continue. They also serve as a framework to the recognized self. In periods of stress or challenge the recognized self may sense these other strains of consciousness, and realize that a fuller experience is possible, a greater psychological thickness. On some occasions in the dream state the recognized self may then enlarge its perception enough to take advantage of these other portions of its own identity. Double or triple dreams may represent such encounters at times. Consciousness always seeks the richest, most creative form, while ever maintaining its own integrity. The imagination, playing, the arts and dreaming, allow it to enrich its activities by providing feedback other than that received in the physical environment itself.
quotes.translation: （11点41分。）这些丝线如同持续的双重梦境。它们也作为被认可自我的框架。在压力或挑战时期，被认可自我可能感知到这些其他意识流，并意识到更完整的体验是可能的，一种更大的心理厚度。在梦境状态的某些场合，被认可自我可能扩展其感知，足以利用其自身身份的其他部分。双重或三重梦境有时可能代表这样的相遇。意识总是寻求最丰富、最具创造性的形式，同时始终维持其自身的完整性。想象力、游戏、艺术和做梦，通过提供物理环境本身所接收之外的反馈，使其能够丰富其活动。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: But if the interactions between or among frameworks exist for everybody, in our terms, then as far as I'm concerned they exist for each thing as well--and I do mean the so-called "inanimate." (This isn't the place to go into it, but Seth maintains that for many reasons we arbitrarily decide what's living and nonliving.) Each reincarnational self, each counterpart self and probable self has its complement of frameworks. So does the most minute living or nonliving entity and the most gigantic. So, "probably," do most of the far-out probable realities one can imagine--for I won't go so far as to deny that some probable realities may exist without such framework structures. Strange one-dimensional "flatlands" indeed! But in each case where those framework interactions operate, they help each creation, each presence, each essence or vital principle fulfill "a larger picture that the conscious mind may not be able presently to perceive." In ways I can't even begin to describe here, all frameworks must ultimately be joined within the ineffable context of All That Is.
quotes.translation: 但如果框架之间的互动对每个人都存在，用我们的说法，那么在我看来，它们对每个事物也存在——我确实指的是所谓的"无生命物"。（这里不是深入探讨的地方，但赛斯坚持认为，由于许多原因，我们武断地决定了什么是活的、什么是非活的。）每个转世自我、每个对应自我和可能自我都有其框架的补充。最微小的有生命或无生命实体以及最庞大的实体也是如此。那么，"很可能"，人们能想象的大多数遥远的可能实相也是如此——因为我不会走得太远，以至于否认某些可能实相可能在没有这种框架结构的情况下存在。奇怪的一维"平坦之地"确实！但在每个框架互动运作的情况下，它们帮助每个创造物、每个存在、每个本质或生命原则实现"一个意识心目前可能无法感知的更大画面"。以我甚至无法在此开始描述的方式，所有框架最终必须在一切万有的不可言说语境中连接。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I don't really think we can conceive of anything to be truly "alien," though, so I use the word here only to lead into the next of Seth's larger concepts that I want to mention: that of probable realities, or probabilities, as Jane and I usually say. Not only does Seth stress the constant psychic motion of reincarnational and counterpart selves upon this earth we know--but he also tells us that each of those selves can move into other or parallel realities. I quote him from Session 681 in Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality:
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: The spontaneous self when it did escape, you see, managed to do so only under circumstances where the explosive impulses shattered their way through. In the years between there was some considerable improvement in balance. When the situations developed which we have discussed, setting off the old conflicts, again you see, then the discipline idea was short-circuited back to the old compulsive behavior, though in different form, and with the old religious connotation of self denial. The old fear of spontaneity returned, and the methodical attempt to deny subconscious impulses; the old feeling of unworthiness was also activated, and the body duly denied. Now this self denial began in the Catholic home, and he was peculiarly prone to accept it. It was part of the old Catholic training, and he fell for it under a new guise.
quotes.translation: 你看，当自发自我确实逃脱时，它只能在爆炸性冲动强行突破的情况下做到。在随后的几年里，平衡有了相当大的改善。当我们讨论过的情况发展起来，触发了旧冲突时，你看，纪律观念又被短路回旧的强迫行为，尽管形式不同，并带有旧的自我的否定宗教内涵。对自发性的旧恐惧回来了，以及有条不紊地否认潜意识冲动的尝试；旧的无价值感也被激活，身体被恰当地否定。现在，这种自我的否定始于天主教家庭，他特别容易接受它。这是旧的天主教训练的一部分，他在新的伪装下陷入了其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: He tries at times to use a schedule, a disciplined schedule as a fence against the subconscious, and becomes panic-stricken imagining himself without it. This is not to say that a schedule in itself is not good, it is to say that he can and sometimes does misuse one. In these instances the time is actually used to clamp down on the inner self, rather than to release it. These outings will be of benefit here, not only because they allow for spontaneous interaction, but because they serve to break the schedules in ways that do not disturb working hours. They provide a beginning for a habit of release. Here the ego is helping us now, for it is sticking to these plans, and the plans are those the ego itself enjoys, and can accept. He has been afraid to simply sit and think, for fear of letting the spontaneous self show without the symbolized writing mechanism.
quotes.translation: 他有时试图使用一个时间表，一个纪律性的时间表作为对抗潜意识的栅栏，并想象自己没有它而变得惊慌失措。这并不是说时间表本身不好，而是说他可以并且有时确实误用了它。在这些情况下，时间实际上被用来压制内在自我，而不是释放它。这些外出活动将对此有益，不仅因为它们允许自发互动，而且因为它们以不干扰工作时间的方式打破时间表。它们为释放习惯提供了一个开端。在这里，自我现在正在帮助我们，因为它坚持这些计划，而这些计划是自我本身享受并能接受的。他害怕只是坐着思考，因为害怕让自发自我在没有象征性写作机制的情况下显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Instead I would like to give you some more material dealing with mental enclosures. These are in some respects a different sort of camouflage, a self-formed, artificial and only partial enclosure, a beneficial psychic device within which the inner self momentarily and temporarily gathers and holds and collects as much psychic energy about it as it is capable of receiving, utilizing, and also withstanding. The mental enclosure in most cases is self-limiting then, since it represents a setting up of barriers on all sides but one. But it is limiting only for the ultimate purpose of intense concentration of energy, resulting in a burst or expansion of this energy that has been transformed and pressurized, so to speak, into new patterns.
quotes.translation: 相反，我想给你们一些更多关于心灵围场的资料。这些在某些方面是一种不同种类的伪装，一个自我形成的、人为的且只是部分的围场，一个有益的心灵装置，内在自我在其中暂时地聚集、持有和收集尽可能多的心灵能量，这些能量是它能够接收、利用并承受的。在大多数情况下，心灵围场是自我限制的，因为它代表了在所有方面但一个方面设置障碍。但它只是限制，最终目的是为了能量的强烈集中，导致这种能量被转化和加压，可以说，进入新的模式，从而爆发或扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are many other natural and spontaneous kinds of comprehension that can also result from the waking and sleeping rhythms that I have suggested. The unconscious, the color black, and death all have strongly negative connotations in which the inner self is feared; the dream state is mistrusted and often suggests thoughts of both death and/or evil. But changed wake-sleep habits can, again, bring about a transformation in which it is obvious that dreams contain great wisdom and creativity, that the unconscious is indeed quite conscious, and that in fact the individual sense of identity can be retained in the dream state. The fear of self-annihilation, symbolically thought of as death, can then no longer apply as it did before.
quotes.translation: 还有许多其他自然和自发的理解方式，也可以从我建议的清醒和睡眠节奏中产生。潜意识、黑色和死亡都有强烈的负面含义，其中内在自我被恐惧；梦境状态不被信任，并常常暗示死亡和/或邪恶的想法。但改变清醒-睡眠习惯，再次，可以带来一种转变，其中显而易见的是，梦境包含巨大的智慧和创造力，潜意识确实是相当有意识的，并且事实上，个体的身份感可以在梦境状态中保留。对自我毁灭的恐惧，象征性地被认为是死亡，然后就不能再像以前那样适用了。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Throughout the ages some have recognized the fact that there is self consciousness and purpose in certain dream and sleep states, and have maintained, even in waking life, the sense of continuity of this inner self. To such people it is no longer possible to identify completely with the ego consciousness. They are too obviously aware of themselves as more. When such knowledge is gained, the ego can accept it, for it finds to its surprise that it is not less conscious, but more conscious, that its limitations are dissipated; now it is not true, and I emphasize this strongly, that so-called unconscious material, given any freedom, will draw energy away from the egotistically organized self in a normal personality.
quotes.translation: 历代以来，有些人已认识到在某些梦境与睡眠状态中存在自我意识与目的，甚至在清醒生活中也保持着这种内在自我的连续性。对这些人而言，完全认同于自我意识已不再可能。他们太清楚地意识到自己远不止于此。当获得这种认知时，自我能够接纳它，因为它惊讶地发现自身并未变得意识薄弱，反而更加清醒，其局限得以消散；现在我要强调一点，所谓的潜意识材料，若给予任何自由，并不会从正常人格中以自我为中心组织起来的自我中抽离能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego then, is only part of a much larger self, but because consciously you do not perceive the whole self you arbitrarily make a unit from a truly indivisible identity, and call this the "I." This designation, this classification, in no way affects the nature of that indivisible self. It merely affects your own conscious attitudes. You succeed in cutting off, in theory, one portion of the self from the whole self.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我只是更广大自性的一部分，但由于你无法有意识地感知整个自性，便武断地从真正不可分割的本体中截取一个单元，称之为"我"。这种命名与分类，丝毫不会影响那个不可分割自性的本质。它仅仅影响你自己的意识态度。你在理论上成功地将自性的一部分与整体割裂开来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Limitations set upon the self are damaging to the race as a whole, and impede value fulfillment. Psychic gates are closed by parents and fences set up around the self, closing out many important possibilities of growth and fulfillment; these barriers must be broken; as mans conception of himself enlarges so will his actual capabilities and possibilities be extended. His psychic limitations are largely self-adopted.
quotes.translation: 对自性施加的限制对整个种族有害，并阻碍价值完成。父母关闭了心灵之门，在自性周围筑起围栏，排除了许多重要的成长与完成的可能性；这些障碍必须被打破。随着人类对自身认知的扩展，其实际能力与可能性也将延伸。他的心灵局限很大程度上是自我强加的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You will not remember, or want to remember, your own dreams for the same reason. Many people, therefore, tell themselves that they are very impatient to discover the nature and extent of the psyche, and cannot understand why they meet with so little success. At the same time, such beliefs convince them that the self is evil. These beliefs must be weeded out. If you cannot honestly encounter the dimensions of your creaturehood, you surely cannot explore the greater dimensions of the psyche. This blocking of associations, however, is a very important element that impedes many people. The psyche's organizations are broader, and in their way more rational than most of your conscious beliefs about the self.
quotes.translation: 出于同样的原因，你不会记得或想要记得自己的梦境。因此，许多人告诉自己他们非常渴望发现心灵的本质与范围，却无法理解为何收效甚微。同时，这种信念使他们相信自性是邪恶的。这些信念必须被根除。如果你无法诚实地面对自身生物性的维度，你必然无法探索心灵的更大维度。然而，这种联想的阻塞是阻碍许多人的重要因素。心灵的架构更为广阔，在其自身方式上比你们大多数关于自性的有意识信念更为理性。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are, and the whole self is aware of all of these realities. With no unkindness meant, you all know yourselves and your weaknesses and failures, so why should you suppose that the self you know is the only self that you are? Surely, it has occurred to you that you have abilities you are not using, that other realities connected with your innermost existence aren't being expressed in the existence you know of.
quotes.translation: 存在着——整个自性知晓所有这些实相。无意冒犯，你们都知道自己的弱点与失败，那么为何要假设你所知的自性就是你唯一的自性呢？想必你曾意识到自己拥有未运用的能力，与内在存在相关的其他实相并未在你所知的生存中表达出来。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These are unfoldings, as the inner self materializes what is already latent into physical actuality. Now there may be areas in which the inner self is simply not interested. There may be areas in which it is simply less proficient. The inner self is a developing entity, not a finished product. The whole idea of physical reality, individually speaking, is the emergence of experience within your particular system.
quotes.translation: 这些是展开的过程，内在自性将已潜藏的事物物质化为物理实相。现在，可能存在内在自性根本不感兴趣的领域。可能存在它不太擅长的领域。内在自性是一个正在发展的实体，而非成品。就个体而言，整个物理实相的概念，是在你特定系统内经验的涌现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: A man stands in the center of a room. When he looks to the right you say "This is my conscious self." When he looks to the left, we have something else again. You say "This is the dreaming self." The dreaming self, or if you will, the left-handed self, indeed is as important as the so-called conscious self. The whole self merely changes direction and viewpoint, and focuses its energies along a particular line.
quotes.translation: 一个人站在房间中央。当他向右看时，你说"这是我的意识自我"。当他向左看时，我们又看到另一种情况。你说"这是做梦的自我"。做梦的自我，或者如果你愿意，左手的自我，确实与所谓的意识自我同样重要。整个自我只是改变了方向和视角，并将其能量聚焦在特定方向上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The overall needs of the personality are always taken into consideration by what I have called in the past the inner ego. Now this portion of the self is indeed self-conscious in the highest meaning of the term--aware of the subconscious portion of the personality, aware of the primary conscious framework that you call your ego, and constantly directs the overall activities. This portion is aware of the complicated workings of the nervous system and all bodily functions. It is the overseer. It knows when to allow subconscious needs and wishes their fulfillment. It knows when to put fulfillment off for a time. It is this part of the personality that is in charge of overall stability.
quotes.translation: 人格的整体需求总是被我过去所称的内在自我所考虑。现在，自我的这一部分确实是该术语最高意义上的自我意识——意识到人格的潜意识部分，意识到你称之为自我的主要意识框架，并不断指导整体活动。这一部分意识到神经系统的复杂运作和所有身体功能。它是监督者。它知道何时允许潜意识的需求和愿望得到满足。它知道何时暂时推迟满足。正是人格的这一部分负责整体稳定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now personality, even as you know it, constantly changes, and not always in ways that are anticipated -- most often, in fact, in unpredictable ways. You insist upon focusing your attention upon the similarities that are woven through your own behavior; and upon these you build a theory that the self follows a pattern that you, instead, have transposed upon it. And the transposed pattern prevents you from seeing the self as it really is. Therefore, you also project this distorted viewpoint upon your conception of the reality of the soul. You think of the soul, therefore, in the light of erroneous conceptions that you hold regarding even the nature of your mortal selves.
quotes.translation: 现在，人格，即使如你所知，也在不断变化，而且并不总是以可预期的方式——事实上，最常见的是以不可预测的方式。你坚持将注意力集中在贯穿你自身行为的相似性上；并在此基础上建立一种理论，认为自我遵循一种模式，而实际上是你将这种模式强加于它。这种强加的模式阻止你看到自我的真实面貌。因此，你也将这种扭曲的观点投射到你对灵魂实相的概念上。因此，你根据对自己必死自我本质的错误观念来思考灵魂。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You can within them often perceive both your past and present simultaneously, but this has always been a characteristic of the whole self in any case. The whole self is not bound by any system. At various times more of the abilities of the whole self intrude, so to speak, upon the ego system. You then become conscious of action that escaped you earlier. This often occurs with the help of the dream state.
quotes.translation: 在其中，你常常能同时感知你的过去和现在，但这始终是整体自我的一个特征。整体自我不受任何系统的束缚。在不同时候，整体自我的更多能力会侵入，可以说，侵入自我系统。然后你会意识到之前逃脱你注意的行动。这通常借助梦境状态发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now (eyes open): In the same way the most infinitesimal self is infinite, and the most finite self, carried to the extremes of itself, is infinite. Each of you is part of an infinite self. That infinite self appears as a series of finite selves in your reality.
quotes.translation: 现在（睁开眼睛）：同样，最微小的自我是无限的，最有限的自我，当被推向其极端时，也是无限的。你们每个人都是一个无限自我的一部分。那个无限自我在你们的实相中表现为一系列有限的自我。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 740
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now. These probabilities, these events that may or may not occur, are extremely interesting. Let us consider our self one and time one. As a rule our self two can indeed view what may happen in self one's future. However, our self two views probabilities, and some of these probabilities will indeed occur to self one. Some will not, and this is where, again, our friends Priestley and Dunne fall short.
quotes.translation: 现在。这些可能性，这些可能发生也可能不发生的事件，非常有趣。让我们考虑自我一和时间一。通常，自我二确实可以观察自我一未来可能发生的事情。然而，自我二观察可能性，其中一些可能性确实会发生在自我一身上。有些则不会，而这正是我们的朋友普里斯特利和邓恩的不足之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The ego however is not an afterthought disconnected from the whole self, and when the intellect becomes aware of data given to it by the intuitions or the inner self, it is then capable of informing the ego, which then changes its attitude accordingly. This way we are assured of the cooperation of the whole self, and avoid any possibility of splitting one self, one part of the self, against another.
quotes.translation: 然而，自我并非与整体自体脱节的后来产物，当理智觉察到直觉或内在自体给予它的资料时，它便能告知自我，自我随之相应改变态度。如此，我们确保了整体自体的合作，并避免任何将自体的一部分与另一部分对立分裂的可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The ego would if it could, stop personality's motion and development for the security of stability. The ego would drive the personality into preconceived channels. This consciousness-of-self--I suggest hyphens between consciousness- of-self--this consciousness-of-self is seen in man as personality, as the human personality. It appears, however, in all types of consciousness to one degree or another.
quotes.translation: 自我若有可能，会为了稳定的安全感而阻止人格的运动与发展。自我会将人格驱入预设的轨道。这种自体意识——我建议在自体意识之间加连字符——这种自体意识在人类身上表现为人格，即人类人格。然而，它在各种意识类型中都或多或少地显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This actual gathering up of prime vitality for the purpose of physical construction is not however truly automatic, and it is not truly performed unconsciously. The strong self-conscious self of which I have spoken, the self-conscious self of which your own personality is not aware, this self that faces into the inner world of reality, quite consciously draws upon the vitality and stuff of what is.
quotes.translation: 这种为物质构建而聚集原始生命力的过程，实际上并非真正自动，也并非真正在无意识中进行。我所提到的那个强大的自体意识自体，那个你自身人格并未察觉的自体意识自体，这个面向内在实相世界的自体，相当有意识地汲取着存在本身的活力与素材。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is only the ego that steps from moment to moment, as a man who walks from puddle to puddle. It is only the ego who drowns in time. Therefore, since only the ego is momentarily imprisoned within the focus of your plane, it is only the ego who probes so slowly into simultaneous action, perceiving it bit by bit and sip by sip. So now you will see what I meant when I spoke about the limitless self, for the whole self is not so bound. The whole self could and does perceive a limitless number of such moment points simultaneously. And now hear this:
quotes.translation: 只有自我才会像在泥坑间行走的人那样，一步接一步地移动。只有自我才会在时间中沉溺。因此，既然只有自我暂时囚禁于你们层面的焦点中，那么也只有自我才会如此缓慢地探索同时性行动，一点一滴地感知它。所以现在你们会明白，当我谈及无限自体时是什么意思，因为整体自体并不受此束缚。整体自体能够且确实同时感知无数个这样的时刻点。现在请听好：
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This book is Seth's way of demonstrating that human personality is multidimensional, that we exist in many realities at once, that the soul or inner self is not something apart from us, but the very medium in which we exist. He emphasizes that "truth" is not found by going from teacher to teacher, church to church, or discipline to discipline, but by looking within the self. The intimate knowledge of consciousness, the "secrets of the universe," are not esoteric truths to be hidden from the people, then. Such information is as natural to man as air, and as available to those who honestly seek it by looking to the source within.
quotes.translation: 这本书是赛斯展示人类人格多维性的方式，证明我们同时存在于许多实相中，灵魂或内在自体并非与我们分离之物，而是我们存在的媒介本身。他强调"真理"并非通过从一个老师到另一个老师、从一个教堂到另一个教堂、或从一个法门到另一个法门而找到，而是通过向内审视自体。因此，对意识的亲密知识、"宇宙的奥秘"并非要隐藏于民众的秘传真理。这类信息对人类而言如同空气般自然，并且对那些诚实地向内寻求源头的人而言唾手可得。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: Now, in one sense, all selves are projections of the whole or that which is. New universes such as your own constantly come into existence. Systems and planes far different develop and in turn form other systems. Infinity has meaning only in subjective and psychic terms. The physical brain cannot contain the idea of infinity. The concept will not fit into three dimensional terms. The whole self, the inner self moves within the concept of infinity as you move within physical reality through space. Infinity contains all that will ever be known, and, of course, all that will ever be known is known within the spacious present .
quotes.translation: 现在，从某种意义上说，所有自体都是整体或存在本身的投射。像你们这样的新宇宙不断诞生。截然不同的系统与层面发展出来，并反过来形成其他系统。无限只在主观和心灵层面上才有意义。物质大脑无法容纳无限的概念。这个概念无法被纳入三维术语。整体自体、内在自体在无限的概念中移动，就像你们在物质实相中穿越空间一样。无限包含所有将被知晓的一切，当然，所有将被知晓的一切都在广袤的当下中被知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: None of these portions of the self are the whole self, obviously, and until the whole self is able to perceive its own parts simultaneously, then these seemingly separate portions of the self appear to themselves isolated to a large degree, and alone.
quotes.translation: 自我的这些部分显然都不是全部的自己，直到全部的自己能够同时感知自身的所有部分之前，这些看似分离的自我部分在很大程度上会自认为孤立且孤独。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The self grows as you use it. Its potentials always exist, on the one hand. On the other hand, if you did not utilize them they may as well not exist now, for your purposes. The whole self is being expanded, is beginning to know itself, for it always was what it will appear to be. Yet until it realizes this, its existence cannot be valid completely in terms of self knowledge or realization.
quotes.translation: 自我会随着你的使用而成长。一方面，它的潜能始终存在。另一方面，如果你不去运用它们，那么对你当前的目的而言，它们就仿佛不存在。全部的自己正在扩展，开始认识自身，因为它始终是它将呈现的样子。然而，在它意识到这一点之前，它的存在无法在自我认知或了悟方面完全有效。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Again this in no way implies an invasion of Ruburt by myself, but instead implies an extension on Ruburts part to make way for the experience. It is not a lessening of self but an extension of self, so that the self-awareness can include not only self but independent （you may call this other） self experience, to include a value that is usually lacking in your ordinary behavior patterns.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这绝不意味着我入侵了鲁柏，而是意味着鲁柏方面做出延伸，为这种体验让路。这不是自我的削弱，而是自我的扩展，使得自我意识不仅能包含自身，还能包含独立的（你可以称之为他者的）自我体验，以纳入通常在你日常行为模式中缺失的价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: An individual or a self also cannot hide from others his own basic intent. It is his and yet, though he possesses it, he still cannot prevent others from sensing it. Along these lines there is much to be said in that many intangibles, considered most secret by the self, do not remain within the self. No skin or bones or skeletal cage can keep the thought of the self from going outward.
quotes.translation: 个体或自我也无法向他人隐藏自己的基本意图。这意图属于他，尽管他拥有它，却仍无法阻止他人感知到它。沿着这些思路，有很多可说的：许多被自我视为最隐秘的无形之物，并不会停留在自我之内。没有皮肤、骨骼或骨架能阻止自我的思想向外发散。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The powers of consciousness are clearly not understood then, nor its multidimensional aspects. As I have told you, the self is literally unlimited. Each individual has his part to play in projecting these EE units into physical actuality. Therefore physical matter can be legitimately described as an extension of the self, as much as the physical body is a projection of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 显然，意识的力量及其多维面向尚未被理解。正如我告诉过你的，自我实际上是无限制的。每个个体在将这些EE单位投射为物质实相时都扮演着自己的角色。因此，物质可以被合理地描述为自我的延伸，正如物质身体是内在自我的投射一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Unfortunately, certain aspects of Christianity were stressed over others, and that dictum was based upon the belief in a wicked self that needed to be disciplined and diverted into constructive activity. The belief in such an unsavory self stops many people from any exploration of the inner self -- and, therefore, from any direct experience that will give them counter-evidence. If you are afraid of yourself, if you are afraid of your own memories, you will block your associative processes, fearing for example that they will bring to light matters best forgotten -- and usually sexual matters.
quotes.translation: 不幸的是，基督教的某些方面被过度强调，而其他方面被忽略，那句格言基于对邪恶自我的信仰——这种自我需要被约束并引导到建设性活动中。对如此不光彩的自我之信仰，阻止了许多人探索内在自我——也因此阻止了他们获得任何能提供反证的直接体验。如果你害怕自己，害怕自己的记忆，你就会阻断联想过程，例如担心它们会揭示出最好被遗忘的事情——通常是性方面的事情。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This ego in particular, and many egos, consider that the self is the ego alone. The ego considers that therefore it must maintain stability and permanence. It therefore attempts to become rigid, because it considers itself the main representative of the self. It attempts to deny the inner emotions because the changeability of these emotions would seem to threaten its own permanence. It does not want to change. Therefore any seemingly small incident will tend to bring forth the explosion of these emotions quite against the egos inclination, precisely because the ego denies them so vehemently.
quotes.translation: 这个自我，以及许多自我，都认为自我就是单独的自我。自我因此认为它必须维持稳定和永恒。它试图变得僵化，因为它视自己为自我的主要代表。它试图否认内在情绪，因为这些情绪的多变性似乎会威胁到它自身的永恒。它不愿改变。因此，任何看似微小的事件往往会引发这些情绪的爆发，完全违背自我的意愿，恰恰是因为自我如此激烈地否认它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is, momentarily, literally accepted by the personality as a part of the self, and here lies its danger. It is not just symbolically accepted, and I am not speaking in symbolic terms. The impeding action, as seen in an illness for example, is quite literally accepted by the personality structure, and by all corresponding systems, as a portion of the self. Once this occurs, a conflict instantly develops. The self does not want to give up a portion of itself, even while that portion may be painful or disadvantageous. There are many psychological reasons behind such a psychological truth.
quotes.translation: 它被人格暂时地、字面意义上地接受为自我的一部分，而危险就在这里。它不仅仅是象征性地被接受，我并非在说象征性的术语。例如，在疾病中看到的阻碍行动，确实被人格结构以及所有相应的系统字面意义上地接受为自我的一部分。一旦发生这种情况，冲突立即产生。自我不想放弃自身的一部分，即使那部分可能痛苦或不利。这种心理真相背后有许多心理原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The entity itself does not have to keep constant check on its personalities, because in each personality there is an inner self-conscious part that knows its origin. This part, for now, I will call the self-conscious beyond the subconscious. The breather and the dreamer are not so automatically controlled as it would seem. I have mentioned before that some part of you knows exactly how much oxygen the lungs breathe, and how much energy it takes to pace a floor, and this is the part of you of which I spoke. It is the part, and the self-conscious part, that receives all inner data.
quotes.translation: 本体本身不必不断检查其人格，因为在每个人格中都有一个内在的自我意识部分，知道自己的起源。这部分，我现在称之为超越潜意识的自我意识。呼吸者和做梦者并不像看起来那样自动受控。我之前提到过，你的一部分确切知道肺部呼吸了多少氧气，以及踱步需要多少能量，这就是我所说的那部分。它是接收所有内在数据的部分，也是自我意识的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The self becomes operationally scattered or divided, so that if one portion of it is attacked, the other portions can rise up in defense. Such persons use the various elements of the personality as spies or soldiers, scattering their forces (pause), and forced under those conditions to set up elaborate communication systems to keep those portions of the self in contact with each other. In times of stress, they set up an even greater isolation of one part of the self from another, which puts stress upon the system of communication, of course, so that it must be used constantly.
quotes.translation: 自我在运作上变得分散或分裂，因此如果它的一部分受到攻击，其他部分可以起来防御。这样的人将人格的各种元素用作间谍或士兵，分散他们的力量（停顿），并在那些条件下被迫建立复杂的通信系统，以保持自我的这些部分相互联系。在压力时期，他们甚至进一步隔离自我的一部分与另一部分，这当然给通信系统带来压力，以至于必须不断使用它。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: At the beginning of the notes for this 920th session I wrote that the session isn't dictation for Dreams. Yet it is, of course, since in it Seth illuminates from still another perspective his concept of value fulfillment.8 The session grew out of the encounter we had yesterday afternoon with an unexpected visitor from out of state. Seth hardly mentions the individual involved, however, but instead goes into the subject of mental illness in more inclusive terms. I see many correlations between this evening's material and that in Session 917 for Chapter 8; there, among other things, Seth had discussed the reasoning mind, the imaginative mind, and schizophrenia. That session had been triggered, at least in part, by a letter Jane had found to be quite upsetting.

quotes.text: The ego is the only part of the self that regards physical objects as anything but symbols. It is highly difficult for other parts of the self to experience the ego for this reason. The ego, while always changing, is one of the most rigid aspects of identity. To the inner self neither house nor walls exist. They are perceived only as vague self limiting ideas on the ego's part.
quotes.translation: 自我是自我中唯一将物质对象视为符号之外的部分。因此，自我的其他部分很难体验自我。自我虽然总是在变化，却是身份最僵化的方面之一。对于内在自我来说，既不存在房屋也不存在墙壁。它们只被感知为自我方面模糊的自我限制观念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Two main possibilities come to mind. One, a continued lack of acceptance of the inner self could lead to worldwide catastrophe, as the ego runs wild. Two, the inner self, restrained and denied for too long a period, could explosively overwhelm the ego so that existence in the physical field was made most difficult, since the ego is equipped to handle such manipulation. ego domination must indeed be halted, but it must be replaced with a balance between the outer and inner selves. Other matters briefly mentioned this evening will be more thoroughly discussed then also.
quotes.translation: 我想到了两种主要可能性。其一，持续不接受内在自我可能导致全球性灾难，因为自我失控。其二，被压抑和否认太久的内在自我可能爆发性地压倒自我，使得物质领域的生存变得极其困难，因为自我是处理这种操控的装备。自我的统治确实必须停止，但它必须被外在自我和内在自我之间的平衡所取代。今晚简要提到的其他事项届时也将更深入地讨论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The resulting thoughts and images in turn are expressed and affect others, and not only symbolically. As you should know, mental acts have an electromagnetic reality which directly affects the inner self, which directly forms the constantly changing nature of the inner self. For the inner self is, after all, composed of mental actions, and the entity itself is ever-changing.
quotes.translation: 由此产生的思想和影像反过来被表达并影响他人，而且不仅限于象征层面。如你所知，心智活动具有电磁实相，直接影响内在自体，并直接塑造内在自体不断变化的本质。因为内在自体终究是由心智行动所组成，而存有本身也始终在变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The cell is material in your terms. The self is not. The entity then, or greater self, is composed of souls. (Pause.) Because the body exists in space and time, the organs have specific purposes. They help keep the body alive and they must stay "in place." The entity has its existence in multitudinous dimensions, its souls free to travel within boundaries that would seem infinite to you. As the smallest cell within your body participates to its degree in your daily experience, so does the soul to an immeasurably greater extent share in the events of the entity.
quotes.translation: 以你们的说法，细胞是物质的，自体则不是。那么存有或更大的自体是由灵魂组成的。（停顿）由于身体存在于时空之中，器官具有特定功能。它们帮助维持身体存活，且必须"各就其位"。存有则存在于多重维度中，其灵魂可自由游走于对你们而言看似无限的疆界内。正如你体内最小的细胞以其程度参与你的日常经验，灵魂也以无可估量的更大程度参与存有的事件。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The book was a first attempt in forming a definite pattern of the material that he was receiving from the inner senses. He was beginning to recognize the whole self. The only reason the whole self is not much more conscious and accessible is your own stubborn refusal to admit it. I cannot emphasize this more strongly. The camouflage pattern world is formed by the mind, and I am using this now in its true term as a part of the inner world. Energy is received by the mind through the inner senses and transformed by use of mental enzymes into camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 这本书是首次尝试将他从内在感官接收的资料整理成明确模式。他开始认识整体自体。整体自体之所以未能更清醒且可触及，唯一原因就是你们固执地拒绝承认它。我无法再更强调这一点。伪装模式世界由心智形成，此刻我正用其真实含义——作为内在世界的一部分。能量通过内在感官被心智接收，并借由使用心智酵素转化为伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You originate ideas then and receive them, but you are not forced to actualize unrealized probable acts that come to you from other probable selves. Now there is a natural attraction between yourself and other probable selves, electromagnetic connections having to do with simultaneous propulsions of energy. By this I mean energy that appears simultaneously both to you and probable selves in other realities; psychic connections having to do with a uniting, sympathetic, emotional reaction and a connection that shows up very strongly in the dream state.
quotes.translation: 你既创造又接收想法，但不必被迫实现来自其他可能自体的未实现可能行动。现在你自身与其他可能自体之间存在自然吸引力，电磁连接与能量的同时推进有关。我指的是同时显现在你与其他实相中可能自体面前的能量；心灵连接则涉及统一的、同情的情绪反应，并在梦境状态中强烈显现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The potentials of the true self are so multidimensional that they cannot be expressed in one space or time. Any person who loves another recognizes the infinite potential within that other person. That potential needs infinite opportunity; the true self's reality needs an ever-new, changing situation, for each experience enriches it and, therefore, enhances its own possibilities. En masse, in your terms, the same is true of the race of man. Mama and Papa, in our analogy, represent the infinite potential within one basic unit (CU) of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 真实自体的潜能如此多维，以至于无法在单一时空表达。任何爱他人者都能认出对方内在的无限潜能。这潜能需要无限机会；真实自体的实相需要永远新颖、变化的情境，因为每个经验都丰富它，进而增强其可能性。以你们的说法，人类整体也是如此。在我们的类比中，爸爸妈妈代表意识基本单位（CU）内的无限潜能。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 695
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: In physical existence a certain portion of the inner self 's electromagnetic properties are used by the physical structure of the body. Subtle changes occur in the body when the inner self projects. This projection is not dependent upon physical life--that is, the survival of the human personality also is then not dependent upon physical survival, nor need it be supported by physical life. The electromagnetic properties simply revert to their original source with the inner self, and are no longer utilized in the construction of a corporeal image.
quotes.translation: 在物质存在中，内在自体的部分电磁属性被身体物理结构所运用。当内在自体投射时，身体会发生微妙变化。这种投射不依赖物质生命——也就是说，人格的存续也不依赖物质生存，更无需物质生命支持。电磁属性只是随内在自体回归其原始源头，不再用于构建物质形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: We are dealing here, again, merely with the various aspects of action. As a personality itself is an action gestalt, within the inner self there is a capsule comprehension of the purposes and intents of the whole personality. These are indeed within the very structure, both psychic and physical, of the personality itself. The ego, on its own as a separate unit, does not have such data, although since it is after all a portion of the whole self, it does have such information available. But when it acts as a unit it does not use such information.
quotes.translation: 我们在此再次讨论的只是行动的各种面向。由于人格本身即是一个行动完形，内在自性中便存有对整个人格目的与意图的浓缩理解。这些确实存在于人格自身的结构之中——无论是心灵结构还是物质结构。自我作为独立单元时并不拥有此类数据，尽管它终究是整体自性的一部分，确实能获取这些信息，但当它作为单元运作时，并不会运用这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: I intend to go into more material about various planes, and soon to give a comprehensive view of the inner senses and their mechanism and operation. If this is not too much for you I will add this: that the inner senses would correspond to the outer senses of the inner hidden self-conscious self, that is, separated by the subconscious from your ordinary conscious self.
quotes.translation: 我打算深入探讨关于不同层面的更多资料，并很快给出内感官及其机制与运作的全面概述。若这对你而言不算太过艰深，我将补充说明：内感官相当于内在隐藏的自我意识自性的外感官——即通过潜意识与你的普通意识自我相分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The package of experience that you can focus upon and make sense of, is indeed composed of many small packages, but the whole package of reality is actually much larger than this. There is however a portion of the self that can and does experience events in an entirely different fashion, and this portion of the self goes off on a different tangent. For when our individual perceives event X, this other portion of the self branches off, so to speak, into all the other probable events that could have been just as easily experienced by the ego.
quotes.translation: 你能够聚焦并理解的经验包裹，确实由许多小包裹组成，但实相的整体包裹实际上远大于此。然而自性中有一部分能够且确实以完全不同的方式体验事件，这部分自性会沿着不同的切线延伸。因为当我们的个体感知事件X时，自性的这一部分会分支进入所有其他可能事件——那些本可同样轻易被自我体验的事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There are selves within selves. Each self is interwound with all others, and yet each self, being composed of action, has within it the powers of action toward change, development, expansion, and the drive toward fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 自性之中存在层层自性。每个自性都与其他自性相互交织，然而每个自性既由行动构成，便内蕴着朝向改变、发展、扩张的行动力，以及趋向圆满的驱力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If you will think （I hope） for simplicity's sake of the whole self as it exists on your plane with its physical body, conscious ego and inner self as one field unit, which is also part of the larger or more complete entity as one field unit within another, then perhaps it will not be too much for you to imagine the connection, or one of the connections, between the entity field and the whole-self field, which is on your plane as being the inner senses--that is, the inner senses are one of the connectives between these two fields.
quotes.translation: 为简化起见，我希望你能将存在于你们层面的整体自性（包含其物质身体、意识自我与内在自性）视为一个场域单元，而它又是更大或更完整存有的一部分——如同嵌套在另一个场域单元中的场域单元。如此你或许不难想象存有场域与整体自性场域之间的连接（或其中之一）：在你们层面，这种连接正是内感官——即内感官是这两个场域之间的连接纽带之一。

quotes.text: Such an exercise is not some theoretical, esoteric, impractical method, but a very precise, volatile, and dynamic way of helping the present self by calming the fears of a past self. That past self is not hypothetical, either, but still exists, capable of being reached and of changing its reactions. You do not need a time machine to alter the past or the future.
quotes.translation: 这种练习并非某种理论性、深奥难解或不切实际的方法，而是一种通过安抚过去自性的恐惧来帮助当下自性的精准、灵动且充满活力的方式。那个过去自性也绝非假设性的存在，它依然存在，能够被触及并改变其反应。你无需时间机器就能改变过去或未来。
