source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: For this is a non interval to the inner self. This material is extremely important. One portion of you leaves the inner self to explore in depth a particular non interval. To the inner self no time passes. You experience of course physical time. This non interval however creates its own interval points that you also explore, in your dreams and waking projections that escape your ordinary consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因为对内在自体而言这是一个非间隔。这个材料极其重要。你的一部分离开内在自体去深入探索一个特定的非间隔。对内在自体而言没有时间流逝。你当然体验物理时间。然而这个非间隔创造了它自己的间隔点，你在梦境和逃离普通意识的醒时投射中也探索这些间隔点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The whole self as you know has its existence in uncamouflaged energy, and is therefore capable of the assimilation of knowledge in so far as it can, if it chooses, be basically unaffiliated to any one camouflage dimension or perspective. In actual practice this takes a supreme development, but even for general purposes the inner self retains a freedom from camouflage perspectives, and is aware in varying degrees of other perspectives, and of its existence outside of them.
quotes.translation: 你所知的整个自己存在于未经伪装的能量中，因此能够吸收知识——若它选择如此，它基本上可以不受任何单一伪装维度或视角的束缚。在实际运作中，这需要极高的发展，但即便为了一般目的，内在自己仍保有脱离伪装视角的自由，并在不同程度上觉察到其他视角，以及自身在这些视角之外的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It then does not reincarnate again upon that plane. However because of its own extraordinary nature, it itself forms with the inner self in an added gestalt, adding to the energy and ability of the inner self; and in a manner which I cannot yet explain to you, it voluntarily may give up its ego identification to a large degree for the purpose of giving its full energies to the store of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 它随后不会在那个层面再次转世。然而，由于其非凡的本性，它自身与内在自己形成一种附加的完形，增强了内在自己的能量与能力；并且以一种我尚无法向你解释的方式，它可能自愿在很大程度上放弃其自我认同，以便将其全部能量奉献给内在自己的库存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: If you use psychological time as I have told you, you will get immediate firsthand experience of many facets of reality which take me pages to explain with the indirect use of words. All entities basically are self-aware portions of energy or vitality. They are self-generating and there is no possibility of thinking in terms of either beginning or end. Again, it is only your own camouflage- imprisoned data which makes you think that everything has a beginning and an end.
quotes.translation: 若你按我告诉你的方式运用心理时间，你将直接亲身体验到现实的许多面向，而我需要用数页篇幅以间接的文字来解释。所有本体基本上都是能量或生命力的自我觉知部分。它们是自我生成的，不存在以开始或结束来思考的可能性。再次强调，唯有你自身受伪装束缚的数据，才让你认为万物皆有始有终。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is no particular and definite line between the ego and the personality and the inner self. They must merely be discussed in such terms. There is, believe it or not, no particular and specific and definite boundary between what is self and not self. If we isolate such portions of reality for the sake of discussion, such isolation is artificial, and in no way affects the nature of reality itself.
quotes.translation: 自我、人格与内在自己之间并无明确界线。它们只是必须用此类术语来讨论。信不信由你，自我与非自我之间并无特定、具体且明确的边界。若我们为讨论之便而孤立现实的此类部分，这种孤立是人为的，绝不会影响现实本身的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Communications exist between all portions of the self, and all parts of the personality; or parts of the whole self, rather, operate as what you may call a supraself. Ruburt has referred to this as a supraconsciousness. This is the identity, the whole identity, of the various portions of the self that operate within various systems. To this supraself, of course, your ego future can be easily viewed.
quotes.translation: 自己的所有部分以及人格的所有部分之间都存在沟通；或者说，整个自己的各部分，是以你所谓的超我运作的。鲁柏将此称为超意识。这就是身份——在各种系统中运作的自己各部分的整体身份。对于这个超我而言，你的自我未来当然可以轻易被看见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It does originate in the inner self that exists in your world, but is not of your world. The inner self-conscious ego as I have said--and this is for Philip's edification--the inner self-conscious ego can be compared to another face, looking out upon a different world. And yet it is the driving personality and force in your world, and you use its energy as you construct your camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 它确实源于存在于你世界中的内在自己，却不属于你的世界。内在自己有意识的自我——正如我所说，这是为了菲利普的启迪——内在自己有意识的自我可比拟为另一张面孔，正望向一个不同的世界。然而，它是在你世界中驱动的人格与力量，而你在构建伪装模式时，正是运用它的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In each dimension the inner self begins to handle further aspects of reality. The primary personality must therefore deal with a much larger number of perceptions, while still maintaining its identity. It manipulates in a larger number of dimensions, until it is able you see to handle many, not just one, of its own egos at any given "time"--and you may put time in quotes--while still maintaining its own inner stability and individuality. It takes on more roles, you see, and the psychological structure becomes more complicated as the inner self becomes sure enough of itself to admit ever more stimuli, while still retaining its own core.
quotes.translation: 在每个维度中，内在自体开始处理实相的进一步面向。因此，主要人格必须处理数量大得多的感知，同时仍维持其身份。它在更多维度中运作，直到它能够处理许多——而不仅是一个——它自己的自我，在任何给定的"时间"（你可以把时间加上引号），同时仍维持它自己的内在稳定性和个体性。它承担更多角色，你看，随着内在自体对自己变得足够确信，以接纳越来越多的刺激，同时仍保留其核心，心理结构变得更加复杂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Once before, in the first and 18th envelope experiments, an object was used that was similar but not identical by any means. In the first experiment in the 179th session, Seth came through with one accurate impression. In the 18th experiment, held during the 212th session, a few more impressions were obtained; but overall the results were interfered with by other factors in a way that doesn't seem to happen these days. See Session 179 in Volume 4, and Session 212 in Volume 5.

quotes.text: The individual self is, therefore, literally a part of what would seem to be completely different objects. In a shorthand you could say that the self is the object which he contemplates, since indeed he constructed the object to begin with from the self.
quotes.translation: 因此，个体自体确实是看似完全不同的客体的一部分。简而言之，你可以说自体是他所沉思的客体，因为他确实从自体开始构建了那个客体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Because you have very limited ideas of what logic is, it seems to you that the dreaming self is not critical, or "logical"; yet it works with amazing discrimination, sifting data, sending some to certain portions of the body, and structuring memory. Sleeping pills also impede the critical functions of dreams that are so often overlooked. The facts are that dreams involve high acts of creativity. These are not only intuitively based, but formed with a logic far surpassing your ideas of that quality. These creative acts are then fitted together through associative processes that come together most precisely to form the dream events.
quotes.translation: 因为你对逻辑有非常有限的概念，所以对你来说，做梦的自体似乎没有批判性，或"符合逻辑"；然而它运作时带着惊人的辨别力，筛选数据，将一些发送到身体的某些部分，并构建记忆。安眠药也阻碍了梦的批判功能，而这些功能常常被忽视。事实是，梦涉及高度的创造行为。这些不仅基于直觉，而且以一种远远超越你对那种品质的概念的逻辑形成。然后，这些创造行为通过联想过程被组合在一起，这些过程最精确地汇聚起来，形成梦的事件。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Projection from a dream state is something else again, therefore, and when it is executed successfully then you have a fine example of the self as it changes the focus of its own awareness. Here the critical consciousness is quite apparent, while the body sleeps. Projections occur quite naturally under these conditions. For the development of the whole self however, and for the perfection of such experiences, it is beneficial that such projections be carried out by the conscious wish of the projector. You learn therefore to manipulate your own consciousness in different realities than the ones with which you are usually concerned.
quotes.translation: 因此，从梦境投射又是另一回事，当它成功执行时，你就有了自体改变其意识焦点的绝佳例子。在这里，批判性意识相当明显，而身体在睡眠。投射在这些条件下自然发生。然而，为了整个自体的发展，以及为了此类体验的完善，由投射者有意识地意愿来执行这些投射是有益的。因此，你学会在不同的实相中操控你自己的意识，而不仅仅是你通常关心的那些。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: When I speak in terms of counterparts, then, or of reincarnational selves and probable selves, I am saying that in the true symphony of your being you are violins, oboes, cymbals, harps -- in other words, you are a living instrument through which you play yourself. You are not an instrument upon which you are played. You are the composer and the symphony. You play ballads, classical pieces, lyrics, operas. One creative performance does not contradict the others.
quotes.translation: 因此，当我谈到对应体，或转世自体与可能自体时，我是在说，在你存在的真正交响乐中，你是小提琴、双簧管、钹、竖琴——换句话说，你是一个活生生的乐器，通过它你演奏你自己。你不是一个被演奏的乐器。你是作曲家和交响乐。你演奏民谣、古典乐曲、抒情曲、歌剧。一个创造性的表演并不与其他表演相矛盾。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It is possible to treat such disorders from a chemical standpoint, as is sometimes being done, but the acquired artificial chemical balance will in most cases not be maintained, because the inner self, the deep subconscious, has not been signaled that an error is being made. Ideally of course such an error should not occur. There are also reasons why the deep subconscious has allowed such difficulties to come about, and in most cases the basic reason here is a lack of understanding and communication between the various portions of the self, so that seemingly the left hand does not know what the right hand is doing.
quotes.translation: 从化学角度处理这类失调是可能的，就像有时所做的那样，但在大多数情况下，获得的人造化学平衡将无法维持，因为内在自体——深层潜意识——没有被信号告知正在犯错误。当然，理想情况下，这种错误不应发生。深层潜意识允许这些困难出现也有其原因，在大多数情况下，根本原因是自体各个部分之间缺乏理解和沟通，以至于看似左手不知道右手在做什么。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now my relationship with you [and Ruburt] is indeed a strange one, since you do not relate to me as you do to each other. The -- I hope -- delightfully human egotistical characteristics that I show help calm your fears and show you that the self as you think of it continues to exist [after physical death]. I have a reservoir of personality banks upon which I can draw, and as a teacher I use the one that is most effective in any given system of reality; this is the one I use here. It is a portion of myself that is the most closely connected with earthly existence, and it is a self that I liked very well, indeed.
quotes.translation: 我与你们（和鲁柏）的关系确实奇特，因为你们不会像彼此相处那样与我互动。我展现的那些——但愿是——讨喜的人性自负特质，能缓解你们的恐惧，并让你们明白，你们所认知的自我（在肉体死亡后）仍会继续存在。我拥有一个可调取的人格银行库，作为教师，我会在特定实相系统中选用最有效的那一个；此刻我在此处使用的正是这个。这是我与尘世存在关联最密切的那部分自我，也是我非常喜爱的一个自我。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This should lead you to understand why physical time is basically meaningless to the subconscious, and why the inner self has at its command a knowledge of past lives and past endeavors; for the inner self, dear friends, these lives are not in the past, nor is the life of the ego necessarily present to the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这应能让你理解为何物理时间对潜意识而言基本毫无意义，以及为何内在自我能掌握前世与过往努力的认知；因为亲爱的朋友们，对内在自我而言，这些生命并非存在于过去，而小我的生命也未必是全体自我所认知的"当下"。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In many respects it is a reflector, the surface of the self looking outward. While this is necessary, the whole remainder of the self could not be left to an organizer or caretaker who did not focus his attentions within the depths but sat, as it were, on the front porch of the house, leaving the inner workings unattended. The outer ego does not want to meet the inner ego. The outer ego does not want to admit the existence of the inner ego. As the eye cannot see its own pupil without a mirror, so the outer ego could not even see itself, were it not that the inner ego hides in the depths of all reflections.
quotes.translation: 从许多方面来看，它是一面反射镜，是自我向外张望的表层。虽然这有其必要性，但自我的其余部分不能交给一个不专注内在深处、反而像坐在房屋前廊般忽视内在运作的管理者或看护者。外在自我不愿与内在自我相遇。外在自我不愿承认内在自我的存在。正如没有镜子眼睛就看不见自己的瞳孔，若非内在自我潜藏于所有反射的深处，外在自我甚至无法看见自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Another thing. It is in some ways convenient that you are not consciously aware of each breath that you take. But it is sheer stupidity to ignore the inner self which does the breathing, and is aware of the mechanics involved. What you almost get here is that some little unknown self performs these necessary functions, and that is not the case. I have said that the mind is a part of the inner world, but you have access to your own minds which you ignore, and this access would lead you inevitably to the truths about the physical world. Working inward you could understand the outward so much more clearly.
quotes.translation: 另一件事。从某些角度看，你未能有意识地觉察每次呼吸反而方便。但若忽视那个实际进行呼吸、并知晓其运作机制的内在自我，便是十足的愚昧。你几乎会误以为某个未知的小我在执行这些必要功能——事实并非如此。我曾说过，心智是内在世界的一部分，但你们本可触及却被忽视的自身心智，这种触及必将引领你们发现物质世界的真相。向内探索，你便能更清晰地理解外在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It isn't what you see, and yet what you see is it. Sight itself is it, the thing seen and the perceiver. You cannot stop action even in your mind, for the attempt to stop action is in itself an action. What you term death is an action. It is not the end of acts. The self at death is indeed more active as a rule than before, and the resources of the self are used to greater advantage.
quotes.translation: 它并非你所见之物，然而你所见即是它。视觉本身即是它，所见之物与感知者皆是它。你甚至无法在思维中停止行动，因为停止行动的尝试本身即是行动。你们所谓的死亡是一种行动，并非行动的终结。死亡时的自我通常比生前更为活跃，且能更有效地运用自身资源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: Now all of this certainly sounds unscientific to many people, yet most of my readers have already picked up a different version of the nature of science, or they would not be reading this book to begin with. The private oracle: What does that mean? And what does it have to do with the unknown reality? More, what does it have to do with the practical world? The private oracle is the voice of the inner multidimensional self -- the part of each person not fully contained in his or her personhood, the part of the unknown self-structure out of which personhood, with its physical alliance, springs. Basically that portion of the psyche is outside of space and time, while enabling you to operate in it.4 It deals intimately with probabilities -- (louder:) the source of all predictable action.
quotes.translation: 这一切对许多人而言当然显得极不科学，但我的多数读者早已对科学的本质持有不同见解，否则他们根本不会开始阅读这本书。私密神谕：这究竟意味着什么？它与未知实相有何关联？更进一步说，它与现实世界有何关联？私密神谕是内在多维自我的声音——是每个人未被完全纳入人格的那部分，是未知自我结构的一部分，人格及其物质联盟正是从中涌现。本质上，心灵的那部分存在于时空之外，同时使你得以在其中运作。它密切处理着可能性——（更大声地：）所有可预测行动的源头。

quotes.text: Now: There are basically no limitations to the self, and all portions of the self are connected -- so the probable selves are aware, unconsciously, of their relationships.
quotes.translation: 现在：自体基本上没有限制，自体的所有部分都是相连的——所以可能的自体在无意识中知道它们的关系。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Consciousness cannot be separated from mobility. It is true that you focus within the physical system mainly, yet the inner self is highly mobile and embarks simultaneously upon a variety of projections. The closest example in your experience of this mobility is the dream situation. These dreams make little impression upon the waking consciousness unless you train it and take it with you as far as it can go. It is then able to translate the dream reality at least in part. In the psychedelic experience the ego can be trained to act in the same manner. Later it can serve as an interpreter.
quotes.translation: 意识无法与移动性分离。诚然，你主要聚焦于物质系统内，然而内在自体具有高度移动性，并同时进行各种投射。在你经验中，这种移动性最接近的例子是梦境情境。这些梦境对清醒意识影响甚微，除非你训练它，并尽可能带着它前进。它至少能部分翻译梦境实相。在迷幻体验中，自我可以被训练以同样方式运作。之后它可以充当翻译者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner self chooses from its available potential personalities the one that it finds most adequate. Sometimes it simply makes an error, for the inner self is not a perfected thing, any more than the ego is. But identity does exist, and the ego is but a pseudo identity formed for utilitarian reasons, and as such it is of course a part of the basic identity from which it springs.
quotes.translation: 内在自体从其可用的潜在人格中选择它认为最合适的一个。有时它只是犯了个错误，因为内在自体并非完美之物，正如自我也不是。但身份确实存在，而自我不过是为实用目的形成的伪身份，因此它当然是从其源出的基本身份的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Obviously the self that engages upon this study is not the waking normal consciousness, which becomes instead part of that which is studied, so another portion of the self is brought into activity. All of these exercises provide training that helps you in all your other work. This particular exercise however definitely requires some success in the recognition of dream projections.
quotes.translation: 显然，从事这项研究的自体并非清醒的正常意识，后者反而成为被研究的一部分，因此自体的另一部分被带入活动。所有这些练习都提供训练，帮助你在所有其他工作中。然而，这个特定练习确实需要在识别梦境投射方面取得一些成功。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: "I hope to finish our book (Dreams) regardless of your publishing plans and so forth, and at this general point that will be beneficial to our friend as he sees some daily accomplishment made in that area. (Long pause.) I want Ruburt to see, however, that healing is taking place, that he can trust his own mind and body, and that all portions of the self are being dealt with, whether or not such is obvious at any given time. Our material on such points is not fiction. Unfortunately, in your society you need every good suggestion you can get, to offset fears and negative conditioning.
quotes.translation: "我希望完成我们的书（《梦》），无论你的出版计划如何等等，在这个大致节点上，这对我们的朋友会有益，因为他看到在那个领域每天都有进展。（长停顿。）然而，我希望鲁柏看到，疗愈正在发生，他可以信任自己的心智和身体，并且自体的所有部分都在被处理，无论在任何特定时间是否明显。我们在这些点上的资料并非虚构。不幸的是，在你的社会中，你需要每一个你能得到的好建议，以抵消恐惧和负面制约。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 7. In Chapter 2 of Dreams, in Volume 1, see Note 1 for Session 885, which we held on October 24, 1979. Through a series of misunderstandings, the people at Ankh-Hermes had published an abridged translation of Seth Speaks without having permission for the cutting from Jane and me. We still feel regret that the company had to go to all of that extra expense in order to publish a second edition of the book. I also wrote that "all concerned must wait for at least another year before a full-length version of Seth Speaks will be published in the Dutch language." Actually, almost two years passed before we received our copies of the new edition.

quotes.text: (Slowly:) The part of Augustus who felt powerful and alien became personified. When Augustus felt threatened then the conscious mind switched over, accepting as operating procedure the system of beliefs in which Augustus saw himself as all-powerful, secure -- but as alien. This part of his beliefs, therefore, and this particular self-image, took over his conscious mind and became what we will here call Augustus Two. When Augustus Two assumed leadership then the physical body itself was not only strong and powerful, but capable of physical feats far surpassing those of Augustus One.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）奥古斯都中感到强大和疏离的部分被拟人化了。当奥古斯都感到威胁时，意识心便切换，接受奥古斯都视自己为全能、安全——但疏离的信念系统作为运作程序。因此，他信念的这一部分，以及这个特定的自我形象，接管了他的意识心，并成为我们在此称为奥古斯都二的部分。当奥古斯都二担任领导时，身体本身不仅强壮有力，而且能够完成远超奥古斯都一的体能壮举。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Action accepts all stimuli in an affirmative manner. It is only when action becomes compartmented, so to speak, in the development of highly differentiated consciousness, that such refinement occurs. I am not here saying that unpleasant stimuli will not be felt as unpleasant, and reacted against, by less self-conscious organisms. I am saying that less self-conscious organisms will rejoice even in their automatic reaction against such stimuli, because any stimuli and reaction represents sensation, and sensation is another method by which such action knows and expresses itself.
quotes.translation: 行动以肯定的态度接纳所有刺激。只有当行动在高度分化意识的发展过程中被分割成不同区块时，这种精炼才会发生。我并非说较不具自我意识的生物不会感受到不愉快刺激并产生抗拒反应。我要说的是，即使在对这类刺激的自动反应中，较不具自我意识的生物也会感到喜悦，因为任何刺激与反应都代表着感知，而感知正是这种行动认识并表达自身的另一种方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Quite simply, the self travels to levels of awareness, and to layers of the self that are far divorced from the physical areas of mobility. The muscles are lax because activity of a physical nature is not required for the physical organism. Actions are indeed being carried on, and actions which would be considered physical if the body was moving, and if the individual were awake. These actions, walking, talking, working, any conceivable dream action, these require energy. The energy that is not being expended within the physical system is used to sustain these mental actions.
quotes.translation: 简单来说，自我会旅行至意识的不同层次，以及远离物质活动领域的自我层面。肌肉松弛是因为物质有机体不需要进行物质性质的活动。实际上行动确实在进行着——如果身体在移动、如果个体处于清醒状态，这些行动就会被视为物质性的。这些行动——行走、交谈、工作、任何可想象的梦境行动——都需要能量。未在物质系统中消耗的能量，被用来维持这些心智行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: (Most emphatically:) In terms of time only, there is an archaeological meaning that is hidden within your own nature. To discover it you look "down" through the levels of your own being, there to find the layers of selfhood that in your world represent the past history of yourself, from which you emerged. You are not those selves psychically, however, any more than you are your mother's or your father's in physical terms. You are as different from those reincarnational selves, therefore, as you are from your parents, though you share certain backgrounds and characteristics.
quotes.translation: （极其强调地：）仅就时间而言，你们自身本质中隐藏着一种考古学意义。要发现它，你们必须"向下"审视自身存在的各个层面，在那里找到代表你们世界历史中自我过往的各个层次——你们正是从这些层次中浮现出来的。然而在心灵层面，你们并非那些自我，正如在物质层面你们并非父母。因此，你们与那些转世自我的差异，就如同与父母的差异一样大，尽管你们共享某些背景与特质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 727
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The multiplicity of human experience would be impossible were it not for the inner self, and for the heritage that speaks through the cells of every human being. The perspectives and psychic relationships that make up the human personality simply could not have resulted through action within your field alone. It cannot be stressed too strongly that experience within the self can lead to at least some understanding of the nature of action in its pure form, for within your physical universe action is to some extent frozen, in so far as your perceptions of it are concerned.
quotes.translation: 若非内在自我，以及通过每个人细胞发声的传承，人类经验的多样性将不可能存在。构成人格的视角与心灵关系，绝不可能仅通过你们领域内的行动产生。必须再三强调：对自我内在经验的探索，至少能让人对纯粹形式的行动本质有所理解，因为在你们的物质宇宙中，就你们对行动的感知而言，行动在某种程度上是冻结的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Consciousness is a way of perceiving the various dimensions of reality. Consciousness as you know it is highly specialized. The physical senses allow you to perceive the three-dimensional world, and yet by their very nature they can inhibit the perception of other equally valid dimensions. Most of you identify with your daily physically oriented self. You would not think of identifying with one portion of your body and ignoring all other parts, and yet you are doing the same thing (smile) when you imagine that the egotistical self carries the burden of your identity.
quotes.translation: 意识是感知实相各个维度的一种方式。你们所知的意识是高度专业化的。物质感官让你们能够感知三维世界，但正是其本质特性，反而会抑制对其他同样有效维度的感知。你们大多数人认同于日常以物质为导向的自我。你们不会想到只认同身体某部分而忽略其他部分，但（微笑）当你们想象自我化的自我承载着你们身份的重担时，你们正在做同样的事。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is an involvement that would seem, would seem, intense. The ego appears to be extremely intense, but to a large degree this is a deception, for the intenseness is caused by the attempt of the ego not to become involved with action, unless the ego can dominate action. There is no basic trust of the inner self. The personality does not basically recognize or trust the ability of the inner self, and this results in an intense inhibited fear.
quotes.translation: 存在一种看似、看似强烈的涉入。自我看似极其强烈，但这在很大程度上是一种欺骗，因为这种强烈感源于自我试图不涉入行动——除非自我能主导行动。内在自我缺乏基本信任。人格基本上不承认或不信任内在自我的能力，这导致了强烈的压抑性恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The dramas themselves do express certain inner realities, and they serve as surface reminders to those who do not trust direct experience with the inner self. They will take the symbols as reality. When they discover that this is not so, they feel betrayed. Christ spoke in terms of the father and son because in your terms, at that time, this was the method used -- the story he told to explain the relationship between the inner self and the physically-alive individual. No new religion really startles anyone, for the drama has already been played subjectively.
quotes.translation: 戏剧本身确实表达了某些内在实相，它们为那些不信任与内在自我直接体验的人提供了表面提醒。这些人会把象征当作实相。当他们发现事实并非如此时，便感到被背叛。基督用父与子的关系来讲述，因为在你们那个时代，这是惯用的方法——他通过故事来解释内在自我与肉身个体之间的关系。没有哪个新宗教真正令人震惊，因为这场戏剧早已在主观层面被演绎过了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The self goes on. Even the stuff of the physical body however continues to act. Action divides itself into various selves, and then explores the moment points of experience, for each new self is indeed a new action, an original act.
quotes.translation: 自我持续存在。即使物质身体的结构也在不断运作。行动将自己分割成不同的自我，然后探索经验的瞬间点，因为每个新自我确实是一个新的行动，一个原创的行为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: Death simply does not exist to the whole personality. Only the physically oriented portions of the self accept this as a finality. (Long pause.) Whenever you use abilities that to you seem supernormal, you are drawing upon the ability of the supraself. It is the whole I and yet more than the sum of its parts. It is action highly aware, and quite able to change its components. It consists also of course of the probable selves of which we have spoken, and it unites and directs infinitely larger portions of action than possible for the physical personality.
quotes.translation: 对整体人格而言，死亡根本不存在。只有自我中面向物质的部分才将死亡视为终结。（长停顿）每当你运用那些对你而言看似超常的能力时，你都在调用超我（supraself）的能力。它是完整的“我”，却又超越其各部分的总和。它是高度觉察的行动，能够轻易改变其组成部分。它当然也包含我们曾讨论过的可能性自我，并统合与引导着远超物质人格所能掌控的更大行动部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In your daily physical life you are usually concerned simply with changing your beliefs about yourself, and then changing the beliefs others hold about you. You will find conflicting beliefs within yourself and you must become aware of these. As an example, you may believe that you want to understand the nature of your inner self -- you may tell yourself you want to remember your dreams, but at the same time still hold a belief in the basic unworthiness of the self, and be quite frightened of remembering your dreams because of what you might find there.
quotes.translation: 在日常物质生活中，你通常只关心改变自己对自我的信念，然后改变他人对你的信念。你会在自身中发现相互冲突的信念，必须意识到这些。举例来说，你可能相信自己想了解内在自我的本质——你告诉自己希望记住梦境，但同时仍持有自我根本无价值的信念，并因害怕在梦中可能发现什么而恐惧记梦。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The topmost layer of the subconscious contains predominantly present associations, but in these are mixed and interwoven associations which have their origin elsewhere. These may be called self-unifying associations, since merely by their presence in the uppermost layers of the subconscious they provide a unifying sense of psychic continuity; of which however the ego is not aware. For one thing, there are basic similarities between an individual's personality in various existences, so that quite naturally many associations of the same nature will arise.
quotes.translation: 潜意识的最表层主要包含当下的联想，但这些联想中混杂交织着源于其他层面的关联。这些可称为自我统合性联想，仅凭它们存在于潜意识最表层，就提供了心理连续性的统合感；然而自我对此并无觉察。一方面，个体在不同存在中的人格存在基本相似性，因此相同性质的联想自然会大量涌现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: But you have on a subconscious level all the knowledge and experience of your previous selves upon which to build. Your dreams are free from the restrictions imposed by your ego, and your dreams affect your daily life much more than you know. For situations appear in them that affect your actions, and these are elements from your own previous selves. This is a large subject; but though I can tell you some things about your future, the future is not predestined, and subconsciously you are well aware yourself of what will happen, and all human beings are.
quotes.translation: 但在潜意识层面，你拥有所有前世自我的全部知识与经验作为构建基础。你的梦境不受自我施加的限制，而梦对你日常生活的影响远超你的认知。因为梦中出现的境遇会影响你的行为，这些元素来自你自身的前世自我。这是个庞大的主题；虽然我能告诉你一些关于未来的事，但未来并非注定，而你在潜意识中早已清楚将会发生什么——所有人类皆是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You are meant to understand the nature of your inner self, and to manifest it outward. As this is done, the exterior circumstances should change for the better as the inner self becomes more aware of its own nature and capabilities. Theoretically, then, in each life you would become stronger, healthier, wealthier, and wiser, but it does not work that way, for many reasons. As mentioned earlier, many personalities adopt different kinds of experiences, focusing upon development in certain specific areas, and ignoring others perhaps for a series of lives.
quotes.translation: 你本应了解内在自我的本质，并将其向外显化。当这得以实现时，外在环境会随着内在自我更清楚认识自身本质与能力而渐入佳境。理论上，每一世你都会变得更强健、更健康、更富足、更智慧，但实际运作并非如此，原因众多。如前所述，许多人格会采用不同经验，专注于特定领域的发展，而可能忽略其他领域达数世之久。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It acts upon itself, being action. The inner self also changes, but it is also that which changes itself. We come now close to a definition finally for the entity, which cannot really be defined, because in your terms it escapes definition. However, the entity can be partially defined as the sum of all the selves within a given range of action, the simultaneous totality which on the one hand then cannot yet exist, since action can never complete itself, yet representing that impetus forever frustrated on the part of action for complete materialization.
quotes.translation: 它作用于自身，因其本质即是行动。内在自我也会改变，但它同时也是改变自身者。现在我们终于接近对存有的定义——这个定义实则无法真正界定，因为以你们的术语而言，它超越了定义范畴。然而，存有可被部分定义为特定行动范围内所有自我的总和，是同时性的整体——这个整体一方面尚不存在（因行动永无止境），另一方面又代表着行动在完全物质化过程中永远受挫的驱动力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. Some of the information that I gave you in our last session, concerning the portions of the self, seem rather alien, I am sure. Do not forget however that you are not even aware of many portions of the self that you know intellectually do exist. So it is not so strange to imagine other portions of the self with which you are not at all familiar in any conscious way.
quotes.translation: 在上次课程中，我提供的关于自我各部分的某些信息，想必对你们而言相当陌生。但请勿忘记，你们甚至对理智上确知存在的自我诸多部分都毫无觉察。因此，想象那些你们在任何意识层面都全然陌生的自我部分，其实并不奇怪。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: What was needed was a highly focused, precisely tuned physical self that could operate efficiently in a space and time scheme that was being formed along with physical creatures--a self, however, that in one way or another must be supported by realms of information and knowledge of a kind that was basically independent of time and space. A knowledge indispensable, and yet a knowledge that could not be allowed to distract the physical focus.
quotes.translation: 所需的是一个高度聚焦、精准调校的肉身自我，能在与物质生物同步形成的时空架构中高效运作——但这个自我，必须以某种方式获得本质上独立于时空的信息与知识领域的支撑。这是不可或缺的知识，却又是绝不能分散物质焦点注意力的知识。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Looked at merely as an example of unconscious production, however, Seth's book clearly shows that organization, discrimination, and reasoning are certainly not qualities of the conscious mind alone, and demonstrates the range and activity of which the inner self is capable. I do not believe that I could get the equivalent of Seth's book on my own. The best I could do would be to hit certain high points, perhaps in isolated poems or essays, and they would lack the overall unity, continuity, and organization that Seth has here provided automatically.
quotes.translation: 然而，仅将赛斯书视为无意识产物的范例来看，它清楚显示组织、辨别与推理绝非意识心独有的特质，并展现了内在自我所能达到的范畴与活动力。我相信自己无法独立写出赛斯书的同等作品。我最多只能触及某些高点——或许在零散的诗作或散文中——但它们会缺乏赛斯在此自动提供的整体统一性、连贯性与组织性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: Only when a certain level of confidence is reached can the outer ego afford to become familiar with these inner workings, at least on your plane. Otherwise you would falter. As a rule, even though the whole self is capable of organizing the data from all of the inner senses, the subconscious can rarely receive such communications full blast; and the outer ego, concerned as it is with camouflage pattern, and really born to deal with camouflage pattern, simply could not stand the shock of realization that a complete set of inner senses would bring.
quotes.translation: 唯有达到某种程度的信心时，外在自我才能承受熟悉这些内在运作的过程——至少在你们的层面上是如此。否则你们会踉跄失足。通常而言，即使整个自我有能力组织所有内在感官的数据，潜意识也极少能全盘接收这类讯息；而专注于伪装模式、且生来就是处理伪装模式的外在自我，根本无法承受完整内在感官系统所揭示的真相带来的冲击。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: So should man's ego be. When man's ego turns instead into a shell, when instead of interpreting outside conditions it reacts too violently against them, then it hardens, becomes an imprisoning form that begins to snuff out important data, and to keep enlarging information from the inner self. The purpose of the ego is protective. It is also a device to enable the inner self to inhabit the physical plane. It is in other words a camouflage.
quotes.translation: 人的自我也应如此。当人的自我反而变成一层外壳，当它非但不去诠释外在条件，反而对它们反应过度激烈时，它就会硬化，变成一种禁锢的形式，开始扼杀重要的资料，并不断屏蔽来自内在自我的扩展信息。自我的目的是保护性的。它也是一种让内在自我能够栖身于物质层面的装置。换言之，它是一种伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You are either conscious of self or you are not. On your plane self-consciousness exists as a rule. A tree is conscious of itself as a tree. It does not think of itself as a rock. A dog knows it is not a cat. What I am trying to point out to you here is this supreme egotistical presumption that self-consciousness must of necessity involve humanity per se. It does not.
quotes.translation: 你要么拥有自我意识，要么没有。在你们的层面上，自我意识通常存在。一棵树意识到自己是一棵树。它不会认为自己是一块岩石。一条狗知道它不是一只猫。我在这里想向你们指出的是，这种极端的自我中心假设——即自我意识必然涉及人类本身——是错误的。事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This requires on the egos part an excellent ability to perceive correctly the elements of the physical situation, to express it in terms that the subconscious can understand, and to deliver the message properly. The subconscious will then break the physical data given to it down into its psychic components, translate it into symbols; and the inner self, at the request of the subconscious, will then focus all of the energies at its command to deliver the most acceptable solution, taking the entire needs of the whole self into consideration.
quotes.translation: 这要求自我具备卓越的能力，能够正确感知物质情境中的要素，以潜意识能够理解的方式表达出来，并恰当地传递信息。然后，潜意识会将接收到的物质资料分解为其灵性成分，将其转化为象征符号；接着，内在自我应潜意识之请，会调动其所能支配的所有能量，在考虑整个自我的全部需求后，给出最可接受的解决方案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is actually a field, that is energy field, boundary. It protects the inner self by acting as a barrier that keeps the whole self's energy controlled, and keeps it from seeping away. At the same time it protects the whole self from certain radiations which do not here concern you. No living consciousness exists on any plane without this tissue capsule enclosing it.
quotes.translation: 它实际上是一个场，即能量场，一个边界。它通过充当一道屏障来保护内在自我，使整个自我的能量保持受控，防止其流失。同时，它也保护整个自我免受某些与你们无关的辐射影响。任何层面上的活生生的意识，都离不开这层组织囊的包裹。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. You have become somewhat aware of the subconscious. This means that your ego has enlarged its conception of the self, of itself, to include certain activities of which it is now aware. Progress in the development of personality in the long run will be determined by the ability of the whole self to recognize and become aware of all of its self-conscious portions.
quotes.translation: 现在。你们对潜意识已经有了一些认识。这意味着你们的自我已经扩展了它对自我、对自身的概念，将某些它现在意识到的活动也包含在内。从长远来看，人格发展的进步，最终将取决于整个自我识别并意识到其所有具有自我意识的部分的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It has its own possibilities of development and achievement. This should not be forgotten, and all potential egos have, also, their own possibilities. The inner self or identity must express itself through its ego in order to manipulate within physical reality. The inner self is composed of all the potential egos that compose it, but it is more than the sum of these.
quotes.translation: 它自身也拥有发展和成就的可能性。这一点不应被遗忘，所有潜在的自我也都有其自身的可能性。内在自我或本体必须通过它的自我来表达自己，才能在物质实相中运作。内在自我由构成它的所有潜在自我组成，但它又大于这些自我的总和。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Through experience in the various levels of existence the inner ego and the outer ego come closer and closer together. The subconscious eventually disappears, as it is no longer needed as a necessary buffer zone. At your stage of development the inner ego is by far the most self-conscious part of the whole self, and has the greatest ability for perception and organization. It alone is capable of experiencing inner and basic reality directly and immediately. It alone can cope with the tumultuous nature of such direct reality experience.
quotes.translation: 在存在各个层面的经验中，内在自我与外在自我越来越接近。潜意识最终会消失，因为它不再需要作为必要的缓冲地带。在你们的发展阶段，内在自我是整体自我中最具自我意识的部分，拥有最强的感知与组织能力。唯有它能直接而立即地体验内在与基本实相。唯有它能应对这种直接实相体验的汹涌本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Not only are you part of other independent selves, each one focused in its own reality, but there is a sympathetic relationship that exists. For example, because of this relationship, your experience need not be limited by the physical perceptive mechanisms. You can draw upon knowledge that belongs to these other independent selves. You can learn to focus your attention away from physical reality, to learn new methods of perception that will enable you to enlarge your concept of reality and greatly expand your own experience.
quotes.translation: 你不仅是其他独立自我的一部分——每个自我都聚焦于自身的实相——而且存在着一种交感关系。例如，由于这种关系，你的经验不必受限于物质感知机制。你可以汲取属于这些其他独立自我的知识。你可以学会将注意力从物质实相转移开，学习新的感知方法，这将使你能够扩展对实相的概念，并大大拓展自身的经验。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: True self -knowledge is indispensable for health or vitality, and this means in every instance. The recognition of the truth about the self means that you must first discover what you think about yourself subconsciously. If this is a good image, build upon it. If it is a poor one, recognize it as simply the opinion of the subconscious and not as a definite truth.
quotes.translation: 真正的自我认识对于健康或活力不可或缺，这适用于每个实例。认识关于自我的真相意味着你必须首先发现自己在潜意识层面如何看待自己。如果这是一个良好的形象，就以此为基础建设。如果这是一个不良的形象，就认识到它只是潜意识的看法，而非确定的真理。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: He dreamed of flying, and that impetus led to the physical inventions that made mechanical flight possible. I am not speaking symbolically here, but quite literally. From the beginning, I said that the self was not confined to the body. This means that the consciousness has other methods of perceiving information, that even in physical life experience is not confined to what is sensed in usual terms. This remains fine theory, however, unless you allow yourself enough freedom to experiment with other modes of perception.
quotes.translation: 他梦见飞行，这种动力导致了使机械飞行成为可能的物质发明。我在这里并非象征性地说话，而是相当字面意义。从一开始我就说过，自我并不局限于身体。这意味着意识有其他感知信息的方法，即使在物质生命经验中，也不局限于通常意义上所感知的事物。然而，这仍然是美好的理论，除非你允许自己有足够的自由去实验其他感知模式。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner ego is a portion of the self, for example -- is the portion of your self -- that is aware of your reincarnational activities. It is the part of you that exists outside of time, yet simultaneously lives in time. You form your own reality. The ego that you are aware of obviously could not form your body for you, however, or grow your bones. It knows how to assess the conditions of the world. It makes deductions. Your reasoning is highly important, yet alone it cannot pump your blood or tell your eyes how to see.
quotes.translation: 例如，内在自我是自我的一部分——是你自我的部分——它知晓你的转世活动。它是你存在于时间之外，同时又活在时间中的部分。你形成自己的实相。然而，你所意识到的自我显然无法为你形成身体，或生长你的骨骼。它知道如何评估世界的状况。它进行推论。你的推理非常重要，但仅凭推理无法泵动你的血液，或告诉你的眼睛如何观看。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 822, FEBRUARY 22, 1978
9:27 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: I have also explained how energy is transformed, and changes, adapting itself to the particular camouflage pattern of any given plane. Now in these tests you will reach the inner self. The results will be, then, valid in physical terms. The emotions are the outer extensions of the inner senses, and it is therefore through the intuitions and traveling, the traveling of the pathways of the emotions, that you will come in contact with the inner self, and therefore be able to carry back this information in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 我也解释过能量如何转化与改变，以适应任何特定层面的特定伪装模式。现在，在这些测试中，你将触及内在自我。因此，结果在物质层面也将有效。情绪是内在感官的外在延伸，因此，通过直觉与旅行——情绪路径的旅行——你将与内在自我接触，从而能够以同样的方式带回这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: If you then realize that every physical particle contains its own inner and initial consciousness, then you will see that we have come full circle. The individual or the self is all important. It operates to form as complicated a gestalt as possible, following the law of value fulfillment, and yet in so doing it does not either invade, deny or negate other individual consciousness. It is limitless because there are no limits to the possibilities of its value fulfillment, or to the number of gestalts which it can form.
quotes.translation: 如果你认识到每个物理粒子都包含其内在的初始意识，那么你就会明白我们已回到原点。个体或自体至关重要。它遵循价值完成法则运作，尽可能形成复杂的完形，但在此过程中既不侵犯、否定也不抹杀其他个体意识。它没有限制，因为其价值完成的可能性和所能形成的完形数量都是无限的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As you know the subconscious is an extension into your field of the inner self, and with those so talented the subconscious, when correctly referred to, will lead to hard facts of the inner universe, with which every inner self is thoroughly acquainted. You at least do not swaddle and suffocate what I say in veils of pseudo religion, and for this I am thankful.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，潜意识是内在自体向你们领域的延伸。对于有天赋者而言，当正确运用潜意识时，它将导向内在宇宙的坚实真相——每个内在自体对此都了如指掌。至少你们没有用伪宗教的面纱包裹窒息我的话语，对此我深表感激。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I am not speaking of anything (pause) like "repression," as it is used by psychologists, but a far deeper issue: one in which the very self is so distrusted that natural impulses of any kind become suspect. You try to inoculate yourselves against yourselves -- a nearly impossible situation, of course. You expect your motives to be selfish because you have been told that they are, and so when you catch yourselves with unkind motives you are almost comforted, because you think that at least you are behaving normally.
quotes.translation: 我并非在谈论心理学家所说的"压抑"（停顿），而是更深远的问题：当自体本身被如此不信任时，任何自然冲动都会变得可疑。你们试图给自己接种对抗自身的疫苗——这当然是几乎不可能的情况。你们预期自己的动机是自私的，因为被告知如此，所以当发现不友善的动机时反而感到宽慰，认为至少自己表现得正常。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (In the opening notes for Session 852 I wrote that starting with the 846th session for April 4, "Seth has been dictating material for Mass Events on Wednesday evenings only." Eight weeks later he's still following that arrangement, that "unspoken agreement" among the three of us. Even last Thursday night's session was displaced from the evening before. I took it upon myself to present material from two Monday night sessions -- 853 and 855.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: What I am trying to get across here is that, because of the superficial studies done so far, it seems that telepathy operates with separateness because of the limitations set by the ego on the definition of self. It is the similarity, or sympathy, of those in telepathic communication that makes telepathy possible. The limited idea of the self held by the ego clouds and distorts the main issue, for the ego is not conscious of the underlying bonds of sympathy that serve to merge, momentarily, the identities involved.
quotes.translation: 我在此试图阐明的是：由于目前肤浅的研究，似乎心灵感应因自我对自体定义的局限而呈现分离性。正是心灵感应沟通者之间的相似性或共鸣使感应成为可能。自我所持有的有限自体观念模糊并扭曲了核心问题，因为自我并未意识到那些暂时融合相关身份的潜在共鸣纽带。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The energy that composes personality therefore consists of an inconceivable number of separate identities. These separate identities form what we call the inner self, which retains its individuality even while the energy that composes it constantly changes. There are continual groupings and regroupings, but basic identities are always retained. The potential egos within any given identity therefore retain their own individuality and self-knowledge, regardless of their relative importance in the order of command.
quotes.translation: 因此构成人格的能量包含难以计数的独立身份。这些独立身份形成我们所谓的内在自体，即使构成它的能量不断变化，它仍保持其个体性。持续进行着聚合与重组，但基本身份始终被保留。任何特定身份中的潜在自我因此保持其个体性与自我认知，无论它们在指挥序列中的相对重要性如何。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: --Now there are no limitations to the self. There is no top nor bottom to the self... I will say at least that you are limited as a self only by what you perceive. Even physically you are more than you know, for the chemicals that are your body, and the atoms and molecules and the breath that leaves your lungs... becomes part of your atmosphere in this room...
quotes.translation: 现在——自体没有限制。自体没有顶端也没有底端……我至少可以说，作为自体你只受限于你所感知的范围。即便在物质层面，你也远超自己所知，因为构成你身体的化学物质、原子分子以及离开肺部的气息……都成为这个房间氛围的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It should be obvious that there is nothing strange in the fact that the dreaming self and the waking self appear so unfamiliar to each other. The study of hypnotism will greatly enlarge man's understanding of human personality in general. These separate states of consciousness, these multiple levels of awareness, these seemingly unrelated personality aspects, are not unnatural artificial productions, brought about through hypnosis. Hypnotism is merely a method that allows you to study the personality directly.
quotes.translation: 显然，做梦的自己与醒时的自己彼此显得如此陌生，这并没有什么奇怪之处。催眠术的研究将大大扩展人类对人格整体的理解。这些分离的意识状态、这些多重层次的觉知、这些看似互不相关的人格面向，并非通过催眠产生的非自然人为产物。催眠术只是一种让你能够直接研究人格的方法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: He first saw this library from the inside last Wednesday. He was simultaneously himself here in this living room, watching the image of himself in a library room, and he was the self in the library. Period. Before him he saw a wall of books, and the self in the living room suddenly knew that his purpose here in this reality was to re-create some of those books. He knew that he was working at both levels. The unknown and the known realities merged, clicked in, and were seen as the opposite sides of each other.
quotes.translation: 他上周三首次从内部看到了这个图书馆。他同时存在于这个客厅里，看着自己在图书馆房间里的影像，而他也是图书馆里的那个自己。句号。在他面前是一整墙的书，客厅里的那个自己突然明白，他在这个实相中的目的就是重新创作其中一些书。他知道自己同时在两个层面运作。未知与已知的实相融合、契合，并被视作彼此的对立面。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 715
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I am alive in Seth Two's memory, as a self from which he sprang. Yet the self I am now is not the self from which he sprang. Only your rigid ideas of time and consciousness make these statements seem strange to you; for in a larger context, again, I can remember Seth Two. All of these connections therefore are open. All psychological events affect all others.
quotes.translation: 我活在赛斯第二的记忆中，作为他从中衍生出的一个自己。然而，我现在的自己并非他衍生出的那个自己。只有你们对时间和意识的僵化观念，才使这些陈述显得奇怪；因为在更大的脉络中，我同样能忆起赛斯第二。因此，所有这些关联都是开放的。所有心理事件都影响着其他事件。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is because of the peculiar connection of selves that our communications are possible. It is for the same reason that such communications are relatively rare, for many conditions and circumstances are necessary; and the number one self is made to bear strains unfamiliar to it, and to perceive data which does not make sense within its number one time system.
quotes.translation: 正是由于自己之间的特殊关联，我们的沟通才成为可能。也正因如此，这类沟通相对罕见，因为需要许多条件与情境；而第一号自己被迫承受对它而言陌生的压力，并感知在其第一号时间系统中毫无意义的数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Fear cannot be ignored. It must be faced and conquered. It always leads to retreat when it is not faced. The physical image is indeed a replica in many ways of the inner self. When a man is ill it is not necessarily because he wants to be ill subconsciously. It is not necessarily because he is receiving some hidden psychological benefit, or because the illness fulfills some need. He is ill often--always in fact--because of a distortion that is occurring within the self, and materialized in physical form.
quotes.translation: 恐惧不能被忽视。它必须被面对并征服。当它不被面对时，总会导致退缩。物质形象在许多方面的确是内在自己的复制品。当一个人生病时，未必是因为他潜意识里想生病。未必是因为他获得了某种隐藏的心理利益，或因为疾病满足了某种需求。他常常生病——事实上总是如此——是因为自己内部发生了扭曲，并以物质形式具体化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Any deep exploration of the self will lead you into areas that will confound conventional beliefs about sexuality. You will discover an identity, a psychological and psychic identity, that is in your terms male and female, one in which those abilities of each sex are magnified, released, and expressed. They may not be so released in normal life, but you will meet the greater dimensions of your own reality, and at least in the dream state catch a glimpse of the self that transcends a one-sex orientation.
quotes.translation: 任何对自我的深入探索，都会将你带入颠覆传统性别观念的领域。你会发现一个身份，一个心理与灵性的身份，按你们的说法是兼具男性和女性的，其中两性的能力被放大、释放并表达。在正常生活中它们可能不会如此释放，但你会遇见自己实相的更大维度，至少在梦境状态中，能一瞥那超越单一性别取向的自己。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Left alone, the self acts spontaneously as a unit, but as an ever-changing one. Listening to voices both within and without, the conscious mind is able to form beliefs that are in league with the self's knowledge as received from material and nonmaterial sources. Then examination of beliefs takes its place along with other activities -- naturally, easily, without effort. Once the conscious mind has accepted a collection of conflicting beliefs, however, a definite attempt is necessary to sort these out.
quotes.translation: 独处时，本我自发地作为一个整体运作，却是一个不断变化的整体。意识心聆听内外之声，能够形成与从物质及非物质来源获得的本我知识相一致的信念。随后，信念的检视与其他活动自然、轻松、毫不费力地同步进行。然而，一旦意识心接受了相互矛盾的信念集合，就必须刻意努力来厘清这些信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The whole self slowly regains knowledge of its own reincarnations, and learns of its relationship to its own entity. I have said that a personality may become another entity. There is no rule against it. It is a matter of inherent strength and ability and also of desire. Many personalities upon receiving knowledge of their entity prefer to remain part of it, though they are always independent individualities within the whole entity, as even the cells of your physical bodies are part of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 整体自己逐渐重获对自身转世的知识，并了解其与自身存有的关系。我曾说过，一个人格可能成为另一个存有。这并无规则禁止。这取决于内在的力量与能力，也取决于欲望。许多人格在获知自身存有的知识后，宁愿保持为其一部分，尽管他们在整体存有中始终是独立的个体，正如你物质身体的细胞是整体自己的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: "Ruburt is, as you know, highly creative. What most artists do not realize is that the self is the first creation. They do not think of themselves as products of their own creativity. Because of Ruburt's energy and creativity, he has always perfectly mirrored and even somewhat exaggerated the condition of the inner self, its activities and inner postures."
quotes.translation: "如你所知，鲁柏极具创造力。大多数艺术家未能意识到的是，自己本身就是第一个创造物。他们不将自己视为自身创造力的产物。由于鲁柏的能量与创造力，他一直完美地映照甚至略微夸大了内在自己的状态、活动与内在姿态。"
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 2. Chromosomes are rod-like bodies within the cell nucleus, and carry the genes that govern hereditary characteristics. They separate lengthwise to double in number during cell division. See Note 2 for Session 821.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: It is the physical materialization of the inner self, but it is not meant to snuff out the inner self. If for example our tree bark grew fearful of the stormy weather and began to harden itself against the elements, in a well-meaning but distorted protective spirit, then the tree would die. The sunlight and so forth could never penetrate. The sap could not move upward for the trunk would solidify through and through, trying all the while to protect, and killing the tree with its obsessive kindness.
quotes.translation: 它是内在自己的物质显化，但并非要扼杀内在自己。例如，若我们的树皮因恐惧暴风雨而开始硬化以抵御自然元素，出于善意却扭曲的保护心态，这棵树便会死亡。阳光等将永远无法穿透。树液无法上升，因为树干将彻底固化，始终试图保护，却以执着的善意杀死这棵树。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now, if you will follow me closely you will obtain a hint at least of the structure of the inner self. It is composed, that is, each inner self is composed, structurally of a particular range of electrical intensities with which various personalities have their identities insured, since their identity is composed of particular intensities within the range.
quotes.translation: 现在，若你仔细跟随我，你至少能获得关于内在自己结构的线索。每个内在自己的结构，由特定范围的电磁强度组成，各种人格的身份借此得到保障，因为其身份由该范围内的特定强度构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It operates for your benefit almost automatically in any case, for your benefit is its benefit, you see, and its energies are always at your disposal. This does not mean that you are dependent. You are independent as far as the actions you choose to take. You are however a part of your supraself, for it is a self which you will become, in your time terms. In other terms it is the self which you are; you can call upon your own supraconsciousness therefore, though there should be no reason to do so.
quotes.translation: 它几乎自动为你的利益运作，因为你的利益即是它的利益，它的能量始终供你支配。这并不意味着你依赖它。就你选择采取的行动而言，你是独立的。然而，你是超我的一部分，因为以你的时间术语来说，超我是你将成为的自己。以其他术语而言，它即是你当下的自己；因此你可以召唤自己的超意识，尽管并无必要如此做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: If its built-in instincts are left alone the body is basically self-regulating. It does not kill off all red blood cells if there are too many of them at a given time. It has better sense. But in your fear of negative thoughts you often attempt to deny all normal aggressiveness, and at the first glimpse of it bring up your mental antibodies prepared for action. In so doing you try to repudiate the validity of your own experience. If you do not feel your individual reality, then you can never realize that you form it, and so can change it. It is this denial of experience, and the energy blockages involved, that build up the accumulation of unnecessary "unnatural" guilt. The body itself cannot understand these blocked messages, and cries out to express its own corporeal knowledge of the moment as it experiences it. (Intently:) You mentally shout in such situations that you do not feel what you feel.
quotes.translation: 若身体内置的本能不受干扰，它基本上是自我调节的。它不会在特定时刻红细胞过多时将其全部杀死——它更有分寸。但你们因恐惧负面念头，常试图否认所有正常的攻击性，一见到它便唤起精神抗体准备行动。这样做时，你们试图否定自身经验的有效性。若感受不到个体实相，便永远无法意识到自己正在创造它，从而改变它。正是这种对经验的否定及伴随的能量阻塞，累积了不必要的"非自然"罪恶感。身体无法理解这些阻塞的信息，它呼喊着要表达自己在体验当下时那属于肉体的认知。（专注地：）在这种情境下，你们在精神上大喊：你们感受不到自己所感受的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The fabric of the present self is interwoven with these reincarnational "pasts," and from them the present self draws unconsciously from its own bank of personality characteristics, activities, and insights. Often past-life memories come to the surface but are not recognized as such, since they appear in fantasy form, or are projected into art creations.
quotes.translation: 当下自我的结构交织着这些转世"过去"，从中汲取自身人格特质、活动与洞见的无意识宝库。前世记忆常浮现表面却未被识别，因其以幻想形式出现，或投射到艺术创作中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The dream images are indeed extensions, not only of the psychic or inner self, but a definite extension of the electromagnetic and chemical properties that operate through the physical self. It is indeed as if extensions of nerve endings reached out in self-expansion, making new connections, and this is indeed what occurs in the creation of dream images.
quotes.translation: 梦境意象确实是延伸——不仅是心灵或内在自我的延伸，更是通过物质自我运作的电磁与化学特性的明确延伸。仿佛神经末梢的延伸在自我扩展中向外伸展，建立新连接，这正是梦境意象创造中实际发生的事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The self, then, is not static by any means. It has no arbitrary boundaries. The term itself is used only for convenience; and indeed the concept of the self is a concept of the ego, which considers itself the self
quotes.translation: 因此，自我绝非静止不变。它没有任意界限。这个术语本身仅为方便使用；而"自我"的概念实则是自我本位的概念，它将自己视为自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am sure you see the many places that this can lead us. For one thing, psychological time is so much a part of inner reality that even though your inner self is still connected to the physical body, you are in the dream framework free of some very important physical effects. Now as your dreams seem to involve you in duration that is independent of your clock time, and I have much more to say here, so can you achieve the actual experience of duration as far as your inner visions are concerned.
quotes.translation: 我相信你们能看到这能引领我们走向许多方向。首先，心理时间如此深刻地属于内在实相的一部分，以至于即使内在自我仍与肉体相连，在梦境架构中你们已摆脱某些重要的物理效应。正如你们的梦境似乎让你们卷入独立于时钟时间的绵延——对此我还有很多要说的——就内在视野而言，你们同样能达成对绵延的实际体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Egos concept of itself as a rock of unchanging identity is highly ludicrous, since its perceptions constantly change it from what it was. It is not a thing proceeding, by any means. This is not to deny the human aspects of the ego, for the ego is also somewhat like a light carried in front of the inner self, a light that gives meaning to the physical universe and to its objects. It enables the inner self to manipulate within physical reality. It translates outer data to the inner personality.
quotes.translation: 自我本位将自己视为永恒不变的身份基石，这种概念极其荒谬，因为其感知不断将它从原有状态改变。它绝非一个持续前进的实体。这并非否认自我本位的人性面向，因为自我本位也像内在自我前方的一盏灯，为物质宇宙及其物体赋予意义。它使内在自我能在物质实相中运作，将外在数据翻译给内在人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I have explained to you how the inner self is connected to the present personality, and how the emotions at your end change through the layers of the subconscious, begin in your plane as parts of the personality, and as part of your force field, and then are transformed and become the innersense connective that connects the outer ego to the inner self.
quotes.translation: 我曾向你们解释过，内在自体如何与当前人格相连，以及你们这一端的情绪如何通过潜意识各层变化，在你们层面作为人格的一部分和你们力场的一部分开始，然后被转化，成为连接外在自我与内在自体的内在感知纽带。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: When you see that the ulcer does not belong to you in these terms, then indeed you will have no purpose in using your energies to maintain it. It is not part of your heritage. It is not part of the whole self; and now, we will see the purpose of the ego in all this is to protect what it considers the self, for the ego considers itself as the only self.
quotes.translation: 当你看到溃疡在这些方面并不属于你时，你便确实没有理由再用你的能量去维持它。它不是你们传承的一部分。它不是整体自体的一部分；而现在，我们将看到自我在这一切中的目的是保护它认为是自体的东西，因为自我视自己为唯一的自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Because of such identification with nature, the death experience, as you understand it, was in no way considered an end. The mobility of consciousness was a fact of experience. The self was not considered to be stuck within the skin. The body was considered more or less like a friendly home or cave, kindly giving the self refuge but not confining it.
quotes.translation: 由于与自然的这种认同，死亡体验，如你们所理解的，绝不被视为终结。意识的流动性是经验的事实。自体不被认为局限于皮肤之内。身体或多或少被视为一个友好的家园或洞穴，仁慈地给予自体庇护，但并不限制它。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The psychology of personality cannot be grasped unless reincarnation is taken into consideration, but even then this only represents energy operating within one system. The personality operates simultaneously within many systems. Projection represents practical application. Such experience allows you to unite various aspects of the self, and to bring the whole self into sharper focus. As a rule projection in some areas can only be achieved by those who are living their last earthly cycle.
quotes.translation: 除非考虑到转世，否则人格心理学无法被理解，但即便如此，这也只代表能量在一个系统内运作。人格同时在许多系统内运作。投射代表了实际的应用。这类经验让你能够统一自体的各个面向，并将整体自体带入更清晰的焦点。通常，某些领域的投射只能由那些正在经历最后一世地球轮回的人实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You see perhaps havoc within the physical field, and this is indeed to be faced and dealt with, and set straight, as aid is given to the victims of a hurricane. But you are familiar only with the results of action as they appear within the physical field, as long as you insist upon viewing your physical universe with the eyes of the ego-self; for the ego-self attempts to cut itself off from that action of which it is a part, and in so attempting it loses contact with this larger reality.
quotes.translation: 你或许在物质领域内看到混乱，这确实需要面对和处理，并加以纠正，就像对飓风受害者提供援助一样。但只要你坚持用自我自体的眼睛观察你的物质宇宙，你就只熟悉行动在物质领域内显现的结果；因为自我自体试图切断它与它所属的行动的联系，而在这种尝试中，它失去了与这个更大实相的联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The actions result in concrete physical materiaizationls. These are all highly colored and charged, however, and the stuff of physical materiaizationl is in itself conscious and alive. There are hidden but very definite connections between the self and the objects of which it has created in its environment. The environment is simply an extension of the self, and those objects within it are a part of the physical or the physically materialized personality. Hence your ideas of ownership.
quotes.translation: 行动导致具体的物质显化。然而，这些都高度着色且充满能量，物质显化的材料本身是有意识且活生生的。自体与其在环境中创造的对象之间存在着隐藏但非常明确的联系。环境只是自体的延伸，其中的对象是物质或物质化人格的一部分。因此有了你们的所有权观念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Such developments would mean the releasing and availability of added energy into your field, that would have endless possibilities in all directions. Ideas and concepts are nonphysical actualities that attract unaligned energy, direct and concentrate it. The dream world exists more closely in that spacious present of which the inner self is so aware. It is not as involved with camouflage constructions as your own universe, and its actions are somewhat limited within its own framework.
quotes.translation: 这类发展意味着将释放额外能量并使其进入你的场域，这些能量将在所有方向上拥有无限可能性。观念与概念是非物质性的实相，它们吸引未定向的能量，引导并凝聚之。梦境世界更贴近那个内在自我如此觉察的广阔当下，它不像你们的宇宙那样深陷于伪装建构中，其运作在其自身框架内也受到一定限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If you are interested I will give you such exercises, but whether or not you remember these lives consciously is of little importance, for you have subconscious knowledge of them. This is your last reincarnation, in your terms. At death you will consciously realize the sum of your reincarnated selves. To me that is your personality, but this is only a small part of your overall self. To me it is as if you had finished one life, you see. To you it will seem as if you had finished many.
quotes.translation: 若你感兴趣，我会给你这类练习，但你是否能意识层面记住这些前世并不重要，因为你潜意识中知晓它们。按你们的说法，这是你最后一次转世。死亡时你将意识层面认识到你所有转世自我的总和。对我而言那才是你的人格，但这仅是你整体自我的一小部分。对我而言，这仿佛你刚结束一世生命，明白吗？对你而言，这却像结束了多世生命。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The boundaries, limitations, extent and vistas of the self are merely arbitrary. In a very true sense each self is infinite, unbounded, connected in a most intimate way to all other things in the universe on your plane; and through the inner senses and the inner ego connected also in a most intimate way to the unknown and unseen inner universe.
quotes.translation: 自我的边界、限制、范围与视野仅是人为设定的。在非常真实的意义上，每个自我都是无限的、无界的，以最亲密的方式与你们层面宇宙中所有其他事物相连；并通过内在感官与内在自我，同样以最亲密的方式与未知且不可见的内在宇宙相连。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: For one thing, you are not dealing with one linear self. The self is indeed multidimensional, and the driving force behind the self does not reside in the ego or in what you refer to as the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 首先，你并非在处理单一的线性自我。自我确实是多维度的，而驱动自我的力量并不存在于自我或你们所谓的潜意识中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: What you consider your consciousness, or your self, or your thinking ego, represents of course only one portion of your entire consciousness, that part which you are using at this time. It is as if, for example, consciousness of any whole self were compared to a huge, and indeed almost infinite light, with the ability inherent in the light to focus in many directions; to be diffused, as if the light had many switches that would turn it to greater or lesser intensities and directions.
quotes.translation: 你们视为意识、自我或思考性自我的部分，当然仅代表你整体意识的一部分——即你此刻正在运用的那部分。举例而言，若将任何整体自我的意识比作一个巨大且近乎无限的光源，其内在能力可向多方向聚焦；可扩散，仿佛这光有许多开关能调节其强度与方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You may in a dream experience two or three hours in a flash of physical time. You have not aged two or three hours. The experience of space and time within the dream universe comes very close to the pure expression of the inner self. For here, free from the ego, the self is relieved of the necessity of constructing ideas into physical reality.
quotes.translation: 你或许在梦境中经历两三个小时，而物理时间仅一瞬。你并未衰老两三个小时。梦境宇宙中的时空体验极接近内在自我的纯粹表达。因为在此处，脱离自我的束缚后，自我无需再将观念建构为物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The scientific framework is basically, now, just as senseless, though within it the facts often seem to prove themselves out, also. There are viruses, for example. Your beliefs become self-evident realities. It would be impossible to discuss human suffering without taking that into consideration. Ideas are transmitted from generation to generation--and those ideas are the carriers of all of your reality, its joys and its agonies. Science, however, is all in all (underlined) a poor healer. The church's concepts at least gave suffering a kind of dignity: It did (underlined) come from God--an unwelcome gift, perhaps--but after all it was punishment handed out from a firm father for a child's own good.
quotes.translation: 科学框架基本上同样毫无意义，尽管其中的事实常常似乎也能自证其说。例如，病毒确实存在。你的信念会成为不言自明的现实。若不考虑这一点，就不可能讨论人类的苦难。观念代代相传——而这些观念承载着你们所有的实相，包括其喜悦与痛苦。然而，科学终究是个蹩脚的疗愈者。教会的概念至少赋予了苦难某种尊严：它确实来自上帝——或许是一份不受欢迎的礼物——但毕竟这是严厉的父亲为了孩子好而施予的惩罚。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: However, the personality as it is manifested can never be understood if it is taken alone. There are sufficient hints and signs that do appear, to give evidence of these other portions of the self. Now there is one important point in particular in all this that should be emphasized, and I will repeat it: Certain portions of the self do not manifest themselves directly within physical reality. They do not operate directly within physical reality, and the word directly is significant.
quotes.translation: 然而，若孤立地看待人格的显现，便永远无法理解它。确实有足够的线索和迹象出现，为自我的这些其他部分提供证据。在这一切中，有一点特别重要需要强调，我将重复它：自我的某些部分并不直接在物质实相中显现。它们不直接在物质实相中运作，"直接"这个词至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Here the self, by becoming part of greater action, increases its own ability to deal with action. The principle that action acts upon itself is extremely important when we are dealing with psychological action. The principle that action is self-generating, and that it cannot be withdrawn, is also vital in connection with psychological action.
quotes.translation: 在此，自我通过成为更大行动的一部分，增强了自身处理行动的能力。当我们处理心理行动时，行动作用于自身的原理极为重要。行动是自我生成的，且无法被撤回，这一原理在与心理行动相关的方面也至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json
