quotes.text: You may or may not have the sensation of traveling through the doors or windows. This is dependent upon the particular kind of projection involved. The molecular structure of the projecting self is of a different nature. There is no change in the physical nature of the door, for example. The molecular structure of the traveling self changes.
quotes.translation: 你可能会有或没有穿越门或窗的感觉。这取决于所涉及的特殊投射类型。投射自我的分子结构具有不同的性质。例如，门的物理性质没有改变。而旅行自我的分子结构发生了变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The ego, if you recall, is self's attempt to set itself apart from action, and to see or perceive action as an object. The ego attempts to attain stability and dominance, and resents change. It seeks to limit certain perceptions, to block out many perceptions of which the self is knowledgeable. In this way limitations become fairly rigid.
quotes.translation: 如果你还记得，自我是自我试图将自己与行动分离，并将行动视为客体来观看或感知的尝试。自我试图获得稳定性和支配地位，并憎恨改变。它寻求限制某些感知，屏蔽许多自我所知晓的感知。通过这种方式，限制变得相当僵化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You are practically aware in everyday life now of a self who watches the self. This is important. For later you will be aware of a self who watches this self, and I want you to note the difference.
quotes.translation: 在日常生活中，你实际上已经意识到有一个自我在观察着自我。这很重要。因为稍后你会意识到有一个自我在观察这个自我，我希望你注意其中的区别。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You will I am sure see the similarity now between this inner, alone sort of psychological time, experienced very often in waking hours, and the sense of time experienced in dreams. This is meant to show you but one more point of similarity between the waking and sleeping selves. In other words it is meant as another proof that they are indeed but one self, and that any divisions between them are artificial.
quotes.translation: 我相信你定能看出，这种内在、孤独的心理时间（常在清醒时体验到）与梦境中体验的时间感之间的相似性。这旨在向你展示清醒自我与睡眠自我之间的又一个相似点。换言之，这是另一项证明：它们确实只是同一个自我，而任何将它们分割开来的做法都是人为的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is this portion who seems to stand outside and view the subjective self. It is the I who is aware and alert within the dream state and who watches the dreaming self. (Long pause, eyes dosed.) This portion, while still within the three-dimensional system, is closely allied with other portions of the self that are free of that system.
quotes.translation: 正是这个部分似乎站在外部，审视着主观自我。它是在梦境状态中保持觉察与警觉的"我"，注视着做梦的自我。（长停顿，闭目。）这个部分虽仍处于三维系统之内，却与摆脱该系统的自我其他部分紧密相连。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: At the end of the reincarnational cycle, the whole self is far more developed than it was before. It has realized and experienced itself in a dimension of reality unknown to it earlier, and in doing so, has of course increased its being. It is not a matter, then, of a whole self splitting in half, and then simply returning to itself.
quotes.translation: 在轮回周期结束时，整体自我比先前发展得更为完善。它在一个先前未知的实相维度中认识并体验了自身，并在此过程中自然扩展了其存在。因此，这并非整体自我分裂为二再简单回归自身的问题。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Within the entire identity there may be, for example, several incipient selves, around whose nuclei the physical personality can form. In many instances one main personality is formed, and the incipient selves are drawn into it so that their abilities and interests become subsidiary, or remain largely latent. They are trace selves.
quotes.translation: 例如，在整个身份之内可能存在数个初生自我，物质人格可围绕其核心形成。在许多情况下，会形成一个主要人格，而初生自我被吸纳其中，使其能力与兴趣成为附属或基本处于潜伏状态。它们是痕迹自我。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The present personality cannot travel to the complete entity, again because of these very real laws; that is, while caught in or under the influence of the field of your plane, the personality cannot travel to the entity. The personality can and should be aware of the whole self of which it is a part, and that part of the whole self which the ego ignores, is the one part which can enter into the field influence of the entity, though it cannot travel to the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 当前人格无法抵达完整存体，再次因这些非常真实的法则：即当被困于或受你层面场域影响时，人格无法抵达存体。人格能够且应当意识到它作为其中一部分的整体自我，而自我所忽视的那部分整体自我，正是能够进入存体场域影响的部分——尽管它无法抵达存体本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Incidentally, if it is not now known by your scientists, it will be shortly discovered that the physical organism does not age in sleep at the same rate at which it ages in the waking state. Aging, therefore, is not a primary. Again, this does not mean that secondary conditions such as aging and gravity and clock time, do not have effects within your system, obviously. It is only that these must be recognized as secondary conditions that do not therefore basically （underlined） affect the inner self, which is to a large degree independent of your system.
quotes.translation: 顺便提一句，若你们的科学家尚未知晓，不久便会发现：肉体组织在睡眠中的衰老速度与清醒状态不同。因此衰老并非首要条件。再次强调，这并不意味着衰老、重力、钟表时间等次要条件不会在你们系统内产生作用——这显而易见。只是必须认识到这些是次要条件，因此不会从根本上（划线强调）影响内在自我，后者在很大程度上独立于你们的系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The one stability between self and what is not-self, and the one and only difference, is not an identity that is part and parcel of constantly changing physical framework, not the outer ego whose conception of who it is constantly changes, according to its age and environment, but the inner self behind all physical constructions.
quotes.translation: 自我与非我之间的唯一稳定点，也是唯一差异，并非不断变化的物质架构中固有的身份，也不是随年龄与环境不断改变自我认知的外在自我，而是所有物质构造背后的内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You can see that the inner self is much more spacious and unlimited than the ego self, and that while divisions occur they may vary, and the boundaries of the inner self constantly change.
quotes.translation: 你可以看到内在自我比自我意识更为广阔无垠，虽然分裂现象可能发生且形式各异，但内在自我的边界始终在持续变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Such electrical realities then, through the strength of their intensities and their particular range, are projected into some fields, but not projected into others. Any so-called travel through time involves then a traveling through such intensities. This is obviously impossible for the physical camouflaged self, but it is not impossible for the inner self, which as you know has its own electrical reality, which is again composed of particular impulses and intensities.
quotes.translation: 这些电性实相凭借其强度的力量与特定范围，被投射到某些场域而非其他场域。任何所谓的时间旅行都涉及穿越此类强度。这对物质伪装自我显然不可能，但对内在自我却非不可能——如你所知，它拥有自身的电性实相，这实相同样由特定脉冲与强度构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. While the inner self is aware of this connection, the present self has been fooling itself to some degree, for it did not accept the intuitional knowledge. Regardless of what you thought consciously therefore, you still inwardly blamed yourself for letting the child go, and therefore the difficulty with the womanly organs.
quotes.translation: 此刻，虽然内在自我知晓这种联结，但当前自我在一定程度上欺骗了自己，因为它拒绝接受直觉知识。因此无论你意识层面如何思考，内心仍因放任孩子离去而自责，进而导致女性器官的困扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

source_raw.title: (Continuation of Session 458, January 20, 1969, after break at 9:47. This material is not included in the records.

quotes.text: The inner self or the whole personality consists of many such egos, as you know, but the inner self is also aware of itself as something more than the sum of its parts. Now this something more than the sum of its parts is a curious phrase, but within it lies a key that can give you some small understanding of what God may be.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，内在自我或完整人格由诸多此类自我意识构成，但内在自我也意识到自身超越了各部分的总和。这种"超越部分总和"的说法颇为玄妙，其中却藏着能让你略窥神性本质的钥匙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: "In that regard, Ruburt's creativity kept struggling for its own growth and value fulfillment. His psychic recognition or initiation represented a remarkable breakthrough, meant to give him that additional psychic room that would insure the continued expansion of the abilities of the natural self. The sinful-self concept is a personal one for each who holds it, but it is also projected outward into the entire species, of course, until the whole world seems tainted.
quotes.translation: "就此而言，鲁柏的创造力始终在为自身成长与价值实现而挣扎。他的灵性认知或启蒙代表着非凡突破，旨在赋予他额外的灵性空间，确保自然自我能力的持续扩展。罪孽自我概念对每个持有者而言都是个人化的，但当然也会向外投射至整个物种，直至整个世界似乎都受到玷污。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 11. When Mass Events is published, see Session 835 for February 7, 1979, in Chapter 6.

quotes.text: When the inner ego and the outer ego pursue directly opposed viewpoints and different aims and goals, then you run into difficulty. In studying human personality and the psyche, your psychologists have not gone far, nor deeply enough. When a complete barrier, or nearly complete barrier, exists between the inner and outer egos, then the whole self is denied value fulfillment to a large degree. Such a division occurs at various times in history, and is occurring now.
quotes.translation: 当内在自我与外在自我追求截然对立的观点与不同目标时，你便会陷入困境。在研究人类人格与心灵时，你们的心理学家既未深入探索，也未触及本质。当内在自我与外在自我之间存在完全或近乎完全的屏障时，整个自我便在很大程度上被剥夺了价值实现。这种分裂在历史上不同时期反复出现，而此刻正在发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: At some inconceivable point all of the threads would be in turn traversed. Self A, now on thread A, would not be aware in his present, of the quote "future" selves on the other threads. Only by meeting one of these other selves however can he become aware of the nature of this strange structure through which he is traveling.
quotes.translation: 在某个难以想象的节点，所有线索都将被依次穿越。处于线索A上的自我A，在其当下无法感知其他线索上所谓的"未来"自我。唯有通过遇见这些其他自我中的某一个，他才能意识到自己正在穿越的这个奇异结构的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Individual selves will retain identity. They will be able to participate at a high level of awareness with the whole of which they are part. The whole is far more infinite than you can conceive. In a basic sense, the whole is aware of all of its parts, and in a basic senseall of its parts are aware of the whole. But each self must go its own way and develop its own abilities and explore the possibilities which it creates itself, otherwise the whole would stagnate.
quotes.translation: 个体自我将保留其身份认同。它们能以高度觉知的状态参与其所归属的整体。这个整体远比你能想象的更为无限。在基本层面上，整体觉知着其所有部分，而所有部分也基本觉知着整体。但每个自我必须走自己的路，发展自身能力，探索自己创造的可能性——否则整体将陷入停滞。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (Emphatically:) When the inner self is alerted, it will immediately try to remedy the situation by an influx of self-corrective measures. On occasion, when the situation gets out of hand, it will bypass those restrictive areas of the conscious mind, and solve the problem by shooting forth energy in other layers of activity.
quotes.translation: （强调地：）当内在自我被唤醒时，它会立即通过涌入自我修正措施来补救局面。当情况失控时，它甚至会绕过意识心智的受限区域，通过向其他活动层面投射能量来解决问题。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: For one thing the self is usually thought of in terms of existence only within one particular time sequence pattern. Its experience however is rooted in the past, as you think of the past. Since there is actually only a spacious present this means that the self is rooted both in the past and in the future, using your terms.
quotes.translation: 首先，自我通常被认为只存在于某个特定时间序列模式中。但其经验却根植于你们所谓的"过去"。由于实际上只存在一个"广袤的当下"，这意味着用你们的术语来说，自我既根植于过去，也根植于未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: What we are looking for here, and indeed one of the purposes of our sessions, is efficient use of various portions of the self in the perceptions of their own realities, and of an overall perception of each of the various portions of the self by the whole self, which transcends the others even while it is composed of them.
quotes.translation: 我们在此追寻的——也是我们课程的目的之一——是高效运用自我的各个部分去感知其自身实相，同时让整体自我对每个部分形成统观性认知。这个整体自我既超越其组成部分，又由这些部分构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Because of the great organizing nature of these basic units, there are also psychological structures that are quite capable of holding their own identities while being aware of any given number of probable selves. Life after death has great meaning in your reality, because death is a part of it. Your greater reality obviously transcends both your births and your deaths. The idea of one universe alone is basically nonsensical. Your reality must be seen in its relationship to others.8 Otherwise you are always caught in questions like "How did the universe begin?" or "When will it end?" All systems are constantly being created.
quotes.translation: 由于这些基本单元具有强大的组织特性，因此也存在能够保持自身身份认同、同时感知任意数量可能自我的心理结构。在你们的实相中，死后生命具有重大意义，因为死亡是其中一部分。你们更大的实相显然超越了出生与死亡。单一宇宙的概念本质上是荒谬的。你们的实相必须在其与其他实相的关联中才能被理解，否则你们永远会被"宇宙如何起源"或"何时终结"这类问题所困。所有系统都在持续被创造中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: There are no limits to the types of projections that can occur, basically speaking, for there are no limitations to the self, and a projection is an extension of the self. Your present existence is of course a projection. Activities based upon the framework of your present existence must be initiated within a system of chemicals and physical properties which make physical existence possible.
quotes.translation: 基本上来说，投射的类型没有限制，因为自我没有限制，而投射是自我的延伸。你们当前的存在当然也是一种投射。基于当前存在框架的活动，必须在使物质存在成为可能的化学与物理属性系统内启动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It may be another version of yourself. We will discuss ways of distinguishing between these. A man may suddenly disappear, and to be replaced by a small girl, a nonsensical development to the logical mind. Yet the girl could be the form of the man's previous or future reincarnated self. The unity, you see, is different. Basically perception of the spacious present is naturally available. It is your nervous and physical mechanism which acts as a limiting device, and also as a focusing device. By limiting many otherwise available perceptions it forces you to focus upon what you can perceive with greater intensity.
quotes.translation: 这可能是你自己的另一个版本。我们将讨论区分它们的方法。一个人可能突然消失，被一个小女孩取代——这对逻辑思维而言是荒谬的发展。然而这个女孩可能是该男子前世或来世转世自我的形态。你看，统一性是不同的。对广阔当下的感知本是自然可得的。是你们的神经与物理机制充当了限制装置，同时也是聚焦装置。通过限制许多本可获得的感知，它迫使你们以更强烈的专注力聚焦于所能感知的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Permanence as the ego thinks of it would be an alien concept to these portions of the self, and to them a highly distasteful concept, adding up to rigidity. Flexibility is the key here, a voluntary changing or alteration of the self as it is allowed to change freely with each probability that is explored. Experience here therefore is of a plastic nature. Some thought concerning your own dream state may give you an intimate key to understand what I mean here.
quotes.translation: 自我所认为的永恒，对这些自我部分而言会是陌生的概念，甚至是非常令人厌恶的概念——那意味着僵化。灵活性才是关键，即允许自我随着探索的每个概率自由改变的自愿性转变。因此这里的经验具有可塑性。思考你们自己的梦境状态，或许能获得理解我此处所指的亲密钥匙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: But self A is not limited to the egos perceptions only, therefore it may be said that self As perceptions are not limited, in toto, to the field in which it exists. For it is not so limited in dreams and in other states, yet while consciousness is in these other conditions, self A still exists within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 但自我A并不局限于自我的感知，因此可以说自我A的感知整体上不受其存在领域的限制。因为在梦境及其他状态中它不受此限，而当意识处于这些其他状态时，自我A仍存在于物质实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: If self A were limited to the perceptions of the ego, and if self A were limited then to the dimensions in which it found itself, then my dear friends precognition in dreams would be impossible, and in order to perceive the future self A would of necessity be forced to discontinue existence within the physical system.
quotes.translation: 如果自我A局限于自我的感知，如果自我A受限于其所在维度，那么我亲爱的朋友们，梦中的预知将不可能实现，而为了感知未来，自我A将被迫终止在物质系统中的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I am rather surprised that Ruburt hit upon this one at this time, as it is usually a rather difficult ability to attain.... Ruburt experienced this on a physical level, trying to translate inner data into sensation that could be recognized by the outer senses. This seventh inner sense represents an extension of the self, a widening of its conscious comprehension ... or a pulling together into ... a minute capsule that enables the self to enter other fields.
quotes.translation: 我颇感惊讶，鲁柏这次竟能领悟这一点，因为这通常是一项相当难以掌握的能力……鲁柏在物质层面体验了这一点，试图将内在数据转化为能被外在感官识别的感觉。这第七种内在感官代表了自我的延伸，是其意识理解范围的拓宽……或是将自我凝聚成……一个微小的胶囊，使其得以进入其他领域。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: To begin with, Augustus was brought up to believe that the inner self was dangerous, that individuals reacted because of inner conflicts over which they had little conscious control. (Gesturing:) He believed that the individual personality was relatively powerless to understand itself and that it stood precariously alone and undefended, with a chasm of evil beneath and with an unattainable, cold, just, but not compassionate Good (with a capital "G") above.
quotes.translation: 首先，奥古斯都从小被教导相信内在自我是危险的，认为个体的反应源于他们几乎无法有意识控制的内在冲突。（做手势：）他相信个体人格相对无力理解自身，且孤立无援地摇摇欲坠，下方是邪恶的深渊，上方是难以企及、冷漠、公正却毫无慈悲的"善"（大写字母G）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You do not even perceive sense data with a third of the vividness of which you are capable. This has to do again with the self-protection used. The self does not perceive any impressions, you see, which are so vivid that it could be overwhelmed. As the self learns then it allows greater and more intense impressions.
quotes.translation: 你甚至未能以自身能力三分之一的生动程度来感知感官数据。这再次与所使用的自我保护机制有关。你看，自我不会接收任何过于生动以致可能令其不堪重负的印象。随着自我不断学习，它便会允许更强烈、更密集的印象进入。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner self is intimately connected with each reality, though you are not aware of it, and the inner self can trace its own connections through the network of any existence, and still keep its identity. When we speak then of the beginnings of your system, we speak only in consideration of your own ideas of time.
quotes.translation: 内在自我与每个实相都紧密相连，尽管你并未察觉，而内在自我能通过任何存在的网络追溯自身的连接，同时仍保持其身份认同。因此，当我们谈论你们系统的起源时，仅仅是基于你们自身的时间观念而言。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The reasons given for such subjugations matter little in the long run, for the reasons change with the times and with your culture. You are not under a sentence placed upon you for original sin, by any childhood events, or by past-life experience. Your life, for example, may be far less fulfilling than you think you would prefer. You may be less when you would be more, but you are not under a pall placed upon your psyche, either by original sin, Freud's infancy syndromes, or past-life influences. I will try to explain the past-life influences a bit more clearly here. They affect you as any experience does. Time is not closed, however -- it is open. One life is not buried in the past, disconnected from the present self and any future self as well.
quotes.translation: 从长远来看，为这种压制所给出的理由并不重要，因为理由会随时代和你们的文化而改变。你们并非因原罪、任何童年事件或前世经历而背负着判决。例如，你的生活可能远不如你期望的那般充实。你本可更丰盛，却反而更匮乏，但你的心灵并未被原罪、弗洛伊德的婴儿期症候群或前世影响所笼罩。在此我将更清晰地解释前世影响。它们如同任何经历一样影响你。然而，时间并非封闭的——它是开放的。一世生命并非埋藏于过去，与当下自我及任何未来自我割裂。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (With many pauses:) Give us a moment ... Such a performance actually means that physical reality clicks off and on.11 In your terms, it exists only in your waking hours. The inner work that makes it possible is largely done in the sleep state. The meeting of body consciousness and your main consciousness requires an intense focus, in which the greatest manipulations are necessary. Perceptions must be precise in physical terms. To some extent, however, that exquisite concentration means that certain limitations occur. Cellular comprehension is not tuned into by the normally conscious self, which is equally unaware of its own free-wheeling nature at "higher" levels. So a disengagement process must happen that allows each to regenerate. The consciousness then leaves the body. The body consciousness stays with it.
quotes.translation: （多次停顿：）给我们一点时间……这样的表现实际上意味着物质实相在开启与关闭间切换。用你们的话说，它只存在于你们的清醒时刻。使其成为可能的内在工作主要是在睡眠状态中完成的。身体意识与你们主要意识的会合需要强烈的专注，其中必须进行最精密的操控。在物质层面，感知必须精确。然而，这种极致的专注在某种程度上也意味着某些限制的产生。通常的自我意识无法调谐到细胞的理解层面，同样也意识不到自身在"更高"层次上自由流动的本质。因此，必须发生一个脱离过程，让两者得以再生。随后意识离开身体，而身体意识则留在其中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (10:55: Jane's delivery had become somewhat faster and very absorbed as it progressed. Just as they had before our three-month layoff from book work [after Session 707], her trances for "Unknown" Reality were proving to be more "difficult" to initiate than those for the previous Seth books.9 She often had to wait for just the right moment to get back into dictation following a break, too; so tonight, after we'd shared an apple, she sat rather impatiently anticipating Seth's return. Resume, finally, at 11:25.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Selfhood overspills with great luxurious outcroppings, yet you jealously guard against such creativity. To a certain extent you do carry the knowledge of your forefathers within your [cells'] chromosomes,1 which present a pattern that is not rigid but flexible -- one that in codified fashion endows you with the subjective living experience of those who, in your terms, have gone before. As Ruburt recently suspected, some very old cultures have been aware of this.2 Period. While being independent individuals their members also identified with their ancestors to some extent, accepting them as portions of their selfhoods. This does not mean that the individual self was less, but was more aware of its own reality. A completely different kind of focus was presented, in which the ancestors were understood to contribute to the "new" experience of the living; one in which the physically focused consciousness clearly saw itself as perceiving the world for itself, but also for all of those who had gone before -- (gradually louder for emphasis:) while realizing that in those terms he or she would contribute as well as the generations past.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……自我性以丰饶的迸发姿态满溢而出，你们却嫉妒地防范着这种创造力。在某种程度上，你们确实将祖先的知识携带在[细胞]的染色体中，这些染色体呈现的并非僵化而是灵活的模式——一种以编码方式赋予你们主观生命体验的模式，这些体验来自那些按你们说法"先走一步"的人。正如鲁柏最近所怀疑的，某些古老文化早已意识到这一点。句号。当这些文化的成员作为独立个体存在时，他们也在某种程度上与祖先认同，将祖先视为自我性的一部分。这并不意味着个体自我被削弱，而是更清楚地意识到自身的实相。他们呈现出一种完全不同的焦点：在这种焦点中，祖先被认为为生者的"新"体验做出贡献；肉身聚焦的意识清晰地看到自己既为自己感知世界，也为所有先人感知世界——（逐渐提高音量以示强调：）同时意识到，按那种说法，他或她也将像过往世代一样做出贡献。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 731

quotes.text: I am speaking now for your convenience simply. There are four cornerstone personalities involved in your seminar. Now three of these personalities are yours: one is not yours. One is not"yours" in your terms as of this time. When you look up and recognize, you will accept that which you do not now recognize as yourself, as yourself. If you looked up now, you would not recognize the self that you will recognize. Because the Spacious present exists as it is, the recognition has already been made. You have not yet caught up with it, you see. You are slowpokes. My friend Ruburt in many respects is also a slowpoke. The environment is not where you think it is. I refer to these seminars. The voice that does not"speak" in your terms is yours, but the instructor is not yourself as you know yourself. It is a self you do not as yet know in your terms.
quotes.translation: 我现在为方便你们理解而简单说明。你们的研讨会涉及四位基石人格。其中三位人格属于你：一位不属于你。有一位按你们当前的说法并非"你的"。当你抬头辨认时，你会接受此刻尚未认作自己的那个自己，将其视为自己。如果你现在抬头，你无法认出将来会认出的那个自己。因为广袤当下如其本然地存在，这辨认早已完成。你尚未赶上它，明白吗？你们都是慢吞吞的家伙。我的朋友鲁柏在许多方面也是个慢吞吞的家伙。环境并不在你以为的地方。我指的是这些研讨会。按你们说法"不发言"的那个声音是你的，但指导者并非你所认识的自己。它是一个按你们说法你尚未认识的自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You spoke earlier of tragedies, and I do not understand you. Great work stands alone. It is a triumph of the human spirit, and it always grows out of experience. As an egotistical creature, alone, you would not choose the experience, even though great work resulted from it. (Smile, and intent delivery.) Learning involves your whole being. Great work is a result of great learning. It is not the result of seeing easy answers scribbled magically upon a blackboard. The flowers thrust themselves up through soil, but they hardly consider the soil or thrusting a tragedy, nor resent the time spent in the frozen earth, for they realize the frozen earth is a condition of their blossoming--a challenge that is an aid, not a hindrance. The light does not resent the darkness which it illuminates, you see? Your inner self is aware of this.
quotes.translation: 你早些时候谈到悲剧，而我不理解你。伟大的作品独立存在。它是人类精神的胜利，永远源于经验。作为一个孤立的自我中心生物，你不会选择那种经验，即使它催生了伟大作品。（微笑，专注地传达。）学习涉及你的整体存在。伟大作品是伟大学习的结果。它不是看到神奇答案潦草地写在黑板上的结果。花朵奋力破土而出，但它们几乎不把土壤或破土视为悲剧，也不怨恨在冻土中度过的时间，因为它们明白冻土是绽放的条件——一个助益而非阻碍的挑战。光明不会怨恨它所照亮的黑暗，你明白吗？你的内在自我深知这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There are five steps. (Pause.) It is possible to cover all of them at once, or the process may take you some time. First however imagine your consciousness out of your body in its astral form. Next, feeling that you are in the astral form, tell yourself that from that image you will be able to see the image of the person that you were in your immediately past life. I cannot tell you whether you will succeed at once, as you may, or whether you will find it difficult. You, Joseph, being proficient with images, may find it easier than Ruburt. Now when you feel that you have this new image of your past self before you, then imagine that your consciousness is moving from your astral form into this past self. You should not do this until you see the whole form.
quotes.translation: 有五个步骤。（停顿。）有可能一次性完成所有步骤，也可能这个过程需要一些时间。但首先，想象你的意识以星光体形态离开身体。接着，在感觉处于星光体形态时，告诉自己从这个影像中你将能看到你上一世那个人的影像。我无法告诉你是否会立即成功——你可能成功，也可能发现困难。你，约瑟夫，擅长影像，可能比鲁柏更容易做到。现在，当你感觉面前有了过去自我的新影像时，想象你的意识从星光体形态移入这个过去自我。在看清完整形态之前，你不应进行这一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: New paragraph (and more rapidly): As egotistical consciousness expands to include hereto largely neglected data, then it will experience, practically speaking, a new kind of identity; knowing itself differently. Its concepts of godhood will significantly alter, as will the dimensions of emotion. Your heritage includes vastly richer veins of love, yet your concepts of self and godhood have severely limited these. You often seem to hate those with different beliefs than your own, for example, and you have perpetrated cruelties upon others in the name of religion and in the name of science, because your limited ideas about the nature of the self led you to fear your emotions. Often you are afraid that love will overwhelm you, for instance.
quotes.translation: 新段落（语速加快）：当自我中心的意识扩展以包含迄今被忽视的数据时，实际上它将体验到一种新的身份认同；以不同的方式认识自己。它对神性的概念将显著改变，情感维度也将随之改变。你们的传承包含远为丰厚的爱的矿脉，但你们对自我和神性的概念严重限制了这些。例如，你们常常憎恨那些信仰与你们不同的人，并以宗教和科学的名义对他人施以残酷行为，因为你们对自我本质的有限观念导致你们恐惧自己的情感。例如，你们常常害怕爱会淹没自己。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 686
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: In other words the ego is not familiar with the probable self, but certain portions of the subconscious are. For the subconscious, like the probable self, is aware of its existence in the inverted time system. The subconscious is aware of many realities which are not accepted by the ego as actual physical events, and it reacts to many stimuli of which the ego is completely unaware.
quotes.translation: 换言之，自我不熟悉可能的自我，但潜意识的某些部分熟悉。因为潜意识与可能的自我一样，意识到自己在倒转时间系统中的存在。潜意识意识到许多未被自我接受为实际物理事件的实相，并对许多自我完全不知的刺激做出反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The expanding self, ideally, would reach out beyond the arbitrary boundaries it has placed upon itself. Again, there just is not any particular boundary between what is self and what is not self. There are gradations, and that is all. The skin is as much, if not more, a necessary connective as it is a boundary.
quotes.translation: 扩展的自我，理想上，会超越它自己加诸于自身的武断界限。再说一次，自我与非自我之间根本没有任何特定的界限。只有程度上的差异，仅此而已。皮肤与其说是界限，不如说是必要的连接物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner self is always aware of the hidden mechanisms of these family gestalts. Those who have been closely bound through emotional ties often prefer to remain in closely tied or loosely tied physical relationships that continue through many lifetimes. New relationships are always encouraged however, for you can have ingrown reincarnational "families." Many of these form physical organizations that are actually manifestations of inner groupings.
quotes.translation: 内在自我始终觉察这些家族完形的隐藏机制。那些通过情感纽带紧密相连的人，往往偏好维持松散或紧密的肉体关系，这种关系会延续许多世。然而，新关系总是受到鼓励，因为你们可能形成内向的转世"家族"。许多这类家族形成的肉体组织，实际上是内在群体的显化。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The day Ruburt received the "advance" information on bridge beliefs (see the last session), the obvious suddenly became clear. The writing self was finding itself more and more hampered, unable to use excellent material because of its limited beliefs. It focused so defensively on its own material that it was hampering its flow of creativity, while the "unacceptable" aspects of Ruburt merrily went on creating other books, not even including my own.
quotes.translation: 当鲁柏收到关于桥梁信念的"预知"信息那天（见上节），显而易见的事突然变得清晰。写作自我发现自己越来越受阻碍，由于受限的信念而无法使用绝佳素材。它如此防御性地聚焦于自己的素材，反而阻碍了创造力的流动，而鲁柏那些"不可接受"的部分却愉快地继续创作其他书籍，甚至不包括我自己的书。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The definition of course stands. I merely would like to be sure that the correct interpretation is given to the definition. The self, or a self, is not any particular thing, as I told you. It is true that there are no boundaries to enclose it within safe confines, where it can be said, "Here is the self."
quotes.translation: 定义当然成立。我只是想确保这个定义得到正确的诠释。自我，或一个自我，并非任何特定的事物，正如我告诉过你们的。确实没有界限能将它圈在安全的范围内，让人可以说："这就是自我。"
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: An internal drama is carried on by each individual, a psychic drama which is finally projected outward with great force upon the field of history. The birth of great religious events emerges from the interior religious drama. The drama itself is a psychological phenomenon in a way, for each physically oriented self feels thrust alone into a strange environment, without knowing its origins or destination or even the reason for its own existence.
quotes.translation: 每个人都在进行内在的戏剧，一场心灵戏剧，最终会以强大力量向外投射到历史领域。伟大宗教事件的诞生源自内在的宗教戏剧。这场戏剧本身在某种程度上是心理现象，因为每个以肉体为导向的自我都感到被孤零零地抛入陌生环境，不知自身起源、归宿，甚至不知自己存在的理由。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Putting this as simply as possible, your actual experience is far too vast for you to physically follow. Your particular kind of consciousness is the result of specialized focus within a particular area. You imagine it to be "absolute," in that it seems to involve an all-exclusive state that includes your identity as you think of it -- only you give it boundaries like a kingdom. It is, instead, a certain kind of organization that is indeed inviolate even while it is itself a portion of other kinds of consciousnesses, with their own points of focus. Your body itself is composed of self-aware organizations of consciousness that escape your notice and deal with perceptual material utterly alien to your own ways.
quotes.translation: 尽可能简单地说，你们实际经验的广度远超肉体所能跟随。你们特定的意识形态是特定领域内专注聚焦的结果。你们想象它是"绝对的"，因为它似乎包含一种排他性的状态，囊括了你们所认为的身份——只是你们给它划定了如王国般的界限。实际上，它是一种特定的组织，确实不可侵犯，即使它本身也是其他类型意识的一部分，那些意识各有自己的聚焦点。你们的身体本身由自我觉察的意识组织构成，这些组织逃过你们的注意，处理着与你们方式完全不同的感知材料。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: At the same time, the inner self will transmit to the conscious mind insights and intuitions meant to clear its sight. But if you believe that the inner self is dangerous and not to be trusted, if you are afraid of dreams or any intrusive psychic material, then you deny this help and turn aside from it.
quotes.translation: 同时，内在自体将向意识心传递旨在澄清其视界的洞见与直觉。但若你相信内在自体是危险且不可信赖的，若你惧怕梦境或任何侵入性的心灵素材，那么你便拒绝了这份帮助并转身离去。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The imagination can vaguely perceive, of course, some probabilities, but the physical organism can directly experience but one of these within physical time, and in terms of continuity. The probable events however are precisely as real as that one event which is chosen from them to be a physical experience. And these events therefore become "real", in quotes, within other dimensions. As a sideline here, there are some interesting episodes, not at all understood, when a severe psychological shock, or even a deep sense of unendurable futility, will cause a short circuit, so to speak, so that one portion of the self becomes aware, and begins to experience reality as it exists for another portion of the self.
quotes.translation: 想象力当然能模糊感知某些可能性，但物质有机体在物理时间内只能以连续性的方式直接体验其中之一。然而那些可能事件与被选中成为物质体验的那个事件同样真实。这些事件因此在其他维度中成为带引号的"真实"。作为题外话，当严重心理冲击或甚至难以忍受的徒劳感造成所谓"短路"时，会出现一些完全未被理解的趣事——自体的一部分会觉察到并开始体验另一部分自体所存在的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: He projected a meaninglessness upon reality, and then fell prey to it. Here the senses themselves can help revive him. (Long pause.) He seems now to be choosing between identities, but there is one waiting for him, and it is a probable ego that he did not adopt as a child. He has been plunged back into a physical universe that he would not accept even as a valid mirage. This time he will be able to find himself within it. (Long pause.) In his case he must accept himself as a human being before he can hope to discover the inner self. The ego got no help from him, and it could not carry on alone. There was a definite splitting of personality elements, and a complete abandonment by the inner self of the ego.
quotes.translation: 他将无意义投射到实相上，继而成为其猎物。此时感官本身能帮助他复苏。（长停顿）他看似在身份间抉择，但有一个身份正等待着他——那是他童年时未采纳的"可能自我"。他已被抛回一个连作为有效幻象都不愿接受的物质宇宙。这次他将能在其中找到自己。（长停顿）就他而言，必须先接纳自己作为人类，才有望发现内在自体。自我未曾从他那里获得帮助，也无法独自支撑。人格元素出现了明确分裂，内在自体彻底遗弃了自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It knows full well its own indestructibility, and that of its fellows. What happens in the case of constructive psychic energy when it is purposely denied aggressive outlets? It finds out. What does it feel like to be the brunt of aggression? It forms another life situation and discovers the answer. How strong and potent is the energy that is at its command? How can it best be used? It is quite necessary that all of these questions be answered, for the inner self is composed of energy, and in other fields of activity thoughts and emotions are instantaneously translated, their results instantly seen. There is no saving time lag, as within your own system, and there is no physical body such as you know it.
quotes.translation: 它深知自身及同伴的不可毁灭性。当建设性心灵能量被刻意拒绝攻击性出口时会发生什么？它会去探索。承受攻击锋芒是什么感受？它会构建另一个人生情境来寻找答案。它所掌控的能量有多强大？如何最佳运用？这些问题都必须得到解答，因为内在自体由能量构成，在其他活动领域中，思想与情绪会瞬间转化，其结果立现。不像你们系统存在时间延迟，也没有你们所知的物质身体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now. I have said that any of you and all of you create a dream universe of validity, actuality, durability, and for Philip's benefit, self-determination, in the same manner that the entity projects the reality of its various personalities. As there is no contact between the entity and the ordinary conscious ego, so there is no contact on a conscious level between the self who dreams and the dream world which has its own independent existence.
quotes.translation: 现在。我曾说过，你们任何一人及所有人都在创造具有有效性、实在性、持久性——为菲利普起见加上"自主性"——的梦境宇宙，正如存有投射其各种人格的实相。正如存有与普通意识自我之间没有接触，做梦的自体与拥有独立存在的梦境世界在意识层面也没有接触。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Those intimate realizations, however, had to be counterbalanced in line with certain purposes set by your species, and even for that matter momentarily set aside so that other abilities and characteristics could emerge. The species' sense of curiosity would not allow it to stay in any home territory for long,6 and so the sense of intimacy was purposely broken. It would become highly important again, however, when the planet was populated extensively, as it is now -- only the original feeling of home area has to be extended over the face of the earth. The "absent" portions of the self are ready to emerge. The other, to you probable, lines of consciousness can now come into play.
quotes.translation: 稍等片刻……然而那些亲密的体认必须根据你们物种设定的某些目的加以平衡，甚至为此暂时搁置，以便其他能力与特性能够浮现。物种的好奇心不允许它长期固守任何家园领域，因此亲密感被刻意打破。但当行星像现在这样被广泛居住时，它又将变得极为重要——只是最初的家园感必须扩展到地球表面。"缺席"的自体部分已准备好浮现。那些对你们而言属于"可能"的意识线索现在可以发挥作用了。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 731
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: We prefer instead Seth's -- as well as our own -- concepts of the inviolate nature of the individual consciousness, before, during, and after physical existence, in ordinary terms, and whether or not any theory of reincarnation is involved. It may be natural enough for us in the West not to enjoy the idea of surrendering our individual natures upon physical death, even if intellectually we can understand, for instance, the Buddhist teaching that "perfect" joy can be found in the eventual, blissful surrender of the self to a supreme spirit -- although I note with some humor that personally I've yet to determine how the self who surrenders knows it's done so if it's been so thoroughly absorbed.
quotes.translation: 我们更倾向于赛斯——以及我们自己——关于个体意识不可侵犯本质的概念，无论是否涉及轮回理论，在普通意义上，个体意识在物质存在之前、期间及之后都保持其完整性。对西方人而言，不愿在肉体死亡后放弃个体本性或许是很自然的，即使理智上我们能理解，例如佛教教义中"完美"喜悦存在于最终将自我幸福地交付给至高灵性——不过我略带幽默地注意到，我个人尚未确定，若自我已被彻底吸收，那个交付的自我又如何知晓自己已完成交付。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Every so often I've thought of averaging Jane's dictation time for Seth Speaks and Personal Reality in the same way, but haven't done so. I'm somewhat puzzled to note, however, that her very short working times for the Seth books seem to be either ignored or taken for granted by practically everyone -- or, perhaps, those factors just aren't understood in terms of ordinary linear time. Maybe I'm alone in my interest here, for even Jane doesn't express any great curiosity about the time she has invested in the Seth material; she just delivers it. But given her abilities, I think her speed of production is a close physical approach to, or translation of, Seth's idea that basically all exists at once -- that really there is no time, and that the Seth books, for example, are "there" to be had in final form for just the tuning in. (In Section 3 of this volume, Note 2 for Session 692 contains information on another way by which we can move closer to Seth's idea of simultaneity from our physical reality, but that method grows out of material not discussed here.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The clues which he does not look for would lead toward not mere dry generalized facts, but facts that are at the basis of the universe as he knows it. Facts indeed that make such a universe possible, facts that would revolutionize science, and most of all the science of medicine, and the field of psychology. The study of so-called extrasensory perception is now considered an isolated bizarre domain, unrelated to other fields of knowledge. The reason for this is that the data that would connect such a study to all other fields of interest is not recognized. The study of the inner workings of the self is closely connected to the study of the universe as it exists in all its levels of reality.
quotes.translation: 他未曾寻找的线索不仅会导向枯燥的普遍事实，更会触及他所认知宇宙的基础事实。这些事实确实使这样的宇宙成为可能，将彻底革新科学，尤其是医学和心理学领域。所谓超感官知觉的研究如今被视为孤立的怪异领域，与其他知识领域毫无关联。原因在于，能够将此类研究与所有其他兴趣领域联系起来的数据尚未被识别。对自我内在运作的研究，与对存在于所有实相层面的宇宙研究密切相关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your ego is now focused within this reality. You have other egos focused in other realities. The inner self is aware of what is being done in all of these realities. There is some compensation, and the race knows this. Ruburt wrote that there were clumps of consciousness, and of course he is correct. You are a part of many such clumps of consciousness. The abilities and potentials are not only being developed in this system but in others.
quotes.translation: 你的自我此刻聚焦于这个实相。你还有其他自我聚焦于其他实相。内在自我知晓所有这些实相中正在发生的事。存在某种补偿机制，人类知晓这一点。鲁柏曾写道存在意识团块，他当然是对的。你是许多此类意识团块的一部分。能力与潜能不仅在此系统中发展，也在其他系统中发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is extremely difficult, I should imagine. Nevertheless, even when an inner self has sent out a new outer ego upon a new camouflage venture, the previous ego is still afforded an almost unlimited avenue for development. There are many possibilities for it. It can choose to remain what it is, one ego. It will then remain in a somewhat subordinate position to the inner self, but in no more of a subordinate position than it was earlier.
quotes.translation: 我想这极其困难。然而，即使内在自我已派出新的外在自我进行新的伪装冒险，先前的自我仍拥有几乎无限的发展途径。它有许多可能性。它可以选择保持原样，作为一个自我存在。届时它将处于相对从属于内在自我的位置，但不会比之前更受支配。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I have myself heard it said that other creatures behave with a natural grace, save man. I have myself heard it said that all of nature is (pause) content unto itself save man, who is filled with discontent. Such thoughts follow "naturally" the dictums of so-called rational thought. When you think such thoughts, you think of them at the most strained level of intellectual speculation -- that is, the thoughts seem self-evident to the intellect that is forced to operate by itself, relatively speaking, divorced from the self's other faculties. It then does indeed seem that man is somehow apart from nature -- or worse, an ungrateful blight, almost a parasite, upon the face of the planet.
quotes.translation: 我亲耳听闻，除人类外，其他生物皆以自然优雅之姿行动。我亲耳听闻，除人类充满不满外，整个自然皆自得其乐。此类想法"自然"遵循所谓理性思维的教条。当你产生这些想法时，你是在最紧张的知识思辨层面思考——也就是说，这些想法对被迫独立运作的理智而言似乎不言自明，相对而言，这种理智与自我的其他官能相分离。于是确实显得人类不知何故与自然分离——或更糟，成为地球表面忘恩负义的祸害，近乎寄生虫。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: It is materialized action, a self, part of other selves, as you are part of other selves. The intensity here is different. You, any human being, represent a capability, an attraction, an electrical field of great intensity that is capable of efficiently acting as a unit within the physical field.
quotes.translation: 它是物质化的行动，一个自我，其他自我的一部分，正如你是其他自我的一部分。此处的强度不同。你，任何人类个体，代表一种能力、一种吸引力、一个高强度的电场，能够在物质场中高效地作为一个单元运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is true the division is arbitrary. Nevertheless the ego is a part of the self. We are acquainting it with other portions of the self. It is still the director of physical activities. Properly trained and intuitively governed this portion of the self can be of benefit in survival circumstances.
quotes.translation: 这种划分确实是武断的。然而自我是本体的一部分。我们正在让它认识本体的其他部分。它仍然是身体活动的指挥者。经过适当训练并受直觉引导时，本体的这一部分能在生存情境中发挥助益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: All of you have but one responsibility, and that responsibility is to the self. Not necessarily to the self as you know it but to the whole self. It is your responsibility, you see, to develop all your abilities. It is your responsibility to materialize within your own system your own potentials.
quotes.translation: 你们所有人都只有一个责任，那就是对本体的责任。不一定是对你所认知的本体，而是对整体本体。你看，发展你所有的能力是你的责任。在你的系统内实现你自身的潜能是你的责任。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: An individual inner self, then, through constant massive effort of great creative intensity, cooperates with all other inner selves to form and maintain the physical reality that you know, so that physical reality is an offshoot or by-product of (Pause), the highly conscious creative inner self.
quotes.translation: 因此，个体内在本体通过持续不断的巨大创造性努力，与所有其他内在本体合作，形成并维持你所知的物质实相，使得物质实相成为高度觉知的创造性内在本体的分支或副产品。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Not only is the entity strengthened, but portions of it, having been actualized in three-dimensional existence, now add to the very quality and nature of that existence. Without this creativity, planetary life in your terms would always be sterile. The soul or entity then gives breath to the body, and to the three-dimensional self within it. The three-dimensional self then goes about its purpose of opening up new areas of creativity.
quotes.translation: 不仅存有得到强化，其部分在三维存在中实现后，更增添了该存在的品质与本质。没有这种创造力，以你们的话来说，行星生命将永远贫瘠。灵魂或存有赋予身体呼吸，也赋予其中的三维本体生命。而三维本体则致力于开辟新的创造力领域。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is energy concentrated to a degree quite unbelievable to you. It contains potentials unlimited, but it must work out its own identity and form its own worlds. It carries within it the burden of all being. Within it are personality potentials beyond your comprehension. Remember, this is your own soul or entity I am speaking of, as well as soul or entity in general. You are one manifestation of your own soul. How many of you would want to limit your reality, your entire reality, to the experience you now know? You do this when you imagine that your present self is your entire personality, or insist that your identity be maintained unchanged through an endless eternity.
quotes.translation: 这是以你们难以置信的程度凝聚的能量。它包含无限的潜能，但必须发展出自身身份并形成自己的世界。它承载着所有存在的重担。其中蕴含着超乎你们理解的人格潜能。请记住，我所说的正是你们自己的灵魂或存有，也是一般意义上的灵魂或存有。你是自己灵魂的一种显化。你们中有多少人愿意将自己的实相——全部的实相——局限于此刻所知的体验？当你们想象当前自我就是完整人格，或坚持自己的身份必须永恒不变时，正是在做这样的事。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The dependent portion of the personality is literally appalled at the more aggressive aspects of the whole personality. In the case of Philip, we find these aggressive tendencies welcomed. But because basically Philip is able to unite the various levels of the self, there is no such deep and persistent physical problem. The aggressiveness is given reign and acceptance. The tendency toward division in Philip's personality shows itself in this tendency toward secrecy, which affects most deeply the nature of his home life.
quotes.translation: 人格中依赖的部分对整体人格更具侵略性的面向感到惊恐。在菲利普的案例中，我们发现这些侵略性倾向受到欢迎。但正因为菲利普基本上能统合自我的各个层面，才没有产生如此深层持久的身体问题。侵略性得到释放与接纳。菲利普人格中分裂的倾向通过这种保密倾向显现，这最深切地影响了他家庭生活的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality is on its own, with what you may call the power of self-determination and free will. If you had thoroughly remembered our material on value fulfillment, you would know that the only detriment to so-called free will is the built-in necessity for value fulfillment. The personality must gain experience, in other words, on a particular level of existence, on which or within which it operates, and it cannot choose otherwise. It must experience existence on the particular level on which it has been projected.
quotes.translation: 人格是独立的，拥有你们所谓的自决力和自由意志。如果你们彻底记住了我们关于价值完成的资料，就会知道所谓自由意志的唯一限制，就是与生俱来的价值完成必要性。换言之，人格必须在它运作的特定存在层面上获得经验，它无法选择其他方式。它必须体验它被投射到的那个特定层面的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Such understanding simply cannot follow logical lines. The intellect may indeed grasp some of this understanding from the intuitions, but the intellect itself is aware of only minute portions of the whole personality. Again, this is not meant to minimize the value of the intellect. The fact remains that answers sought by a personality can only be found through a traveling within the actions that compose the self. Within our last session, I explained some of the basic psychological heritage that resides within the action makeup of the personality. There is no escaping this heritage, and it is so important that without it the personality system could not be built up.
quotes.translation: 这种理解无法遵循逻辑路线。理智确实可能从直觉中领悟到部分理解，但理智本身只意识到整个人格的极小部分。再次强调，这并非要贬低理智的价值。事实是，人格寻求的答案只能通过穿越构成自性的行动来找到。在上次课程中，我解释了存在于人格行动构成中的一些基本心理传承。这种传承无法逃避，而且如此重要，没有它人格系统就无法建立。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As we have to some extent mentioned earlier, here we have travel through probable actions, where each conceivable action is experienced. The self allows itself to change while retaining knowledge that it is the self who changes. It develops through the changes. Time can only be measured through experience. It is obvious that other gestalt personalities experience more in an equivalent amount of your time, but this is not the point.
quotes.translation: 正如我们之前多少提到过的，这里我们穿越了可能行动，每个可想象的行动都被体验。自性在改变的同时保留着知道是自性在改变的知识。它通过改变而发展。时间只能通过经验来衡量。显然，其他完形人格在你们同等时间内体验得更多，但这不是重点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Before our break I will leave you with a few questions. （Smile, lighting cigarette.） Was there something your future self had forgotten? Did the future self request information, and did this request cause the present self, you see, to make an actual and legitimate projection into the future?
quotes.translation: 休息前我会留给你们几个问题。（微笑，点燃香烟。）你们未来的自己是否忘记了什么？未来的自己是否请求了信息，而这个请求是否导致现在的自己，你们看，对未来做出了实际且合法的投射？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This designation does not include the entity as a whole, however. The personality does have access to the entity, but the personality does not contain the entity. In other words the whole self as it exists on your plane does not contain the entity, although communication between the entity and the whole self can and does take place by means of the inner senses.
quotes.translation: 然而，这个指定并不包括整体存有。人格确实可以接触到存有，但人格并不包含存有。换句话说，存在于你们层面的整体自性并不包含存有，尽管存有与整体自性之间可以通过内在感官进行沟通，而且确实在沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Ruburt's mother is part of an entity, and he should remember this. He does not have arthritis, although he has been mimicking the symptoms, and could in time hypnotize himself into believing he did have the disease, though this is highly improbable given his own constitution. The spontaneous self happens to be basically more powerful and far more sensible than the ego, and would never stand for this development. It would doubtless cause some sort of an explosion however, in order to prevent any such occurrence.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏的母亲是某个存有的一部分，他应该记住这一点。他没有关节炎，尽管他一直在模仿症状，并且最终可能催眠自己相信确实患有这种疾病，但考虑到他的体质，这极不可能发生。自发自性本质上比自我更强大、更明智得多，绝不会容忍这种发展。不过，它无疑会引发某种爆发，以防止任何此类事件发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This would not lead to a blurring of consciousness or focus. Instead the greater flexibility would result in a perfection of conscious focus. The seeming great division between the waking and the sleeping self is largely a result of the division in function, the two being largely separated -- a block of time being allotted to the one, and a larger block of time to the other. They are kept apart, then, because of your use of time.
quotes.translation: 这不会导致意识或专注力的模糊。相反，更大的灵活性反而会带来意识专注的完美化。清醒自我与睡眠自我之间看似巨大的分野，很大程度上源于功能上的划分——两者被大致分离，一段时间分配给前者，更长时间分配给后者。因此，它们之所以被分隔，正是源于你对时间的运用方式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The ego may assimilate only a part of a given experience. Sometimes it will not assimilate or accept an experience at all. Remember here again that there is a difference between the ego and consciousness of self. It is not necessary that the ego assimilate all experiences that are open to consciousness of self. ego must have at hand, however, those experiences that are significant for manipulation within the physical environment.
quotes.translation: 自我可能仅吸收特定经验的一部分。有时它甚至完全不会吸收或接纳某个经验。请再次记住，自我与自我意识之间存在差异。自我无需吸收所有向自我意识敞开的经验。但自我必须掌握那些对在物质环境中的操控具有重要意义的经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When you understand that basically all are one, and that in actuality there are no limitations between self and not-self, then these facts will not bother you. It also of course works the other way, so that when an individual feels energy- depleted, he does subconsciously, and by the same sort of process, drain off reserves from nonidentity molecular sources.
quotes.translation: 当你理解到本质上万物一体，实际上自我与非我之间并无界限时，这些事实便不会困扰你。反之亦然，当个体感到能量枯竭时，会通过同样的过程在潜意识中从非身份性的分子源头汲取储备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: When such abilities as telepathy occur, this telepathic function is carried on continually by this other self-conscious part of you, but as a rule you act upon such data without the knowledge of the conscious self with which you are familiar. I wanted to at least get into this material this evening, because while it may sound complex to you now, it is really basic. And it is knowledge that you must have before we can go further.
quotes.translation: 当心灵感应这类能力显现时，这种感应功能其实一直由你内在的另一个具有自我意识的部分持续运作。但通常你会在熟悉的意识自我不知情的情况下，依据这些信息采取行动。我今晚至少想触及这些材料，因为虽然现在听起来可能复杂，但这确实是基础。在我们继续深入之前，你必须掌握这些知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is a correlation here with something Ruburt said in [ESP] class last evening. He said that writing can be, first, a method of standing apart from life to some extent -- in order to capture life, and preserve the unutterable uniqueness of any given day. But, he said, you can then discover that the writing itself becomes the day's experience. You are then "lost" in the writing as much as you feared being lost in normal living, with no way to step aside and view the experience. My addition, now, to those remarks is this: You would need the creation then of another "self," who stood aside from the writing self in order to preserve the original intent.
quotes.translation: 这与鲁柏昨晚在[ESP]课程中所说的内容存在关联。他说写作首先可以是某种程度上的抽离生活——为了捕捉生活，保存任何一天难以言喻的独特性。但他又说，随后你会发现写作本身变成了那天的体验。你于是"迷失"在写作中，就像你曾害怕在正常生活中迷失那样，无法抽身旁观这个体验。我现在对这些话语的补充是：你随后需要创造另一个"自我"，这个自我站在写作自我之外，以保持最初的意图。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 692
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: If you have become afraid of emotion or the expression of feeling, or if you have been taught that the inner self is no more than a repository of uncivilized impulses, then you may have the habit of denying this deep rhythm. You may try to operate as if it did not exist, or even try to refute it. But it represents your deepest, most creative impulses; to fight against it is like trying to swim upstream against a strong current.
quotes.translation: 如果你已对情绪或情感表达感到恐惧，或者你被教导内在自我不过是未开化冲动的储藏室，那么你可能养成了否认这种深层节奏的习惯。你可能会试图假装它不存在，甚至试图反驳它。但它代表着你最深层、最具创造力的冲动；对抗它就像逆着激流游泳。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Dream therapy will be discussed in many of our sessions, and definite directions will be given, whereby the waking self can to a large extent insure the help of the physical organism. The various aspects of the self communicate with each other, when they do, in a very sly fashion, for no such communication is direct. They are like relatives who do not speak to each other, yet each one knows what goes on in the others household.
quotes.translation: 梦的治疗将在我们的许多课程中讨论，届时会给出明确的方向，使醒时的自我在很大程度上能确保得到身体机体的帮助。自我的各个面向彼此沟通时，它们以一种非常隐秘的方式进行，因为这种沟通没有直接的。它们就像互不交谈的亲戚，但每一方都知道对方家里发生的事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In the dream state you allow yourself greater freedom, trying out certain ideas and beliefs in this more plastic framework. You may therefore accept new beliefs initially in the dream state, and the intellectual or emotional realization may only come "later." In dreaming, the conscious mind itself is far more lenient and playful. It can afford this greater permissiveness because it well knows that it need not immediately test out theory in the daily context. It very willingly looks inward toward those areas of the inner self's experience to see what it can find for its own use, quite like an explorer searching for resources in virgin territory.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，你允许自己更大的自由，在这个更具可塑性的框架内尝试某些想法和信念。因此，你最初可能在梦境中接受新的信念，而理智或情感上的领悟可能只会在“之后”才出现。在梦中，意识心本身要宽容得多，也更爱玩。它能允许这种更大的放纵，因为它深知自己不必立即在日常情境中检验理论。它很乐意向内看向内在自我经验的那些领域，看看能找到什么为自己所用，就像一个探险家在处女地寻找资源。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In other words the apparent intensity of the egotistical reactions is a sham on the part of the ego, to hide the fact that it refuses to become involved with action as a whole, because it fears for its permanence. When the ego understands, and it will, that it is a portion of the whole self, and itself a part of action, then indeed it will not fear for its own permanence, for it will realize that being a part of action, its very nature is dependent upon change, and vitality, and value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，自我反应的那种表面强度是自我的伪装，以掩盖它拒绝整体地参与行动的事实，因为它担心自己的恒久性。当自我明白——它会的——它是整体自我的一部分，并且它自身也是行动的一部分时，那么它确实不会再为自己的恒久性担忧，因为它会认识到，作为行动的一部分，它的本质依赖于变化、活力与价值完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. This inner ego can also operate within the dream state, and in certain awake-seeming dreams it is the portion that realizes that the personality is not in its normal waking condition. It is this portion of the self that is with you in the most excellent projections. The inner ego is the part of the personality that contains the highest aspirations and capabilities. It has been called by psychologists the subliminal self.
quotes.translation: 现在。这个内在自我也可以在梦境中运作，在某些看似清醒的梦中，正是这一部分意识到人格并不处于正常的醒时状态。正是自我的这一部分在最出色的投射中与你同在。内在自我是人格中包含最高志向与能力的部分。心理学家曾称之为阈下自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This is a voluntary arrangement. The boy needs the additional vitality. I do not believe the boy will live to old age. The father loaned this vitality and helps the boy, knowing beforehand the boy's difficulty. The boy is unable to relate fully to physical reality. When the man called your father dies his energy will return to the self who is waiting. That self will then call back the energy which it has loaned to Ruth's son.
quotes.translation: 这是一种自愿的安排。那个男孩需要额外的活力。我不认为那个男孩会活到老年。父亲借出了这份活力并帮助了男孩，事先就知道男孩的困难。男孩无法完全与物质实相建立联系。当那个被称为你父亲的人去世时，他的能量将回到那个等待着的自我那里。那个自我随后将收回它借给露丝儿子的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is the self that looks outward. It is the self that you call egotistically aware. The inner self became what I refer to as the inner ego. It looks into that inner reality, that psychic dimension of awareness from which both your own consciousness and your body consciousness emerged.
quotes.translation: 它是向外看的自我。它是你称之为自我意识的那部分自我。内在自我变成了我所说的内在自我。它看向那种内在实相，那种心理维度的觉知，你的意识与你的身体意识都从中涌现。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your own physical environment appears as it does to you because of your own psychological structure. If you gained your sense of personal continuity through associative processes primarily, rather than as a result of the familiarity of self moving through time, then you would experience physical reality in an entirely different fashion. Objects from past and present could be perceived at once, their presence justified through associative connections. Say that your father throughout his lifetime has eight favorite chairs. If your perceptive mechanisms were primarily set up as a result of intuitive association rather than time sequence, then you would perceive all of these chairs at one time; or seeing one, you would be aware of the others. So environment is not a separate thing in itself, but the result of perceptive patterns, and these are determined by psychological structure.
quotes.translation: 你自身的物质环境之所以呈现为现在的模样，完全取决于你的心理结构。如果你主要通过联想过程而非自我穿越时间时的熟悉感来获得个人连续性，那么你体验物质实相的方式将截然不同。过去与现在的物体可能同时被感知，它们的存在通过联想关联得以合理化。假设你父亲一生中有八把心爱的椅子，若你的感知机制主要建立在直觉联想而非时间序列上，你便会同时看见所有这些椅子；或者看见一把时，就会意识到其他椅子的存在。因此环境本身并非独立存在，而是感知模式的结果，而这些模式又由心理结构决定。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You do not understand the communications between your selves and pets, for example, where in their own way they interpret and react to your beliefs.* They mirror your ideas, then, and so become vulnerable as they would not be in their natural circumstances. In greater terms their relationship with you is natural, of course, but their innate realization that the creature's point of power is in the present is to some degree undermined by their own receptivity and translation of your beliefs. A young kitten is treated differently than an older one. The cat responds to such conditioning. In the same way your own conclusions about age become fact in your experience. In line with them, if you could convince yourself that you were ten years younger, or ten years older, then it would be faithfully reflected in your personal environment.
quotes.translation: 例如，你并不理解自己与宠物之间的沟通——它们以自身方式诠释并回应你的信念。于是它们映照出你的想法，因而变得脆弱，这在自然环境中本不会发生。从更宏大的角度看，它们与你的关系当然是自然的，但动物天生"力量点在于当下"的认知，会因它们对你信念的接收与转译而受到某种程度的削弱。人们对幼猫与老猫的态度不同，猫也会回应这种制约。同理，你对年龄的结论会成为你经验中的事实。若你能说服自己年轻十岁或年长十岁，这便会忠实地反映在你的个人环境中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: Many who write want to develop and use the same abilities, yet it is obvious from their letters that their beliefs prevent them from trusting the inner self enough. You cannot fear your own being and expect to travel through it, to explore its dimensions. First you must take the simple step of affirming your identity. That affirmation will release those attributes that you have and open up new avenues of experience. They will and must be your own. When you ask others to interpret your dreams, for example, you are automatically putting the fulfillment of your own potentials a step away. When you ask another to tell you the direction of your life, then to some extent you keep from yourself the realization that you yourself possess it. Without that awareness no methods will help you.
quotes.translation: 许多写作之人渴望发展并运用相同的能力，但从他们的来信中明显看出，信念阻碍了他们足够信任内在自我。你无法既恐惧自身存在，又期望穿越它、探索其维度。首先你必须采取简单步骤：肯定自己的身份。这份肯定将释放你所拥有的特质，并开启新的经验途径。这些途径将且必须属于你自己。例如，当你请他人解梦时，便自动将自身潜能的实现推远了一步。当你请他人告知人生方向时，便在某种程度上否认了自己本就拥有它的认知。没有这份觉知，任何方法都无济于事。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (Slowly:) I told you once that there were pulses of activity in which you blinked off and on -- this applying even to atomic and subatomic particles.1 "You" assign as real -- present here and now -- only that activity that is your signal. "You" are not aware of the others. When people think in terms of one self, they of course identify with one body. You know that the cellular structure of it changes constantly. The body is at any given moment, however, a mass conglomeration of energy formed from that rich bank of probable activity. The body is not stable in the terms usually thought of. On deeper biological levels the cells straddle probabilities, and trigger responses. Consciousness rides upon and within the pulses mentioned earlier, and forms its own organizations of identity. Each probability -- probable only in relation to and from the standpoint of another probability -- is inviolate, however, in that it is not destroyed. Once formed, the pattern will follow its own nature.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）我曾告诉过你，存在一种活动脉冲，你在此中闪烁明灭——这甚至适用于原子与亚原子粒子。1 "你"只将作为你信号的活动认定为真实——即此时此地的存在。"你"并未意识到其他活动。当人们以单一自我的概念思考时，自然认同于单一身体。然而你深知其细胞结构不断变化。在任何特定时刻，身体都是由那丰沛的可能活动库中形成的能量聚合体。身体并非通常所认为的稳定存在。在更深的生物学层面，细胞跨越可能性并触发反应。意识乘骑并栖居于前述脉冲之中，形成其自身的身份组织。每个可能性——仅相对于另一可能性并从其立场而言才具可能性——都是不可侵犯的，因其不会被摧毁。一旦形成，模式将遵循其自身本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: (From the 33rd session for March 9, 1964:) I do not bring about the trance state in the manner of which you [Joseph] are speaking. Ruburt switches on another channel, through which my essence can enter more readily. This certainly does involve a looking inward on his part, but it is not self-hypnosis in usual terms -- merely a focusing upon an objective inner stimulus ... Any such signs (as the powerful, deeper Seth voice) involve camouflage patterns, and do not actually represent direct experience. This is not my voice, for example. It is a representation or approximation of my voice for your edification. Furthermore, in your terms I do not have a voice. But it is a valid representation, and if I say so myself -- that's a pun -- the voice is much like the one I would use....
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年3月9日第33节课：）我并非以你[约瑟夫]所说的方式引发出神状态。鲁柏切换至另一频道，使我的本质能更易进入。这当然涉及他的向内观照，但并非通常意义上的自我催眠——只是聚焦于客观的内在刺激……任何此类迹象（如深沉有力的赛斯之声）都涉及伪装模式，并不实际代表直接经验。例如这并非我的声音，而是为启迪你们而呈现的声音表征或近似物。况且以你们的说法，我并无声音。但这是有效的表征——容我自夸一句（这是双关语）——这声音与我本会使用的声音极为相似……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The nonphysical personality does not think in terms of words, but experiences concepts in a much more direct manner. This sort of thing simply could not be understood by the physically focused individual ... The survival personality's inner self gives this reassembled ego ideas in the same way that, often, the subconscious gives the ego concepts in physical existence. This reassembled ego then attempts to perceive these insights in terms of sense perceptions, which are sent to the physical individual at the other end. Sometimes the communications are made directly, though they must be sifted through the subconscious of the one who is physical. When that person is trained along these lines, however [as Ruburt is], he or she helps in this process, and a psychological framework, like a bridge,22 is erected that serves to connect the two personalities.
quotes.translation: 非肉体的存有并不以文字思考，而是以更直接的方式体验概念。这类事物绝非聚焦于物质世界的个体所能理解……生存人格的内在自我以类似方式向重组后的自我传递理念——正如物质存在中潜意识常向自我传递概念。这个重组后的自我随后试图以感官知觉的形式感知这些洞见，并将其传送至另一端的物质个体。有时沟通是直接进行的，但必须透过物质个体的潜意识过滤。然而当此人经过此类训练时（如鲁柏），他或她会协助这一过程，并建立起类似桥梁的心理架构，22用以连接两个存有。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I speak as my whole self to you ... since my personality structure is more advanced than is usual for communications from other systems. Therefore, I do not need to adopt a past ego [of my own]. Perhaps because this is not necessary, the psychological bridge is required to make my messages comprehensible to Ruburt. This connecting framework does some of the translating for me that a reassembled ego would do. It delivers information to Ruburt in a way that he can understand. Occasionally [in your tests] I do impress him directly, telepathically (see Note 19), with a concept. When he receives data in the form of images the framework is operating. With my direction, this framework uses Ruburt's personal associations to direct his impressions toward the correct point. Then when we are successful I insert the right information.23
quotes.translation: 我以完整的自己对你说话……因为我的人格结构比来自其他系统的通讯更为先进。因此，我不需要采用[我自己的]过去自我。或许正因无此必要，才需要心理桥梁让我的讯息能被鲁柏理解。这个连接框架代我完成了重组自我本应做的部分翻译工作。它以一种鲁柏能理解的方式传递信息。偶尔[在你们的测试中]我会直接通过心电感应（见注19）将概念印刻在他心中。当他以图像形式接收数据时，这个框架就在运作。在我的指引下，该框架利用鲁柏的个人联想，将他的印象导向正确方向。当我们成功时，我便植入正确信息。23
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.
