quotes.text: Any true psychic development of personality, however, is bound to lead to an understanding of the nature of the psyche that is far too large for any such confusion of basic identity with sexuality. The concept of reincarnation itself clearly shows the change of sexual orientation, and the existence of a self that is apart from its sexual orientation, even while it is also expressed through a given sexual stance. To a good extent, sexual beliefs are responsible for the blocking-out of reincarnational awareness. Such "memory" would necessarily acquaint you with experiences most difficult to correlate with your current sexual roles. Those other-sex existences are present to the psyche unconsciously. They are a portion of your personality. In so specifically identifying with your sex, therefore, you also inhibit memories that might limit or destroy that identification.
quotes.translation: 然而，任何真正的人格灵性发展，必然导向对心灵本质的理解——这种理解远非将基本身份与性取向混淆所能企及。轮回概念本身清晰显示了性取向的转变，以及一个独立于性取向的自我存在——即便它同时通过特定性别立场表达。在很大程度上，性信念正是阻碍轮回觉知的原因。这种"记忆"必然让你接触到与当前性别角色最难调和的经历。那些异性别存在无意识中存在于心灵中，是你人格的组成部分。因此，当你如此明确地认同自身性别时，也同时抑制了可能限制或摧毁这种认同的记忆。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Consciousness within the body knows that its existence is within the body's context, and apart from it at the same time. In ordinary life during the day consciousness often takes a recess, so to speak -- it daydreams, or otherwise experiences itself as somewhat apart from the body's reality. At night, in sleep, the self's consciousness takes longer, freer recesses from physical reality, and does this as spontaneously as the body itself walks. These experiences are not hypothetical. They happen to each person. On such occasions, each person is to some extent aware of a kind of comprehension that is not dependent upon the accumulation of data, but of a deeper kind of experience and direct encounter with the reality from which the world emerges.
quotes.translation: 身体内的意识知道自身既存在于身体脉络中，又同时独立于它。在日间寻常生活里，意识时常会"休息"——它做白日梦，或以某种方式体验自身与身体现实的分离。夜晚睡眠时，自我意识会从物质现实中获得更长久、更自由的休憩，其自然程度如同身体行走一般。这些体验并非假设，而是发生在每个人身上。在这些时刻，每个人都某种程度上意识到一种不依赖数据积累的理解——那是一种更深层的体验，以及与万物源起之现实的直接相遇。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The serf will invariably be looking at his time through a different focus than his future self could ever do. And think of the added challenges of feeling and perception where sexual changes between present and past incarnations are involved! Eroticism--and yes, outright sexual curiosity and arousal over reversed genitalia, for instance--must enter in sometimes, although in print at least these specifics of sex in connection with reincarnation seem to be a taboo subject. By contrast, there's plenty of material in the reincarnational literature on the generalized patterns of sexual behavior, from promiscuity to repression. (I wonder whether a long-term past-life sexual fantasy could be connected to a real sexual problem or challenge in a present--or future--life.)
quotes.translation: 农奴看待自己时代的视角，永远不同于未来自我可能采取的方式。试想当涉及前世与今生之间的性别转换时，感受与知觉将面临何等额外的挑战！情欲——是的，甚至对反转生殖器的直白性好奇与兴奋——有时必然介入其中，尽管至少在印刷品中，这些与轮回相关的性细节似乎仍是禁忌话题。相比之下，轮回文献中关于性行为普遍模式（从滥交到压抑）的材料却比比皆是。（我怀疑长期的前世性幻想是否可能与今生——或来世——真实的性问题或挑战相关联。）
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: The next natural step would be to reassimilate those portions of the self, to acknowledge their ancient origins and abilities, to return them so that they form a new coating, as it were, or a new version of selfhood. It is as if (pause) man could not understand his own potentials unless he projected them outward into a godhead, where he could see them in a kind of isolated pure form, recognize them for what they are, and then accept them--the potentials--as a part of his own psychological reality (all very intently). As a species, however, you have not taken the last step. Your idea of the devil represents the same kind of process, except that it stands for your idea of evil or darkness, or abilities that you are afraid of. They also stand for elements of your own potential. I am not speaking of evil possibilities, but that man must realize that he is responsible for his acts, whether they are called good or evil.
quotes.translation: 下一步自然是要重新整合自我的那些部分，承认它们古老的起源与能力，将它们召回以形成新的涂层——如同为自我性披上新装。仿佛（停顿）人类除非将自身潜能投射到神性中，在某种纯粹孤立的形式中看见它们，认清其本质，然后接纳这些潜能作为自身心理现实的一部分（极其专注地），否则便无法理解自己的潜能。然而作为一个物种，你们尚未迈出最后一步。你们对魔鬼的概念代表着同样的过程，只是它象征着你们对邪恶或黑暗的认知，或你们所恐惧的能力。它们同样代表着你们自身潜能的元素。我并非在谈论邪恶的可能性，而是说人类必须认识到自己要为自己的行为负责——无论这些行为被称为善还是恶。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner ego knows when to apply safety valves, and is aware of the danger before the outer ego is alerted. The inner ego is concerned with maintaining the foundations and balance, which is very important, of the whole self, and it is open to messages from the overall entity. The inner ego receives messages through the inner senses, and is aware of realities which the outer ego cannot afford to recognize because of its specialization. In some important aspects the outer ego is supposed to represent to some degree the subdominant personalities who still dwell in the subconscious. When the outer ego is narrow, and poorly represents these subdominant personalities then they rise up in arms, and when conditions are favorable attempt to express themselves through a momentary weakness on the part of the dominant ego. But without even doing this they may momentarily take over or express themselves through a single function, such as speech or motion, while the outer ego is blissfully unaware.
quotes.translation: 内在自我知道何时启用安全阀，并在外在自我警觉之前就已察觉危险。内在自我致力于维护整个自我的根基与平衡——这至关重要——并且对来自整体实体的讯息保持开放。内在自我通过内在感官接收讯息，并知晓那些因专业化而无法被外在自我承认的现实。在某些重要方面，外在自我本应适度代表仍潜藏于潜意识中的从属人格。当外在自我狭隘且未能妥善代表这些从属人格时，它们便会揭竿而起，在条件有利时试图通过主导自我的短暂弱点表达自己。即便不采取这种行动，它们也可能暂时接管或通过单一功能（如言语或动作）表达自己，而外在自我却浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is a chameleon like characteristic, a continuity, not in terms of successive moments, but a continuity in terms of design. Events are perceived in what would seem a most alien manner to the ego. The probabilities are traveled through, so to speak. Identity or continuity of the self is retained and strengthened in a series of simultaneous events, with value fulfillment foremost insofar as purposeful action is concerned.
quotes.translation: 自我具有类似变色龙的特性，其连续性并非体现在连续的时刻中，而是体现在设计模式上。事件以自我最陌生的方式被感知。可以说，概率被穿越了。在同时性事件系列中，自我的身份或连续性得以保留并强化，就目的性行动而言，价值完成居于首位。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You have a full stature as a personality that you are not reaching. There is a self into which you shall grow, a strong intuitive self in full control of its own destiny so far as is possible. This is the self that you cannot deny, and this should be the object of your search for now.
quotes.translation: 你拥有尚未达到的完整人格高度。有一个你终将成长而成的自我，一个尽可能完全掌控自身命运的强健直觉性自我。这是你无法否认的自我，也应是当前探索的目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In sleep, when the ego is quieted, then the self looks in other directions. In sleep the self becomes conscious of its dreams, but this does not mean that the dreams have not existed while you were not conscious of them. Nor does it mean that they cease to exist when you are no longer conscious of them, for they have their own sort of molecular and electrical construction. But the ego cannot tune into that perceptive range.
quotes.translation: 睡眠中，当自我安静下来时，自我便转向其他方向。睡眠中自我意识到自己的梦境，但这并不意味着在你未意识到它们时梦境就不存在。也不意味着当你不再意识到它们时它们就停止存在，因为它们拥有自己独特的分子与电性结构。但自我无法调谐到那个感知范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Any such divisions are of course arbitrary to begin with. Practically speaking a self can be defined as an energy gestalt whose perceptions are organized under the auspices of apparent identity. The more of reality that is perceived the larger the dimensions of the self, or identity.
quotes.translation: 任何此类划分当然都是武断的。实际上，自我可被定义为一种能量完形，其感知在显见身份的主持下组织而成。感知到的实相越多，自我或身份的维度就越大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Outer physical time is a complete camouflage, unnecessary basically on your plane; but you have made it seem necessary because of your refusal to admit the inner self as part of your whole personality, and therefore you have not been able to utilize psychological time to its fullest advantage on your plane. Psychological time as I have said is a natural pathway, part of an inner sense, that was meant as an easy access from the inner to the outer world and back again. You do not use it as such.
quotes.translation: 外在物理时间是彻底的伪装，在你们层面上本非必要；但因你们拒绝承认内在自我是完整人格的一部分，故未能充分利用心理时间在你们层面的最大优势。如我所言，心理时间是自然通道，是内在感官的一部分，本应作为从内在世界通往外在世界再返回的便捷途径。你们并未如此使用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: For all of this, however, inner portions of each individual's being are not touched by those beliefs. The ideas will be reflected in their daily experience, certainly, and seem to be justified. Yet beneath, the inner self is quite aware of the great thrusting creativity that occurs in dreams, and realizes that the source of individual energy has nothing to do with such superficial concepts as the nature of good and evil.
quotes.translation: 尽管如此，每个个体存在的内在部分并未被这些信念触及。这些观念当然会反映在日常经验中，看似合理。然而在表层之下，内在自我完全知晓梦境中发生的巨大创造力迸发，并意识到个体能量的源头与善恶本质这类肤浅概念毫无关联。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Various portions of the self therefore face physical reality at any given time as the ego. The process is constant. An attempt to maintain the status quo is of course natural on the part of the ego, but when this becomes a stubborn effort to maintain dominancy then the difficulties arise. The self throws up those portions of itself that it considers most able to handle the changing physical environment at any given time.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我的各个部分在任何特定时刻都会以自我的身份面对物质实相。这个过程是持续不断的。自我自然会试图维持现状，但当这种努力变成固执地维持主导地位时，困难就出现了。自我会抛出它认为在任何特定时刻最能应对不断变化的物质环境的那部分自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The energy of this inner self is directed and used by it to richly form from itself, from components and inner experience, a material counterpart in which the outer ego then can act out its role. The outer ego is most in the role, acting out a play that the inner self has written.
quotes.translation: 内在自我的能量由它引导和运用，从自身、从组成部分和内在经验中，丰富地塑造出一个物质对应物，外在自我随后可以在其中扮演其角色。外在自我最投入于角色之中，演绎着内在自我已写好的剧本。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying that in our methods the ego is changed rather completely but gradually in many cases, and only through its own willingness to do so. It recognizes its identity as a part of. underlined, the inner self. Therefore basically it has no need to fight the inner self, since it knows its survival is dependent upon this inner framework.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，在我们的方法中，自我在许多情况下会相当彻底但逐渐地改变，而且只有通过它自己的意愿才能做到。它认识到自己的身份是内在自我的一部分（强调）。因此，它基本上无需与内在自我对抗，因为它知道自己的生存依赖于这个内在架构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: But would our time traveler ever want to give up his or her present mental and physical focus to enter completely into an earlier personality? I think not, in the overwhelming majority of cases--and perhaps never--for in those terms it would mean surrendering a portion of the whole self or entity that had, through a projection into our scheme of "present" time, attained a certain consciousness and physical form of a unique degree. Yet, on second thought I wouldn't dare rule out completely such bizarre developments. Perhaps transfers like that can and do take place within the vast arena of probable realities (which I'll also be discussing in this essay). If so, then, they would be strange only from our limited viewpoints.
quotes.translation: 但我们的时间旅行者会愿意放弃他或她当前的心智和物质焦点，完全进入一个较早的人格吗？我认为在绝大多数情况下不会——也许永远不会——因为按照那些说法，那将意味着放弃整个自我或存有的一部分，而这部分通过投射进入我们“当下”时间的架构，已经获得了某种独特程度的意识和物质形态。然而，转念一想，我不敢完全排除这种离奇的发展。也许这样的转移在可能性实相的广阔领域内（我将在本文中进一步讨论）确实能够且确实发生。如果是这样，那么它们只是从我们有限的视角看来才显得奇怪。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: Now you are looking at the personality with the ego as your starting point. Other portions of the personality however perceive, or attempt to perceive, the whole self from their own starting point. The ego is seen in quite a different light when it is viewed by other portions of the self. It is not viewed--this was a poor term--as much as it was experienced, for no portion of the personality can be viewed as an object.
quotes.translation: 现在，你以自我为起点来审视人格。然而，人格的其他部分却从它们自己的起点来感知或试图感知整个自我。当自我被自我的其他部分审视时，它会被以一种截然不同的方式看待。它并非被“看待”——这个词用得不好——而是被体验，因为人格的任何部分都不能被当作一个客体来审视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The one self that he recognizes is the only part of himself of which he is presently aware. Other facets of consciousness available to him, and a part of his greater nature, appear foreign, or "not-self," or "beyond self," because of the focus of selectivity as it now operates.
quotes.translation: 他所认识的那个自我，只是他目前意识到的自己的一部分。其他可为他所用的意识面向，以及他更伟大本性的一部分，却显得陌生，或被视为“非我”，或“超越自我”，这是因为选择性聚焦目前运作的方式。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 684
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The self is limitless. Where your perceptions fail, boundaries seem to appear. This has much to do with your conception of the reality of dreams, for it appears to you that dreams cease when you are no longer aware of them. Another portion of the self however is aware of them.
quotes.translation: 自我是无限的。当你的感知失效时，界限便似乎出现了。这与你们对梦境实相的理解密切相关，因为当你们不再意识到梦境时，它们似乎就终止了。然而，自我的另一部分却始终知晓它们的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Ruburt knew that Helper could be sent out to others, to their advantage, and in that regard the form stood for the great power of natural, positive desire and thought patterns. (To me:) You have the same kind of "form." These represent the greater source-selves out of which your present persons spring. I told you that you possessed far more knowledge about your own lives, and the lives of others, than you were intellectually aware of.2 You act on that knowledge, for one thing, when you are born physically, when you grow. The squirrel acts on that kind of knowledge when it buries nuts--as you saw, again, on a recent TV program--and the squirrel's greater knowledge includes the knowledge of its species as well.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏知道"助人者"可以被发送给他人，为他们带来益处，就此而言，这种形态代表了自然、正向欲望与思维模式的强大力量。（对我而言：）你拥有同样类型的"形态"。这些形态代表着更大的源头自我，而你们当前的人格正是从中涌现的。我曾告诉过你们，你们对自己及他人生命的了解，远比你们理智上意识到的要多得多。你们在肉体出生时、在成长过程中，都在依据这种知识行事。就像你们最近在电视节目中看到的，松鼠埋藏坚果时也在运用这种知识——而松鼠的更大知识还包含了其物种的集体知识。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A strong suicidal base frequently exists here. The knowledge is present that the "old self" did not make it -- so what assurance does the so-called new self have? (Pause.) Again, the body is a living sculpture. You are in it and you form it, and it is to all intents and purposes you while you are physical. You must identify your material being with it. Otherwise you will feel alienated from your biological identity.
quotes.translation: 此处常存在强烈的自杀倾向基础。当"旧自我"未能成功时，这种认知便浮现——那么所谓的新自我又有什么保障呢？（停顿。）再次强调，身体是一座活生生的雕塑。你居于其中并塑造它，在物质层面它就是你本身。你必须将物质存在与它认同，否则就会感到与生物身份疏离。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The inner self is highly capable and follows certain electromagnetic routes which it knows, and avoids other routes. Signals from the body reach it constantly. It is in immediate contact with the body on certain levels: survival levels. With these conditions satisfied, it can indeed travel further, so to speak, than in such an experience with drugs. I am comparing now the drug and drugless experiences at their best.
quotes.translation: 内在自我能力卓著，遵循其已知的特定电磁路径，同时避开其他路径。身体信号持续不断地传递给它。在生存层面等特定层次上，它与身体保持着即时联系。当这些条件满足时，它实际上能比药物体验走得更远——我在此比较的是药物与非药物体验的最佳状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: To a future self no more illuminated than you are, you appear dead and lifeless -- a dim memory. When you look out into the universe from your viewpoint, it seems as if you look into the past.8 Scientists tell you that when the light from every distant galaxy reaches you, the galaxy is already dead. In the same way, when you look "backward" into the psyche the life you may indistinctly view -- the past life -- is already vanished. Why is it that your scientists' instruments do not allow them to look into the future instead, into worlds not yet born, since they operate so well in discerning the past? And why is it, with all of your ideas about reincarnation, there is precious little said about future lives?9
quotes.translation: 对于并不比你更开悟的未来自我而言，你显得死气沉沉——不过是个模糊的记忆。当你从自身视角望向宇宙时，仿佛在凝视过去。科学家告诉你，当遥远星系的光芒抵达时，该星系早已消亡。同样，当你"回溯"心灵时，隐约瞥见的生命——前世——已然消逝。为何科学家的仪器能如此精准地探测过去，却无法望向未来、望向尚未诞生的世界？为何在你们关于转世的所有观念中，对未来生命的论述如此稀少？
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 727
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You must realize that fanatics always deal with grandiose ideals, while at the same time they believe in man's sinful nature, and the individual's lack of power. They cannot trust the expression of the self, for they are convinced of its duplicity. Their ideals then seem even more remote. Fanatics call others to social action. Since they do not believe that the individual is ever effective, their groups are not assemblies of private individuals come reasonably together, pooling individual resources. They are instead congregations of people who are afraid to assert their individuality, who hope to find it in the group, or hope to establish a joint individuality -- and that is an impossibility (emphatically).
quotes.translation: 你必须明白，狂热分子总是执着于宏大的理想，同时却相信人类有罪的本性，以及个体能力的匮乏。他们无法信任自我的表达，因为他们确信其具有双重性。于是他们的理想显得更加遥不可及。狂热分子号召他人参与社会行动。由于他们不相信个体能真正发挥作用，他们的团体并非理性聚集、共享个体资源的私人集合，而是那些害怕彰显个性、希望在群体中找到个性、或试图建立共同个性之人的集会——而这根本不可能（强调语气）。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 852, MAY 9, 1979
9:39 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: We will resume dictation ... You will react, therefore, to all the information that you receive according to your conscious beliefs concerning the nature of reality. The deeper portions of the self do not have to take the ego's idea of time into consideration, so these portions of the self also deal with data that would ordinarily escape the ego's perception, perhaps until a certain "point" of ego time was reached.
quotes.translation: 我们将继续口授……因此，你会根据自己对实相本质的有意识信念，对你接收到的所有信息做出反应。自我的更深层部分不必考虑自我的时间观念，因此自我的这些部分也会处理那些通常逃过自我感知的数据——或许直到自我时间达到某个"点"为止。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The mind is always with you. The particular brain is the physical mechanism that translates the thoughts of the mind. It goes without saying then, that the brain belongs to the physical system, and here in clear terms you see the smooth cooperation that exists. Thoughts are initially psych electric patterns in pure form, productions of the inner self that must be translated in order to be used by the physical self.
quotes.translation: 心智始终与你同在。特定的大脑是将心智的思想进行转化的物理机制。不言而喻，大脑属于物质系统，在此你清楚看到存在的顺畅协作。思想最初是纯粹形式的心理电模式，是内在自我的产物，必须经过转化才能被物质自我使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are here also thrusts in all directions, with certain identifying pulsations that underlie all, and that have their origins within the inner self. As the vitality of the universe forms, of itself, the boundaries of the various fields of activity, and as vitality itself takes on the coloration of the various fields and forms the camouflage patterns within them, so also vitality, in the form of emotions that the camouflage patterns of the personality, even while this vitality forms both emotions and personality for every individual, every consciousness, may be thought of as a separate field of activity; and all the data relating to fields of activity may be seen to apply to any consciousness as well.
quotes.translation: 此处同样存在向各个方向的推进，带有某些作为基础的特定识别脉动，这些脉动源自内在自我。正如宇宙的生命力自行形成各种活动领域的边界，正如生命力本身呈现出各个领域的色彩并在其中形成伪装模式，同样地，生命力以情感的形式——即使这生命力同时为每个个体、每个意识形成情感和人格——也可以被视为一个独立的活动领域；而所有与活动领域相关的资料，同样适用于任何意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The word slow, or slowly, is not good in this connotation, since of itself it does not necessarily suggest safety, but a mere neutral and temporary putting off. So far Ruburt is doing well, and will learn as he progresses how to operate inner acceleration and flow, or rush of energy, so that he is comfortable. And the ego, through experience, will learn that the inner self will always return safely. And it would be most unjust, and needlessly cruel, not to give the ego this necessary reassurance; and also the inner self should manage to communicate to the ego its gratitude for the egos protective concern.
quotes.translation: "缓慢"或"慢"这个词在此语境中并不恰当，因为它本身未必暗示安全，而只是中性的暂时搁置。到目前为止，鲁柏做得很好，并将在进步中学会如何运作内在加速与能量流动或奔涌，从而感到舒适。而自我将通过经验学会，内在自我总会安全返回。若不给予自我这种必要的保证，将是最不公正且不必要的残忍；同时内在自我也应设法向自我传达对其保护性关切的感激。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The "you" who is capable of such expansion must be a far more creative and multidimensional personality than you earlier imagined. Many of the suggested small exercises given earlier in the book will also help you become acquainted with your own reality, will give you direct experience with the nature of your own soul or entity, and will put you in contact with those portions of your being from which your own vitality springs. You may or may not have your own encounters with past reincarnational selves or probable selves. You may or may not catch yourselves in the act of changing levels of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 那个能够如此扩展的"你"，必定是比你先前想象的更具创造力、更多维的人格。书中早期建议的许多小练习，也将帮助你认识自己的实相，让你直接体验自己灵魂或存有的本质，并使你与自身生命力所源出的那些部分建立联系。你可能会或不会遭遇自己过去的转世自我或可能自我。你可能会或不会在改变意识层次的过程中捕捉到自己。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The very journey involved in self-discovery, the very self-questioning involved, is indeed part of the process of recovery. The energy being used in the maintenance of the ulcer will already begin to take new channels. The thoughts and anticipations of the personality have already begun to stray from the all important ulcer to the causes behind it, for in this case, as in many others, we find a strange phenomenon.
quotes.translation: 自我发现所涉及的旅程本身，自我质疑本身，确实是康复过程的一部分。用于维持溃疡的能量将开始转向新的渠道。人格的思想和预期已开始从至关重要的溃疡转向其背后的原因，因为在此案例中，如同许多其他案例一样，我们发现了一种奇特的现象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In other cases where the symptom is interior itself, as in ulcers, this is a sign that the inner self has not yet come to such a point. The personality is not yet willing to face the problems even to that extent and the symptom itself is shielded from physical sight, quite rightly symbolically speaking. The relative observability of a symptom is a clue therefore as to the personality's attitude toward its problem.
quotes.translation: 在其他情况下，当症状本身是内在的，比如溃疡，这表明内在自我尚未到达那个地步。人格甚至不愿意面对问题到那种程度，而症状本身被屏蔽于肉体视线之外，从象征意义上说这非常恰当。因此，症状的相对可观察性是人格对其问题态度的线索。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The identity, indeed, is as much and more the inner self as it is the ego. This has been mentioned in the past, but Ruburt became so fearful of his own spontaneity in early life that he was more or less forced, out of fear, to deny the validity of his identity with the inner self. On some occasions, as the other evening, he spontaneously accepts this identification, particularly when alcohol acts as a depressant.
quotes.translation: 身份认同，实际上，与内在自我的关联程度不亚于甚至超过与小我的关联。这一点过去曾提及，但鲁柏在早年变得如此恐惧自己的自发性，以至于他出于恐惧，或多或少被迫否认自己与内在自我身份认同的有效性。在某些场合，比如前几天晚上，他自发地接受了这种认同，尤其是在酒精作为抑制剂的时候。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When you think of reincarnation, you suppose a series of progressions. Instead the various lives grow out of what your inner self is. They are not thrust upon you by some outside agency. They are a material development, as your consciousness opens up and expresses itself in as many ways as possible. It is not restricted to one three-dimensional lifetime, nor is it restricted to three-dimensional existence alone.
quotes.translation: 当你想到转世时，你假设了一系列的进展。相反，各种生命是从你的内在自我所是之中生长出来的。它们并非由某种外在力量强加于你。它们是物质性的发展，随着你的意识开启并以尽可能多的方式表达自己。它不受限于一个三维生命，也不受限于三维存在本身。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: More difficult to achieve is an experience in which the ego becomes more alert in self defense. The ego, for example, did not have to worry about Ruburt's physical survival as he lay in bed and "saw" （in quotes） the clock in the other room. When the ego's instinct for self-protection is aroused, then of course it rises up in arms. This is one of the reasons why the experience of levitation is so seldom achieved.
quotes.translation: 更难达到的是小我在自我防御中变得更加警觉的体验。例如，当鲁柏躺在床上并“看见”（引号内）另一个房间的时钟时，小我并不需要担心他的肉体生存。当小我的自我保护本能被激发时，它当然会奋起反抗。这就是为什么漂浮体验如此罕见的原因之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. Space travel, when it occurs, will utilize expansion of self. Your idea of death is based upon your dependence upon the outer senses. You will learn that it is possible, through no physical act （and underline that, through no physical act）, to relinquish the physical body, expand the self, using atoms and molecules as stepping stones to a given destination, and reforming the physical body at the other end.
quotes.translation: 现在。太空旅行发生时，将利用自我的扩展。你对死亡的观念基于你对外在感官的依赖。你将学会，有可能通过非肉体的行为（并且强调，通过非肉体的行为），放弃肉体，扩展自我，使用原子和分子作为踏脚石到达特定目的地，并在另一端重组肉体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It means that the word is nothing, and that it is merely a symbol for that which you can neither see nor feel nor touch. It is merely a symbol for that small particle of yourselves which you permit your consciousness to perceive. It is a symbol to express that portion of an unseeable self, that is brought most obviously into operation for purposes of manipulation of the physical image within a camouflage field.
quotes.translation: 这意味着言语是虚无的，它仅仅是你既看不见、感觉不到也触摸不到的东西的象征。它仅仅是你允许你的意识感知到的那一小部分自己的象征。它是一个象征，用以表达那不可见的自我的一部分，这部分最明显地用于在伪装场中操控物质形象的目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It could still do this and retain its own nature, merely by allowing into its awareness the reality of other actions as a part of its self-image. There is for example no basic reason why the subconscious and the ego cannot communicate to a much larger extent than is now usual. Such communication would result in the acceptance of additional energy and action by the ego, and an expansion of the ego's self-image.
quotes.translation: 它仍能做到这一点并保持自身本质，只需将其他行动的现实作为其自我形象的一部分纳入觉知。例如，潜意识与自我之间没有根本理由不能进行比现在更广泛的沟通。这种沟通将导致自我接纳额外的能量与行动，并扩展自我的自我形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: A part of the whole self is quite aware of the probabilities. Now. This is a portion of the self that exists as a perceiving participator, in the dimension which we discussed in our last session. This is fairly difficult material, and so I am giving it to you carefully.
quotes.translation: 整体自我的某一部分完全知晓这些可能性。现在。这一部分自我作为感知的参与者，存在于我们上次课中讨论的那个维度。这是相当难懂的材料，所以我谨慎地传授给你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As emotional storms may be the result of a lack of discipline or of knowledge, or of control of one or more portions of the self, bringing about a corresponding exaggeration or growth of other portions of the self, so also erratic physical storms come from the same causes on a collective basis, but with the energy directed outward and often turned to a constructive purpose. Though this is not always the case.
quotes.translation: 正如情绪风暴可能源于对自我某一部分或更多部分的缺乏纪律、知识或控制，导致自我其他部分的相应夸张或增长；同样，不稳定的物理风暴也源于集体层面的相同原因，但能量向外投射，且常转向建设性目的——尽管并非总是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now in a very small way, admittedly, that analogy hints at the kind of deeper events that occur as selves are born out of selves to operate in various levels of activity. In the case of entities, each such self dwells entirely in its own dimension or system of reality.
quotes.translation: 诚然，这个类比在极小程度上暗示了更深层事件的发生方式：当自我从自我中诞生，并在不同活动层面运作时。就存有而言，每个这样的自我完全栖居于其自身的维度或实相系统中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 692
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Again, it is important that you realize the initial nonphysical reaction to stimuli that sparks off all physical reactions. There is constant interplay and communication between the areas of consciousness that are connected to the brain and those that are not. The "deeper" purposes of the consciousness involved "circulate," sometimes arising in the awareness that is joined with the brain. Information coming from those deeper sources of the self, reaching the areas connected to the brain, will be interpreted according to the beliefs of that most physically focused segment of the self.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，重要的是你要认识到：激发所有物理反应的初始非物理反应刺激。与大脑相连的意识区域和未与大脑相连的意识区域之间存在持续的相互作用与沟通。所涉意识的"更深层"目的会"循环"，有时浮现于与大脑相连的觉知中。来自自我这些更深层源头的信息，在抵达与大脑相连的区域时，将根据自我最聚焦于物质的那一部分的信念被诠释。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now. The drug allows for regulated periods of highly intensified consciousness, operating at peak levels, with all of the mental faculties accelerated. Between these periods however there are periods of unconsciousness. These are of a protective nature. During the periods of unconsciousness the drugs injected into the brain give increased nourishment to those areas of the physical brain that are involved in such ejections of consciousness. Therefore even though your probable self is within reaching distance, so to speak, he is sometimes involved in such blackout-nourishment periods.
quotes.translation: 现在。这种药物允许在高峰水平运作的高度强化意识进行有规律的调控期，所有心智官能都加速运转。然而在这些时期之间，存在无意识时期。这些具有保护性质。在无意识期间，注入大脑的药物为参与此类意识投射的物理大脑区域提供更多滋养。因此，即使你的可能性自我触手可及——可以这么说——他有时也正经历这种"黑屏滋养期"。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Ruburt picked up some communications from me last night. One which he did not get clearly was that you can take some consolation in the fact that your whole self is not as deeply affected by your present parents as you would suppose, and I promise to help you attain further important freedoms from any bad influences along this line, in a manner that will still allow you to help them without hurting yourself.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏昨晚接收到了我的一些讯息。其中一条他未能清晰接收的是：你的整体自己受今世父母影响的程度，其实远比你想象的要浅——这事实能给你些许慰藉。我承诺会以既能让你帮助他们又不伤害自身的方式，助你进一步摆脱这方面不良影响的重要束缚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: He, as I explained earlier, has a strong spontaneous self, which he had been taught to fear. It was because of distrust of this spontaneous self that he accepted your suggestions so readily and without argument. This did indeed result in further lack of mobility, with strong Emotional blockages because of his feeling for you. This explains some of the difficulties incidentally in your intimate life together.
quotes.translation: 如我之前解释的，他拥有一个被教导要恐惧的强烈自发自己。正是由于对这种自发自己的不信任，他才如此轻易且毫无异议地接受你的建议。这确实导致行动力进一步丧失，并因他对你的情感而产生强烈情绪阻塞。这顺便解释了你们亲密生活中某些困难的成因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: When large doses of chemicals are used, the conscious mind is confronted full blast with very potent experiences that it was not meant to handle, and by which it is purposely made to feel powerless. (Pause.) Faced with the exterior nightmares of wars and natural disasters, the conscious mind is still directed outward into that world with which it knows it was formed to cope. In periods of great physical stress it draws upon the powers of the body and inner self to perform remarkable feats of heroism -- that leave it wondering afterward at the power and energy of the self in crisis.
quotes.translation: 当大量化学物质被使用时，意识心会直面本不该处理的强烈体验，并被刻意制造出无力感。（停顿）面对战争与自然灾害的外在噩梦时，意识心仍被导向它自认生来就该应对的外部世界。在巨大身体压力时期，它会调用身体与内在自己的力量完成非凡的英雄壮举——事后连它自己都对危机中自己的能量与力量感到惊叹。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: For practical purposes you might say, and for practical purposes only, that on your plane the self is limited only by the fields of energy that it can control. The self in nonphysical terms, in psychological, psychic and philosophic terms is not limited theoretically.
quotes.translation: 为实用目的（且仅为实用目的）而言，你可以说在你们层面，自己仅受其能控制的能量场域所限。从非物质角度——即心理、心灵与哲学层面——自己在理论上不受限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This has been a fruitful session, and I am pleased to find us back on schedule. You will discover that this evening's material on the physical organism in particular will be most helpful, particularly in future sessions. We will sometime or other deal with the maintenance of the organism, and then you will need this material. I hope it explains the comparative （underline comparative） rigidity of pattern which composes the body, which allows it to maintain apparent constancy; and one of the prices it must pay for this is a stabilization of a kind that the inner self is not bound by.
quotes.translation: 这是一次富有成果的课，我很高兴看到我们回归正轨。你们会发现今晚关于身体有机体的资料尤其有用，特别是在未来课程中。我们终将探讨有机体的维护，届时你们会需要这些资料。希望这能解释构成身体的模式那种相对（强调相对）的僵固性——正是这种僵固性使身体能维持表面恒定；而它为此付出的代价之一，便是内在自己不受其束缚的那种稳定化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: To some extent, we have discussed your body and its composition of cells (in the 632nd session in Chapter Seven, for instance). All of the cells that now make up your physical form obviously exist at once. Imagine that you have many lives enduring in the same fashion. Instead of cells then you have selves. I told you that each cell has its own memory. The self-memory is, of course, of far greater dimension.
quotes.translation: 某种程度上，我们已讨论过你的身体及其细胞构成（例如第七章第632节）。所有构成你当前形体的细胞显然同时存在。想象你以同样方式拥有许多生命——那时取代细胞的便是各个自己。我曾告诉你每个细胞都有其记忆。自己的记忆当然具有更宏大的维度。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: All directions taken by the flower of consciousness are good. The flower knows it is alive in the bulb, but it takes "time" for the bulb to let the stem and leaves and flower emerge. The flower is not better than the bulb. It is not even more progressed than the bulb. It is the bulb in one of its manifestations. So in your terms, it may seem as if there are progressions, or consecutive steps of development, in which more mature comprehensive selves will emerge. You are a part of those selves now, as the petals are of the bulb. Only in your system is that time period meaningful.
quotes.translation: 意识之花所采取的所有方向都是好的。花知道自己在球茎中活着，但球茎需要"时间"才能让茎、叶和花显现出来。花并不比球茎更好，甚至不比球茎更进步。它是球茎在其一种显现中的形态。因此，用你们的说法，似乎存在着进步，或连续的发展阶段，其中更成熟、更全面的自性将会出现。你现在就是那些自性的一部分，正如花瓣是球茎的一部分。只有在你们的系统中，这个时间段才有意义。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 683
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The cells are not inferior as far as you are concerned, even though they form part of the structure of your physical being. They are not even less conscious. (Emphatically:) They are conscious in a different fashion. There is no need to "romanticize" them, or to think of them as little people, but each of them possesses a highly focused consciousness, and a consciousness of self. You like to think -- again -- that only your own species possesses an awareness of its own selfhood. There are different kinds of selfhood, and an infinite variety of ways to experience self-awareness.
quotes.translation: 就你们而言，细胞并不低等，即使它们构成了你们物质身体结构的一部分。它们甚至并不更不具意识。（强调地：）它们以不同的方式具有意识。没有必要"浪漫化"它们，或把它们想象成小人，但每个细胞都拥有高度集中的意识，以及自我意识。你们喜欢——再次——认为只有你们自己的物种拥有对其自身自性（selfhood）的觉知。存在着不同种类的自性，以及体验自我觉知的无限多样的方式。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 730
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: We have been speaking of ascending selves in your terms. In your (underlined) terms, there are also, of course, descending selves, in that each atom and molecule has its own consciousness and contains all the characteristics inherent in consciousness itself. It is individualistic, it contains qualities you term personality qualities. It adopts form, gains experience, and develops through value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 我们一直在用你们的说法谈论上升的自性。在你们（强调的）说法中，当然也存在着下降的自性，因为每个原子和分子都有其自身的意识，并包含意识本身固有的所有特性。它是个人主义的，它包含你们称之为个性品质的特质。它采用形态，获得经验，并通过价值完成而发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Jung's dark side of the self is the ego, not the unconscious. The complicated, infinitely varied, unbelievably rich tapestry of Jung's, in quotes "unconscious," could hardly be unconscious. It is the product of an inner consciousness with far more sense of identity and purpose than the daily ego. It is the daily ego's ignorance and limited focus that makes it view so-called unconscious activity as chaotic.
quotes.translation: 荣格的自性黑暗面是自我（ego），而非无意识。荣格那复杂、无限多样、难以置信的丰富"无意识"织锦，几乎不可能是无意识的。它是内在意识的产物，其身份感和目的感远胜于日常自我。正是日常自我的无知和狭隘焦点，使其将所谓的无意识活动视为混乱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Many people realize intuitively that the self is multitudinous and not singular. The realization is usually put in reincarnational terms, so that the self is seen as traveling through the centuries, moving through doors of death and life into other times and places.
quotes.translation: 许多人直觉地认识到自性是多元的，而非单一的。这种认识通常以转世的说法来表达，因此自性被视为穿越世纪，穿过死亡与生命之门，进入其他时空。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 721
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now. Regard the inner senses in connection with the nature of action and electromagnetic reality, for the perceptions of the inner senses are themselves action, and as such they change both the perceiver and the thing perceived. You can see then that even this astral image is always in motion and never static, and its condition alters the physical self even as the physical self acts upon the astral image.
quotes.translation: 现在。请结合行动与电磁实相的本质来审视内在感官，因为内在感官的感知本身就是行动，因此它们既改变了感知者，也改变了被感知之物。那么你们可以看到，即使是这个星光体也始终在运动中，从未静止，其状态会改变物质自性，正如物质自性作用于星光体一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Each layer, or each area of the whole self, imagines that it is the center of awareness, and that the whole self revolves about it. So far you have had little experience with these other "centers"--you may put that in quotation marks--but before too long we shall give you some ideas so that you may become at least slightly acquainted. Initially this will be done through suggestion on a subconscious level.
quotes.translation: 全我（whole self）的每一层或每一区域，都想象自己是意识的中心，而全我围绕着它旋转。到目前为止，你对这些其他"中心"（你可以加上引号）几乎毫无经验，但不久后我们会给你一些概念，让你至少能略知一二。起初这会通过潜意识层面的暗示来实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Without these chemical and electromagnetic connections, （voice louder） the ego as such would not exist. The ego is largely dependent upon the physical mechanisms that compose the corporal image. It has its beginnings with corporal birth. While we speak of the ego, this part of the self is hardly permanent or constant, but ever-changing. However the intellect is also a portion, or an attribute, of the ego.
quotes.translation: 没有这些化学与电磁连接，自我（ego）本身便不会存在。自我很大程度上依赖于构成肉身形象（corporal image）的物理机制。它始于肉体的诞生。当我们谈论自我时，自我的这一部分并非恒久不变，而是不断变化的。然而，智性（intellect）也是自我的一部分或一种属性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Humanity dreams the same dream at once, and you have your mass world. The whole construction however is like an educational play in which you are the producers as well as the actors. There is a play within a play within a play, mazes of understanding. (Long pause.) There is no end to the within of things. The dreamer dreams and the dreamer within the dream dreams, and sometimes the dreamers are aware of each other. But the dreams are not meaningless, and the actions within them are highly significant. The whole self is the observer, and also a participator in many roles.
quotes.translation: 人类同时做着同一个梦，于是你们有了这个大众世界（mass world）。然而整个构造就像一场教育戏剧，你们既是制片人也是演员。戏中有戏，戏中还有戏，形成理解的迷宫。（长停顿。）事物的内在永无止境。做梦者做梦，梦中的做梦者也在做梦，有时做梦者能彼此觉察。但梦境并非毫无意义，其中的行动具有高度重要性。全我是观察者，也是众多角色中的参与者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We gave you the pattern by which your physical selves are formed. We gave you the pattern by which you learned to form your physical reality. We gave you the patterns intricate, involved, and blessed from which you form the reality of each physical thing you know. The most minute cell within your brain has been made from the patterns of consciousness, which we have given you. We gave you the pattern upon which you formed your entire physical universe... and the comprehension that exists within each cell, the knowledge that each cell has, the desire for organization was given by us. The entire webwork was initiated by us. We taught you to form the reality that you know.
quotes.translation: 我们给了你们形成物质自我的模式。我们给了你们学会构建物质实相的模式。我们给了你们那些复杂、交织且受祝福的模式，你们借此构建所知的每一物质事物的实相。你脑中最微小的细胞，都是由我们给予的意识模式所造。我们给了你们构建整个物质宇宙的模式……每个细胞内存在的理解力、每个细胞拥有的知识、对组织性的渴望，都由我们赋予。整个网络由我们启动。我们教会你们构建所知的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Creativity connects waking and dreaming reality, and is in itself a threshold in which the waking and dreaming selves merge to form constructs that belong equally to each reality. You cannot begin to understand how you form the physical events of your lives unless you understand the connections between creativity, dreams, play, and those events that form your waking hours. In one respect dreams are a kind of structured unconscious play. Your mind dreams in joyful pleasure at using itself, freed from the concerns of practical living. Dreams are the mind's free play. The spontaneous activity, however, is at the same time training in the art of forming practical events.
quotes.translation: 创造力连接清醒与梦境实相，它本身是一个门槛，在此清醒与做梦的自我融合，形成同时属于两种实相的构造。除非你理解创造力、梦境、游戏与构成清醒时光的那些事件之间的关联，否则你无法开始明白自己如何形成生活中的物质事件。从某方面说，梦境是一种结构化的无意识游戏。你的心灵在愉悦地运用自身时做梦，摆脱了实际生活的顾虑。梦境是心灵的自由游戏。然而，这种自发活动同时也是形成实际事件的艺术训练。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: And despite all comments to the contrary, this is by far the most difficult discipline; but without it the inner self is not secure in its journeys, and is like a boat with no harbor to receive it, and like the man without a country, with no place to return. The personality, to some （underline some） degree has been led astray by those who begin such a journey without first making certain of their return.
quotes.translation: 尽管有种种相反的说法，这却是迄今为止最艰难的修持；但若没有它，内在自我（inner self）在其旅程中便不安全，如同没有港湾接纳的船只，如同没有祖国的人，无处可归。人格在某种程度上（强调"某种"）会被那些未先确保回归便踏上旅程的人引入歧途。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Entities or souls, in other words, send out portions of themselves to open up avenues of reality that would not exist otherwise. (Long pause at 9:39.) The three-dimensional selves, in existing within these realities, must focus their attention there completely. An inner awareness gives them a source of energy and strength. They must, however, come to understand their roles as actors, "finally" from their roles, and through another act of comprehension, return to the entity.
quotes.translation: 换言之，存有或灵魂会派出自身的一部分，去开拓那些原本不存在的实相途径。（9:39处长时间停顿。）三维自我在存在于这些实相中时，必须将注意力完全集中于此。内在觉知为他们提供能量与力量的源泉。然而，他们必须理解自己作为演员的角色，"最终"从角色中脱离，并通过另一层领悟，回归到存有。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (11:01.) Those selves are not dead, in other words. Your understanding of this must be limited because you automatically think in terms of one life experience at a time, and in linear patterns of development. In your terms, a reincarnational self can be aware of your environment, and interact sometimes through your own relationships.
quotes.translation: （11:01。）换言之，那些自我并未消亡。你对这一点的理解必然有限，因为你自动以一次生命体验为单位思考，并遵循线性发展模式。从你的角度来看，一个转世自我能够感知你的环境，有时还能通过你的人际关系进行互动。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It cannot maintain stability, for all its efforts, and it cannot in any way limit the self. It, the ego, merely does not perceive because it will not perceive those other perception patterns, and that larger scope with which the whole self is constantly involved.
quotes.translation: 它竭尽全力也无法维持稳定，且绝不可能限制自我。这个自我（小我）仅仅是不去感知——因为它不愿感知那些其他感知模式，以及整个自我始终参与其中的更广阔范畴。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: But action must attempt to materialize itself and fulfill itself completely. It cannot do so, and the result is the formation of many selves, that are a part of action, and formed from action; and therefore each self must continue in the creation of other selves.
quotes.translation: 但行动必须试图将自身具体化并完全实现。它无法做到这一点，结果便形成了许多自我——这些自我既是行动的一部分，又由行动所构成；因此每个自我必须继续创造其他自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is the dilemma of the ego, particularly in its early states. It looks outward for answers because this is its nature: to manipulate within physical reality. It also senses, however, a deep and abiding connection that it does not understand, with other portions of the self that are not under its domain. It is also aware that this inner self possesses knowledge upon which its own existence is based.
quotes.translation: 这是小我的困境，尤其在其早期阶段。它向外寻求答案，因为这是它的本性：在物质实相中运作。然而，它也感受到一种深刻而持久的联系——与自我中那些不受其管辖的其他部分之间的关联，尽管它并不理解这种联系。它同样意识到，这个内在自我拥有支撑其自身存在的知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The ego is now somewhat in the confidence of the whole self, therefore we have more to contend with. We are no longer tricking the ego, which it would ultimately and sometimes almost disastrously resent, but taking it into the confidence of the whole self, so that it will allow departure from the physical image, as a mother can finally be convinced that it is safe for a son or daughter to go out alone.
quotes.translation: 如今小我多少已获得整个自我的信任，因此我们面临更多挑战。我们不再欺骗小我（这最终会引发它几乎灾难性的怨恨），而是让它参与整个自我的信任圈，使其允许脱离物质形象——正如母亲最终能确信子女独自外出是安全的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: But thoughts have shapes, as do dreams. I use the word shape for simplicity's sake, but the electrical universe is composed of dimensions which are perceived by the inner self, for the inner self also has existence within the electrical universe. If all of this sounds farfetched, then remember that the shapes that you perceive meaningful, many other species within your own field cannot perceive at all.
quotes.translation: 但思想具有形状，梦境亦然。我使用"形状"一词仅为简便起见，但电性宇宙由内在自我感知的维度构成——因为内在自我同样存在于电性宇宙之中。若这一切听来牵强，请记住：你所感知为有意义的形状，在你自身领域内的许多其他物种完全无法感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The artist does not identify with the colors he uses. He knows he chooses them, and applies them with a brush. So you paint your reality with your ideas in the same manner. You are not your ideas, nor even your thoughts. You are the self who experiences them. If a painter finds his hands stained with pigment at the end of a day, he can wash the stain off easily, knowing its nature. If you think that limiting thoughts are a portion of you, permanently attached therefore, you will not think of washing them off. You would behave instead like a mad artist who says, "My paints are a part of me. They have stained my fingers, and there is nothing I can do about it."
quotes.translation: 艺术家不会认同于他使用的颜料。他知道自己选择颜料，并用画笔将其涂抹。同样地，你也用你的意念以相同方式描绘你的实相。你不是你的意念，甚至不是你的思想。你是体验它们的那个自我。若画家发现双手在一天结束时沾满颜料，他深知其本质，轻易便能洗去污渍。若你认为限制性思想是你的一部分、因而永久附着，你便不会想到要洗去它们。你反而会像疯狂的画家那样说："颜料是我的一部分。它们染污了我的手指，我对此无能为力。"
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: They are a dimension, as I mentioned. Consciousness is not one thing, therefore consciousness is not of itself limiting. Boundaries may be set up in terms of a self. A self is a gestalt of action perception patterns, which are formed together through attraction.
quotes.translation: 如我所言，它们是维度。意识并非单一事物，因此意识本身并不设限。界限可能以自我的形式建立。自我是行动-感知模式的完形，这些模式通过吸引力共同形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now: All of your so-called pasts exist within you now, and you can recapture your memories and discover what they are. You are not imprisoned in time unless you believe that you are, and there is nothing more important than belief. If you believe that you exist only within the context of this life, that you are born only to death and annihilation, then you will not use your freedoms in this existence. You deny their abilities when they show themselves, yet no one forces this bondage upon you but yourself. To understand your multidimensional self is to use it.
quotes.translation: 现在：你所有所谓的过去都存在于你当下之内，你能重新捕捉记忆并发现其本质。除非你相信自己被囚禁于时间中，否则你并未受困——而信念比任何事物都重要。若你相信自己仅存在于此生脉络中，生来只为走向死亡与湮灭，那么你便不会在此生运用你的自由。当这些能力显现时你否认它们，但除你之外无人强加此束缚。理解你的多重维度自我，即是运用它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The idea of counterparts1 somewhat shatters that old concept, yet you still want definitions for the self so that you know where you "stand." You are so taken with the idea of labels that many follow astrology blindly. You are born at a certain time, at a certain place, under certain conditions -- but consciousness always forms the conditions. If it is to some extent affected by those conditions, then, it is because the effects follow in the same way that a painter is affected by the landscape that he has himself created. So you decide to be born, say, in a certain month when the planets are thus-and-so. Ahead of time, you choose the seasons of your birth.
quotes.translation: 对应体的概念多少粉碎了旧有观念，但你仍想要自我的定义以知晓自己"立足"何处。你如此执着于标签概念，以致许多人盲目追随占星学。你在特定时间、特定地点、特定条件下出生——但意识始终塑造着条件。若它在某种程度上受这些条件影响，那正是因为这种影响如同画家被他亲手创造的风景所影响一般。因此你决定在行星排列如此这般的那月出生。你预先选择了你出生的季节。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 729
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Men in those times protected themselves against storms, and yet in the same way they did not begrudge the storm its victims. They simply changed the alliances of their consciousnesses from the identification of self-within-the-flesh to self-within-the-storm. Man's and nature's intents were largely the same, and understood as such. Man did not fear the elements in those early times, as is now supposed.
quotes.translation: 那时的人们会防范风暴，却同样不会责怪风暴夺走生命。他们只是将意识的联盟从"肉身中的自我"认同转变为"风暴中的自我"认同。人类与自然的意图大体相同，且被如此理解。早期人类并不像现今所认为的那样畏惧自然元素。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Regardless of your histories, those early men and women were quite healthy. They had strong teeth and bones. They dealt with the physical world through the purposeful use of the imagination, however, in a way now most difficult to understand. They realized they were mortal, and must die, but their greater awareness of Framework 2 allowed them a larger identification, so they understood that death was not only a natural necessity, but also an opportunity for other kinds of experience and development (see Note 1 for Session 803).
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Theoretically, the self is unlimited, if you will recall. The ego within your field is limited because of the nature of its rigidity. The ego operates as a partitioning agent. It directs and uses the abilities of the personality for manipulation in the physical universe. It can mobilize a smaller or larger amount of these energies according to its own strength. It has a small focus but a powerful one.
quotes.translation: 理论上来说，自我是无限的，如果你还记得的话。你们场域内的自我之所以受限，是因为其僵化本质。自我扮演着划分者的角色，它引导并运用人格的能力在物质宇宙中运作。它能根据自身强度调动或多或少的能量，其焦点虽小却极具威力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It matures as far as the normal you is concerned, you see. You are able to use more and more of its abilities. I am telling this to you because you may find that you are performing this exercise spontaneously. You are about ripe for it. This other self, or portion of the self, can be utilized also in dream projections and in deliberate projections, it is the part of Ruburt with which I normally work.
quotes.translation: 就寻常的你所知而言，它会逐渐成熟。你能够运用它越来越多的能力。我告诉你这些，是因为你可能会发现自己正自发地进行这项练习。你已经接近成熟的时机。这个另一个自我，或自我的另一部分，也能在梦中投射和刻意投射中被运用，它就是我通常与鲁柏合作的那部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Many individuals imagine the soul to be an immortalized ego, forgetting that the ego as you know it is only a small portion of the self; so this section of the personality is simply projected onward, ad infinitum, so to speak. Because the dimensions of your reality are so little understood, your concepts are bound to be limited. In considering "immortality," mankind seems to hope for further egotistical development, and yet he objects to the idea that such development might involve change. He says through his religions that he has a soul indeed, without even asking what a soul is, and often he seems to regard it, again, as an object in his possession.
quotes.translation: 许多人将灵魂想象成不朽的自我，却忘了你所知的自我只是自我的一小部分；因此人格的这一部分只是被无限投射下去，可以说永无止境。由于你们对现实维度的理解甚少，概念必然受限。在思考"不朽"时，人类似乎希望获得进一步的自我发展，却又反对这种发展可能涉及改变的观点。他们通过宗教宣称自己确实拥有灵魂，却连灵魂是什么都不曾追问，而且往往再次将其视为自己拥有的物品。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. At some point you, Joseph, and Ruburt and myself, are part of the same entity. This entity is that synthesization that Dunne did not foresee, but it in no way implies a loss of individual identities. This is extremely difficult to explain, since when I use the word individual identity, I am not referring primarily to egotistical identity alone. As a matter of fact, I am in one way, and in one way only, a future self--this is extremely simplified--of Ruburts; that could be compared I suppose to a theoretical number twelve self, according to Dunne.
quotes.translation: 现在。在某个层面上，你约瑟夫、鲁柏和我，都是同一存有的一部分。这个存有就是邓恩未能预见的那种综合，但这绝不意味着个体身份的丧失。这极难解释，因为当我使用"个体身份"这个词时，我主要指的并非仅仅是自我身份。事实上，从某种角度而言，且仅从这一角度而言，我是鲁柏的一个未来自我——这是极度简化的说法——按照邓恩的理论，或许可以比作理论上的第十二号自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This event X becomes real then, in your terms, only when it is experienced or perceived by our conscious self. What about all of these other probable events, however? The only difference between them and event X is that event X was perceived and experienced by our conscious individual. In other words, were it not for this perception of the event X, it would still be as valid, or as invalid, as real or as unreal, as all the other probable events that were not perceived.
quotes.translation: 这个事件X，用你们的说法，只有在被我们的意识自我体验或感知时才成为真实。然而，其他所有可能的事件呢？它们与事件X的唯一区别在于，事件X被我们的意识个体所感知和体验。换句话说，若非对事件X的感知，它与其他未被感知的可能事件一样有效或无效，一样真实或不真实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It does no good in such a case to bemoan the situation and say, "I want to understand myself but I'm frightened that I will not like what I find." You yourself must change your beliefs. You must stop believing that the inner self is a dungeon of unsavory repressed emotion. It does contain some repressed emotion. It also contains great intuition, knowledge, and the answers to all of your questions.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，哀叹处境并说"我想了解自己，但我害怕发现不喜欢的东西"是毫无益处的。你必须自己改变信念。你必须停止相信内在自我是令人不快的压抑情绪的牢笼。它确实包含一些压抑的情绪，但也蕴藏着伟大的直觉、知识，以及你所有问题的答案。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: They are fields within fields. In our discussion of fifth dimension, I mentioned how the vitality of the universe changes in different planes while it actually makes up the planes at the same time. In this manner also the so-called whole self and entity are connected, in this case by many diverse patterns, the inner senses being composed of the same elements of which the entity itself is composed.
quotes.translation: 它们是场中之场。在我们讨论第五维度时，我曾提到宇宙的生命力如何在不同的层面中变化，同时它实际上又构成了这些层面。同样地，所谓的整体自性和存有也以这种方式相连——在此情况下通过许多不同的模式，而内在感官则由构成存有本身的相同元素所组成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Hypnotism will be necessary, however, only for a time, and only to induce the light trance state. In the light trance state, the inner self is free from the camouflage nature of your plane, and the truly humorous aspect is this: Only by freeing yourself from your own camouflage universe can you see it clearly, understand it for what it is, and actually learn to use it for mankind's best advantage.
quotes.translation: 然而，催眠术只会在短期内必要，且仅用于诱导轻微的出神状态。在轻微的出神状态中，内在自性得以摆脱你们层面的伪装本质，而真正幽默之处在于：唯有通过摆脱你们自己的伪装宇宙，你才能清晰地看见它，理解它的本来面目，并实际学会运用它来为人类谋取最大利益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: And what meaning you give it is there, and part of it, since you who project the meaning are yourselves part of it. The inner self is, therefore, that inner portion of action which forms the egos, and the selves, through the dilemmas of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 你所赋予它的任何意义都存在于其中，并成为它的一部分，因为赋予意义的你本身就是它的一部分。因此，内在自性便是构成自我与诸自性的那部分内在行动，经由我所提及的那些困境而运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now if there is good communication between the self, that is the inner self and the outer ego, then the ego begins to understand what it is, and also to realize that it has greater capacities than it can realize by continued reincarnations, upon one plane.
quotes.translation: 倘若自性（即内在自性）与外在自我之间沟通良好，那么自我便会开始明白它是什么，并意识到它拥有比在单一层面上通过不断转世所能认知的更为强大的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The human personality has no limitations except those which it accepts. There are no limits to its development or growth, if it will accept no limits. There are no boundaries to the self except those boundaries which the self arbitrarily creates and perpetuates. There is no veil through which human perception cannot see, except the veil of ignorance which is pulled down by the materialistic ego.
quotes.translation: 人类人格除了它自己所接受的限制之外，没有任何限制。只要它不接受限制，它的发展或成长便没有极限。自性除了它自己任意创造并固守的界限之外，没有任何界限。人类感知无法穿透的帷幕，唯有被物质自我拉下的无知之幕。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: "Being your own natural and magical self when you dream, you utilize information that is outside of the time context experienced by the so-called rational mind. The creative abilities operate in the same fashion, appearing within consecutive time, but with the main work done outside of it entirely.... When you were both working on your projects, your cultural time was taken up in a way you found acceptable. When the projects were done, particularly with Ruburt, there was still the cultural belief that time should be so used (underlined), that creativity must be directed and disciplined to fall into the proper assembly-line time slots.
quotes.translation: "当你做梦时，作为你自然且神奇的自己，你运用了所谓理性心智所经历的时间脉络之外的信息。创造能力以同样的方式运作，它们显现在连续时间内，但主要工作却完全在时间之外完成……当你们两人都在进行各自的项目时，你们的文化时间以你们可接受的方式被占用。当项目完成后——尤其是鲁柏的情况——仍然存在文化信念，认为时间应该被如此使用（划线强调），认为创造力必须被引导和规训，以落入适当的装配线式时间槽中。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 4. In Chapter 2 for Volume 1 of Dreams, see the opening notes for Session 885.

quotes.text: There is within the family a general realization of the experiences of its members, but these are second-handed, except for those experiences which the family shares as a unit. This is an important point, for there is an unspecialized, extremely generalized and intuitional knowledge on the part of any portion of the self, as to the nature of experience as felt by the other portions of the self.
quotes.translation: 在家庭内部，成员们对其经历有一种普遍的认知，但这些认知是间接的，除非是家庭作为一个整体所共享的经历。这一点很重要，因为自我的任何部分对自我其他部分所体验到的经验本质，都拥有一种非专门化、极其概括且直觉性的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The experiences at these various levels may be interpreted symbolically. They may appear in the form of fantasy, fiction, or art work, without the conscious self realizing their origin. Now at any of these various stages of consciousness, other phenomena may also be perceived -- thought-forms for example, energy manifestations, projections from the personal subconscious, and projections from the collective unconscious. Any or all of these may take symbolic form, and may appear beneficial or threatening according to the attitude of the personality involved. They should be regarded as quite natural phenomena, often neutral in intent.
quotes.translation: 这些不同层面的经历可能以象征形式被解读。它们可能以幻想、小说或艺术作品的形式出现，而意识自我并未意识到其来源。现在，在这些意识的不同阶段，其他现象也可能被感知——例如思想形态、能量显现、个人潜意识的投射以及集体潜意识的投射。这些现象中的任何一种或全部都可能采取象征形式，并根据相关人格的态度，显得有益或具有威胁性。它们应被视为相当自然的现象，通常意图中立。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Vague yearnings toward certain accomplishments may be clues that the necessary characteristics are inherent but untrained in the self that you know. In its own way, the twenty-four hour period represents both an entire lifetime and many lives in one. In it, symbolically, you have "death" as your physically attuned consciousness comes to the end of the amount of stimuli it can comfortably handle without rest. So, at your normal physical death, you come to the point where your earth-attuned consciousness can no longer handle further data without a "longer rest," and organize it into a creative meaningful whole -- in terms of time.
quotes.translation: 对某些成就的模糊渴望，可能是你所知的自我中固有但未经训练的必要特征的线索。以它自己的方式，二十四小时周期既代表整个一生，也代表一生中的许多世。在其中，象征性地，你经历“死亡”，因为你的身体调谐意识来到了它无需休息就能舒适处理的刺激量的终点。因此，在你正常的肉体死亡时，你来到一个点，在那里你与地球调谐的意识无法再处理更多数据，除非经过“更长的休息”，并将其组织成一个创造性的有意义整体——以时间而言。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This would seem to deny the idea of progression, since I tell you that all portions or all guises, or all aspects and all levels, of any given personality exist at once. The immediately conscious selves however do progress in their realization. It is not enough that the inner self knows. The various immediately conscious portions of personality evolve and change as they recognize these truths.
quotes.translation: 这似乎否定了进步的概念，因为我告诉你，任何给定人格的所有部分、所有伪装、所有面向和所有层面都同时存在。然而，直接意识自我确实在其认知中进步。内在自我知道是不够的。人格的各种直接意识部分在认识到这些真理时，会进化并改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: So, while each action of your life is taken in context with all other actions of your life until your death, this does not mean that your death is predestined to occur at any given time. As you might change your sentence in the middle from one version to another without even being consciously aware of it, so as you live your life you also work with probabilities. You are the self who speaks the sentence, and you are the self who lives the life. You are larger than the sentence that you speak, and larger than the life you live.
quotes.translation: 因此，虽然你生命的每个行动都与你生命直至死亡的所有其他行动相关联，但这并不意味着你的死亡被预定在任何特定时间发生。正如你可能在句子中间无意识地从一个版本改为另一个版本，同样，在你生活时，你也与概率打交道。你是说出句子的自我，也是活出生命的自我。你比你说出的句子更大，也比你所活出的生命更大。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Dream dramas are not nebulous theater-like productions. Their own dimensions, in their way, are every bit as valid as those of waking life. They are as coherent. They affect the self sometimes to an even greater degree. The dream personalities are indeed fragments, projections of the self, all working out various roles, seeking various experiences, searching for solutions and gratifications.
quotes.translation: 梦境戏剧并非模糊的剧场式产物。它们自身的维度，以它们的方式，与清醒生活的维度一样真实。它们同样连贯。它们有时对自我的影响甚至更大。梦中的角色确实是自我的碎片、投射，都在扮演各种角色，寻求各种体验，寻找解决方案和满足。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As I also mentioned (in the 614th session in Chapter Two), the conscious mind is not basically cut off from the inner self or from those deep inner sources of knowledge available to it. The aware mind is not any one event, for that matter; it represents various portions of the inner self that "surface" at any given time.
quotes.translation: 正如我先前（第二章第614节）提到的，意识心并非与内在自体或它可触及的深层内在知识源头完全隔绝。就这点而言，觉知的心并非单一事件；它代表了内在自体在特定时刻"浮出表面"的不同部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: One form may indeed serve, and then consciousness may project out of it into a new form that is familiar with other dimensions. In Ruburt's experience three different forms were used. He spoke, incidentally to his Father Trainor, and Lizzie Roohan together, while he was in the second form . He was then led by me into a further dimension of reality in which his third form was used. You must remember that all of these portions of the self exist at once, and that the whole inner self knows them as a part of its own identity.
quotes.translation: 一种形态确实可以服务，然后意识可能从中投射进入另一个熟悉其他维度的新形态。在鲁柏的经历中，他使用了三种不同形态。顺便一提，当他处于第二种形态时，他与特雷纳神父和莉兹·鲁汉同时交谈。随后我引导他进入一个更进一步的实相维度，在那里他使用了第三种形态。你必须记住，自体的所有这些部分同时存在，而整个内在自体将它们视为自身身份的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: All of this happens through the window of your present. In terms of energy, again, the vitality of your entity impinging into three-dimensional reality forms a particle that is your present being. But this particle is also deflected away from the earth in a rhythmic pattern. The same happens to other portions of your self at other points in the space-time continuum, but at certain intervals you meet, so to speak. Each of your "presents" becomes charged, filled with potentiality; and your entity, itself conscious energy, is also enriched by your various experiences, by the combined and magnified power of its own "past."
quotes.translation: 这一切都通过你当下的窗口发生。就能量而言，你存有的生命力冲击三维实相，形成一个粒子，即你当下的存在。但这个粒子也以节奏模式偏离地球。同样的情况发生在时空连续体中其他点的你自体其他部分，但可以说，在特定间隔你们会相遇。你的每个"当下"都变得充满电荷，充满潜能；而你的存有，作为有意识的能量本身，也因你的各种经验、因它自身"过去"的联合与放大的力量而丰富。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (12:21.) In other terms, the self that you have projected into the future is sending you back encouragement from a probable reality that you still can create. That focused self operates from its present, however, and some day in your own future you may find yourself thinking nostalgically of a moment back in your own past, when you were indecisive and irresolute, but took the proper course.
quotes.translation: （12:21）换个说法，你投射到未来的自体，正从一个你仍可创造的可能实相中向你发送鼓励。然而，那个聚焦的自体从其当下运作，在你未来的某一天，你可能会发现自己怀念过去某个时刻——那时你犹豫不决，却选择了正确的道路。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is this inner self, out of the massive knowledge and unlimited scope of its consciousness, that forms the physical world, that provides stimuli to keep the ego constantly at the job of awareness . It is the inner self, termed here the inner ego, that organizes, initiates, projects, controls the EE units of which we have been speaking lately, transforming energy into objects, into matter.
quotes.translation: 正是这个内在自体，凭借其庞大知识和无限意识范围，形成了物质世界，提供刺激让自我持续保持觉知的工作。正是这个内在自体（此处称为内在自我）组织、启动、投射、控制我们近来一直在讨论的EE单位，将能量转化为物体，转化为物质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In the dream state the actors become aware to some extent of the parts they play, and sense the true personal identity that is behind the artist's craft.
