quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Are laws made to protect man from the self as it is generally outlined by Freud and Darwin? Man had laws, however, far earlier. Are laws made then to protect man from his "sinful nature"? (Pause.) If you were all "perfect beings," would you need laws at all? Do laws define what is unacceptable, or do they hint of some perhaps undifferentiated, barely sensed, more positive issues? Are laws an attempt to limit impulses? Do they represent society's mass definitions of what behavior is acceptable and what is not?
quotes.translation: 法律是为了保护人类免受弗洛伊德与达尔文所勾勒的"自我"之害而制定的吗？人类早在更早时期就有法律。那么法律是为了保护人类免于"罪恶本性"而制定的吗？（停顿）若你们都是"完美存在"，还需要法律吗？法律是定义不可接受的行为，还是暗示某些尚未分化、隐约感知的更具积极意义的议题？法律是试图限制冲动吗？它们是否代表社会对可接受与不可接受行为的集体定义？
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 860, JUNE 13, 1979
9:19 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Surely investigation should be done to probe into this matter. In such a case negative ions form an electrical framework in which healing is possible. Such healing dreams come most often when the inner self deeply feels a sense of desperation, and automatically opens up channels from deeper layers of the self, that have been closed for all effective purposes.
quotes.translation: 确实应该对此事进行探究。在此情况下，负离子会形成可促成疗愈的电场框架。这种疗愈梦境最常出现在内在自我深感绝望之时，此时它会自动开启深层自我中那些实际上已被封闭的通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: "Words aren't describing this at all. Each person who passes the car is more than three-dimensional, super-real in this time, but part of a 'model' of a greater self ... and each person's reality is obviously and clearly more than three-dimensional. I know I'm repeating myself here, but it's as if before I've seen only a part of people or things. The world is so much more solid right now4 that by contrast my earlier experience of it is like a shoddy version, made up of disconnected dots or blurred focus...."
quotes.translation: 文字根本无法描述这一切。每个经过车子的人都不止是三维的，在这个时间里是超现实的，但属于一个更伟大自体的“模型”……每个人的实相显然且清晰地超越了三维。我知道我在重复自己，但仿佛以前我只看到人或事物的一部分。此刻世界如此坚实，相比之下我早先对它的体验就像个粗劣的版本，由不连贯的点或模糊的焦点拼凑而成……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 715
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Many cavemen doubtlessly feared for their personal survival when they ventured forth upon the earth in daylight. They feared that their selves would be annihilated. Such a development as we are considering involves instead an expansion or extension; in the same manner that the expanding universe takes up no space, but expands in terms of value fulfillment, so the expanding consciousness would take up no space, but would also expand in terms of value fulfillment. This is your new frontier, your new challenge.
quotes.translation: 许多穴居人无疑在白天冒险外出时恐惧自身的生存。他们害怕自己的自体将被消灭。而我们正在探讨的这种发展，反而涉及一种扩展或延伸；正如膨胀的宇宙不占据空间，而是以价值完成的方式扩展，所以扩展的意识也不占据空间，同样以价值完成的方式扩展。这是你的新边疆，你的新挑战。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: They cannot be consciously aware of each other. Now the ego interprets all it perceives mainly in terms of its self. Other portions of the self, also self-conscious, interpret what they perceive in terms of themselves.
quotes.translation: 他们无法有意识地觉察彼此。现在，自我主要根据自身来诠释它所感知的一切。自体的其他部分，同样具有自我意识，则根据它们自身来诠释所感知的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: 1. Seth's material on dying and the nature of consciousness immediately reminded me of what he'd said at 11:20 in the 801st session: "Dying is a biological necessity ... Inherently, each individual knows that he or she must die physically in order to survive spiritually and psychically ... The self outgrows the flesh." I'd been thinking about those passages, and when Seth returned to the subject tonight I decided to have some fun with our accepted social and scientific establishments by writing this note.
quotes.translation: 1. 赛斯关于死亡与意识本质的资料，立刻让我想起他在第801节课11点20分说过的话：“死亡是生物性的必然……本质上，每个个体都知道他或她必须在肉体上死亡，才能在灵性与心灵上存活……自体超越了肉体。”我一直在思考这些段落，当赛斯今晚回到这个主题时，我决定写这条笔记，跟我们公认的社会与科学建制开个玩笑。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: NOTES: SESSION 803
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: If you will remember the three creative dilemmas discussed in our past session, you will see that we have here the reason for our self-perpetuating universe, the reason for termination within it, and the inherent necessity for change. If one thought were held forever, no other thoughts would follow, no action would follow, and no identity. In your own intimate psychological experience, in the intimate psychological experience of every individual within your race, you will find recognition of the thought.
quotes.translation: 如果你记得我们上次课讨论的三个创造性困境，你就会明白我们在此找到了宇宙自我延续的原因、宇宙内终结的原因，以及改变的内在必然性。如果一个念头被永远固守，就不会有后续的念头，不会有行动，也不会有身份认同。在你自身亲密的心理经验中，在你种族内每个个体亲密的心理经验中，你都会找到对这个念头的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have given you both sermon enough for this evening but I cannot emphasize too strongly the importance of what I have said. If you direct your inner self with confidence to steer you through your physical existence, it will do so. If you concentrate upon difficulties you will not allow it to do so. This method of giving yourself room will also help you to achieve a greater freedom in psychic matters. For any negative focus （and underline negative） within egotistical reality will automatically block you.
quotes.translation: 今晚我给你的训诫已经够多了，但我再怎么强调我所说内容的重要性也不为过。如果你自信地引导你的内在自体来指引你度过物质存在，它就会这样做。如果你专注于困难，你就不会允许它这样做。这种给自己留出空间的方法，也会帮助你在心灵事务上获得更大的自由。因为在自我现实中的任何负面焦点（并强调负面），都会自动阻碍你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: (Slowly:) The dream state, however, does operate as a rich web of communication between probable selves and probable existences. All probabilities spring from inner reality, from the psyche's own inner activity and structure. (Long pause.) The consciousness that you know can indeed now emerge into even greater realization of itself, but not by obsessively defending its old position. Instead it must recognize its power as the director of probable action, and no longer inhibit its own greater capacities.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）然而，梦境状态确实作为可能自我与可能存在之间的丰富沟通网络运作。所有可能性都源自内在实相，源自心灵自身的内在活动与结构。（长停顿。）你所知的意识确实能够进入对自身更伟大的认知，但并非通过执迷地捍卫其旧有立场。相反，它必须认识到自己作为可能行动导演的力量，不再抑制自身更伟大的能力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 687
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This value, or this particular extension of self to include other self experience, is one of the attributes that can be expected through the use of psychological time. It is an attribute that is independent of and free from your physical as well as clock time. You should remember the difference between physical time and clock time--I have given them to you.
quotes.translation: 这种价值，或者说这种将自我延伸以包含其他自我体验的特定扩展，是通过运用心理时间可以预期的属性之一。这是一种独立于且不受制于你的物理时间以及钟表时间的属性。你们应当记住物理时间与钟表时间的区别——我已将它们告知于你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. These effects, these various seemingly separate selves that can be demonstrated through hypnosis, operate continually and quite normally in both the waking and the dream states. There is however a cooperation that exists between these seemingly separate aspects of the self. It goes without saying that some overall direction must be, and is, maintained.
quotes.translation: 现在。这些效应，这些通过催眠可以展现的看似分离的各个自我，在清醒状态与梦境状态中都持续且完全正常地运作。然而，这些看似分离的自我面向之间存在着一种合作。不言而喻，某种整体方向必须且确实被维持着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Here we have a combination of forces psychic showing themselves in chemical and electrical manifestations. The seasons as you know represent the physical construction of the inner psychic climate. As particular portions of matter are transformed, as the inner self, through the inner senses creates a simple material object that is picked up by the outer senses clearly as, say, a table, so are these other constructions that closely mirror inner reality that are perceived by the outer senses as effects.
quotes.translation: 在此我们拥有一种以化学与电性显现方式展现自身的灵性力量组合。你们所知的季节代表了内在灵性气候的物理建构。正如特定物质部分被转化，内在自我通过内在感官创造出一个被外在感官清晰捕捉为（例如）桌子的简单物质对象，这些其他建构也以同样方式紧密映照内在实相，并被外在感官感知为效应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Being your own natural and magical self when you dream, you utilize information that is outside of the time context experienced by the so-called rational mind. The creative abilities operate in the same fashion, appearing within consecutive time, but with the main work done outside of it entirely. When you finished your project,4 you had several days of feeling miserable, but you caught yourself and turned yourself around beautifully, and you have every right to congratulate yourself in that regard.
quotes.translation: 当你在梦中成为自己自然且神奇的自我时，你运用了所谓理性心智所经验的时间脉络之外的信息。创造能力以相同方式运作，出现在连续时间内，但主要工作却完全在时间之外完成。当你完成你的计划后，你经历了数日痛苦感受，但你及时醒悟并漂亮地扭转了局面，在这方面你完全有权利自我祝贺。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The physical system suffers. It is impossible for the ego to block off specific connections with the whole personality, therefore any barriers effectively impede whole blocks of active and necessary vitality. In Ruburt's case now, the floodgates to the inner self are opened, so that the vitality rushes into those areas that have been to some extent denied.
quotes.translation: 物质系统承受着痛苦。自我不可能阻断与整个人格的特定连接，因此任何屏障都会有效阻碍整块活跃且必要的生命力。在鲁柏目前的案例中，通往内在自我的闸门已被打开，使得生命力涌入那些在某种程度上被否定的区域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now I mean this literally. Reality is on the one hand the product of perception. On the other hand that which is, is always present as the basis for any perception. That which is perceives itself, you see. The unitary self is basically an illusions and yet individuality is no illusion.
quotes.translation: 我这话是字面意思。实相一方面是感知的产物，另一方面，存在本身始终是一切感知的基础。存在感知自身，你明白吗？单一自我基本上是个幻相，但个体性绝非幻相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: All this involved an idea of, and I hesitate to say advancement, but an idea of change along certain lines. We have spoken of mental genes. These are more or less psychic blueprints for physical matter, and in these mental genes existed the pattern for your human type of self-consciousness. It did not appear constructed, that is in constructed form, for a long period of physical time however, and we have discussed psychological time as being part of what I will call for now an inner time sense.
quotes.translation: 这一切涉及一个观念——我犹豫是否该用"进步"一词——但确实涉及沿特定路线变化的观念。我们曾讨论过心灵基因。这些大致是物质实相的心灵蓝图，在这些心灵基因中存在着你们人类自我意识类型的模式。然而，它并非以建构形态呈现——即并非以建构形式存在——经历了漫长的物理时间。我们曾讨论过心理时间，它属于我暂且称为内在时间感的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is a delicate connection here with the dream universe that is somewhat difficult to explain. The dream universe, however, pervades many other fields. It does not exist outside or apart from your own universe, but simultaneously with it. It appears, and is a reality, to all aspects or portions of the self, and often it is only within the dream universe that the personality can change focus easily or efficiently enough so that he can perceive the variety of roles that he himself has played.
quotes.translation: 这里与梦境宇宙存在微妙的关联，这有些难以解释。然而，梦境宇宙遍及许多其他领域。它并非存在于你们宇宙之外或与之分离，而是与之同时存在。它对自我的所有面向或部分显现为实相，且往往只有在梦境宇宙中，人格才能足够轻松或高效地转换焦点，从而感知自身曾扮演的种种角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You know you can have more than one dream at a time. You can also experience versions of dreams of probable selves, but there will always be some point of contact--that is, there will always be a reason why you pick up such a dream. All of the dreams people have form a mass dream framework. Dreams exist at other levels, and physically of course they affect the body state. In such ways, the world's actions are worked out in mass dream communications that are at the same time public and private.
quotes.translation: 你知道人可以同时做多个梦。你也能体验可能自我的梦境版本，但总会存在某个接触点——也就是说，你捕捉到这类梦境总有原因。所有人所做的梦共同构成一个庞大的梦境框架。梦境存在于其他层面，当然在物质层面会影响身体状态。通过这种方式，世界的行动在同时兼具公开与私密性质的大众梦境交流中得以展开。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Basically this concern for human welfare is indeed virtuous, but overindulged in it becomes loaded with possibilities that could be most unfortunate. You knew I was going to light into you this evening, as Ruburt would say. What I want, here, is the balance. Neither plunge yourself into the ignorance, doubts and injustices, so that you can see nothing else, nor close your eyes to them. But there must be a place within you where these do not exist, or the freedom of the inner self will be hampered, as far as its connection with the ego is concerned. Your deep consideration for human problems has indeed helped lead you to these sessions.
quotes.translation: 从根本上说，这种对人类福祉的关切确实是美德，但过度沉溺其中就会充满可能酿成不幸的隐患。你早知道我今晚要训你一顿——如鲁柏所言。我在此要强调的是平衡。既不要沉溺于无知、怀疑与不公以致看不见其他事物，也不应对它们视而不见。但你的内在必须存在一个不受这些侵扰的所在，否则内在自我的自由——就其与自我意识的关联而言——将受到阻碍。你对人类问题的深切关怀确实引导你参与了这些课程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When Ruburt replaces the bed sheets, I suggest colored ones. As he goes to sleep this evening, have him try imagining a scene in springtime, with him walking briskly or running. When he walks now on the streets, he should keep the mental image just given in his mind, picturing the whole flexible and fleet image, and the inner self will take steps to see that the suitable adjustments are made. He should remember to give frequent suggestions pertaining to relaxation. This is extremely important.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏换床单时，我建议用彩色床单。今晚他入睡时，让他尝试想象春日场景，想象自己轻快行走或奔跑。现在他走在街上时，应在心中保持刚才给出的意象，想象整个灵活迅捷的画面，内在自我自会采取步骤确保做出适当调整。他应记得经常给予与放松相关的暗示。这极为重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The self, Mr. A.J., is more than you know. It is capable of intelligence that you do not use. It is capable of making distinctions finer than you now imagine. The self, as other sections of this material explains, has methods not only of perception, but of criticism and judgment, that man in general does not take advantage of nearly as much as he could.
quotes.translation: 自我，A.J.先生，远比你认知的更为深邃。它具备你尚未运用的智慧，能做出超乎你当前想象的精微分辨。正如本资料其他章节所述，自我不仅拥有感知方式，更具备批判与判断的能力——人类普遍未能充分利用这些潜能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Discipline then should not only be considered, as it is by some schools of thought, as a mere mental discipline over the muscles, or various portions of the body by the inner self, but indeed a discipline in terms of training of the ego by the inner self, so that the ego as a personality achieves a well-balanced relationship with the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 因此，自律不应如某些学派所认为的，仅是内在自我对肌肉或身体各部位的纯粹心智控制，而应是内在自我对自我（ego）的训练，使自我作为人格能与物质宇宙建立平衡的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: To some degree you feel the same way when you encounter the concept of probable selves, or of counterparts. It is as though you had an unlimited bank of abilities and characteristics from which to draw, and yet were afraid of doing so -- fearing that any addition could make you less instead of more. If all of this goes on personally, as you choose one melody and call it yourself, then perhaps you can begin to see the mass creative aspects in terms of civilizations that seem to rise and fall.
quotes.translation: 当你接触"可能自我"或"对应体"的概念时，多少会感到类似的不安。仿佛你拥有取之不竭的能力与特质宝库，却畏惧取用——担心任何增添反而会削弱而非增强自我。当个人层面如此运作，当你选择某个旋律并称之为"自己"时，或许就能开始理解文明兴衰背后那宏大的创造面向。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 735
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Your consciousness fluctuates in the same way. It is here and then it is not here, but the physical self focuses upon only those moments of physical reality. Because consciousness fluctuates however, other portions of your self have memory of those times when it is not focused in "physical reality," and this is also a portion of your entire existence.
quotes.translation: 你的意识同样波动起伏。它时而在此，时而不在，但物质自我只聚焦于物质实相的片段。正因意识波动，你自我的其他部分仍记得那些未聚焦于"物质实相"的时刻——这同样是你整体存在的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is always because you do not trust the natural self that you resort to such drug therapy. The individuals who seek out treatment fear the nature of their own identity more than anything else. They are then only too willing to sacrifice it. (Pause, then smiling:) Your thoughts and beliefs form your reality. There is, as Joseph (Seth's name for me) said in our break, no magic therapy -- only an understanding of your own great creativity, and the knowledge that you yourself make your world.
quotes.translation: 你之所以诉诸药物疗法，归根结底是因为不信任自然自我。寻求治疗者最恐惧的，正是自身身份的本质。他们因此甘愿轻易牺牲它。（停顿后微笑）你的思想与信念构建了你的实相。正如约瑟夫（赛斯对我的称呼）在休息时所说，不存在神奇的疗法——唯有理解自身伟大的创造力，并认知到你自己创造了你的世界。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The inner self does indeed have an overall conception of the goals and strengths of the personality. It is then this inner self that must be searched for the answers. I mentioned earlier in another session that the very attempt to seek for an answer to the basic problem will indeed automatically release some of that energy for a constructive purpose.
quotes.translation: 内在自我确实对人格的目标与力量拥有整体概念。因此，必须向内探寻答案。我在之前某次课中提及，仅凭寻求根本问题答案的尝试，就足以自动释放部分能量用于建设性目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The sensitivities are vanishing. Improvements come as the personality learns intuitively, you see, having nothing to do with time in a basic manner. An intuitive grasp may come suddenly with an equally fast disappearance of blocks of symptoms. The spontaneous self is being allowed more freedom now, this is the source of the intuitional understanding.
quotes.translation: 敏感度正在消失。当人格凭直觉学习时，改善便会到来——你看，这本质上与时间无关。直觉的领悟可能突然降临，同时症状区块也会迅速消失。自发自体如今被允许拥有更多自由，这正是直觉性理解的来源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now dolphins deal with an entirely different dimension of reality. There is as yet no method of communication that can allow you to perceive their concepts of selfhood, or their [collective] vision of existence. They are sensitive, self-aware individuals. They are altruistic. They understand the nature of relativity,6 and they have different ways of passing on information to their young. They are not higher or lower than your own species. They simply represent a different kind of selfhood.
quotes.translation: 海豚处理的是完全不同的实相维度。目前尚无任何沟通方式能让你感知它们对自我性的概念，或它们对存在的[集体性]视野。它们是敏感、具有自我意识的个体。它们具有利他性。它们理解相对性的本质，并以不同方式向幼崽传递信息。它们既不高于也不低于人类物种，只是代表了另一种自我性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 730
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It is true that as a rule you are not aware of your whole entity, which as a rule does not reside within your boundaries. But there is no reason why you must be blind to the whole self of your present personality, which is part of your entity, and which can be glimpsed on your plane in terms of the breathing and dreaming self of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 诚然，通常你无法意识到自己的整体存有——这个存有通常并不栖居于你的界限之内。但你没有理由必须对当前人格的整体自我视而不见，这个整体自我是你存有的一部分，并且可以通过我所说的呼吸与做梦的自体，在你的层面上被瞥见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is of course necessary at this stage of your development that selectivity be used, and that some standards be drawn that will effectively define apparent limitations and boundaries. The area within these limitations and boundaries you call the self. The self expands as your ability grows, as you learn to retain identity in the midst of diversity.
quotes.translation: 当然，在你当前的发展阶段，必须运用选择性，必须划定某些标准来有效定义明显的限制与边界。你称这个限制与边界内的区域为"自我"。随着你能力的增长，随着你学会在多样性中保持身份认同，自我会随之扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This is one of the reasons why breathing seems automatic, and why dreaming seems to confound your physical camouflage idea of time. It is perfectly within your present capabilities to understand that time, to your dreaming self, is very much like time to your waking inner self. But you must first disconnect the physical concept of time and watches.
quotes.translation: 这就是为何呼吸看似自动，为何做梦似乎混淆了你对时间的物质伪装概念的原因之一。你完全有能力理解：对你的做梦自体而言，时间非常类似于你清醒内在自体的时间。但你必须首先断开物理时间与钟表的概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I will never on the other hand insist upon a groveling humility, a feeling of uselessness, for upon such a false and inadequate conception of self is based the most unfortunate sort of exterior posturing. I insist upon an honest, humble and proud acceptance of your own relationship with the universe, and an acceptance of your responsibility in it.
quotes.translation: 另一方面，我绝不会坚持一种卑躬屈膝的谦卑、一种无用感，因为这种虚假且不恰当的自我概念，正是最不幸的外在姿态的基础。我坚持的是：诚实、谦逊且自豪地接受你与宇宙的关系，并接受你在此关系中的责任。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This same dream, however, will deal with many other actualities. It will serve as a method of communication between the various portions of the self. It will deliver information concerning past and future, and if proper suggestions are given it, then the self will use the dream drama particularly to better the overall condition of the personality.
quotes.translation: 然而，这个相同的梦会处理许多其他实相。它将作为自我各个部分之间的沟通方法。它会传递关于过去和未来的信息，如果给予适当的暗示，那么自我将特别利用梦的戏剧来改善人格的整体状况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: The inner ego however is always aware of both aspects of its reality. In the deepest sense (Pause), this inner self is organized about its primary aspect, which is creativity. It constantly translates the components of its gestalt into reality, either physical reality through the EE units I have mentioned, or into other realities equally as valid.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在自我始终意识到其现实的两个方面。在最深层的意义上（停顿），这个内在自我围绕其主要方面——创造力——组织起来。它不断将其完形的组成部分转化为现实，要么通过我提到的EE单位转化为物质现实，要么转化为同样有效的其他现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: But since it is so difficult for man to even recognize the self that moves his own muscles and breathes his own breath, then I suppose it should not be startling that he cannot realize that this whole self also forms the camouflage world of physical appearance, in almost the same manner that he forms a pattern with his breath upon a glass pane.
quotes.translation: 但既然人类甚至难以认识到那个驱动自己肌肉、呼吸自己气息的自我，那么我想，他无法意识到这个整体自我也以几乎相同的方式——就像他在玻璃窗上呼出图案一样——形成了物质外观的伪装世界，这应该不足为奇。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now, the strange sensation experienced by Ruburt just before this session was a taste of our seventh inner sense, but only a small portion. It represents enlargement or an opening up and extension. This operates in two directions. The purpose of the enlargement or extension I will discuss at the next session. It is of course an enlargement or extension of the self, and a widening of the boundaries of the self, and therefore of even conscious comprehension.
quotes.translation: 现在，鲁柏在这次课之前体验到的奇异感觉，是我们第七内在感官的一丝滋味，但只是很小的一部分。它代表扩展或开启与延伸。这向两个方向运作。关于这种扩展或延伸的目的，我将在下次课讨论。这当然是自我的扩展或延伸，是自我边界的拓宽，因此甚至是有意识理解的拓宽。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have told you that portions of your personality exist in other realities. Other portions of the self are focused within different dimensions than you own. If you can, imagine a huge building with many rooms, each room entirely different from the other. The environment, the methods of perception, the reality system within each room is unique.
quotes.translation: 我告诉过你，你人格的部分存在于其他现实中。自我的其他部分聚焦于与你不同的维度中。如果可能，想象一栋巨大的建筑，有许多房间，每个房间都与其他房间完全不同。每个房间内的环境、感知方法、现实系统都是独特的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Some sense impressions fall beneath the threshold of consciousness, these impressions coming from the outside environment. Some impressions however have their origin within inner reality, and the personality is receiving information not available to the egotistical self. If such inner data is to become at all conscious, it must be translated into terms that the ego can recognize. In other words, into sense data.
quotes.translation: 一些感官印象落在意识阈值之下，这些印象来自外部环境。然而，一些印象起源于内在现实，人格正在接收自我意识无法获得的信息。如果这种内在数据要变得有意识，它必须被翻译成自我能够识别的术语。换句话说，翻译成感官数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You have a greater identity outside of your context, yet a part of it is inside your context, as you. Your youness is your significance, a focus of awareness, conscious of itself, that seeks out and views experience with its own unique propensities. The existence of probable realities and probable selves in no way denies the validity of your own experience or individuality. That rides secure, choosing from unpredictable fields of actuality those that suit its own particular nature.
quotes.translation: 在你所处的脉络之外，你拥有一个更伟大的身份，然而它的一部分又存在于你的脉络之内，即作为你的那个部分。你的“你性”就是你的重要性，它是一个意识的焦点，能够自我觉察，以其独特的倾向去探寻和审视经验。可能实相与可能自己的存在，绝不会否定你自身经验或个体性的有效性。你的个体性安然稳固，从不可预测的实相领域中，选择那些符合其自身特质的经验。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: There is in all of this an order. It is an order that the inner self is to learn. It is intuitively known, but it must be realized. There are personalities far more developed than my own; there are personalities that operate in a context that even I would find extremely alien, but no particle of individuality is ever lost, and no experience.
quotes.translation: 这一切之中存在着一种秩序。这是内在自己必须学习的秩序。它被直觉地知晓，但必须被实现。有些人格的发展程度远超过我；有些人格运作的脉络，甚至对我来说也极其陌生，但没有任何个体性的微粒会丢失，也没有任何经验会丢失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The brain looks out upon the physical universe, and consciousness then reacts, again creatively, to that environment. Information is now carried in reverse fashion back to the inner self, in an instantaneous and automatic procedure. Thus thought becomes an inner image which is translated into a thermal image, and then into intuitional form, into highly condensed and codified data, and then into a pure and direct sort of experience which you cannot understand as physical creatures.
quotes.translation: 大脑向外审视物质宇宙，然后意识再次以创造性的方式对该环境做出反应。信息现在以反向的方式，通过一个即时且自动的程序，被传回内在自己。因此，思想变成了一个内在影像，这个影像又被转化为热影像，然后转化为直觉形式，转化为高度浓缩和编码的数据，最后转化为一种你们作为物质生物无法理解的、纯粹而直接的经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I do not bring about the trance state in the manner of which you are speaking. Ruburt switches another channel on, through which my essence can enter more readily. There is the problem here of my entry also into your conscious minds. This does certainly involve a looking inward on Ruburt's part, but it is not self-hypnosis in the terms usually spoken of, merely a focusing upon an objective inner stimulus in much the same manner that you focus upon an outside camouflage stimulus.
quotes.translation: 我并非以你们所谈论的那种方式引发出神状态。鲁柏会打开另一个频道，我的本质可以通过这个频道更容易地进入。这里还涉及我进入你们意识心智的问题。这当然涉及鲁柏的向内观照，但这并非通常所说的自我催眠，而只是聚焦于一个客观的内在刺激，其方式与你们聚焦于外在的伪装刺激大致相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: For a psychic communication to take place the communication must fall within the particular range of electromagnetic reality that can be picked up by the receiver, and by that particular level of the receiver's self that is able to translate it into meaningful terms. If, that is, you want any kind of proof. Otherwise the communication is simply received and acted upon automatically without leaving a trace. It merely becomes part of a new action, giving no evidence of its source.
quotes.translation: 要使心灵沟通发生，该沟通必须落在接收者能够接收到的特定电磁实相范围内，并且必须落在接收者自身能够将其翻译成有意义术语的特定层面上。也就是说，如果你们想要任何形式的证据的话。否则，沟通只是被自动接收并付诸行动，不留任何痕迹。它仅仅成为新行动的一部分，不提供其来源的证据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The expression of emotions in itself is an expression of action, of motion. To move requires first of all the expression of feeling, and the expression of any feeling makes room for still further motion. Self-hypnosis can indeed be invaluable in terms of accelerating bodily motion and healing. Expression, rather than repression, is vital.
quotes.translation: 情绪的表达本身就是行动、运动的表达。要运动，首先需要感受的表达，而任何感受的表达都会为进一步的运动腾出空间。就加速身体运动和疗愈而言，自我催眠确实可能具有不可估量的价值。表达，而非压抑，至关重要。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (I talked about the first session for Jane's symptoms -- the private portion of Session 208, for November 15, 1965 -- yet she said that for her the whole thing really started the day before we went to a party in June 1966 regarding How to Develop Your ESP Power. Our friends wanted to celebrate the publication of her first "psychic" book, her first mention of Seth, but she read poetry at the party and wouldn't talk about the ESP book -- too embarrassed. A strange, protective way to behave.

quotes.text: The self that you know is but one fragment of your entire identity. These fragment selves are not strung together, however, like beads of a string. They are more like the various skins of an onion, or segments of an orange, all connected through the one vitality and growing out into various realities while springing from the same source.
quotes.translation: 你所认知的自我，只是你整体身份的一个片段。然而这些片段自我并非像串珠般串联在一起。它们更像洋葱的层层外皮，或橘子的瓣瓣果肉，皆由同一生命力相连，从同一源头萌发，延伸至不同的实相中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When I said earlier that the ulcer was not a part of you, like a leg or an arm, I meant this literally. Because you believe this literally, literally you have allowed the ulcer to become a part of your self-image, in the same manner that an arm or a leg is a part of a self-image. And it is this connection that we must, and we will, cut.
quotes.translation: 先前我说溃疡不像腿或手臂那样属于你的一部分，这是字面意义上的说法。正因你字面意义上相信了这一点，你才字面意义上允许溃疡成为你自我形象的一部分——就像手臂或腿是自我形象的一部分那样。而我们必须、也必将切断的，正是这种联结。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Once again I make the point, a seeming paradox: The self constantly changes. The self at any given moment is not the self that it was, yet it is that which it was, since it is that which changed.
quotes.translation: 容我再强调这个看似矛盾的论点：自我不断变化。任何特定时刻的自我，既不是它曾是的那个自我，却又是它曾是的那个自我——因为它正是那个变化了的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: What you have is this. Let us speak no more of a conscious self and a subconscious or unconscious self. There is one self, and it focuses its consciousness in various dimensions, and that is all.
quotes.translation: 事实如此：我们不必再谈论有意识自我与潜意识或无意识自我。只有一个自我，它只是将意识聚焦于不同维度而已。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This "life-symbolization" may be adopted by those who gave little thought to self-examination during their lifetime. It is a part of the self-examination process, therefore, in which an individual forms his life into an image and then deals with it. Such a method is not used by all. Sometimes a series of such episodes are necessary....
quotes.translation: 这种"生命象征化"可能被那些生前很少自省的人所采用。因此，这是自省过程的一部分——个体将自己的生命塑造成一个意象，然后与之互动。并非所有人都使用这种方法。有时需要一连串这样的情节……
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner ego is indeed the "I" of your dreams, having somewhat the same sort of position within the inner self as the ego itself has to the physical self. Actions however merge within the inner ego. The scope of awareness is more complex. We will at a later time discuss this inner ego in connection with the dream situation and health.
quotes.translation: 内在自我确实是你们梦境中的"我"，它在内在自我中所处的位置，与外在自我在物质自我中的位置大致相同。然而，行动在内在自我中相互融合。意识的范畴更为复杂。我们稍后将讨论这个内在自我与梦境情境及健康的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The conscious physically oriented portions of the self become acquainted with the inner information. To some extent the reality of thought is consciously perceived as the innovator behind physical matter. Such an individual then can understand the nature of hallucinations at the point of death, and with full conscious awareness enter into the next plane of existence. The information made conscious is then passed on to others where it can be physically recognized and applied.
quotes.translation: 自我中面向物质实相的意识部分得以熟悉内在信息。在某种程度上，思想的实相被有意识地感知为物质背后的创新者。这样的个体便能在死亡时刻理解幻觉的本质，并以全然的觉知进入下一个存在层面。被意识化的信息随后传递给他人，使其能在物质层面被识别和应用。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: At times they are able to be perceived as pseudo images. They are doing subconsciously what came naturally, attempting to form, as always, their own physical construction. However it is impossible for them to create a consistent solid image in your terms, for while they are still focused within your system the inner self knows well that the individual is finished with a given life situation, is out of alignment so to speak, and is therefore denied full use of its own energy.
quotes.translation: 有时它们能被感知为伪影像。它们潜意识地进行着本能的尝试，一如既往地试图构建自身的物质形态。然而在你们的认知中，它们无法形成连贯的实体影像，因为当它们仍聚焦于你们系统时，内在自我深知该个体已结束特定生命情境——可谓已脱离原有轨道——因而被剥夺了自身能量的完整使用权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Deliberately he decides to create a sculpture, and automatically focuses his energies in that direction. When you form the living sculpture of your body, which is far more important to you than any work of art, you should certainly follow the same course. In other words, direct your energies toward the creation of a healthy functioning body. You form your image constantly; as many of the artistic processes are hidden, so the inner mechanisms by which you create your material self lie beneath the surface of your conscious mind. They are highly effective, nevertheless.
quotes.translation: 他刻意决定创作雕塑，便自动将能量聚焦于此方向。当你们塑造自身这具活生生的雕塑——这比任何艺术品都重要得多——时，当然也应遵循相同法则。换言之，将能量导向创造健康运作的身体。你们持续塑造着自身形象；正如许多艺术创作过程隐而不显，你们创造物质自我的内在机制也潜藏于意识表层之下。尽管如此，它们依然高效运作。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now,"There is no place to go" if you know what is truly meant by that statement. It is also true that there are as many places to go as you wish to find. You always create the places and the destinations at which you arrive. There are no places, and there are infinities of places. The inner self forms all systems and all places. On the one hand you can indeed call them illusion. On the other hand, these illusions are quite real. They are the clothing over the basic reality.
quotes.translation: 现在，"无处可去"这句话若你理解其真义，便知确实如此。同样真实的是，有多少你想寻找的地方，就有多少去处。你始终创造着所抵达的地点与目的地。既没有地方，又有无限的地方。内在自我形成所有系统与所有地方。一方面你确实可称其为幻相，另一方面这些幻相又相当真实——它们是包裹基本实相的外衣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This is the ideal circumstance, for when this is the case then the ego listens to the inner self, and then directs its energy outward in a way that is beneficial for the whole gestalt framework. What you call negative suggestions are often judgments of the ego, for suggestion works from the ego to the subconscious, as well as it works the other way around. Such suggestions made by the ego can indeed be caught, and positive or constructive suggestions given to replace them.
quotes.translation: 这是理想状态，因为当此情形时，自我会聆听内在自我，继而以有益于整体完形架构的方式向外投射能量。你们所谓的负面暗示常是自我的判断，因为暗示既从自我流向潜意识，也反向运作。自我发出的这类暗示确实能被捕捉，并代之以积极或建设性的暗示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: As the ego becomes certain of its strength, then it will allow the self to expand. I mentioned in our last session that the scientists did not realize that man has indeed evolved since the development of the human brain. For it has learned to form literally millions of new connections, meanings and concepts, new gestalts that have indeed made man something quite different than he was. All of these are new electromagnetic patterns which are now indelibly a part of the race.
quotes.translation: 当自我确认自身力量后，便会允许自我扩展。上次课程我曾提及，科学家并未意识到人类自大脑进化后确实已发生蜕变。因为大脑已学会形成数百万计的新连接、新意义与新概念，这些新完形确实使人类与往昔截然不同。所有这些新电磁模式如今已成为人类种族不可磨灭的组成部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are, again, no limitations to the self, but those that you create. These become valid limitations for all practical purposes however. When you learn, and you are learning, to extend the limitations of your self, you simply become aware of what you are already. You become more aware, but there is always more to become aware of.
quotes.translation: 自我本无限制，唯你所造者方成限制。然就实际效用而言，这些限制确实成立。当你学习——且你正在学习——扩展自我的界限时，你只是逐渐意识到自己本已是的状态。你变得更加觉察，但总有更多值得觉察之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You are largely over that kind of reaction -- yet it is still apt to return now and then when you fear that you have not done as well as you should have, or when you have momentarily caught yourself behaving in old ways. A feeling of self-approval is absolutely necessary for any true sense of well-being; it is not (underlined) virtuous in any way to put yourself down, or to punish yourself, because you do not feel you have lived up to your best behavior at any given time.
quotes.translation: 你大体上已超越那种反应——但当你担忧自己未尽本分，或偶尔察觉自己重蹈覆辙时，这种反应仍会不时重现。自我认同感对任何真正的幸福感而言绝对必要；因一时未能达到最佳表现而贬低或惩罚自己，绝非（强调）美德之举。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Your question about transmigration (in Session 903 in Dreams) was an excellent one, and did indeed make the matter clear. It is a temptation at times to use more specific scientific terms, but these would be as confusing as the various definitions and classifications (with humor) that you read in the dictionary, so overall we try to hit a "happy medium." (With more humor.)

quotes.text: The whole self contains the ego, and he ignored this. Any investigations into the nature of existence, and any true learning, must take place within all levels of the self. He cut off his ego to save his soul, and nearly lost both in the bargain. The ego indeed is part of the soul. It is one of the voices of the soul. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 整体自我包含自我意识，而他忽略了这点。任何对存在本质的探究与真正的学习，都必须在自我的所有层面进行。他为了拯救灵魂而割舍自我意识，结果险些两者俱失。自我意识实为灵魂的一部分，是灵魂的诸多声音之一。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Death is the personality's release from the physical plane, or we will use the term "the physical field," and that is all. To the ego this is a frightening future in prospect. To the ego, even sleep seems a slap in the face. Recognition in physical life of the whole self would do much to negate this death fear, since there are rather pleasant psychological experiences which are akin to the experience of death, and which would prepare the personality for this eventuality.
quotes.translation: 死亡是人格从物质层面的解脱——或容我们使用"物质场域"一词——仅此而已。对自我意识而言，这前景令人恐惧。在自我意识看来，连睡眠都像一记耳光。若能在物质生活中认知整体自我，将大大消解这种死亡恐惧，因为某些愉悦的心理体验与死亡经验相似，能为人格面对此终极事件做好准备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: All of the powers of your inner self are set into activation as a result of your conscious beliefs. You have lost a sense of responsibility for your conscious thought because you have been taught that it is not what forms your life. You have been told that regardless of your beliefs you are terrorized by unconscious conditioning.
quotes.translation: 你内在自我的所有力量，皆因你有意识的信念而被激活。你已丧失对意识思想的责任感，因你被教导说它并非塑造人生的关键。你被告知：无论信念如何，你始终受无意识制约的恐吓。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In the waking state the whole self is focused toward physical reality. In the dreaming state the whole self is focused within a different dimension. It is every bit as conscious and aware.
quotes.translation: 清醒状态下，整体自我聚焦于物质实相。梦境中，整体自我则聚焦于另一维度。其意识与觉察程度丝毫不减。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You visit with travelers from other systems. You plant thought forms in other systems, and you tend them. You hold congregation with the many segments of your own reality. Your world is like a thought form in my experience. Your physical system exists in many intensities, and can be perceived. Probable selves can be viewed by myself and others like me, for we see your reality in all of its dimensions, and you view it from the small present forms that you know. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 你拜访来自其他系统的旅人。你在其他系统里种植思想形态，并照料它们。你与自己实相的许多片段举行集会。你的世界在我体验中就像一个思想形态。你的物质系统存在于许多强度中，并且可以被感知。可能的自己可以被我和像我这样的存在看见，因为我们看到你实相的所有维度，而你从你所知的渺小当下形式中观看它。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The paintings already exist however as definite potential forms, already created by your whole self. Only you can give them physical reality however. You can only fail in not giving them physical form, and you can only fail to give them physical form by refusing to open up your inner channels to the intuitions of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些画作已经作为明确的潜在形式存在，由你的整个自己创造。但只有你能赋予它们物质实相。你唯一可能失败的方式是不赋予它们物质形式，而你唯一可能不赋予它们物质形式的方式是拒绝打开你内在的通道，以接收整个自己的直觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (Rewritten November/2000: The vision grew out of Seth's saying in the deleted 382nd session, on November 27/67, that I'd do well known painting of Bill Gallagher. It will be based upon the conception of my painting of 1954 that I "sold to Sonja. ''see session 584 in Seth Speaks, held on May 3/71.)

quotes.text: The material that I have just given you is necessary for any understanding of the ways in which massive doses of LSD can affect the individual. Here we are dealing with an artificial and forced method of, hopefully, bringing about physical, psychic and spiritual illumination. Such enlightenment is supposed to lead to better health, self-knowledge, and provide an inner state of peace. Through such therapy, conscience is to be encountered and conquered once and for all.
quotes.translation: 我刚才给你的资料对于理解大剂量LSD如何影响个体是必要的。这里我们处理的是人为且强迫的方法，希望借此带来物质、心灵与灵性的启迪。这种启蒙被认为能带来更好的健康、自我认知，并提供内在的平静状态。通过这种疗法，良知将被一劳永逸地面对并征服。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Psychological time adds duration. You will find something else here. From the framework of psychological time you will see that clock time is as dreamlike and fleeting as you once thought inner time was. And you will discover that inner time is as much a reality as you once thought outer time was. You will discover your whole selves in other worlds, peeping inward and outward at the same time, and finding that all time is one time, and that all divisions are illusion.
quotes.translation: 心理时间增加了持续性。你在这里会发现别的东西。从心理时间的架构中，你会看到钟表时间如同你曾认为内在时间那般如梦似幻且转瞬即逝。而你会发现内在时间如同你曾认为外在时间那般真实。你会在其他世界里发现你的整个自己，同时向内与向外窥视，并发现所有时间都是同一时间，所有分割都是幻相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is often bathed in dreams, and it drifts back to other lives and places as a release and a relief from the struggle that is involved in the new formation. This is the dilemma of creation. The inner self does all of this spontaneously, as both of your parts spontaneously--each of your selves spontaneously play their own role.
quotes.translation: 它常沐浴在梦境中，飘回其他生命与地方，作为从新形成所涉挣扎中的释放与解脱。这是创造的困境。内在自己自发地做这一切，正如你的两个部分自发地——你的每个自己自发地扮演自己的角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The animals possess a consciousness of self, and without the human intellect. You do not need a human intellect to be aware of your own consciousness. Animals, it is true, do not reflect upon the nature of their own identities as man does (pause), but this is because that nature is intuitively comprehended. It is self-evident.
quotes.translation: 动物拥有自我意识，且无需人类智力。你不需要人类智力来觉察自己的意识。诚然，动物不像人类那样反思自身身份的本质（停顿），但这是因为那种本质被直觉地领悟了。它是不证自明的。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: This extension of self will occur in some degree before any really effective brotherhood of man is accomplished. This is unfortunate but true. The self begins learning its arbitrary limitations at the same time that it tries expansion in childhood. If the cultural limitations were lifted this would at least be of some benefit.
quotes.translation: 这种自我的延伸在真正有效的人类博爱实现之前，会在某种程度上发生。这虽令人遗憾，却是事实。自我在童年试图扩展的同时，也开始学习其人为的限制。如果文化限制被解除，这至少会带来一些益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: He may, for example, continue within it for several reincarnations. Reincarnated selves are no more than probable selves, choosing to experience various forms. In such circumstances, the personality does not leave your system, in your terms, for some time, though this is all subjective. Experience is the only reality, you see.
quotes.translation: 例如，他可能在其中持续数个转世。转世的自我不过是或然自我，选择体验各种形式。在这种情况下，用你们的话说，人格不会立即离开你们的系统，尽管这一切都是主观的。你看，经验是唯一的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: It is almost impossible to explain clearly, through the use of words, this massive complexity, for all fields of activity are self-generating. Even the dream field is self-generating. No consciousness can bring itself to destruction. It can only cease experiencing a certain portion of action. This is a rather important point.
quotes.translation: 几乎不可能通过文字清楚解释这种巨大的复杂性，因为所有活动场域都是自我生成的。甚至梦境场域也是自我生成的。没有任何意识能将自己导向毁灭。它只能停止体验某一部分的行动。这是一个相当重要的观点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is not to say that the outer ego is a puppet. It is to say that the outer ego is far less conscious than the inner ego or the inner self, that its perception is less, that it is far less stable, though it makes great pretense at stability; that it springs from the inner self, and is less rather than more, aware. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 这并不是说外在自我是个傀儡。而是说外在自我远不如内在自我或内在自己具有意识，它的感知较少，远不稳定，尽管它极力假装稳定；它源自内在自己，且意识较少而非较多。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now it is obvious that the body grows up about the inner self, and that trees grow out of the ground, whereas buildings do not ordinarily spring up like flowers of their own accord; so the inner self has various methods of creation, and uses the EE units in different ways, as you shall see as we continue with this discussion.
quotes.translation: 显然身体是围绕内在自己成长起来的，树木从地面长出，而建筑物通常不会像花朵一样自行生长；因此内在自己有各种创造方法，并以不同方式运用EE单位，随着我们继续讨论，你们将会明白这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We find therefore no, no limitations to the self, neither top nor bottom. The self is not enclosed within the bony skull. You call your thoughts your own, and yet how do you hold them?
quotes.translation: 因此我们发现，自我没有任何限制，既无顶端也无底端。自我并非封闭在头骨之内。你们称自己的思想为己有，然而你们又如何能抓住它们呢？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The physical self as you know it is a focus of consciousness that forms a personality in response to that focus. It is very difficult to make analogies here, but I am foolhardy enough to try it. (Pause.) It seems to you that any naturally aborted fetus has no physical life at all, that such life has been denied to it for some reason. Instead, the fetus experiences another level: physical life at a different scale, that in your terms would apply to the distant past.
quotes.translation: 你所认知的物质自我是意识的一个焦点，它围绕这个焦点形成人格。在此很难用类比说明，但我仍斗胆尝试。（停顿）在你看来，任何自然流产的胎儿都完全没有物质生命，这种生命似乎因某种原因被剥夺了。实则不然，该胎儿体验着另一层次：以不同尺度的物质生命存在，按你们的说法这适用于远古时期。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 730
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now. Take for example probable event X. This so-called probable event or action will be experienced by the various portions of the self in their own way. When it is experienced by the ego you call it an actual physical event. When the event is perceived or experienced by other layers of the self, the ego does not know of it.
quotes.translation: 现在。以可能事件X为例。这个所谓的可能事件或行动，将被自我的各个部分以各自的方式体验。当它被自我体验时，你称之为实际物质事件；当该事件被自我其他层面感知或体验时，自我对此一无所知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Knowing your reincarnational background, but not knowing the true nature of your present self, is useless. You cannot justify or rationalize present circumstances by saying, "This is because of something I did in a past life," for within yourself now is the ability to change negative influences. You may have brought negative influences into your life for a given reason, but the reason always has to do with understanding, and understanding removes those influences.
quotes.translation: 知晓你的转世背景却不知晓当下自我的真实本质，这毫无用处。你无法通过说"这是因为前世所为"来合理化或辩解当前处境，因为此刻你自身就具备改变负面影响的能力。你或许因特定原因将负面影响带入生命，但这个原因始终与领悟相关，而领悟会消除这些影响。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner self obviously needs the outer ego with its outer senses, in order to permit its own materialization in various camouflage forms. This should not be underrated or forgotten. Without the outer core, the inner self could simply not add to its own value fulfillment through participation in energy-constructs （hyphen）.
quotes.translation: 内在自我显然需要外在自我及其外在感官，才能以各种伪装形态实现自身物质化。这一点不应被低估或遗忘。没有外在核心，内在自我就无法通过参与能量建构来增添自身的价值完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Again past, present and future are definite realities only to the ego. Memory to the ego presupposes the existence of a past that no longer exists within physical reality. When I say that the dreaming self has memory, therefore, of its dream experiences, I mean that it scans its present existence. It is a simultaneous self.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，过去、现在与未来对自我而言才是确定的现实。自我的记忆预设了在物质实相中已不复存在的过去。因此当我说做梦的自我拥有其梦境体验的记忆时，是指它正在扫描其当下存在。这是一个同时性的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The selves who ride the wheel therefore also provide some of the power that runs the wheel. It is only because you stress similarities rather than differences that you do not realize that the self that you call the ego is but the appearance, in one particular perspective, of many quite different aspects of the personality.
quotes.translation: 因此，驾驭轮子的诸自我也提供了驱动轮子的部分力量。正因你强调相似性而非差异性，才未能意识到：你称之为自我的那个自我，不过是人格诸多迥异面向在某一特定视角下的表象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It does not fear destruction however, as the ego does. It still fights for survival, of course; but the consciousness of plant life involves a consciousness of self as it operates within action. It sees or feels itself as a part of continuing action, and because of this inner atomic knowledge it does not fear destruction, basically, knowing that it will be changed into other kinds of action.
quotes.translation: 它并不像自我那样惧怕毁灭。当然，它仍为生存而战；但植物生命的意识包含了对自我在行动中运作的意识。它将自己视为持续行动的一部分，由于这种内在的原子知识，它基本上不惧怕毁灭，因为它知道自己将转化为其他形式的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner self would be then any given outthrust of original action outward, as explained earlier. This outthrust would, because of its nature, instantly send further outthrusts in as many directions as possible for it. And because it is action, and because no action can complete itself, and no action can completely materialize, then each outthrust or materialization would result in an in-thrust; not into the original action from which it came, but into itself.
quotes.translation: 如先前所述，内在自体便是原始行动向外的任何特定投射。这种投射因其本质，会立即向尽可能多的方向发出进一步的投射。由于它是行动，且没有任何行动能完成自身，也没有任何行动能完全物质化，因此每一次投射或物质化都会导致一次内收——不是回到它所源自的原始行动，而是进入自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is a corresponding image, held always within the inner consciousness of those who pass out of your system. (Long pause. One of several here.) This is indelible, but not always immediately available for reference. It forms a part of the whole inner self. We would prefer that you not think of any given entire entity in terms of a physical structure, though we have ourselves used the term structure to make explanations simpler, and will probably do so again.
quotes.translation: 那些离开你们系统的人，其内在意识中始终存有一个相应的影像。（长停顿。此处有数次停顿。）这个影像不可磨灭，但并非总能立即供参考。它构成了整个内在自体的一部分。我们更希望你们不要将任何特定整体存有视为物理结构，尽管我们自己也使用"结构"一词来简化解释，并且可能还会再次使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The self is extended, so to speak, existing within many dimensions. It extends as vitally and actually in the dream universe as it does in your own physical universe. It is as much a part of the electrical universe as it is a part of the world of psychological motivation. The intertwinings are infinite in all directions.
quotes.translation: 可以说，自体是延伸的，存在于许多维度中。它在梦宇宙中的存在与在你们物理宇宙中的存在同样鲜活而真实。它既是电磁宇宙的一部分，也是心理动机世界的一部分。其交织在一切方向上都是无限的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The conscious mind, the ego, must be momentarily diverted, so that the intuitive self is allowed freedom. He should know that inspiration does not come from the ego. He knows this intellectually, but upon this occasion he insists in using his ego as a whip to force speed. In the past he was more sensible in this respect.
quotes.translation: 意识心、自我必须暂时转移，以便让直觉自体获得自由。他应当知道灵感并非来自自我。他在理智上明白这一点，但在此情况下，他坚持用自我作为鞭子来催促速度。过去他在这一方面更为明智。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is nevertheless the physical materialization of this lack of communication. Its purpose is basically a good one. The results are obviously poor. The ulcer is an attempt to force a recognition of unity from the various levels of the self. It is, literally, a physical bridge. At this time it is an impeding action, but it can be dissolved and resolved, according to our previous discussions.
quotes.translation: 然而，这仍是这种沟通缺失的物理物质化。其目的本质上是好的，但结果显然不佳。溃疡是试图迫使自体各层面承认统一性的努力。它实际上是一座物理桥梁。此刻它是一种阻碍行动，但根据我们之前的讨论，它可以被化解和解决。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Later you may be able to follow this inner self even while the physical ego operates in its normal manner, but this is much more difficult if overall personality balance is to be maintained. It should be fairly obvious that identity hardly resides exclusively within the physically-oriented ego. In one sense, identity is always a becoming, and it can never be a static, finished thing. For it knows itself through change, and that which is finished cannot change.
quotes.translation: 日后你或许能在物质自我正常运作的同时，跟随这个内在自己，但若要维持整体人格平衡，这便困难得多。显而易见的是，身份认同绝非仅存于以物质为导向的自我之中。从某种意义来说，身份认同始终处于"成为"的状态，它永远不可能是一成不变的完成品。因为它通过改变来认识自己，而完成之物已无法改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: With deep trance the conscious outer state is completely switched off. Knowledge is forcibly poured down the imaginary gullet, and I can't feel very enthusiastic over such a method. What we are doing may be slower on your terms, but the effects are more durable and the whole self is aware of any knowledge thus received.
quotes.translation: 进入深度出神状态时，意识的外在状态会完全关闭。知识被强行灌入想象的食道，我对这种方法实在难以热衷。以你们的时间标准来看，我们正在做的方式或许较慢，但效果更为持久，整个自己都能意识到如此接收到的任何知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In reincarnations also you carry along many of these tendencies. In the middle of a projection you may suddenly remember the self on the bed, and in the middle of a given existence you may suddenly remember a previous self. I have also told you that the term previous in this connection is used only for your convenience.
quotes.translation: 在转世中，你们也会携带许多这类倾向。在投射过程中，你可能会突然记起床上的自己；在某个特定存在中，你可能会突然记起前世的自己。我也告诉过你们，在此语境中使用"前世"一词仅为方便起见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In such cases the dilemma is projected outside of the self and seen as an exterior condition which can be manipulated. Indeed, a "magical" transformation is involved. This is not to be construed, however, as a statement that all creative acts result from individual problems or neuroses. Quite the contrary, in fact. Such problems projected outward can never really be solved as far as the individual is concerned, of course, since their source is not understood.
quotes.translation: 这类情况下，困境被投射到自我之外，被视为可操控的外在条件。确实，这涉及一种"魔法般的"转化。但这不应被解读为所有创造性行为都源于个人问题或神经症。事实上恰恰相反。就个人而言，这类被投射出去的问题永远无法真正解决，因为其根源未被理解。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is also automatically transformed according to your beliefs, so that it makes sense to you at least to some degree. In energy terms, think of your selves as particles, and of your experiences as the waves that flow through the particles and gives each of them its sensations. When you are physical you are a particle. The form of the particle defines your experience as the waves permeate it, but your greater reality cannot be expressed in such limited terms.
quotes.translation: 它也会根据你的信念自动转化，至少在一定程度上对你而言具有意义。从能量角度而言，将你的诸多个体视为粒子，将你的经验视为流经粒子并赋予每个粒子感知的波。当你处于物质状态时，你就是一个粒子。粒子的形态决定了波渗透时你的经验，但你的更大实相无法用如此有限的术语表达。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: They must be interpreted instead through the use of those inner senses of which I have spoken, for these are the basic tools of the inner self. I realize that it is frowned upon to speak in terms of a limited intellect, which cannot understand a whole reality because of a built-in deficiency; nevertheless while it is true that the intellect by itself cannot grasp or comprehend inner reality, this should not be thought of as a deficiency inherent in intellect.
quotes.translation: 它们必须通过我提及的那些内在感官来诠释，因为这些是内在自己的基本工具。我明白，谈论有限智力因先天缺陷而无法理解整体实相是遭人诟病的；然而，尽管智力本身确实无法把握或领悟内在实相，但这不应被视为智力固有的缺陷。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In time you will experience them as one. Therefore, when you read, and various names are given to, levels of the self, remember this. This point alone will save you much bewilderment. The exercises, the way Ruburt has adapted them recently, are excellent. He should keep this view. You will always adapt in any case. These sessions and material represent your closest and most dependable source of inner knowledge, outside of direct personal mystical experiences.
quotes.translation: 终有一天你会体验到它们是一体的。因此，当你读到关于自我不同层面的各种名称时，请记住这一点。仅此一点就能让你免于许多困惑。鲁柏最近调整的练习方式非常出色，他应当保持这个观点。无论如何你总会自行调整。这些课和资料，除了直接的个人神秘体验之外，是你最可靠、最贴近的内在知识来源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: --for it has all kinds of implications that we cannot cover in an evening, but it will be more than worthwhile for us to pursue them. Now whether or not a medium is in a trance that is as deep as the Atlantic Ocean, the medium will not be a pure channel. The ego will simply be bypassed, but the other layers of the self, the neurological structures particularly, will continue to operate as always. They will be altered by the perceptions that flow through them.
quotes.translation: ——因为它包含的各种含义我们无法在一晚之内讲完，但深入探讨它们绝对值得。无论灵媒是否陷入深如大西洋的恍惚状态，灵媒都不会成为纯粹的通道。自我只是被绕过了，但自我的其他层面，特别是神经结构，仍会照常运作。它们会因流经其中的感知而改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We will be deliberate for a moment to get this material through, since I know it is difficult for you. I want to make these points to lead up to the main one. Consciousness comes first, and forms the physical body in ways that I have described. Nevertheless there are no real boundaries that separate self from non-self.
quotes.translation: 为了顺利传达这些资料，我会刻意放慢节奏，因为我知道这对你来说很困难。我要提出这些要点，是为了引出核心观点。意识是第一位的，它按照我描述的方式塑造了物质身体。然而，自我与非自我之间并不存在真正的界限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your idea of one soul, one self, forms a significance and a selectivity that blinds you to these other realities that are as much "here and now" as your present self. The units of consciousness that compose your physical being alone are aware of those greater significances, to which your limited ideas make you opaque.
quotes.translation: 你对"一个灵魂、一个自我"的认知形成了一种意义和选择性，这使你无法看见那些与你当前自我同样"此时此地"的其他实相。构成你物质身体的意识单位本身，就知晓那些更宏大的意义，而你受限的观念使你对其视而不见。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 683
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: If you toss a ball in a dream, neither the self that tosses the ball, nor the ball, exist in any space structure as you know it. In somewhat the same manner are emotion structures handled. A refusal or a denial, an attempt not to handle a particular emotional structure involves action. The refusal itself is an action.
quotes.translation: 如果你在梦中抛出一个球，那么抛球的自我和球本身，都不存在于你所知的任何空间结构中。情感结构的处理方式也大致如此。拒绝或否认，以及试图不去处理某个特定情感结构的行为，本身都涉及行动。拒绝本身就是一个行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am in somewhat the same position when I try to explain to you the nature of this inner self, for while you can become aware of it in dreams, you cannot truly appreciate its maturity or abilities; yet they are yours in the same way that the man's abilities belonged to the child. In the dream state you learn, among other things, how to construct your own physical reality day by day, just as after death you learn how to construct your next physical lifetime.
quotes.translation: 当我试图向你解释这个内在自我的本质时，我的处境也类似——因为虽然你可以在梦中觉察到它，却无法真正领会它的成熟度或能力；然而它们属于你，就像那个男人的能力属于那个孩子一样。在梦境状态中，你学习如何日复一日地构建自己的物质实相，正如死后你学习如何构建下一世物质生命一样。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Many writers of historical pieces, for example, are writing out of direct experience with those times. Such instances represent an excellent working rapport between the present self and the unconscious, which brings these memories to the surface in such a way that current life is enriched. More often than not, true awareness of the situation often becomes almost conscious, and just beneath awareness the individual knows the source of his authentic material.
quotes.translation: 例如，许多历史题材的作家，其作品直接源于对那个时代的亲身经历。这类案例展现了当下自我与潜意识之间卓越的工作默契——潜意识将这些记忆以丰富当前生活的方式带到表层。通常，对情境的真实觉知几乎已接近意识层面，而个体在意识边缘便知晓其真实素材的来源。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The telepathic message picked up in dreams under such circumstances will of course be interpreted by the dreaming self in its own way, symbolically, so that the dream actions may not appear to be the same. If it were possible to examine two such allied dream communications however, the connection between them would be very clear. In years to come we may be able to work along these lines, but this will be in the future. It is nevertheless an important point.
quotes.translation: 在此类情境下，梦中接收的心灵感应信息自然会被做梦的自我以自身方式象征性地诠释，因此梦境行为可能看似不同。然而，若能检验两则相关的梦境通讯，其间的关联将十分清晰。未来数年间我们或许能朝此方向探索，但这尚属后话。不过，这确实是个关键要点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Each painting that you create represents the death of the self that you were before you created it. The changing self forever dies in this manner, and yet only this symbolic death insures psychic survival. There is no basic moral problem then when you consider the true nature of aggression, for it is highly creative,
quotes.translation: 你所创作的每一幅画作，都代表着创作前那个自我的死亡。变迁的自我以这种方式永恒地消逝，却唯有这种象征性的死亡才能确保心灵的存续。因此，当你审视攻击性的真实本质时，根本不存在道德难题——因为它具有高度创造性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: At the same time all beliefs are communicated to others, not only through quite unconscious bodily mechanisms, but telepathically. You will always try to correlate your ideas with exterior experience. (Pause.) All of the abilities of the inner self will be brought to bear to materialize the image of your beliefs, regardless of what they ought to be. The "proper" emotions will be generated, bringing about those body states that exist in your conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 与此同时，所有信念不仅通过全然无意识的身体机制，更通过心灵感应传递给他人。你总会试图将自身观念与外在经验相协调。（停顿）内在自我的所有能力都将被调动，以具现你信念的意象——无论这些信念"应该"是什么。那些"恰当"的情绪将被激发，引发你意识心智中存在的身体状态。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is true that on a conscious level you do not as yet operate outside of time, but are bound by it. When you learn to free yourselves from those dimensions to some extent, you are not simply duplicating or "returning" to some vaster condition, but adding a new element to that condition. The kind of self-awareness you have is unique, but all kinds are unique. Each triumph you make as an individual is reflected in your species and in its cellular knowledge.
quotes.translation: 诚然，在意识层面你尚未能超越时间运作，仍受其束缚。当你学会在一定程度上挣脱这些维度时，并非简单复制或"回归"某种更宏大的状态，而是为那种状态增添新元素。你所拥有的自我觉知形式独一无二，但所有形式皆具独特性。你作为个体取得的每次胜利，都会在同类物种及其细胞认知中留下回响。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 705
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now. Although you have chosen to form a particular group of qualities into a field pattern of a particular personality, upon which you focus the bulk of your energy, there are also other more shadowy, less well-constructed possibilities of personality selves that exist loosely within the psychic framework of the dominant personality, and these also have their influence. They also attempt physical constructions to a limited degree, and with limited success.
quotes.translation: 现在。尽管你选择将特定品质组合成特定人格的能量场模式，并将大部分能量聚焦于此，但在主导人格的心灵架构内，仍松散存在着其他更模糊、建构较不完善的人格自我可能性。这些可能性同样施加影响，它们也在有限程度上尝试物质建构，并取得有限成效。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Energy itself is continually new--event, and motion, and no particular pattern will suffice it for long. Energy is self-renewing, and indefinite duration of pattern would lead to dead ends. Energy always builds. Identity, again, is not dependent upon matter. Energy propels and carries along with it, its own traces.
quotes.translation: 能量本身是持续更新的——事件、运动，没有任何特定模式能长久满足它。能量是自我更新的，模式的无限延续会导致死胡同。能量始终在构建。身份认同同样不依赖于物质。能量推动并携带自身的痕迹前行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As you know, camouflage elements are formed from the vital energy, which itself forms of itself all dimensions and all realities.
