quotes.text: In many cases memory remains unconscious as far as waking self is concerned, but the experiences themselves can completely change the structure of an individual life. Disastrous courses can be averted through such inner communications and illuminations, whether or not the ego is aware of them.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下，就清醒自我而言，记忆仍是无意识的，但经历本身可以完全改变个体生活的结构。通过这种内在交流与启示，无论自我是否意识到，灾难性的进程都可以被避免。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Every nerve and fiber within the physical image has an inner purpose that is not seen, and that serves to connect the inner self with physical reality--in other words, that allows the inner self to create physical reality.
quotes.translation: 物质形象中的每条神经和纤维都有看不见的内在目的，这目的将内在自我与物质实相连接——换句话说，它允许内在自我创造物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now, so do the cells in your own body have self-consciousness and individuality to some extent, and so on a different scale entirely do they make decisions. Their decisions affect you, though they have but vague awareness that you exist as a whole at all. Their decisions indirectly affect your manipulations of camouflage, and of course directly influence your whole state of being. The cells are developed to the fullest at this time.
quotes.translation: 现在，你身体中的细胞在某种程度上也拥有自我意识和个体性，并且在完全不同的尺度上做出决定。它们的决定影响你，尽管它们对你作为一个整体的存在只有模糊的认知。它们的决定间接影响你对伪装的操控，当然也直接影响你的整个存在状态。细胞此刻已发展到最充分的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You see his failing here; see your own. He is good at telling you to expand, and yet he is so frightened of a self no longer undisciplined that he shrinks from using his abilities at the gallery, and this is reinforced by your fear of his doing so, or indeed of showing your own abilities to others. Expansion brings expansion. You cannot truly shrink in one field of endeavor without shrinking in all, particularly if you are creative.
quotes.translation: 你看到他的失败之处；也看到你自己的。他擅长告诉你要扩展，却又如此害怕一个不再不受约束的自我，以至于在画廊中畏缩不敢运用自己的能力，而你对他的这种做法的恐惧——或对向他人展示自己能力的恐惧——又强化了这一点。扩展带来扩展。你无法真正在一个努力领域退缩而不在所有领域退缩，尤其是如果你具有创造力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying, or should, that the inner self sends its projections of inner senses through both the physical universe and the dream universe; yet all this talk of space and placement is a mere convenience. Yet, in terms of physical construction this is what you would find, and this, if it were understood, is what is seen in the actual construction of the most minute physical particle under observation in your laboratories.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻（或应该不言而喻），内在自我通过物质宇宙和梦境宇宙发送其内在感官的投射；然而所有这些关于空间和位置的讨论都只是方便说法。但就物质构建而言，这正是你会发现的，如果被理解，这正是你们实验室中观察最微小物质粒子实际构建时所见的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You try to maintain a constant, relatively permanent physical and subjective self in order to maintain a relatively constant, relatively permanent environment. So you are always in a position of ignoring such changes. Those that you refuse to acknowledge are precisely those that would give you a much better understanding of the true nature of reality, individual subjectivity, and the physical environment that seems to surround you.
quotes.translation: 你试图维持一个恒定、相对永久的物质与主观自我，以便维持一个相对恒定、相对永久的环境。因此你总是处于忽略这类变化的状态。那些你拒绝承认的变化，恰恰能让你更深刻地理解实相的本质、个体主观性以及看似环绕你的物质环境。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If you perceived the constant change within your body with as much persistence as you attend to its seemingly permanent nature, then you would be amazed that you ever considered the body as one more or less constant, more or less cohesive, entity. Even subjectively you focus upon and indeed manufacture the idea of a relatively stable, relatively permanent conscious self. You stress those ideas and thoughts and attitudes that you recall from "past" experience as your own, completely ignoring those that once were "characteristic" and now are vanished -- ignoring the fact also that you cannot hold thought. The thought of a moment before, in your terms, vanishes away.
quotes.translation: 如果你以关注身体看似永久性的同等执着，去感知体内持续的变化，那么你会惊讶自己竟曾将身体视为一个或多或少恒定、或多或少连贯的实体。即使在主观层面，你也聚焦并实际上制造出一个相对稳定、相对永久的意识自我的概念。你强调那些从"过去"经验中回忆起的、自认为属于你的想法、念头和态度，完全忽略那些曾经"典型"如今却已消失的——同时也忽略你无法抓住念头这一事实。用你的话说，前一秒的念头已然消逝。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your painting was meant to bring out from the recesses of your being the accumulation of your knowledge in the form of images -- not of people you might meet now on the street, but portraits of the residents of the mind. The residents of the mind are very real. In a certain fashion, they are your parents more than your parents were, and when you express their realities, they are also expressing yours. All time is simultaneous. Only the illusion of time on each of your parts keeps you from greeting each other. To some extent, when you paint such portraits you are forming psychic bridges between yourself and those other selves: Your own identity as yourself grows.
quotes.translation: 你的画作旨在将你存在深处积累的知识以图像形式呈现——并非你此刻可能在街上遇到的人，而是心灵居民的肖像。心灵居民非常真实。从某种角度看，他们比你的父母更像是你的父母，当你表达他们的实相时，他们也在表达你的实相。所有时间都是同时存在的。只是你们每个人对时间的幻相阻碍了彼此问候。在某种程度上，当你绘制这类肖像时，你正在自己与那些其他自我之间架设心灵桥梁：你作为自己的身份认同因此成长。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 834, FEBRUARY 5, 1979
8:59 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: It was composed of actual matter. As you should know, like all other atoms and molecules, its atoms and molecules had capsule comprehension, generalized consciousness. They formed themselves at Mark's instigation into a gestalt of physical construction; but the gestalt could not operate consistently or endure for any amount of physical time, in your field, because of the absence here of the greater data which is the property of the whole self, in its construction of a completed human form. This will take some reading over. Certain conditions, which we will discuss at length later, are necessary for a completely valid or effective materialization into human form.
quotes.translation: 它由实际物质构成。如你所知，与其他所有原子和分子一样，它的原子和分子具有胶囊式理解力与普遍意识。它们在马克的驱动下自行组合成物质结构的完形；但这个完形无法持续运作或在你场域中维持任何物理时间长度，因为这里缺少完整自我在构建完整人类形态时所拥有的更宏大资料。这需要反复阅读。某些条件——我们稍后将详细讨论——对于完全有效或成功地物质化为人形是必要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: All of this happens because the inner portions of your being operate spontaneously, joyfully, freely; all of this occurs because your inner self believes in you, often even while you do not believe in it. These unconscious portions of your being operate amazingly well, frequently despite the greatest misunderstanding on your part of their nature and function, and in the face of strong interference from you because of your beliefs.
quotes.translation: 这一切之所以发生，是因为你存在的内在部分自发、喜悦、自由地运作；这一切之所以发生，是因为你的内在自我相信你，即便常常在你都不相信它的时候。你存在的这些无意识部分运作得惊人地好，尽管你常常对其本质与功能存在最大误解，并且面对你因信念而产生的强烈干扰。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The emotions belong to the personality, that is to the present personality, and are strongly connected both to the conscious ego and to the inner self, which is so often ignored. This is the rather difficult part for me to explain, I'm afraid. I'm not sure how to go about making this clear.
quotes.translation: 情绪属于人格，即当前人格，并与常被忽略的意识自我和内在自我紧密相连。恐怕这部分对我来说相当难以解释。我不确定该如何阐明这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As this effective field of perception patterns changes, so do the apparent boundaries of the practical self. It is imperative that we move away from the concept of a self as an indivisible, rigid and limited reality. Indeed, I hesitate almost to continue, since I do not want to confuse you.
quotes.translation: 随着这个有效的感知模式场域发生变化，实用自我的明显边界也随之改变。我们必须摆脱将自我视为不可分割、僵化且有限的实相概念。事实上，我几乎犹豫着不想继续，因为我不想让你感到困惑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The body maintains its vitality not only through the physical motion and agility that you perceive, but by microscopic agility, and actions within microseconds, that you do not perceive. There is as much motion, stimulation, and reaction in the interior bodily environment as the body meets through its encounters with the exterior environment. The body must now and then "flush its systems out," run through its repertoire, raise its temperature (pause), activate its hormonal actions more strongly. In such ways it keeps its system of immunities clear. That system operates always. To some extent, it is a way that the body distinguishes between self and nonself.
quotes.translation: 身体不仅通过你所感知的身体运动和灵活性来维持活力，还通过微观层面的灵活性和微秒内的行动来维持，这些是你无法感知的。身体内部环境中的运动、刺激和反应，与身体通过外部环境遭遇的同样多。身体必须时不时地"冲洗其系统"，运行其全部程序，提高体温（停顿），更强烈地激活其激素作用。通过这种方式，它保持其免疫系统的清晰。该系统始终在运作。在某种程度上，这是身体区分自我与非我的一种方式。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (Smile, eyes open.) Short range predictions would be most difficult for me, since I cannot break down time as you think of it to that degree. I perceive instead at one glance seemingly whole segments of your time field. (Pause.) Seth as you knew him perceives your own system more clearly. (Pause.) From my viewpoint (pause) I do not perceive your physical universe then as you do. I do perceive your psychic values and Emotional intensities, and realize that you perceive but very small segments of these. As you break down the spacious present into moments, which you then experience, so also you break down psychic identity, gestalts, into small self structures.
quotes.translation: （微笑，睁眼。）短期预测对我来说是最困难的，因为我无法像你那样将时间分解到那种程度。相反，我一眼就能感知到你时间场域中看似完整的片段。（停顿。）你所认识的赛斯更清晰地感知到你们自己的系统。（停顿。）从我的视角来看（停顿），我并非像你那样感知你们的物质宇宙。我确实感知到你们的心灵价值和情感强度，并意识到你们只感知到这些的极小片段。正如你将广阔当下分解为瞬间，然后体验它们，同样地，你也将心灵身份、完形分解为小的自我结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In the beginning of this recovery they were used to maintain the status quo, and prevent any further worsening of symptoms. This meant that a complete stop was made in all destructive issues. Such an action requires enormous energy alone, for it is the stoppage of a process which is in itself action. This state was maintained steadily, and held, and then the recovery process begun. In this case this represented an entire, almost complete, transformation of the circulating system, and a change of chemical interactions. The mental condition you see has not deteriorated since its improvement. The whole outlook of the psychic self has changed for the better.
quotes.translation: 在这次康复的初期，它们被用来维持现状，并防止症状进一步恶化。这意味着所有破坏性问题都被完全停止。这样的行动本身就需要巨大的能量，因为它是阻止一个本身就是行动的过程。这种状态被稳定地维持和保持，然后康复过程开始。在这种情况下，这代表了循环系统的彻底、几乎完全的转变，以及化学相互作用的改变。你看到的精神状况自改善以来没有恶化。心灵自我的整个前景已经向好的方向改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Only in this case the hallucinatory effects are actual constructions upon the plane in question, and involve problems that must be worked out. The hallucinations appear more or less consistent merely because everyone on that particular level is under the effects of self-hypnosis, and because they have already constructed hallucinatory senses, the outer senses, in order to perceive the hallucinatory world that they have created.
quotes.translation: 只是在这种情况下，幻觉效果实际上是所涉层面上的实际建构，并涉及必须解决的问题。这些幻觉看起来或多或少一致，仅仅是因为那个特定层面上的每个人都处于自我催眠的影响下，并且因为他们已经构建了幻觉感官，即外在感官，以便感知他们创造的幻觉世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Its beliefs about the nature of reality are then given to inner portions of the self. These rely mainly upon the conscious mind's interpretation of temporal reality. The conscious mind sets the goals and the inner self brings them about, using all its facilities and inexhaustible energy.
quotes.translation: 它对实相本质的信念随后被传递给自我的内在部分。这些主要依赖于意识心对时间实相的解释。意识心设定目标，内在自我利用其所有能力和取之不尽的能量来实现这些目标。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are other constructions, quite as valid, which make little or no impression on the outer senses, but constructions with which the inner self is fairly familiar; and these so-called immaterial constructions exert a strong influence indirectly upon the world of physical construction.
quotes.translation: 还有其他同样真实的建构，它们对外在感官几乎不产生或完全不产生印象，但内在自体对这些建构却相当熟悉；这些所谓的非物质建构间接对物质建构的世界施加了强大的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I have mentioned this many times. There are no boundaries to the self, and no barriers put upon its development. A personality may "originally" be a part of a given entity, and on its own develop interests quite different. It can on its own take a lonely way, or it can instead attach itself or gravitate toward other entities with interests like its own. The original connection will not be severed, but new ones made and formed.
quotes.translation: 我曾多次提及这一点。自体没有界限，其发展也不受任何阻碍。一个人格可能"最初"是某个存有的一部分，并自行发展出截然不同的兴趣。它可以独自走上孤寂之路，也可以依附或趋向其他与自己兴趣相投的存有。原初的联系不会断绝，但新的联系会建立并形成。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Problems leading to world wars also cause worldwide natural disasters. These are merely another materialization of energy projected by those who have not learned how to handle it. Such reactions fire through the dream universe also, and are reflected through all phases of your activity. The whole self compares the performance of various portions of itself in physical reality and in dream reality, and draws its own conclusions.
quotes.translation: 导致世界大战的问题也会引发全球性的自然灾害。这不过是那些尚未学会如何处理能量的人所投射能量的另一种物质化表现。这类反应也会贯穿梦境宇宙，并反映在你活动的所有层面。整个自体比较自身在物质实相与梦境实相中各个部分的表现，并得出自己的结论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Emotions also are electrically coded, and also have an independent electrical reality. On a physical level they are both chemical and electrical. The validity and strength of emotions cannot be overestimated, for they represent in only slightly tinged form the uncamouflaged vitality of the universe as it passes through the inner self. Emotions represent, therefore, this vitality before it has been constructed into camouflage.
quotes.translation: 情绪同样以电性方式编码，并拥有独立的电性实相。在物质层面，它们兼具化学与电性特质。情绪的有效性与力量绝不可低估，因为它们以仅稍加染色的形式，代表了宇宙未经伪装的活力流经内在自体时的状态。因此，情绪代表了这种活力在被建构为伪装之前的形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Many of the old ideas of precivilization come closer to anything near the truth. What you prefer to think of as God is basically and above all, indeed as I have said, an infinite energy gestalt: or pyramid consciousness. It is aware of itself as being, for example, you, Joseph. It is aware of itself as what seems to you as your own future and past selves.
quotes.translation: 许多前文明的古老观念更接近真相。你倾向于称之为神的存在，从根本上且首要地——正如我所说——是一个无限能量的完形，或金字塔意识。它觉知自身即是，例如，你，约瑟。它觉知自身即是那些在你看来属于你未来与过去的自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (11:21.) The individuals alive at such a time will also have a hand in such decisions, however. Once more, because you are self-conscious beings your beliefs regulate your reality. An animal knows unconsciously that it is unique and has a place in the scheme of being. Its sense of grace is built-in. Your free will allows for the freedom of any belief, including one that says you are unworthy, with no right to your existence.
quotes.translation: (11:21) 然而，生活在这样时代中的个体也将参与这些决定。再次强调，因为你们是具自我意识的存有，你们的信念调节着你们的实相。动物无意识地知晓自己是独一无二的，并在存在架构中占有一席之地。它的优雅感是与生俱来的。你们的自由意志允许任何信念的自由，包括那些声称你毫无价值、无权存在的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The dream objects, then, are so cunningly, and if I may say so, almost slyly chosen, that the simplest of them may refer to instances in this existence, to personally subconsciously desired or feared objects or instances, to desired or feared objects or instances in past lives. They, such dream objects, may be the method or means with which the inner self warns the personality of future possible disappointments or disasters.
quotes.translation: 那么，梦中的物体被如此巧妙地——如果我可以这么说的话——几乎是狡黠地选择，以至于其中最简朴的物体也可能指涉此生的经历、个人潜意识中渴望或恐惧的物体或经历，以及前世中渴望或恐惧的物体或经历。这些梦中的物体，可能是内在自我用来警告人格未来可能发生的失望或灾难的方法或手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For one thing, individuals who finally visit such offices are oftentimes already emotionally upset. Oftentimes also those in attendance, the doctors or other healers are themselves tired, prone to the patient's emotional fears, and automatically in self-defense respond by giving voice to the patient's subconscious dread, picking it up telepathically but feeling it is directed at themselves, on a subconscious level of course.
quotes.translation: 首先，最终造访这类办公室的个体往往已经情绪不安。同样，在场的医生或其他疗愈者自身也常常疲惫不堪，容易受到患者情绪恐惧的影响，并出于自我保护，自动地通过说出患者潜意识中的恐惧来回应——他们以心电感应方式接收到这种恐惧，但在潜意识层面上却感觉这是针对他们自己的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is much involved here that a reading of past sessions on matter will make plain. You realize of course that the atoms and molecules within the physical image continually change during existence on the physical field. Openings, so to speak, for the influx of new material into the physical form, are made possible by the inner self. When it abdicates it closes up the possibility of this repairing type of molecular action.
quotes.translation: 这里涉及许多内容，阅读过去关于物质实相的课程将使其变得清晰。你当然明白，物理形象中的原子和分子在物质场域的存在期间持续变化。可以说，内在自我使得新物质涌入物理形态的“开口”成为可能。当它放弃时，它就关闭了这种修复性分子活动的可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Latent potentialities, always present within the system, are activated as they are needed. The physical self can, it is true, become somewhat bewildered, but the ego also learns and expands so that it is able to accept and use the new information, and benefit from it. It quickly learns methods for example to utilize such activities for the purposes of the psychological structures that it recognizes and feels responsible for.
quotes.translation: 系统中始终存在的潜在能力会在需要时被激活。确实，物质自我可能会变得有些困惑，但自我也会学习并扩展，从而能够接受并利用新信息，并从中受益。例如，它很快学会如何利用这类活动来服务于它所认可并感到负有责任的心理结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner self could be called, then, the nucleus, the original point of action from which all the other emanations that form the whole self began. There is here you see no limitation upon the direction in which action may move, nor any limit to the dimensions which action may create.
quotes.translation: 那么，内在自我可以被称作核心，即所有形成整体自我的其他发射的原始作用点。你看，这里对行动可能移动的方向没有限制，对行动可能创造的维度也没有任何限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Practically speaking however there are usually only three. Your own fourth-dimensional personality structure obviously operates constantly. One of the main purposes and goals of the whole self is to become aware of all such existences, and to correlate them into an identity structure.
quotes.translation: 然而，实际上通常只有三个。你自身的第四维人格结构显然在持续运作。整体自我的主要目的和目标之一，就是觉察所有这类存在，并将它们整合成一个身份结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: More energy indeed can be held in the personal subconscious in such a manner than can be used in studying other areas of the inner self, for it is in the personal subconscious that energy blockage most frequently occurs. This does not mean that you should cease in that direction. A smooth and disciplined schedule will serve you well here. I would indeed suggest however that this half-hour schedule not include your weekends.
quotes.translation: 个人潜意识中确实可以储存更多能量，其方式甚至超过用于研究内在自我其他领域的能量，因为能量阻塞最常发生在个人潜意识中。但这并不意味着你应该停止朝那个方向探索。一个平稳且有规律的作息安排对你大有裨益。不过我确实建议这半小时的日程不要包含周末。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In sleep there is no need for it to be dominant, nor is there under survival conditions. In sleep other areas of the self are being trained through their own kind of experience, and psychic organizations are built up, dispensed with, and built up again in a sort of practice maneuver.
quotes.translation: 在睡眠中，它无需占据主导地位，在生存条件下也是如此。睡眠时，自我的其他领域正通过它们自身的经验类型接受训练，灵性组织在一种练习演练中被建立、废弃、再重建。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner self is always in the process of trying to perfect the nature of that ego which it has adopted. The ego, as you know, is never the same. It bears indeed the stresses that result from daily encounters with physical situations, but it also reaps the rewards that are involved.
quotes.translation: 内在自我始终在试图完善它所采纳的那个自我的本质。如你所知，自我从来不是一成不变的。它确实承受着日常与物质情境接触所产生的压力，但也收获了随之而来的回报。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: His abilities are considerable in the healing line, and again for this reason it is extremely important that he is understanding of himself as well as others. His ego is (underlined) a kind one, but the structure of any ego is such that it considers, or can consider easily, psychic ability as a sign of its own power; or feel possessive of the ability, and overly proud of it, even when it knows it originates in other layers of the self. We want our friend to have a strong and healthy overall personality balance, for this will allow him to use his abilities well, and then the abilities themselves will further add to his own development.
quotes.translation: 他在疗愈领域能力卓著，正因如此，他理解自己与他人同样至关重要。他的自我（划线强调）是仁慈的，但任何自我的结构都会——或容易——将灵性能力视为自身力量的标志；或对能力产生占有欲，并过分引以为傲，即便它知道能力源于自我的其他层面。我们希望我们的朋友拥有强大而健康的整体人格平衡，这将使他善用自身能力，而这些能力本身将进一步促进他的成长。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner self that knows its existence within action, has a firm foothold within reality. The ego can perform its function, fulfill its responsibilities within the physical field, and be free to know adequate joys and pleasures. But such an inner self must be renewed within action.
quotes.translation: 知晓自身存在于行动中的内在自我，在实相中拥有稳固的立足点。自我能在物质领域履行其功能、承担责任，并自由体验充分的喜悦与快乐。但这样的内在自我必须在行动中不断更新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Without a sense of joy and inner accomplishment and development of potential, the personality will not only fail to flourish, but the inner self will refuse to maintain the physical structure adequately. This is extremely important. Superficial measures will not fool the inner self.
quotes.translation: 若缺乏喜悦感、内在成就感与潜能开发，人格不仅无法茁壮成长，内在自我更会拒绝充分维持物质结构。这一点极为重要。肤浅的手段无法欺骗内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: (A one-minute pause at 11:21.) Learned behavior therefore alters not only present and future but also past conduct. Your power as a rational consciousness focused in the present provides you with opportunities for creativity that you are but vaguely learning to understand. As you do learn, you will automatically begin to appreciate the multidimensional nature of not only your own species but of others as well. The moment as you think of it, then, is the creative framework through which you, the nonphysical self, constantly form corporeal reality; and through that window into earthly existence you form both its future and its past.
quotes.translation: （11:21停顿一分钟）因此，习得行为不仅改变现在和未来，也改变过去的行为。你作为聚焦于当下的理性意识所拥有的力量，为你提供了你才刚刚开始模糊理解的创造力机会。当你真正开始学习时，你会自动开始欣赏不仅是你自己的物种，还有其他物种的多维本质。因此，你所以为的"当下时刻"，正是你作为非物质的自己不断构建物质实相的创造性框架；而通过这扇通往尘世存在的窗口，你同时塑造了它的未来与过去。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If you recall, we mentioned the fact that the dreaming self has its own memories. It has memories of all of its dream experiences. To you this might mean that it has memory of its past, and indeed to you memory itself is dependent upon the existence of a past, or it is meaningless.
quotes.translation: 如果你还记得，我们曾提到做梦的自己拥有自己的记忆。它拥有所有梦境体验的记忆。对你而言，这可能意味着它拥有对过去的记忆——事实上对你来说，记忆本身依赖于过去的存在，否则便毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... In a way you are all your own mutants, creatively altering cellular formations. Period. When your fate seems dependent upon heredity, for example, then the transmission of ideas and beliefs operates; these give signals to the chromosomes. They cause miniature self-images, so to speak, that are mirrored in the cells. In many cases these images can be altered, but not with the technology that you have.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……从某种角度说，你们都是自己的突变体，创造性地改变着细胞结构。句号。当你的命运似乎取决于遗传时，观念与信念的传递便开始运作；这些信号传递给染色体。可以说，它们引发了微小的自我影像，这些影像在细胞中得以映照。在许多情况下，这些影像可以被改变，但并非通过你们现有的技术。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 705
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: (11:44.) I am not speaking here of the desire for suicide, which involves a definite killing of the body by self-deliberate means -- often of a violent nature. Ideally this desire for death, however, would simply involve the slowing of the body's processes, the gradual disentanglement of psyche from flesh; or in other instances, according to individual characteristics, a sudden, natural stopping of the body's processes.
quotes.translation: （11:44）我这里说的并非自杀的欲望——那涉及通过自我蓄意的手段（通常带有暴力性质）明确杀死身体。然而，这种死亡的欲望在理想状态下，本应只是让身体过程逐渐放缓，让心灵与肉体逐步分离；或者根据个体特性，在某些情况下让身体过程突然、自然地停止。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 801, APRIL 18, 1977
9:31 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: I am not saying that you should not believe the evidence of your senses; I am waiting for you to say that. We know that our so-called tables are not solid. Even your science knows this now, and yet your eyes see the table as solid. Face up to it, my dear lovelies: Your senses lie. The table is a conglomeration of quickly-moving atoms and molecules but you see it as a table, and you see it as solid. Your senses, and again this is to bring John-Philip up to date, your senses are perceptron of a camouflage physical world which is created by the inner self through the use of mental enzymes in a pattern set by the mental genes.

quotes.text: Sometimes the artist in me visually comes to the aid of the writer by laying out pages of material and notes side by side upon a table or two. quotes.translation: 有时我内在的艺术家会通过将材料页和笔记并排摆放在一或两张桌子上来协助作家。这样我就能整体看到自己试图完成的内容，半直觉半理智地决定如何组织可能遇到问题的段落。这个过程对我而言总是充满挑战且令人振奋。尽管进展有时仍可能缓慢，但这方法似乎总能奏效。当我的作家自我遇到复杂情况时，这种方法也极大帮助抵消了艺术家部分最初强烈感受到的不耐烦。

quotes.text: What you will be, Joseph, what Mark and Philip and Ruburt will be, you all are now, not in some misty half-real form, but in the most real sense. You simply are not aware of these selves anymore on a conscious level than you are aware of what you refer to as past selves.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，你将成为的、马克、菲利普及鲁柏将成为的，你们此刻已是——并非存在于某种朦胧的半真实形态，而是在最真实的意义上。你们只是在意识层面不再觉察这些自我，正如你们不再觉察所谓的过去自我一般。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: (With emphasis, while Billy slept curled up against my left elbow as I sat on the couch writing down Seth's material:) Animals know that their own lives spell out life's meaning. They feel their relationship with all other forms of life. They know that their existences are vitally important in the framework of planetary existence. Beyond that, they identify themselves with the spirit of life within them so fully and so completely that to question its meaning would be inconceivable. Not inconceivable because such creatures cannot think, but because life's meaning is so self-evident to them.
quotes.translation: （强调语气，比利蜷缩着靠在我左肘边熟睡，而我正坐在沙发上记录赛斯资料：）动物知道自己的生命诠释着生命的意义。它们感知自身与所有生命形态的关联，明白自己的存在在行星存有的框架中至关重要。不仅如此，它们如此彻底而完整地认同内在的生命精神，以至于质疑其意义是不可思议的——并非因为这类生物无法思考，而是因为生命的意义对它们而言不言自明。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Here in Dreams Seth uses the uncertainty principle as an analogy (and an excellent one), meaning that as the positions and motions of elementary particles, say, cannot be simultaneously measured precisely, so our genetic qualities and their motions can not always be specifically determined. In Dreams he's already said (in Session 909) that the human species has an "amazing interplay between genetic preciseness and genetic freedom," and (in Session 910) that "your genetic structure reacts to each thought that you have, to the state of your emotions, to your psychological climate." Choices and probabilities apply. Thus do we avoid genetic rigidity.

quotes.text: You cannot escape your own attitudes, for they will form the nature of what you see. Quite literally, you see what you want to see, and you see your own thoughts, your own Emotional attitudes, materialized in physical form. If changes are to occur, they must be physical and psychic changes. These will be reflected in your physical environment. Negative, distrustful, fearful, or degrading attitudes toward anyone work against the self and against the individuals involved. Now if you would change an individual, change your thoughts toward him, and changes will appear in the Sense data world.
quotes.translation: 你无法逃避自己的态度，因为它们将塑造你所见事物的本质。确切地说，你看见的是你想看见的，你看见的是自己的思想、自己的情感态度以物质形态显化。若要改变发生，必须是物理与心灵的同步转变。这些改变将反映在你的物质环境中。对任何人抱持负面、猜疑、恐惧或贬抑的态度，都会伤害自我与相关个体。若想改变一个人，请改变你对他的想法，改变自会在感官数据世界中显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The type of telepathy which is most commonly thought of as telepathy is of course not the elemental type of which I spoke earlier, but a different variety. This particular, more advanced telepathy could not and did not occur in its most complicated form until the development within your plane of psychically developed personalities. This development involved separations and concentrations of energy into self-conscious identities. This development was an advancement, yet this advancement led also to a separation and objectifying of consciousness, into dual segments of subject and object.
quotes.translation: 通常被视作心电感应的那种类型，自然不是我先前所说的基本类型，而是另一种变体。这种更高级的特殊心电感应，直到你们层面发展出心灵成熟的人格后，才可能以最复杂的形式出现——在此之前它从未存在过。这种发展涉及将能量分离凝聚为自我意识体，既是进化，却也导致意识分裂为客体化的主客二元片段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You are intuitively aware that you form your image, and that you are independent of it. You do not realize that you create your larger environment and the physical world as you know it by propelling your thoughts and emotions into matter -- a breakthrough into three-dimensional life. The inner self, therefore, individually and en masse, sends its psychic energy out, forming tentacles that coalesce into form.
quotes.translation: 你直觉地知道自己在塑造形象，且独立于形象之外。却未意识到自己通过将思想情感投射为物质——突破进入三维生命的壮举——创造了更广阔的环境与认知中的物质世界。因此内在自我，无论个体还是集体，都将心灵能量向外投射，形成触须凝聚为形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: She wants him to be his old self. (Pause, head down.) I seem to see a distant connection with Wisconsin (? Will ask aunt), on Billie's part, I think... A wedding anniversary and a string of beads. (She wore beads a lot.) She was trying to get through Jerry to get to the father because she wanted him to know that she was with him as much as ever, and then she sort of laughs and says more so, probably more so.
quotes.translation: 她希望他变回原来的自己。（停顿，低头。）我似乎看到与威斯康星州的遥远关联（？需问姑妈），就比利而言，我想……一个结婚纪念日和一串珠子。（她常戴珠子。）她试图通过杰瑞联系父亲，因为她想让他知道她一如既往地与他同在，接着她似笑非笑地说"更甚"，或许更甚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now all the richly creative, original work that is done by this inner self is not unconscious. It is purposeful, highly (underlined) discriminating, performed by the inner conscious ego, of which the exterior ego is but a shadow, and not you see the other way around.
quotes.translation: 内在自我完成的所有丰沛创意与原创工作并非无意识。这是有目的、高度（强调）辨别的行为，由内在意识自我执行——外在自我不过是其投影，而非你所以为的相反情形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Even the alterations of obvious pauses between languages make sense only because of an implied, unstated inner rhythm. The historic gods become equally archaic. Their differences are often obvious. When you are learning a language, great mystery seems involved. When you are learning about the nature of the psyche, an even greater aura of the unknown exists. The unknown portions of the psyche and its greater horizons, therefore, have often been perceived as gods or as the greater psyches out of which the self emerged -- as for example Latin is a source for the Romance languages.
quotes.translation: 甚至语言间明显停顿的变化之所以有意义，也是因为存在一种隐含的、未言明的内在节奏。历史上的诸神同样变得古老。它们的差异往往显而易见。当你学习一门语言时，似乎涉及巨大的奥秘。当你了解心灵的本质时，存在一种更强烈的未知光环。因此，心灵未知的部分及其更广阔的视野，常被感知为神祇或自我从中涌现的更大心灵——例如拉丁语是罗曼语系的源头。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is form. The very mechanism of the body however is so constructed that it can bear the brunt of many errors, and free itself from them, though this may not seem to be the case at times. Nevertheless yours is a slow motion world in many ways as far as your perceptions are concerned, while you are within it. Your body is much like a sculptor or a sculpt, never really completed, the inner self trying out various techniques of creativity on its first test piece. The results are not always of the best, but the sculptor is independent of his product and knows there will others.
quotes.translation: 存在形式。然而，身体的机制本身构造得足以承受许多错误的冲击，并从中解脱出来，尽管有时情况看似并非如此。不过，就你的感知而言，当你身处其中时，你的世界在许多方面是一个慢动作的世界。你的身体很像一位雕塑家或一件雕塑，从未真正完成，内在自我在其第一件试验品上尝试各种创造技巧。结果并不总是最佳，但雕塑家独立于其作品，并知道还会有其他作品。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The larger self, then, seeds itself in time. In this process no identity is lost and no identity is the same, yet all are interrelated. So you can theoretically expand your consciousness to include the knowledge of your past lives, though those lives were yours and not yours. They have a common root, as next year's leaves have a common root with the leaves now of this plant (pointing again to the begonia).
quotes.translation: 因此，更大的自我在时间中播下自身的种子。在这个过程中，没有身份会丢失，也没有身份完全相同，但所有身份都相互关联。所以理论上你可以扩展你的意识，以包含你过去生活的知识，尽管那些生活是你的又不是你的。它们有一个共同的根源，就像明年的叶子与这株植物现在的叶子（再次指向秋海棠）有共同的根源一样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 731
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The language is an excellent example of the coded messages I mentioned earlier (as I'd thought). It is supposed to remain secret, you see, yet becomes the symbol of the all-powerful knowledge of the exaggerated superior self, while making the knowledge impossible to act upon. To translate the information would mean a more serious commitment to physical communication than that young man was willing to make.
quotes.translation: 语言是我之前提到的编码信息的一个极好例子（正如我所想）。它本应保持秘密，你看，却成为夸大优越自我的全知知识的象征，同时使知识无法付诸行动。翻译这些信息意味着对物理沟通做出比那个年轻人愿意做出的更严肃的承诺。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: At the beginning of the notes for this 920th session I wrote that the session isn't dictation for Dreams. Yet it is, of course, since in it Seth illuminates from still another perspective his concept of value fulfillment.8 The session grew out of the encounter we had yesterday afternoon with an unexpected visitor from out of state. Seth hardly mentions the individual involved, however, but instead goes into the subject of mental illness in more inclusive terms. I see many correlations between this evening's material and that in Session 917 for Chapter 8; there, among other things, Seth had discussed the reasoning mind, the imaginative mind, and schizophrenia. That session had been triggered, at least in part, by a letter Jane had found to be quite upsetting.

quotes.text: Those of you who believe in reincarnation in more or less conventional terms, can make the error of using or blaming "past" lives, organizing them through your current beliefs. It is bad enough to believe that you are at the mercy of one past, but to consider yourself helpless before innumerable previous errors from other lives puts you in an impossible situation; the conscious will is robbed of its power to act. Such lives exist simultaneously. They are other expressions of yourself, interacting, but with each conscious self possessing the point of power in its own present.
quotes.translation: 那些或多或少以传统方式相信轮回的人，可能会犯下利用或指责“过去”生活的错误，通过你当前的信念来组织它们。相信你受制于一个过去已经够糟了，但认为自己在无数来自其他生活的先前错误面前无能为力，则使你陷入不可能的境地；意识意志被剥夺了行动的力量。这样的生活同时存在。它们是你自身的其他表达，相互互动，但每个意识自我在其自身的当下拥有力量点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: Your effective power of action follows the lines of your beliefs. To believe in your own weakness is to deny yourself the power of action. To accept uncritically all beliefs that come to you is to open yourself to a barrage of conflicting data at best, in which the clear lines of action and power become blurred. Contradictory demands and assessments are then sent in to the inner self, which by various methods will try to tell you that something is wrong. Beliefs of like nature attract each other, for you are bound to look for consistencies in your behavior and experience.
quotes.translation: 你有效的行动力量遵循你信念的路线。相信自己的软弱就是否认自己行动的力量。不加批判地接受所有来到你面前的信念，就是让自己暴露在最好情况下也是相互冲突的数据洪流中，其中行动和力量的清晰路线变得模糊。然后，矛盾的要求和评估被发送到内在自我，内在自我会通过各种方法试图告诉你出了问题。相似性质的信念相互吸引，因为你必然会在行为和经历中寻找一致性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: So is your own identity secure in the midst of all these births and deaths of which your conscious self is unaware. The memory of all of its experiences is retained. Each cell remembers its past though all of its parts have been and are being continually replaced.*
quotes.translation: 你的身份在意识自我未曾察觉的无数次生灭中依然稳固。所有经验的记忆都被保留。每个细胞都记得自己的过去，尽管其所有组成部分一直在被持续替换。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This involves efficient, complete use of the outer senses in their perception of camouflage reality, and of joyful, effective behavior and manipulation within that field of camouflage in which you spend a certain level of your existence. When you operate within it you should indeed experience it completely, in as many phases as possible, and be it to a much greater degree than is usually achieved, the conscious mind using itself then in experience, and thus knowing itself. And then the switch to use of the inner senses. The great contrast then refreshes the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这涉及对外感官的高效完整运用，以感知伪装实相，并在你存在某个层次所栖身的伪装领域中进行愉悦有效的行动与操控。当你在此领域运作时，确实应当尽可能全面地体验它，让意识心智在经验中充分运用自身，从而认识自己——其程度远胜寻常。随后转向内感官的运用。巨大的反差将使整个自我焕然一新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Other dream events, though forgotten, may also cushion the individual to withstand the effects of such "nightmare therapy." In the same way that some LSD treatment finally results in a feeling of rebirth (that is often only temporary, however), so a period of such nightmares often leads quite naturally to dreams in which the self finally makes new and greater connections with the source of its own being.
quotes.translation: 其他被遗忘的梦境事件，也可能缓冲个体承受此类"噩梦疗法"的影响。正如某些LSD治疗最终带来重生感（往往只是暂时的），一段时期的噩梦往往会自然导向这样的梦境：自我最终与自身存在的源头建立更新更深的联结。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: New paragraph (as Seth often declares). When you identify with only one particular level of your thought processes, however, the others -- when you sense them -- appear alien. You begin to feel threatened, determined to uphold your old ideas of selfhood. Plants grow many leaves. One leaf does not threaten the existence of others, and the plant is not jealous of its own foliage. So there is no need to protect your own individuality because it may send out other shoots into probable realities. This is simply the self growing in different directions, spreading its seeds.
quotes.translation: 新段落（如赛斯常宣告的）。当你只认同思维过程的某一特定层次时，其他层次——当你感知到它们时——会显得陌生。你开始感到威胁，决心固守旧有的自我观念。植物生长众多叶片。一片叶子不会威胁其他叶子的存在，植物也不会嫉妒自己的枝叶。因此无需保护你的个体性，因为它可能向可能实相伸出其他枝桠。这不过是自我向不同方向生长、播撒种子的过程。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The man as he knows himself felt hardly anything. His inner self knew, as the inner self is always aware of such endings.
quotes.translation: 那个自认为了解自己的人几乎毫无感觉。他的内在自我知晓，正如内在自我始终觉察这类终结。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The survival personality therefore momentarily inserts his ego in its old position. It can then interpret this data in terms that can be received and understood. This reassembly however does cause some disorientation on the part of the survival personality. The ego, back in its dominant position, finds the circumstances difficult to deal with. It is being asked to manipulate in a manner unfamiliar to it. The survival personality's inner self gives this reassembled ego concepts in the same way that, often, the subconscious gives the ego concepts in physical existence.
quotes.translation: 因此存续人格会暂时将自我置回其旧有位置。这样它就能以可接收和理解的方式解读这些数据。然而这种重组确实会给存续人格带来某种迷失感。当自我重掌主导地位时，会发现难以应对当前处境。它被要求以不熟悉的方式运作。存续人格的内在自我向这个重组后的自我传递概念，正如物质存在中潜意识常向自我传递概念那样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Joseph recently had an experience that disturbed him, simply because it was difficult to interpret even in the light of his understanding about the nature of the self. You cannot explore the nature of reality, hoping to discover its unknown aspects, if you insist that those aspects correspond with the known ones. So Joseph allowed himself some freedom -- and then was almost scandalized with the results.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫最近经历了一件令他不安的事，仅仅因为这件事即使以他对自我本质的理解也难以解释。如果你坚持未知的面向必须与已知的面向相符，就无法探索实相的本质，期望发现其未知的面向。所以约瑟夫给了自己一些自由——然后几乎被结果吓坏了。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: As I mentioned, the sixth inner sense involves something that can be likened to what you call the instincts, except that it is a property of the inner self. Consider a spider spinning a web. The web is a camouflage pattern that definitely exists on your plane. Here your simple spider is using his sixth sense, for these senses are the latent property of other living things, and not restricted to mankind.
quotes.translation: 如我所提，第六内在感官涉及某种可以比作你们所谓本能的东西，只是它是内在自我的一种属性。想象一只蜘蛛在织网。网是一种伪装模式，确实存在于你们的层面上。在这里，你们简单的蜘蛛正在使用它的第六感，因为这些感官是其他生物潜在的属性，并不限于人类。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is nothing to be feared for Mark. His lung will remain in excellent condition for the summer. Nevertheless, I still maintain that it becomes imperative for him to live alone, or the condition will continue. He will cause the return of symptoms, if he does not seriously take steps to assure his inner self of his intention. This is by no means meant to alarm, but to help him evade such a difficulty.
quotes.translation: 马克没什么好害怕的。他的肺在整个夏天都会保持良好状态。然而，我仍然坚持他必须独自生活，否则情况会持续。如果他不认真采取措施向他的内在自我保证他的意图，他将导致症状复发。这绝不是为了引起恐慌，而是为了帮助他避开这样的困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （Sam Levine knows about Seth but has never attended a session. He has been invited to. He has expressed neither belief nor disbelief, he has also listened to part of the tape recording we made of Jane when delivering the 25th session. See page 183. Someday Jane and I intend to put the pressure on Sam and make him attend a session, no matter how busy he is. [ Session 25 is in Vol. 1.]）

quotes.text: As a personality is molded by his exterior circumstances, so is he also molded by the dreams that he creates, and which help to form his interior or psychic environment. To the whole self there is little differentiation made between actions that are of an exterior nature, and actions that are of an interior nature. While the ego makes these distinctions, the basic core of the personality does not do so.
quotes.translation: 正如人格被外在环境塑造，他也被他创造的梦境所塑造，这些梦境帮助形成他的内在或心灵环境。对整体自我而言，外在性质的行为与内在性质的行为之间几乎没有区别。虽然自我做出这些区分，但人格的基本核心并不如此做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: conversely, if you do not accept the idea of reincarnation, this does not mean that reincarnation is not a fact. It does mean that this insufficient energy will keep this reality at such a low ebb that it will not sufficiently materialize as an event within your system. For the egotistical self it will be a non-fact and the physical senses will of course find no Sense data to confirm reincarnation.
quotes.translation: 现在：反过来说，如果你不接受转世的概念，这并不意味着转世不是事实。它确实意味着这种不足的能量将使这个实相保持在如此低潮的状态，以至于它不会在你们的系统内充分物质化为一个事件。对自我而言，它将是一个非事实，而肉体感官当然找不到感官资料来证实转世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Each self, as a part of All That Is, therefore also retains memory of that state. It is for this reason that each portion of All That Is, each most minute consciousness, is endowed with the impetus toward survival, change, development and creativity. It is not enough that All That Is, as a primary consciousness- gestalt, desires further being, but, that every portion of it also carry this determination.
quotes.translation: 每个自我，作为一切万有的一部分，因此也保留了对那种状态的记忆。正是因为这个原因，一切万有的每一部分，每一个最微小的意识，都被赋予了朝向生存、改变、发展和创造的驱动力。仅仅一切万有作为一个主要意识完形渴望进一步的存在是不够的，它的每一部分也必须携带这种决心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: As you know, other portions of the self are intensely focused elsewhere. Before physical birth, you have already made the decision to choose this probable reality, and to probe its potentials. The entity is therefore learning to realign its methods of perception.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，自我的其他部分正高度专注地聚焦于别处。在肉体出生之前，你已做出选择，决定进入这个可能的实相，并探索其潜能。因此，存有正在学习重新调整其感知方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This conception is to blame for the superstitious attitudes, however, concerning the inner world as a whole, and some of mans misconceptions have been ludicrous and pathetic. I think now mainly of his giving the immaterial inner self a dwelling place formed of physical camouflage patterns. In other words, a physical heaven and hell.
quotes.translation: 然而，这种观念导致了对于内在世界整体的迷信态度，而人类的一些误解既荒谬又可悲。我此刻主要想到的是，他们赋予无形内在自我一个由物质伪装模式构成的居所——换言之，即物质化的天堂与地狱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The "true facts" are that you exist in this life and outside it simultaneously. You are "between lives" and "in lives" at once. The deeper dimensions of reality are such that your thoughts and actions not only affect the life you know, but also reach into all of those other simultaneous existences. What you think now is unconsciously perceived by some hypothetical 14th-century self. The psyche is open-ended. No system is closed, psychological systems least of all. Your life is a dreaming experience to other portions of your greater reality which focus elsewhere.
quotes.translation: "真实情况"是：你同时存在于这一生及其之外。你"处于转世之间"又"处于转世之中"。实相的更深维度使得你的思想和行动不仅影响你所知的生命，还会触及所有其他同时存在的生命。你此刻的想法会被某个假设的14世纪自我无意识地感知。心灵是开放的，没有系统是封闭的，心理系统尤其如此。对你更大实相中聚焦于别处的其他部分而言，你的生命不过是一场梦境体验。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You might say that the personalities then are but divisions of your self here. There is no competition between them. There never was any real division, but only a seeming one in which you played various roles, developed different abilities, learned to create in new and diverse ways. These reincarnational personalities continue to develop, but they also understand that their main identity is also yours.
quotes.translation: 你可以说，那些人格只是你在此世自我的不同划分。它们之间不存在竞争。从来就没有真正的分裂，只有看似分裂的表象——在其中你扮演不同角色，发展不同能力，学习以新颖多样的方式创造。这些转世人格持续发展，但它们也明白，它们的主要身份同样也是你的身份。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such inner therapeutics also occur however at various levels of consciousness where they may be sparked by exterior stimuli of an esthetic or pleasing nature. Other exterior conditions have also their effect. To involve oneself in large groups, for example, is beneficial often, not simply to take attention away from the self, but because a larger range of electromagnetic realities are easily available.
quotes.translation: 然而，这种内在疗愈也会发生在不同意识层面，可能由外在的审美或愉悦性刺激所触发。其他外在条件也会产生影响。例如，参与大型团体往往是有益的——这不仅是为了让注意力离开自我，更是因为更大范围的电磁实相更容易被获取。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The ego attempts to break down action into smaller and smaller units. The intuitions try to perceive action as a whole. The ego breaks down for purposes of examination, the intuitions construct. Both the ego and the intuitions, in performing their functions, obviously create action. The self may of course be considered as a gestalt of action, perceived in a different manner by various levels of itself.
quotes.translation: 自我试图将行动分解为越来越小的单元，而直觉则试图将行动视为整体。自我为便于检视而分解，直觉则进行建构。自我与直觉在履行各自功能时，显然都在创造行动。当然，自我可被视为行动的整体形态，被其自身的不同层面以不同方式所感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Men are not islands, even unto themselves. They merely perceive islands, or they perceive bits of realities. The dream correlates the various manifestations of the self with the whole portion. Dreams bring intuitive knowledge of the whole self to its own parts.
quotes.translation: 人并非孤岛，即使对他们自己而言也是如此。他们只是感知到岛屿，或感知到现实的片段。梦境将自我的各种显现与整体部分相关联。梦境将整个自我的直觉知识带给其各个部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

source_raw.title: （As Seth states, Jane did have a dream about the idea the following night, September 11,1963. She recalls it quite easily. However she has no written record of the dream, since this was before she had cultivated the habit of keeping a dream notebook. As mentioned many many sessions ago, however, her poem The Fence, written in May 1963, clearly foreshadows the Seth material, dealing with [but not always by outright name] such subjects as reincarnation, dreams, unperceived worlds, etc. [See the poem on page 28, Session 5, in Volume I of The Early Sessions]

quotes.text: Therefore each portion of action is aware of its simultaneous experience within all levels. Again, action carries itself along. Each self is therefore aware of its previous gestalt affiliations. Now. Identities may or may not have egos. An atom is an identity--
quotes.translation: 因此，行动的每个部分都意识到它在所有层面上的同时体验。再次强调，行动自行推进。因此，每个自我都意识到它先前的完形关联。现在。身份可能有自我意识，也可能没有。一个原子就是一个身份——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: His egotistical decisions therefore now more faithfully reflect the whole self, or the whole personality. There has been an integration. It is for this reason that his suggestions are taking hold so well, for they do not conflict with other layers of the self.
quotes.translation: 因此，他基于自我中心的决定现在更忠实地反映了整个自我，或整个的人格。已经发生了一种整合。正是因为这个原因，他的建议才如此有效地被采纳，因为它们不与自我的其他层面冲突。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: (Voice strong and powerful:) Who is any one of us to make such demands? (Louder.) The whole development of your individuality and of your whole self is a gift of All That Is; a state of grace is the acceptance of life and vitality and joy. Live then within it!
quotes.translation: （声音强而有力：）我们中的任何一个人，有什么资格提出这样的要求？（更大声地。）你个体性及整个自我的全部发展，都是万有即一切的礼物；恩宠状态就是接受生命、活力与喜悦。那么，就活在其中吧！
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner self is obviously not only conscious, but conscious of itself, both as an individuality apart from others, and as an individuality that is a part of all other consciousness.In your terms it is continually aware, both of this apartness and unity-with.
quotes.translation: 内在自我显然不仅具有意识，而且意识到自身，既作为一个独立于他人的个体性，又作为一个属于所有其他意识一部分的个体性。用你们的话来说，它持续地意识到这种分离与合一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: As this point is reached the ego obviously becomes more disturbed. In very few cases however does the conflict reach this sort of proportion. A lack of communication between the ego and the inner self is obviously one of the main causes for such difficulties.
quotes.translation: 当达到这一点时，自我显然变得更加不安。然而，在极少数情况下，冲突才会达到这种程度。自我与内在自我之间缺乏沟通，显然是造成此类困难的主要原因之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is extremely difficult to pinpoint an answer. For you the seminars are run by a self belonging to you that you do not yet know or recognize. For others the seminars are run by selves they do not yet recognize and yet the seminar is run by one and not many.
quotes.translation: 要明确指出答案极为困难。对你们而言，这些研讨会是由一个属于你们、但你们尚未认识或认同的自我所主持的。对其他人来说，研讨会是由他们尚未认同的自我所主持，然而研讨会是由一个自我而非多个自我所主持的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Your dreams are also uniquely yours, yet they happen within a shared context, an environment in which the dreams of the world occur. In that context your own existence is "forever" assured. You are the physical event of yourself put into a given space and time, and because of the conditions of that framework, within it you automatically exclude other experience of your own selfhood. The greater event of yourself exists in a context that is beyond your usual perception of events. That greater portion of yourself, however, forms the self that you know.
quotes.translation: 你的梦境也独特地属于你，然而它们发生在一个共享的脉络中，一个世界梦境发生的环境里。在那个脉络中，你自身的存在是“永远”被确保的。你是被置于特定时空中的自身物理事件，由于该架构的条件，在其中你自动排除了对自身自性的其他体验。你自身更大的事件存在于一个超越你通常对事件感知的脉络中。然而，你自身的那个更大部分，形成了你所认识的自我。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Then you move out into a much larger and different kind of room, and here the furniture may be arranged in any fashion--arranged and rearranged to your hearts content, and you may form different combinations from it and use it for different purposes. So Peg is rearranging the furniture of her mind; and as you might visit a new residence and move some of your belongings into it before you have officially made it your own, so she has for some time been examining her new environment, and been in tie process of transferring her self to the new location.
quotes.translation: 然后你进入一个更大、不同类型的房间，这里的家具可以以任何方式布置——随心所欲地布置和重新布置，你可以从中形成不同的组合，并用于不同的目的。所以佩格正在重新布置她心灵的家具；正如你可能会参观一个新住所，在正式将其据为己有之前，先搬入一些物品，她一段时间以来一直在审视她的新环境，并处于将自我转移到新地点的过程中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (Slowly:) Since you are not only a physically focused creature, however, other issues also operate. You have within yourself the condensed knowledge of your entire being. This information cannot appear in any complete fashion within a consciousness connected with a physical brain. The multidimensional reality simply cannot be expressed. In the dreaming state, when consciousness relates opaquely to physical concerns, glimpses of the multidimensional self can appear in dream imagery and fantasies that will symbolically express your greater existence.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）然而，由于你不仅是一个聚焦于物理的生物，其他问题也在运作。你内在拥有你整个存在的浓缩知识。这些信息无法以任何完整的方式出现在与物理大脑相连的意识中。多维实相根本无法被表达。在梦境状态中，当意识与物理事务模糊相关时，多维自我的瞥见可以出现在梦境意象和幻想中，这些会象征性地表达你更大的存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now, the inner self is psychologically influenced by these probable personalities, for they are all psychologically connected and represent a whole personality structure, a whole personality gestalt with which you as you know yourself are utterly unfamiliar.
quotes.translation: 现在，内在自我在心理上受到这些可能人格的影响，因为它们在心理上都是相连的，并代表一个完整的人格结构，一个完整的人格完形，而你对这个完形作为你所认识的自己而言是完全陌生的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: When you are proficient you will not be swept willy-nilly into other stages of consciousness as you sleep, but will be able to understand and direct these activities. Consciousness is an attribute of the soul, a tool that can be turned in many directions. You are not your consciousness. It is something that belongs to you and to the soul. You are learning to use it. To the extent that you understand and utilize the various aspects of consciousness, you will learn to understand your own reality, and the conscious self will truly become conscious.
quotes.translation: 当你熟练时，你不会在睡眠中不由自主地被卷入其他意识阶段，而是能够理解和引导这些活动。意识是灵魂的一个属性，是一个可以转向许多方向的工具。你不是你的意识。它是属于你和灵魂的东西。你正在学习使用它。到你理解和运用意识的各种面向的程度，你将学会理解你自己的实相，而意识自我将真正变得有意识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner ego looks inward, yet in looking inward it looks outward toward those vast portions of the self. Because there is always action within action, and because of the three dilemmas of which we have spoken earlier, the new personalities projected outward into other fields of perception, or other moment points, these other personalities in turn create new ones, and the cycle is again repeated.
quotes.translation: 内在自我向内观照，然而在向内观照时，它又向外望向自我的那些广阔部分。因为行动中始终存在行动，又因为我们之前谈到的三重困境，新的人格被投射到其他感知领域或其它时间点，这些其他人格又反过来创造新的人格，如此循环往复。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Nor do I know all the answers. It is however a fact that even mankind, in his blundering manner, will discover that he himself creates his own physical universe, and that the mechanisms of the physical body have more functions and varieties than he knows. Nor in the sleeping state are these functions stilled. They continue in an even more direct form than they do when he is awake. He creates when he dreams in a truer and less distorted fashion, and his physical world is much more the product of his dreaming self than it is of his waking state.
quotes.translation: 我也并非知晓所有答案。然而事实是，即使人类以他笨拙的方式，终将发现自己创造了自身的物质宇宙，并且肉体的机制拥有比他所知的更多功能和变体。在睡眠状态中，这些功能也并未停歇。它们以比清醒时更直接的形式持续运作。他在梦中以更真实、更少扭曲的方式创造，他的物质世界更多是他做梦自我的产物，而非清醒状态的产物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Obviously the cause behind illness is not always the same. In a re-incarnational sense, the personality for a while takes the role of a sick person, as an actor would, and is completely immersed in it. Obviously again, more dimensions are involved here than in an actor's role. The actor would merely try to imagine how it would be like to be in such a position. The person in the re-incarnational role is as immersed in it as possible. He decides to take the role for various reasons of his own, and the inner self knows that the role was chosen.
quotes.translation: 显然，疾病背后的原因并非总是一致。从转世的角度看，人格会暂时扮演病人的角色，如同演员一般，并完全沉浸其中。同样明显的是，这比演员的角色涉及更多维度。演员只是试图想象处于那种境地会是什么样子。而处于转世角色中的人则尽可能彻底地沉浸其中。他出于自身各种原因决定扮演这个角色，内在自我知道这个角色是被选择的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The half-hour schedule will allow for a disciplined, smooth and automatic self-discovery which will not drain your energies. You have indeed additional energy at your command, but the focus in the personal subconscious prevents you from using it. You will find that your condition is now improving and will continue to do so. And all of this also involves a practical lesson in the nature of action.
quotes.translation: 半小时的日程安排将允许一种有纪律、顺畅且自动的自我发现，这不会耗尽你的能量。你确实有额外的能量可供调遣，但个人潜意识中的焦点阻止你使用它。你会发现你的状况正在改善，并将持续如此。而这一切也涉及关于行动本质的实践课程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Beneath these root assumptions however portions of the self perceive physical reality in an entirely different fashion, free of the tyranny of objects and material form. Here you experience concepts directly, without the need for symbolisms. Here you experience the spacious present directly. Here you have knowledge of your past personalities, and know that they exist simultaneously with your own.
quotes.translation: 然而在这些根本假设之下，自我的某些部分以完全不同的方式感知物质实相，不受物体和物质形态的暴政束缚。在此你直接体验概念，无需象征符号。在此你直接体验广阔当下。在此你了解自己过去的人格，并知晓它们与你现在的人格同时存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Action cannot be dammed up, for it becomes explosive. There are many balances to be maintained. The dream world of which we have spoken so often is also action, and as such it affects all other action. It is not apart from your so- called physical universe, for the dream universe, through its connection with the inner self, also helps to construct physical matter--and this is no trifling matter.
quotes.translation: 行动不能被堵塞，否则会变得具有爆炸性。有许多平衡需要维持。我们经常谈到的梦境世界也是行动，因此它影响所有其他行动。它并非脱离你所谓的物质宇宙，因为梦境宇宙通过其与内在自我的连接，也帮助构建物质——这绝非小事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Do not forget however that you are a portion of the inner self. It is not using you. You are the portion of it that experiences physical reality. Now physical illnesses that are not critical but observable, that do not involve the loss of say of a limb or of an organ, generally (underlined) represent problems that are in the process of being solved, problems that are in quotes "out in the open."
quotes.translation: 但请别忘了，你是内在自性的一部分。它并非在利用你。你是它体验物质实相的那部分。那些不致命但可观察的生理疾病——比如不涉及肢体或器官丧失的情况——通常（划线强调）代表正在被解决的问题，也就是所谓"公开化"的问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: A psychological experience may take up no space as a rock takes up space, but when a psychological experience happens it may fill you up. Yet you do not deny the existence of a psychological experience, though you cannot rip it apart from yourself and examine it with the physical senses. Still it has its effect, and its validity is well known to every man. So also are there other realities that cannot be examined through the use of the physical senses, realities so close to the self that they cannot be separated from it and objectified.
quotes.translation: 心理体验不像岩石那样占据空间，但当心理体验发生时，它可能充满你的整个存在。然而你无法否认心理体验的存在，尽管你无法将它从自身剥离并用肉体感官检视。它依然产生着影响，其真实性对每个人而言都显而易见。同样地，也存在其他无法通过肉体感官检视的实相，这些实相与自性如此贴近，以至于无法与之分离并客观化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is, of course, on a subconscious basis. Another example only: a very industrious individual thinks the majority of mankind are lazy and good for nothing. No one would ever think of calling him lazy or good for nothing, yet this may be precisely his own subconscious picture of himself, against which he drives himself incessantly, all in an effort to prove that his erroneous self image is, indeed, wrong. And all without realizing his basic concept of himself and without recognizing the fact that he projects it outward onto others.
quotes.translation: 这当然是在潜意识层面运作。再举一例：一个极其勤勉的人认为大多数人都懒惰且一无是处。没有人会认为他懒惰或一无是处，但这恰恰可能是他潜意识中的自我画像——他不断驱策自己对抗这个画像，竭力证明这个错误的自我形象确实有误。而整个过程他既未察觉自己对自我的基本认知，也未意识到自己将此认知投射到了他人身上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now I will let you end the session, but this is information that is highly valuable. The spontaneous self is also highly relieved that it is on good terms again with the ego, and that the personality is establishing itself and the main work is beginning.
quotes.translation: 现在我将让你结束此节，但这是极具价值的信息。自发自性也因与自我重新达成和谐而深感宽慰，人格正在确立自身，主要工作即将展开。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: That kind of dream awareness can literally regenerate your life, though the original impact will be forgotten, and the entire event will usually be translated into images before awakening. Such dream events may be called experiences of basic being. During them, the self or consciousness literally travels to the source of its own energy. On another level atoms possess this same kind of knowing.
quotes.translation: 那种梦中的觉知确实能重塑你的生命，尽管最初的冲击会被遗忘，整个事件通常在清醒前被转化为意象。这类梦境事件可称为"基本存在体验"。在此过程中，自性或意识确实会旅行至自身能量的源头。在另一层面上，原子也拥有这种相同的知晓。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Shortly we will begin to discuss the formation of a better kind of mass reality -- a reality that can happen as more and more individuals begin to come in contact with the true nature of the self. Then we will have less frightened people, and fewer fanatics, and each person involved can to some extent begin to see the "ideal" come into practical actualization. The means never justify the ends.
quotes.translation: 不久我们将开始讨论如何构建更美好的群体实相——这种实相将随着越来越多的人开始接触自性的真实本质而成为可能。届时恐惧之人将减少，狂热之徒也将减少，每个参与者都能在一定程度上看到"理想"开始实际显化。手段永远不能使目的正当化。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

SESSION 862, JUNE 25, 1979
