quotes.text: There is also a natural tension, then, between sexes that is based on far deeper causes than physical ones. The tension results from the nature of your consciousness that arises from the anima, but depends for its continuation upon the "aggressiveness" of the animus. I have to some extent explained the fascination that one has for the other, as resulting from the inner knowledge of the whole self, that strives to attain true identity as it struggles to combine and fulfill the seemingly opposite tendencies that are a part of it.
quotes.translation: 两性之间也存在一种自然的张力，其根源远比生理因素更为深远。这种张力源于你们意识的本性——它源自阿尼玛，却依赖阿尼姆斯的"攻击性"来维持延续。我曾在一定程度上解释过两性间的相互吸引，这种吸引源于对完整自体的内在认知——当自体努力结合并实现其内在看似对立的部分倾向时，便渴求达成真正的身份认同。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Some of Ruburt's notes that you have not seen have further important insights as to such activity. The main point is indeed the importance of accepting (underlined) a different kind of overall orientation -- one that is indeed not any secondary adjunct, but a basic part of human nature. As your own and Ruburt's notes state, Ruburt's more clearly, this involves an entirely different relationship of the self you know with time. You can make your own connections here, as per Ruburt's camera experience, and your own dreams of late.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏那些你们尚未见过的笔记，对此类活动提供了更重要的洞见。关键点确实在于接受（强调）一种全然不同的整体取向——这绝非次要的附属品，而是人性的基本组成部分。正如你们与鲁柏的笔记所述（鲁柏的表述更为清晰），这涉及你们所知的自我与时间之间完全不同的关系。你们可在此自行建立关联，参照鲁柏的相机体验以及你们近期的梦境。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Because I say that you create your physical universe in the same manner and as automatically and as un-self-consciously as you create with your breath a pattern of steam upon a glass plane, this does not mean that you create All That Is. It merely means that you create your own physical environment. And if I have your permission, Joseph, we will meet tomorrow evening to go into other matters.
quotes.translation: 因为我说你们创造自己的物质宇宙，其方式如同呼吸在玻璃平面上形成蒸汽图案般自动且无意识，这并不意味着你们创造了万有。这仅意味着你们创造了自己的物质环境。若蒙允许，约瑟夫，我们明晚再会以探讨其他议题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The personality also contains good intellectual capacities, and he should examine psychic experience in the light of his intelligence also. There are truths which the intellect cannot perceive, but the intellect knows the ego, and represents a firm and reliable pathway between the inner self and the ego; and psychic experience--I repeat, psychic experience--will not suffer from such scrutiny.
quotes.translation: 该人格也具备良好的智力禀赋，他应当运用智慧来审视灵性体验。确实存在理智无法感知的真理，但理智认知自我，是内在自体与自我之间坚实可靠的通道；而灵性体验——我重申，灵性体验——不会因这种审视而受损。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now, I project a portion of my reality as I dictate this book to an undifferentiated level between systems that is relatively clear of camouflage. It is an inactive area, comparatively speaking. If you were thinking in terms of physical reality, then this area could be likened to one immediately above the atmosphere of your earth. However I am speaking of psychological and psychic atmospheres, and this area is sufficiently distant from Ruburt's physically oriented self so that the communications can be relatively understood.
quotes.translation: 此刻，当我口述此书时，正将自身实相的一部分投射到系统间相对清晰的未分化层面——这是个相对而言不活跃的区域。若以物质实相来类比，此区域可比拟为地球大气层上方的空间。然而我指的是心理与灵性氛围，这个区域与鲁柏以物质为导向的自体保持足够距离，使沟通得以相对清晰地被理解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It begins to travel down safe paths, and out of fear it continually enlarges the scope of limitations. In the particular personality's case, perception becomes also limited, and rejections occur. In this as in many such cases foods are rejected. In many such cases the ego itself chooses to perceive only within those areas where it feels safe, and it rejects more and more any involvement that it can avoid. And now the ego has the self-created ulcer to blame, and it rejects many foods, for foods are symbolistic of involvement.
quotes.translation: 它开始沿安全路径行进，出于恐惧不断扩展限制的范围。在此特定人格的案例中，感知也受到局限，并产生排斥反应。在此类案例中，食物常被排斥。许多类似案例中，自我只选择在自认安全的领域内进行感知，并日益排斥任何可避免的涉入。如今自我有了自创的溃疡作为借口，排斥诸多食物——因为食物象征着涉入。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now in the same way that consciousness originated the physical dimension, you as portions of consciousness continue to maintain and create it anew. Your source of energy is that first creation, in which consciousness focused, where before it had not. You also then know and develop yourselves through your own creations, and you automatically create and maintain your physical environment in the same manner that you breathe. Your physical image and your physical environment are both materialized extensions of your inner selves.
quotes.translation: 正如意识最初创造了物质实相，作为意识的一部分，你们持续维持并重新创造它。你们的能量来源正是那最初的创造——意识在其中聚焦，而此前它并未聚焦。你们也通过自己的创造来认识和发展自己，并且像呼吸一样自动创造并维持你们的物质环境。你们的物质形象和物质环境都是内在自我的物质化延伸。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The breast cancer suggestions associated with self-examinations have caused more cancers than any treatments have cured (most emphatically). They involve intense meditation of the body, and adverse imagery that itself affects the bodily cells.2 Public health announcements about high blood pressure themselves raise the blood pressure of millions of television viewers (even more emphatically).
quotes.translation: 与自我检查相关的乳腺癌暗示所造成的癌症，比任何治疗所治愈的癌症都要多（极其强调）。它们涉及对身体的高度冥想，以及本身就会影响身体细胞的不良意象。关于高血压的公共卫生公告本身就会提高数百万电视观众的血压（更加强调）。

quotes.text: It is most beneficial for Ruburt to be fairly well self-disciplined this period of the year, for reasons that I will go into later. A quiet schedule is important for him through April at least. Not boredom, dear Ruburt, you don't have to worry. That is, a quiet schedule will help him direct and discipline and use beneficially the sudden spurt of nervous energy which sometimes overwhelms him.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在今年这个时期保持相当良好的自律最为有益，原因我稍后会详述。至少到四月份，安静的作息对他很重要。不是无聊，亲爱的鲁柏，你不必担心。也就是说，安静的作息将帮助他引导、约束并有益地运用那股有时会淹没他的神经能量突然爆发。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. You must realize that within this room, and within any room, at any time there are other personalities that you do not perceive. There are ways of perceiving them if they choose to be perceived. Possibly, with some help from certain directions, we shall see what we can do in other classes. And our friend Ruburt is quite correct, you (WL) learn the nature of the inner self first.... and then we shall help you in the development of your own abilities. And before too long, we will have a message for you to take to heart.
quotes.translation: 现在。你们必须认识到，在这个房间里，在任何房间里，任何时候都有你们感知不到的其他存有。如果他们选择被感知，就有感知他们的方法。或许，在某些方向的帮助下，我们会在其他课上看看能做些什么。而我们的朋友鲁柏说得非常正确，你（WL）首先要学习内在自我的本质……然后我们会帮助你发展自己的能力。不久之后，我们会给你一个需要铭记在心的讯息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The blacks were to be oppressed then on the one hand, and yet treated indulgently as children on the other. There was always a great fear that the blacks as a race would escape their bounds -- given an inch they would take a yard -- simply because the whites so greatly feared the nature of the inner self, and recognized the power that they tried so desperately to strangle within themselves.
quotes.translation: 黑人一方面受到压迫，另一方面又被当作孩子般纵容对待。人们始终极度恐惧黑人种族会越界——得寸进尺——仅仅因为白人如此恐惧内在自我的本质，并认出他们拼命想在自己内心扼杀的力量。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: He becomes trapped by his own artificially-divided self. He looks for gods, anything at all, to explain perfectly natural functions that belong to him. This beautifully absolves him in his own eyes from all responsibility, but it does not. I have been speaking here only, if you will believe it, of personalities in their particular lives as they operate on your plane, and I have much to say.
quotes.translation: 他陷入自己人为分裂的自我之中。他寻找神祇，寻找任何东西，来解释那些本属于他的完全自然的功能。这在他自己眼中美妙地免除了他所有的责任，但事实并非如此。如果你愿意相信，我在这里只谈论在你们层面上运作的特定人生中的存有，而我还有很多话要说。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: What you are pleased to call the subconscious represents merely the part of the inner senses, or of the inner self, that even your society can no longer ignore. And this is indeed only the surface. Here you find of course the repository for personal memories, and not of personal ego-bound conscious memories either, but also of psychological experiences that the ego itself prefers to forget.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓的潜意识，仅仅代表内在感官或内在自体的那一部分，甚至连你们的社会都无法再忽视它。而这确实只是表面。在这里，你们当然会发现个人记忆的储存库，不仅是受自我束缚的有意识记忆，还包括自我本身宁愿遗忘的心理经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: He tells us that our reincarnational selves explore the past, present, and future--but basically all at once, since time as he defines it is simultaneous. I've written before that as physical creatures we're always going to find the contradictory notion of "simultaneous time" hard to comprehend, intellectually at least.
quotes.translation: 他告诉我们，我们的转世自体探索过去、现在和未来——但基本上同时进行，因为他定义的时间是同时性的。我之前写过，作为物质生物，我们总是会发现"同时性时间"这个矛盾概念难以理解，至少在理智上如此。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: I would suggest however that the first recalled dream for any given evening be compared with the first recalled dream from other evenings, that the second recalled dream from any one evening be compared with the second dream from other evenings, and so forth. This should prove highly interesting, and if such experiments are carried on consistently over a period of years, then the results could lead to excellent evidence for the various layers of the subconscious and the inner self, of which I have spoken for so long.
quotes.translation: 然而，我建议将某个夜晚回忆起的第一个梦与其他夜晚回忆起的第一个梦进行比较，将某个夜晚回忆起的第二个梦与其他夜晚的第二个梦进行比较，以此类推。这应该会非常有趣，如果这些实验能持续进行多年，那么结果将为潜意识与内在自体的各个层面提供极佳的证据，这是我长久以来一直在谈论的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: These are my instructions. You may consider this your first lesson. We will go by easy stages, for we do not want you betwixt and between. You may induce a medium trance in whatever way you choose. On occasion this will be spontaneous, as you know. For best results in the beginning it is good to make a projection attempt when you already feel physically drowsy, but pleasantly so. When you have induced the trance state, then begin to examine your own subjective feelings until you find recognition of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这些是我的指示。你们可以将此视为第一课。我们将循序渐进，因为我们不希望你们处于模棱两可的状态。你们可以选择任何方式诱导出中等出神状态。如你们所知，有时这会是自发的。为了在初期获得最佳效果，最好在身体已经感到困倦但愉悦时尝试投射。当你们诱导出出神状态后，开始检视自己的主观感受，直到认出内在自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... (Humorously, to me:) You are the living version of yourself in space and time, around which your world revolves.11 The great potentiality that exists in the unknown self, however, also actualizes other such focuses, and in the same space-time framework. They are not you, any more than you are the black man, or the white woman, or the Indian woman, or the Chinese man.
quotes.translation: 给我们一点时间……（幽默地对我：）你是自己在时空中的活生生版本，你的世界围绕着你旋转。然而，未知自体中所存在的巨大潜能，也在同一时空框架中实现了其他这样的焦点。他们不是你，就像你不是那个黑人、那个白人女性、那个印度女性或那个中国男性一样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The self is not limited. The true meaning of that statement may sometime dawn. The idea of one personhood still closes your eyes to the greater multipersonhood that is your true reality. Often your dreams give you a hint of this kind of existence.
quotes.translation: 自体不受限制。这句话的真正含义或许终有一天会显现。单一人格的观念仍然让你对更大的多重人格——你真正的实相——视而不见。你的梦境常常会给你这种存在方式的暗示。

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The material that I have given you concerning the nature of planes will be quite handy here. I have told you that a plane is not necessarily a planet, nor a place, but even a mere focus of awareness. A dream is an awareness of and existence in another plane, whereby the self changes focus to keep in touch with the various portions of itself so that inner communication can be maintained.
quotes.translation: 我之前给过你们关于层面本质的资料，现在正好派上用场。我曾告诉你们，层面未必是行星，也未必是地点，甚至可能只是意识的一个焦点。梦境就是在另一个层面的觉知与存在，自我借此转换焦点，以与自身的各个部分保持联系，从而维持内在沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Take for example this subconscious feeling: "I want to be comforted. If I were sick someone would feel sorry for me and comfort me then." Such a wish is very seldom on a conscious level, but it is often Emotionally charged, and it brings forth immediate results because of the charge it carries. Whenever you catch yourselves in Moods of self pity, then you are courting just such results.
quotes.translation: 以这种潜意识感受为例："我想要被安慰。如果我生病了，就会有人同情我、安慰我。"这种愿望很少浮现在意识层面，但往往带有强烈的情感电荷，正是由于它所携带的电荷，会立即引发结果。每当你们陷入自怜的情绪时，就是在招致这样的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Many actual physical intervening steps are cut out. The ego becomes more similar to the inner ego than to its old self, comparatively speaking. This altered ego is aware of large portions of inner reality that were previously denied. Structurally it remains intact, and yet it has changed chemically, and electromagnetically. It is able to open up so that inner experience can be received.
quotes.translation: 许多实际的身体介入步骤被省略了。相对而言，自我变得比过去的自己更接近内在自我。这个改变后的自我能够觉察到先前被否认的大量内在实相。它在结构上保持完整，但在化学和电磁层面已经改变。它能够敞开，从而接收内在体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Although this type of existence seems cold to you, it is a clear and crystal-like existence in which things are known that are beyond your comprehension... in which no time is needed in your terms for experience... in which the inner self condenses all human knowledge that has been received by you through your various existences and reincarnations... has been coded and exists indelibly.
quotes.translation: 虽然这种存在方式在你们看来显得冰冷，但它是一种清澈如水晶般的存在，其中所知之事远超你们的理解……在你们的认知中无需时间即可体验……内在自我将你们通过各次存在与转世所接收的所有人类知识浓缩……这些知识已被编码，且永恒存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Knowledge does not exist independently of the one who knows. Someone gave Cayce the material. It did not come out of thin air. It came from an excellent source, a pyramid gestalt personality, with definite characteristics, but the alien nature of the personality was too startling to Cayce, and he could not perceive it. (Pause.) I am giving you the material through a personality that you can understand; one that is mine, one of my favorite selves. (Smile.) In this way the point is made so that it is clear.
quotes.translation: 知识并非独立于知者而存在。有人给了凯西那些资料。它们并非凭空而来。它们来自一个卓越的源头——一个金字塔格式的整体人格，具有明确特征，但这个人格的异质性对凯西来说过于惊人，使他无法感知。（停顿。）我现在通过一个你们能够理解的人格来传递资料；这个人格属于我，是我最喜爱的自我之一。（微笑。）这样就能清晰传达要点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: So-called extrasensory perception gives you but a crude and distorted idea of the basic ways in which the inner self receives information, but the concepts built around extrasensory perception are at least nearer the truth, and as such represent an improvement over the idea that all perception is basically physical.
quotes.translation: 所谓的超感官知觉，只是对内在自我接收信息基本方式的粗陋扭曲认知，但围绕超感官知觉建立的概念至少更接近真相，因此相比"所有感知本质上都是物理的"这一观点，它代表了一种进步。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Suggestion, well used, with training and knowledge, will therefore allow you to alter the very cells of your body. The inner senses can be requested to operate in such a way that the ego will accept their communications. For the astral body is not some distant and alien other self, but it is even now that portion of yourself that you know but cannot see, that you feel but cannot touch.
quotes.translation: 善加运用暗示，配合训练与知识，便能改变你身体的细胞。你可以要求内在感官以某种方式运作，使自我接受它们的沟通。因为星光体并非某个遥远陌生的其他自己，而是此刻你自身中那部分——你知道却看不见、你感受却触摸不到的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There is communication between them but they are not aware of it. The tape is the element common to all the channels. Now. The inner ego is the director as you know, but the whole self must know itself simultaneously. It is not enough that the inner ego knows what is going on. Ultimately therefore the inner ego must itself bring about comprehension on the parts of the various portions.
quotes.translation: 它们之间存在沟通，但彼此并未察觉。磁带是所有通道共有的元素。如你所知，内在自我是导演，但整个自己必须同时知晓自身。仅凭内在自我了解状况并不足够。因此，内在自我最终必须让各个部分也获得理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: "When you mentioned his ink sketches he instantly wanted to play at painting again, but felt, guiltily, that he should not. He forgot, once again, that the creative self is aware of his entire life, and that his impulses have a creative purpose.
quotes.translation: "当你提及他的墨水素描时，他立刻又想重拾绘画，却带着愧疚感认为自己不该如此。他再次忘记，创造性自己知晓他整个生命，而他的冲动具有创造性的目的。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: NOTES: SESSION 881
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: I prefer that he keep highly informed. His own interests propel him in this direction, and because of the way in which we are working together, it is advantageous for him to become acquainted with as much knowledge in a number of fields as he is capable of assimilating. If we were using the very deep trance state then indeed this would not be necessary, but for your own benefits I prefer as much cooperation on your parts as possible, and like to work with an assimilation of knowledge by the whole self.
quotes.translation: 我宁愿他保持高度知情。他自身的兴趣驱使他朝这个方向前进，由于我们合作的方式，让他尽可能吸收多个领域能消化的知识是有利的。若我们使用极深出神状态，这确实不必要，但为了你的益处，我宁愿你们尽可能充分合作，并喜欢让整个自己吸收知识来工作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It will involve an expansion of consciousness, not physical knowledge... You will directly and simply perceive more... I cannot make Ruburt find all the words. Your God is part of a larger reality. We see what we can see... This larger reality is also a part of our dreams: it is more important and vital than breath, for you are all part of this individually. There is a give and take between you and the stars on a physical basis, just as there is also a connection between selves and what you call a god.
quotes.translation: 这将涉及意识的扩展，而非物质知识……你将直接而单纯地感知更多……我无法让鲁柏找到所有词汇。你的神是更大实相的一部分。我们看见所能看见的……这更大实相也是我们梦境的一部分：它比呼吸更重要更鲜活，因为你们每个人都参与其中。在物质基础上，你与星辰之间存在给予与接受，正如各个自己与你所谓的神之间也存在关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In one way the self represents what you shall be in your time terms, represents your highest potential. Basically however the supraselfalready does exist, you see, for all potentials are fulfilled. The supraselfcan be sensed at times, almost as you might senseanother presence. You are already part of it, of course.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度说，自己代表你在时间术语中将成为的样子，代表你最高的潜能。但根本上，超我早已存在，你看，因为所有潜能都已实现。超我有时能被感知，几乎就像你感知另一个存在。你当然已是它的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You will learn them here. You will learn them through reading, and through listening to your inner self. The methods have been known for centuries; not only centuries as you think of them, but for the lifetime of this earth as you know it, and even before -- when the poles were reversed and when there were other stars in the sky and when the planets were not the planets that you know.
quotes.translation: 你将在此学会它们。你将通过阅读、通过倾听内在自我来学会它们。这些方法已为世人所知数世纪之久；不仅是你所认知的数世纪，而是如你所知的地球生命历程，甚至更早——当两极反转、天空中有其他星辰、行星并非你所知的那些行星之时。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It will, hopefully, avoid the Pollyanna attributes of many self-help books, and tease the reader into an enthusiastic desire to understand the characteristics of reality if only to solve his or her own problems. The methods given will be highly practical, workable, and within the abilities of any person genuinely concerned with those problems inherent in the nature of human existence.
quotes.translation: 希望它能避免许多自助书籍中那种盲目乐观的特质，激发读者热切渴望理解实相的本质，哪怕只是为了解决自身的问题。所提供的方法将高度实用、可行，且任何真正关心人类生存本质中固有问题的个人都能掌握。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: "First of all, however, a note primarily to Ruburt: I often quite purposefully (with amusement) break off book dictation to discuss other matters that come into your experience. This allows me to cover material from several different viewpoints, and to organize it in different fashions. Actually, however, there are several self-formed books in your material already. Do you follow me?"
quotes.translation: "然而首先，有一则主要给鲁柏的提示：我常常有意（带着戏谑）中断书的传述，转而讨论进入你经验的其他事项。这让我能从多个不同观点涵盖材料，并以不同方式组织它。但实际上，你的材料中已有几本自行形成的书。你明白我的意思吗？"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: "I can envision Seth's material expanding almost endlessly just on a day-to-day basis, as he deals with events in the lives of Jane and me--and this idea conveys nothing about news of his reactions to and interactions with events on various levels of his own reality, plus other realities he may be able to reach. In Chapter 8 of Dreams, when I asked Seth what he was going to do for the rest of the evening (in our terms), he replied: 'I am going to refresh myself by diving into some new concepts, for there are new concepts for me also, of course, and I dive into them from many positions all the time as well.' (See the conclusion of Session 916 for May 14, 1980.) Think of the questions one could ask him relative to just this one statement! Such provocative assertions leave behind them unsatisfied voids of curiosity. Actually, most of his information does, regardless of subject matter. But obviously, if Seth did take up every moment of our temporal lives with personal material, all else would be probable."

quotes.text: He spoke of the undiscovered man in terms of the whole self, whose abilities are so little known, and this is precisely what we are here attempting to bring to light: the vast areas within the self which have been left undiscovered and unknown.
quotes.translation: 他以整体自我的角度谈论未被发现的人，其能力鲜为人知，而这正是我们在此试图揭示的：自我中那些尚未被发掘和认知的广阔领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your main point of contention is brought about by the emotional barriers that are caused by the difference in terms. It is as if you choose to work for a day in the slums. It would be ridiculous for you to choose to do this, and then say to yourself, "Why did I choose to work in the slums? I would prefer to work on Fifth Avenue." You know the reason, and your entire identity knows the reason. You hide it from the present self simply to insure the fact that the present reality is not a pretended one.
quotes.translation: 你的主要争议点源于术语差异所造成的情感障碍。这就像你选择在贫民窟工作一天。若你选择这样做，然后对自己说："我为何选择在贫民窟工作？我宁愿在第五大道工作。"那将十分荒谬。你知道原因，你的整个身份都知道原因。你向当前自我隐瞒它，仅仅是为了确保当前实相并非虚假的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: At the same time imagine that these creatures are really one creature, but with definite parts equipped to handle two entirely different worlds. The subconscious therefore, in this truly ludicrous analogy, would exist between the two brains, and would enable the creature to operate as a single unity. At the same time, and this is the difficult part to explain, neither of the two faces would ever see the other world. They would not be aware of each other. And yet each would be fully self-conscious.
quotes.translation: 同时想象这些生物其实是同一个生物，但拥有明确的部分来应对两个截然不同的世界。因此，在这个真正荒谬的类比中，潜意识将存在于两个大脑之间，使该生物能作为一个统一体运作。同时——这是最难解释的部分——两张面孔中的任何一张都永远不会看到另一个世界。它们不会意识到彼此的存在。然而每一张面孔都完全具有自我意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Of itself however it does not make these judgments in those terms. The decision as to whether or not a particular probable event should be perceived as a physical one depends, of course, upon the nature of the ego which would then experience it. The probable self does not make the decision, but merely passes on the data which it has received through its own experience with the event.
quotes.translation: 然而，它本身并不会以这些术语做出这些判断。至于某个特定可能事件是否应被感知为物质事件，这当然取决于随后将体验该事件的自我的本质。可能自我并不做决定，只是传递它通过自身对事件的体验所接收到的数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: We are attempting in these sessions to develop both of your abilities in many areas, while we still maintain a most necessary balance of development so that one part of you does not get top-heavy, and topple over. I say this partially in jest, nevertheless there is a definite reason for such a steady, balanced progression. From the beginning of our sessions you have been learning the method with which we will explore the whole self, but we have not plunged headlong into any foolhardy expeditions.
quotes.translation: 在这些课程中，我们试图在多个领域发展你们两人的能力，同时我们仍保持一种最必要的平衡发展，以免你们某一部分变得头重脚轻而倾倒。我这样说半是玩笑，然而这种稳定、平衡的进展确有明确理由。从课程开始以来，你们一直在学习我们将用来探索整个自我的方法，但我们并未鲁莽地投入任何轻率的探索。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The probable system, therefore, is as complicated as the reincarnational one. Now I have told you that all action is simultaneous; therefore, on the one hand, you exist in both systems at once. However, to explain to you that decisions are involved, and to separate these events, I must simplify them to some degree. Put it this way: A portion of the whole self focuses in reincarnational cycles and handles developments there. Another portion focuses in probabilities and handles developments there.
quotes.translation: 因此，可能系统与转世系统同样复杂。我曾告诉你们所有行动都是同时发生的；因此，一方面，你们同时存在于两个系统中。然而，为了向你们解释其中涉及的决定，并将这些事件分开，我必须在某种程度上简化它们。这样说吧：整个自我的一部分聚焦于转世循环，处理那里的发展。另一部分聚焦于可能性，处理那里的发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: For the inner self can perceive it, and does change it. The idea of inverted time states that time flows in all directions, and that as each action affects every other action, so time constantly affects itself and continually reacts within itself. The past moment is never completed. Consciously you have simply lost sight of it, and have not followed it through in its endless depths.
quotes.translation: 因为内在自我能够感知它，并且确实改变它。倒转时间的概念指出时间向所有方向流动，并且由于每个行动影响其他所有行动，时间也不断影响自身，并在自身内部持续反应。过去的时刻从未完成。你们只是有意识地忽略了它，没有在其无尽的深度中追随它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: （Mark is Bill Macdonnel's entity name. See Session 68 in Volume 2.）

quotes.text: "I now want to put the sinful-self material in a larger spectrum," Seth told us in part. "Ideally, infants 'bond' with their parents, particularly with the mother but with the father also, and they bond with the general ideas of their society. This offers the sense of safety in which the youngster can then feel free and curious enough to explore its world and the nature of reality.
quotes.translation: "我现在想把有罪自我的材料放在一个更大的光谱中，"赛斯部分地告诉我们。"理想情况下，婴儿与父母'联结'，特别是与母亲，也与父亲，并且他们与社会的一般观念联结。这提供了安全感，使年轻人能够感到足够自由和好奇，去探索其世界和实相的本质。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 17. See the opening notes for Session 920, in this Chapter 9.

quotes.text: The ego is that portion of the self which experiences time as continuity, and to whom experience is a series of stimuli and responses carried on one after another. And yet this is in itself a division, so to speak, or a kind of value fulfillment, for the simultaneous nature of a given action is here experienced in slow motion, as a child must learn to walk before the child can run.
quotes.translation: 自我是自我中将时间体验为连续性的那部分，对自我而言，经验是一系列接连发生的刺激与反应。然而，这本身可以说是一种分割，或一种价值完成，因为特定行动的同时性本质在此以慢动作被体验，正如孩子必须先学会走路才能奔跑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am speaking now of course of both of you. That is, each of you should by now be aware of such an emerging psychological unit. It is the result of your ability to step out of your own system to some small extent, for you cannot do this until you are ready. For the very attempt, or successful attempt, results in an extension of the self out of the system in which you were nurtured.
quotes.translation: 我现在当然是在说你们两位。也就是说，你们每个人现在都应该意识到这样一个正在浮现的心理单元。它是你们在某种程度上能够跳出自身系统的结果，因为你们必须准备好才能做到这一点。因为这种尝试或成功的尝试，会导致自我从你们被培养的系统向外延伸。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now to return to our discussion. The matter of time is highly important if you have any hopes of understanding the self in its entirety, or other personalities that do not operate within your system. The Psychological frameworks are so different. The apparent cause and effect sequence is absent, and identity knows itself as itself through other means than continuity, in your terms.
quotes.translation: 现在回到我们的讨论。如果你们有任何希望理解完整的自我，或理解那些不在你们系统中运作的其他人格，时间问题就极为重要。心理框架是如此不同。明显的因果序列并不存在，而身份认同通过不同于连续性的其他方式（按你们的说法）来认识自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is no point where the child ceases and the man begins, and no point where the young man ceases and the old man begins. These are states happening simultaneously, but perceived in slow motion within your system. Not only are they perceived in slow motion, but they are perceived along one line of focus only. The focus is indeed intense, but so limited in scope that it is relatively impossible for you to keep your attention upon the self except in the most inconsistent and fleeting of ways.
quotes.translation: 没有孩子停止而成人开始的点，也没有年轻人停止而老人开始的点。这些状态是同时发生的，但在你们的系统中以慢动作被感知。它们不仅以慢动作被感知，而且只沿着一条焦点线被感知。这个焦点确实强烈，但范围如此有限，以至于你们几乎不可能以任何方式持续关注自我，除了最不一致和转瞬即逝的方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: （Mark is Bill Macdonnel's entity name. See Session 68 in Volume 2.）

quotes.text: Ultimately it is not self-generating, but for the purposes of our discussion it may be termed so. The force originates within the psychic or nonphysical aspects of each living creature within your system. This force acts as a balancing mechanism for the psychic structures, and through use of it living forms create and maintain in a most basic manner their own physical environment.
quotes.translation: 最终它并非自我生成，但为了我们讨论的目的，可以这样称呼它。这种力量源于你们系统中每个生物的心灵或非物质层面。这种力量作为心灵结构的平衡机制运作，通过使用它，生命形式以最基本的方式创造并维持自己的物理环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Using this third form, there would be a tendency for you not to recognize your own physical situation. It would be difficult to carry the memories of the present ego personality with you. This third form is the vehicle of the inner self. The disorientation that it feels is the disorientation, you see, that it will feel when the physical body is deserted, or at the point of death.
quotes.translation: 使用这第三种形式，你们会有一种倾向，即无法认出自己的物理状况。带着当前自我人格的记忆会变得困难。这第三种形式是内在自我的载体。它所感受到的迷失方向，你们看，正是当肉体被抛弃时，或死亡时刻所感受到的迷失方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Hypnosis will work well to help your physical and even mental conditions. It is after all only a means of reaching the whole self and of acquainting the ego, through effects, with the abilities of the whole self, of which it is but a part.
quotes.translation: 催眠将有效帮助你们的身体甚至心理状况。毕竟它只是达到完整自我的一种手段，并通过效果让自我熟悉完整自我的能力，而自我只是完整自我的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The natural development of your abilities in other words already exists. You must merely be ready, intuitively alive, prepared and assured, and these developments will appear to you. (Pause.) Great artists are those who material ize physically the paintings already created by the whole self in potential form.
quotes.translation: 换言之，你能力的自然发展早已存在。你只需准备好、直觉敏锐、笃定自信，这些发展便会向你显现。（停顿）伟大的艺术家，正是那些将整个自性以潜能形式早已创造出的画作，在物质层面具体呈现出来的人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (Rewritten November/2000: The vision grew out of Seth's saying in the deleted 382nd session, on November 27/67, that I'd do well known painting of Bill Gallagher. It will be based upon the conception of my painting of 1954 that I "sold to Sonja. ''see session 584 in Seth Speaks, held on May 3/71.)

quotes.text: Full and uninhibited use of even the outer senses would lead you to inner reality. Usually only a strong and disciplined self, a well-structured identity, can perceive in this manner, and then only occasionally. Full operation of inner and outer senses, you see, in your present stage of development as a race, would be blinding, as you can see in your reading of drug experiences.
quotes.translation: 即使仅充分且无拘束地运用外在感官，也会引领你触及内在实相。通常只有强大而自律的自性、结构稳固的身份，才能以这种方式感知，且仅能偶尔为之。你看，在人类当前的发展阶段，内外感官的完全运作会令人目眩——正如你在阅读药物体验相关记载时所见的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: We will take your physical system as an example. There is general and mass focus of all self structures within that system, binding enough and cohesive enough so that the appearance of a permanent and all-pervading physical reality is maintained. The ego part of the structure concentrates with great intensity, directing itself within those coordinates that form physical reality.
quotes.translation: 我们以你们的物质系统为例。该系统中所有自性结构存在普遍而集中的焦点，其约束力与凝聚力足以维持一个看似永恒且无所不在的物质实相。结构中自我部分以极高强度集中运作，将自身导向构成物质实相的那些坐标体系内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You must try to forget for a period of time each day the self that you think of as yourself... the adult pretensions, the adult bigness's. You must remember the childhood spontaneity. You must think of the freedom that is within a flower. Now it seems to you that a flower cannot move, and therefore has no freedom. And yet I tell you, you must think about the freedom of a flower.
quotes.translation: 你每天必须花一段时间，试着遗忘那个你视为"自己"的自性……遗忘成人的矫饰、成人的自大。你必须忆起童年的自发性。你必须思考一朵花内在的自由。此刻对你而言，花朵似乎无法移动，因而没有自由。但我告诉你，你必须思考一朵花的自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is a self materialized in physical form. It is conscious of itself as belonging to action. The fact that it may be part of a larger gestalt self in no way belittles its own identity. It is conscious of the gestalts of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 这是一个以物质形态具现化的自性。它自觉属于行动的一部分。它可能是一个更大完形自性的一部分，这个事实丝毫不减损其自身身份。它觉察到自身所属的完形结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the dreaming state and in other states of consciousness, he can indeed to some degree become aware of perceptions which will be neglected by the ego alone. In other words, psychologically there is only one portion of self A that is limited in its perceptions to the physical dimension, and that is the ego.
quotes.translation: 在梦境状态及其他意识状态中，他确实能在某种程度上觉察到那些仅靠自我会忽略的感知。换言之，从心理学角度看，自性A中只有一部分的感知局限于物质维度，那就是自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: All limitations, basically, are self-adopted. They may be necessary at one time or another, but they can never be primary realities. Limitations, in other words, are illusion. You have to deal with them only because you have created them. Your exterior circumstances are the materializations of inner climate.
quotes.translation: 所有限制基本上都是自我接纳的。它们可能在某个时刻是必要的，但永远不能成为首要实相。换言之，限制是幻相。你不得不处理它们，只因为是你创造了它们。你的外在境况是内在气候的具体化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: We have to some extent touched upon the various ways by which this process is carried out. The process is carried out so quickly as to seem simultaneous on your plane, but the pause and resulting pulsation is always present. This mental enclosure is arbitrary, necessary again, a device used by the self. It would seem to limit the extension of consciousness, and yet it does not.
quotes.translation: 我们已在某种程度上触及了此过程得以进行的各种方式。这过程进行得如此之快，以致在你的层面上看似同时发生，但停顿与随之而来的脉动始终存在。这种心智围场是武断的，再次是必要的，是自我使用的一种装置。它看似会限制意识的扩展，实则不然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. Projections further extend the self and the identity, only this time in realms where the physical self cannot follow. Now this kind of projection, this extension of identity, is the true nature and the creative aspect of aggression.
quotes.translation: 现在。投射进一步扩展了自我与身份，只是这次是在物质自我无法跟随的领域。这种投射、这种身份的扩展，正是攻击性的真实本质与创造性面向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This highly intricate web or field obviously reaches out from you as a self to all the persons you perceive, and you also participate in the same sort of web, projecting outward from the other individuals. These webs have an electromagnetic structure as well as a chemical basis. They act like infinite pathways, and have a definite construction, though you do not perceive this.
quotes.translation: 这个高度复杂的网络或场域显然从作为自我的你延伸至你所感知的所有人，而你也参与同样的网络，从其他个体向外投射。这些网络具有电磁结构及化学基础。它们如同无限路径，有明确构造，尽管你并未察觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The personality so touched by it actually does then become, in certain terms, what he seems to be. He will emerge as an eternal hero in the external religious drama, as the inner self is the eternal hero of the interior religious drama.
quotes.translation: 被其如此触动的人格，在特定意义上确实会变成他所显现的样子。他将作为外在宗教戏剧中的永恒英雄出现，正如内在自我是内在宗教戏剧的永恒英雄。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You would be more than disoriented, for example, but quite terrified, if between one moment and the next your familiar environment as you knew it disappeared to be replaced by other sets of data that you were not ready to understand, so much information from the inner senses must be translated in terms that you can comprehend. Such information must somehow make sense to you as three-dimensional selves, in other words.
quotes.translation: 举例来说，若在瞬间你熟悉的已知环境消失，被其他你尚未准备好理解的数据集取代，你不仅会迷失方向，更会相当惊恐，因此来自内在感官的许多信息必须以你能理解的方式翻译。换言之，这些信息必须以某种方式对作为三维自我的你具有意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: That led you, just below normal consciousness, to consider the relationship between father and daughter, and then to think of Ruburt's father, Del. He appeared younger and more vital than you had ever known him -- indeed, transformed in a fashion. He was redeemed in your mind, and appeared as his ideal self. In that capacity he helped lead you along safe paths, out of danger.
quotes.translation: 这使你，在正常意识之下，开始思考父女之间的关系，进而联想到鲁柏的父亲戴尔。他比你记忆中的模样更年轻、更有活力——确实以某种方式转化了。他在你心中得到救赎，呈现出理想自我的样貌。以这个身份，他协助引导你沿着安全路径脱离险境。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Jane went to hydro as usual this morning, but wasn't too happy about the system. While she was eating a good lunch I thought of telling her the typewriter repair service had called this morning, citing a bill for $90.00 for the repair and a box of a dozen cartridges, but I forgot to mention it as we talked about other things. I'd also called our optometrist and asked his secretary to have him return my call so I could ask him a couple of technical questions about a note I'm writing for Session 901 for Dreams. Since I had to wait for his call -- which never came -- I couldn't leave the house to get Jane's typewriter. I want to try it out to make sure it's okay before I turn my own in for repair, which it needs.

quotes.text: As an analogy, you live in a self-constructed box with certain self- constructed senses to enable you to perceive the box world that you yourself have created. Any true concept has its origins outside your box, and continues beyond it.
quotes.translation: 打个比方，你活在一个自我构建的箱子里，用某些自我构建的感官来感知自己创造的箱中世界。任何真实概念都源自你的箱子之外，并延伸至其外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. I told you that the knowledge gained would be retained. Not only this, but it is retained not only by the individual selves as you think of them. It becomes part of the knowledge of all the probable selves in other realities also.
quotes.translation: 现在。我告诉过你，获得的知识会被保留。不仅如此，这些知识不仅被你认知中的个体自我所保留，还会成为其他实相中所有可能自我的知识的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: So if you want to know what my environment is like, you will have to understand what I am. In order to explain, I shall have to speak about the nature of consciousness in general. In doing so I shall end up telling you much about yourself. The inner portions of your identity are already aware of much that I will tell you. Part of my purpose is to acquaint your egotistical self with knowledge that is already known to a larger portion of your own consciousness, that you have long ignored.
quotes.translation: 因此，若想了解我的环境，你必须先理解我的本质。为了解释这一点，我必须探讨意识的一般本质。在此过程中，最终会告诉你许多关于你自己的事。你身份的内在部分早已知晓我将要讲述的许多内容。我的部分目的是让你那个自我意识的部分，认识到你自身更大意识早已知道却长期忽略的知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If you are interested in any kind of evidential material, it is good to hold tests fairly regularly. Now. When you want to give Ruburt a vacation from them, this is quite all right. But because of his peculiar makeup the first, or first few tests after resumption are apt to be poor now, at this time, because he is apt to try too hard. He is not used to the touch enough yet. He loses the touch of it, and falls back on other layers of the self which are not reliable for this sort of data.
quotes.translation: 若你对任何验证性材料感兴趣，定期进行测试是好的。现在。当你想让鲁柏从测试中休假时，这完全没问题。但由于他特殊的构成，恢复测试后的第一次或前几次测试，在此刻容易表现不佳，因为他容易过度努力。他尚未足够熟悉那种触感。他会失去那种触感，转而依赖其他不可靠的自我层面来获取这类数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The difficulty lies in making this communication, which is direct from me, to what would be Ruburt's time three self, clear to the time one self of Ruburt's, which must speak these words, in what could be called Priestley's time one.
quotes.translation: 困难在于如何将这份直接来自我的讯息，传递给鲁柏的时间三自我，再清晰传达给必须说出这些话语的鲁柏时间一自我——这发生在可称为普里斯特利的时间一中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now if you would each, for ten minutes a day, open yourselves to your own reality there would be no question of self-justification, for you would realize the miraculous nature of your own identity. I have said this before in class: You are as dead now, and as alive, as you will ever be. In life you can be as dead as you think any corpse is -- even, by contrast, far deader.
quotes.translation: 如果你们每个人每天花十分钟向自己的实相敞开，就不会有自我辩护的问题，因为你们会认识到自身身份的神奇本质。我曾在课堂上说过：你们现在既如你们将来会是的那么死，也如你们将来会是的那么活。在生命中，你们可以像你们认为任何尸体那样死——甚至，相比之下，死得更彻底。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is an extremely interesting one, though somewhat complicated. This ability is a natural one, operating to some degree or another within every personality. It is a natural protective mechanism of inner origin, directly affecting matter. It is a self-correcting mechanism. The individual's health is determined by his ability to take advantage of, or to use, this mechanism.
quotes.translation: 这是一个极其有趣的问题，虽然有些复杂。这种能力是一种自然能力，在每个人格内或多或少地运作。它是一种源自内在的自然保护机制，直接影响物质。它是一种自我修正机制。个体的健康取决于他利用或使用这种机制的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is a strong and rather aggressive nature beneath the surface personality of the questioner, of which the questioner is frightened, to some extent therefore a divided self. The male is passive and of a submissive mind, and given to an obsession with over consideration for security. He will always seek security, but he enjoys being the object of a chase of this nature.
quotes.translation: 提问者表面人格之下有一种强烈且相当侵略性的本性，提问者对此感到恐惧，因此在某种程度上是一个分裂的自我。男性是被动的、顺从的思维，过分关注安全。他总是寻求安全，但他喜欢成为这种追逐的对象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Such medications also often prevent certain necessary dream cycles that can help the body recuperate, and the consciousness then becomes highly disoriented. Some of the divisions between different portions of the self, therefore, are not basically necessary but are the result of custom and convenience.
quotes.translation: 这类药物也常常阻止某些必要的、能帮助身体恢复的梦周期，然后意识变得高度迷失方向。因此，自我不同部分之间的某些分裂基本上不是必要的，而是习惯和便利的结果。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is your refusal to accept the whole self that causes the difficulty. Once more: Data received by the inner senses is as vivid, and in fact more vivid, than any other data you will ever receive, and the ironic part of the whole matter is that you actually receive this inner data constantly. You utilize it constantly and yet consciously you will not accept its existence.
quotes.translation: 正是你们拒绝接受完整的自我导致了困难。再说一次：内在感官接收的数据与你们将接收的任何其他数据一样生动，实际上更生动，而整个事情的讽刺之处在于你们实际上不断接收这些内在数据。你们不断利用它，但有意识地却不愿接受它的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The ego is not aware of the manner in which dreams are created. Neither is it aware of the manner in which the inner self creates physical matter. Neither, therefore, is it aware of those distortions that cause it to construct faults within physical matter, for in all cases the physical matter of the human body will be subconsciously created in line with inner conditions.
quotes.translation: 自我不知道梦是如何创造的。它也不知道内在自我如何创造物质。因此，它也不知道那些导致它在物质中构建缺陷的扭曲，因为在所有情况下，人类身体的物质都会潜意识地根据内在条件被创造出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: First here a small note. Much later there will be other suggestions for you, in which you will direct your sleeping self to perform various activities in sleep, visit certain locations, bring back information and so forth. This is obviously still very much in the future, but it is well within the abilities of human personality, and within the realms of your own abilities.
quotes.translation: 首先在此略作说明。在更遥远的未来，你们会收到其他建议，届时你们将引导睡梦中的自我在睡眠中执行各种活动、探访特定地点、带回信息等等。这显然仍是相当遥远的事，但这完全在人类人格的能力范围之内，也属于你们自身能力的范畴。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. Often clairvoyant information will appear to be wrong. In some cases this is because a different probable event has been chosen by a self for physical materialization. I have access to the field of probabilities and you do not--egotistically, you do not. I have access to your so-called past. I can view your present. To me your past, present and future merge into one.
quotes.translation: 现在。通灵信息时常看似有误。在某些情况下，这是因为某个自我选择了不同的可能事件来物质化呈现。我能触及概率场域，而你们——从自我角度而言——无法触及。我能触及你们所谓的过去。我能审视你们的当下。对我而言，你们的过去、现在与未来融为一体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The personality itself, as you know, is a gestalt of action, and as such it is necessary that the flow of action within it follow the overall directives of the entity and the inner self. When for example the ego is allowed to apply too tightly and too rigorously its inhibitory functions, then this freedom of action within the personality is seriously divided and impeded.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，人格本身是行动的整体形态，正因如此，其内部的行动之流必须遵循存有与内在自我的整体指引。举例而言，当自我被允许过度严苛地施加其抑制功能时，人格内部的这种行动自由便会遭到严重割裂与阻碍。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: A psychological existence presupposes experience, experience in terms of value fulfillment (pause) and the Emotional manipulation and direct knowledge of subjective states. This involves a capacity and ability to throw yourself wholeheartedly into a reality enveloping situation, and yet to be aware of the self who is then so lost or enveloped. (Pause; emphatic delivery.)
quotes.translation: 心理存在预设了经验——以价值完成（停顿）为尺度的经验，以及情感运作与对主观状态的直接认知。这需要一种能力：既能全身心投入某个包裹性现实情境，又能觉察那个在此过程中迷失或被包裹的自我。（停顿；强调语气。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There are several points I would like to make concerning psychological identity. For the sake of analogy only now, imagine your present self at the center of a circle of endless spirals. You are yourself, and yet one of the spirals that form the circle. You are a vortex for the circle. You do not have to contact it nor its other spirals, in that you already belong to it.
quotes.translation: 关于心理身份认同，我有几点想说明。现在仅作比喻：想象你当下的自我位于无尽螺旋圆环的中心。你既是自己，又是构成圆环的螺旋之一。你是圆环的漩涡。你无需接触圆环或其它的螺旋，因为你本就属于它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: No action can be considered by itself. There is no solitary action. Such a possibility is basically meaningless. Nor does a tension exist in isolation. In all of these matters there is also constant pulsations of action within the outer ego, the inner ego, and all the other aspects of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 没有任何行动能独立存在。不存在孤立的行动。这种可能性从根本上毫无意义。紧张状态也无法孤立存在。在所有这一切中，外在自我、内在自我以及整体自我的所有其他面向之间，始终存在着持续的行动脉动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These sessions themselves are a very slight evidence. As you have mentioned, Ruburt's egotistical self is now aware of potentialities and problems that did not exist for it earlier. For the reality did not exist consciously then.
quotes.translation: 这些课程本身就是非常微弱的证据。如你所提，鲁柏的自我现在意识到了先前并不存在的潜能与问题，因为当时那实相在意识层面尚未存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The multiplicity of your own system is but one small example of the infinite realities that exist outside it. The gradations in physical matter forms alone escape your scientists. That matter exists in other forms is scarcely understood. There are gradations in matter as there are gradations in your color, realities that blend one into the other, and probable systems in which various representations, reflections, shadows and echoes, all probable creations of any given self, mature.
quotes.translation: 你们自身系统的多样性，不过是其外存在之无限实相的一个微小例子。仅物理物质形态的层级变化就令你们的科学家难以参透。物质以其他形态存在这一点鲜少被理解。物质中存在层级变化，如同你们颜色中的渐变，实相彼此交融，还有各种可能系统，其中任何特定自我的所有可能造物——各种表征、反射、阴影与回响——皆在其中成熟。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Action basically can never complete itself. Inner vitality, materializing in any form whatsoever, at once multiplies the possibilities of further materialization. At the same time, because inner vitality is self-generating, only a minute fraction of inner vitality is needed to seed a whole universe.
quotes.translation: 行动本质上永远无法完成自身。内在活力以任何形式具体化时，会立即倍增进一步具体化的可能性。同时，由于内在活力是自我生成的，仅需极小部分内在活力便能播种整个宇宙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now: It is true that habitual thoughts of love, optimism and self-acceptance are better for you than their opposites; but again, your beliefs about yourself will automatically attract thoughts that are consistent with your ideas. There is as much natural aggressiveness in love as there is in hate. Hate is a distortion of such a normal force, the result of your beliefs.
quotes.translation: 现在：诚然，惯常的爱的念头、乐观与自我接纳比其对立面更利于你；但再次强调，你对自己的信念会自动吸引与你的观念一致的念头。爱中与恨中同样存在自然的攻击性。恨是这种正常力量的扭曲，是你信念的结果。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The ego, as you now know it. will not always be necessary, you see, but a type of ego is a basis for individuality and will always be necessary. An inner ego, of course, that contains various egos that have been or will be a portion of any given self--these egos and any ego organizes experience along various lines and ties experience together within meaningful pattern.
quotes.translation: 如你现在所知的自我，并非永远必要，你看，但某种类型的自我是个体性的基础，将永远必要。当然，一个内在自我，包含各种曾为或将成为任何特定自我一部分的自我——这些自我及任何自我，会沿着不同路线组织经验，并将经验在意义模式中串联起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is able to use all of its vast information, gained through previous experience, and all of its knowledge, to solve the problem at hand. Literally, the whole inner personality is able to focus upon any given problem, completely free of distractions, using the subconscious language of symbols. This language is crisper in its fashion, and more concise and more inclusive than any written language. For as we have explained, each symbol has various meanings to all layers of the self.
quotes.translation: 它能够运用通过先前经验获得的所有浩瀚信息，以及所有知识，来解决当前问题。从字面意义上说，整个内在人格能够完全不受干扰地聚焦于任何给定问题，运用符号的下意识语言。这种语言以其方式更为清晰、更简洁、更具包容性，超越任何书面语言。因为如我们解释过的，每个符号对自我的各个层面都有不同含义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You form the fabric of your experience through your own beliefs and expectations. These personal ideas about yourself and the nature of reality will affect your thoughts and emotions. You take your beliefs about reality as truth, and often do not question them. They seem self-explanatory. They appear in your mind as statements of fact, far too obvious for examination.
quotes.translation: 你透过自己的信念与期待构筑了经验的织锦。这些关于自我及实相本质的个人观念，会影响你的思想与情感。你将关于实相的信念视为真理，往往不加质疑。它们看似不言自明，以事实陈述的姿态出现在你心中，因过于显而易见而无需检验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The soul fantasy, or spirit fantasy, arose at about this time, and has been a disadvantage to him because it gives a name and a designation to one part of the whole self, setting it up against the other part. It is this basic conception, however, that also forced him to face one truth despite himself--that of continued existence, to which he gave the word immortality.
quotes.translation: 灵魂幻想或灵性幻想大约在这个时期出现，对他而言始终是个不利因素，因为它为整体自性的某一部分命名并赋予标签，使其与另一部分对立。然而，正是这个基本概念迫使他不得不面对一个真相——即持续存在的本质，他将其称为不朽。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This does not mean that you must not manipulate within the physical universe. I am not telling you that you should forget your responsibilities in physical life. I am telling you that the origin and ability and power and identity has its origins deep within the personality, and that these origins have little to do with the waking self of which you are all so familiar.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着你不可在物质宇宙中运作。我并非要你忘记物质生活的责任。我要告诉你的是：起源、能力、力量与身份认同的根源深植于人格之内，而这些根源与你所熟悉的清醒自我几乎毫无关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now, these do not represent more highly evolved selves, necessarily at all. Certain abilities will be more developed in them than in you, but certain of your abilities are more developed than theirs. In other words, I am not now speaking of portions of yourself that exist in your so-called future.
quotes.translation: 这些未必代表更高度进化的自性。它们某些能力确实比你更发达，但你某些能力也比它们更发达。换言之，我现在并非在谈论存在于你所谓未来的自我部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: As I have explained the ego to you, within your system it can only perceive in terms of continuity, in a straight-line fashion so to speak, one event after the other. It can only choose to experience one event out of all the probable events at a time. The ego is however the only portion of the self that is, in the main, limited to follow experience along these lines.
quotes.translation: 正如我曾向你解释的，在你们的系统内，自我只能以连续性的方式感知——可以说是直线式地感知一个接一个的事件。在众多可能事件中，它每次只能选择体验其中一个。然而，自我是自性中唯一主要被局限在这种线性经验模式中的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Jung was correct in postulating a collective unconscious. But with his limited knowledge he did not see that this unconscious would exist outside of your three-dimensional system entirely, holding future as well as past, nor that it has such a cohesive effect upon humanity as a whole. It is the one self with its origins within your system, but its existence outside.
quotes.translation: 荣格提出集体潜意识的假设是正确的。但受限于知识，他未能看到这个潜意识完全存在于你们的三维系统之外，同时涵纳未来与过去，也未能察觉它对人类整体具有如此强大的凝聚效应。它是那个根源在你们系统之内、存在却在系统之外的自性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The personality is busy transforming literally infinite data. Much of this work has already been done by the third month of pregnancy. As quickly as the new data forms the fetus and the physical structure, the self from the previous reincarnation must begin to withdraw its hold. It enters briefly then into this process. It does not become the new individual however.
quotes.translation: 人格正忙于转化近乎无限的数据。这项工作大部分在怀孕第三个月就已完成了。当新数据形成胎儿与肉体结构时，前一世的本体必须开始收回其掌控。它短暂地进入这个过程，但并不会成为这个新个体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Those who have extremely strong hidden self-conscious selves have the need for greater use of individuality, and these people therefore create what could be called another plane in waking hours, through the use of art forms.
quotes.translation: 那些拥有极其强烈隐秘自我意识的人，需要更充分地运用个体性，因此这些人会通过艺术形式，在清醒时刻创造出可称为另一层面的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Instead, as mentioned (in this session), it is also meant to receive and interpret important data that comes to it from the inner self. Left alone, it does this very well. It receives and interprets impressions. What has happened, however, is that man has taught it to accept [only] data coming from the outside world, and to set up barriers against inner knowledge.
quotes.translation: 相反，如（本课）所述，它同样被设计用来接收并诠释来自内在自体的重要数据。若不加干预，它本可完美运作——接收并解读各种印象。然而人类却教导它只接受来自外界的数据，并筑起屏障阻绝内在知识。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: One more point. The ulcer for example has reality upon many levels, and must be dealt with in a like manner, for it is not enough to handle it even from the viewpoint of the present ego; for indeed causes are involved of which the present ego must necessarily be mainly ignorant. The inner self however has at its command all these reasoning's, and all these causes.
quotes.translation: 再补充一点。例如溃疡在多个层面都具有实相，必须用相应方式处理，因为即便从当前自我角度处理也不足够；事实上其中涉及的成因，当前自我必然主要处于无知状态。但内在自体却掌握着所有这些理据与成因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You however do have free will, for while the entity's psychic structure can be compared to the body, it is a part of and inhabits far greater dimensions. All of this may seem to have little to do with your personal reality. Yet your daily experience is as connected with your self or entity (abruptly louder, briefly), as it is with the cells of your physical form.
quotes.translation: 然而你们确实拥有自由意志，因为虽然存有的心灵结构可比拟为身体，但它既是身体的一部分，又栖居于更广大的维度。这一切看似与你的个人实相无关，但你的日常体验与你的本体或存有的关联，正如与肉体细胞的关联一样紧密。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: "Ruburt is dealing with quite profound material involving the self's relationship with its source--this material being worked out in your current situations. The solutions will automatically lead him not only to a solution in practical terms, but toward the areas of development that he has been seeking (emphatically), while being afraid of them at the same time."
quotes.translation: "鲁柏正在处理相当深奥的素材，涉及本体与其源头的关联——这些素材正在你们当前的情境中展开。解决方案将自动引导他不仅获得实际层面的解答，更会走向他一直在寻求（强调地）却又同时畏惧的发展领域。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 7. In Chapter 2 of Dreams, in Volume 1, see Note 1 for Session 885, which we held on October 24, 1979. Through a series of misunderstandings, the people at Ankh-Hermes had published an abridged translation of Seth Speaks without having permission for the cutting from Jane and me. We still feel regret that the company had to go to all of that extra expense in order to publish a second edition of the book. I also wrote that "all concerned must wait for at least another year before a full-length version of Seth Speaks will be published in the Dutch language." Actually, almost two years passed before we received our copies of the new edition.

quotes.text: You cannot deny the normal coming of night by refusing to face it, and closing the outer eyes would only result in those very characteristics of night which the self tried to avoid. Nor would the pleasant characteristics of night be ever known, but night would forever mean terror and chaos, since it would never be given the recognition due it, and never explored.
quotes.translation: 你无法通过拒绝面对夜晚的正常来临而否认它，闭上外在的眼睛只会导致自我试图避免的那些夜晚特征。夜晚的宜人特质也永远不会被知晓，而夜晚将永远意味着恐怖与混乱，因为它从未得到应有的认可，也从未被探索。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As it grows, in your terms, it looks outward for confirmation of this inner knowledge. The inner self upholds the ego with its support. It forms its truths into physically oriented data with which the ego can deal. It then projects these outward into the area of physical reality. Seeing these truths thus materialized, the ego then finds it easier to accept them.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话来说，随着它的成长，它向外寻求这种内在知识的确认。内在自我以其支持来支撑自我。它将自身的真理转化为自我能够处理的、面向物质世界的数据。然后它将这些投射到物质实相的区域中。看到这些真理如此物质化后，自我便更容易接受它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are traces in your present experience of your probable selves, even as there are signs in each individual of all the great talents shown and developed so flamboyantly by a few. These traces can be brought into your experience to enrich it. They do so in any case on unconscious levels, where they form the basis from which you choose your current experience.
quotes.translation: 你们当前的经验中存在着你们可能自我的痕迹，正如每个个体身上都存在着少数人如此绚烂展现和发展的所有伟大天赋的迹象。这些痕迹可以被带入你们的经验中以丰富它。无论如何，它们在无意识层面确实如此运作，构成你们选择当前经验的基础。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Throughout this venture however you are, in the dream state, always kept in touch with the realities from which your physical experience springs. As you understand time, you will eventually be able to merge your inner comprehension with your physical self, and form your world on a conscious basis. Such manuscripts as mine are meant to help you do precisely that.
quotes.translation: 然而在整个冒险过程中，在梦境状态里，你们始终与物质经验所源出的实相保持联系。按照你们对时间的理解，你们最终将能够将内在领悟与物质自我融合，并有意识地构建你们的世界。像我这样的手稿正是为了帮助你们做到这一点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The ego maintains much of its stability by looking backwards, so to speak, into its experience of its past, and finding something of itself there. Now the past may be an illusion, but it is not illusion to the ego. The portions of the self that deal in probabilities do not have such an experience with a past, to give them their feeling of identity or continuity.
quotes.translation: 自我通过回顾——可以这么说——它过去的经验，并在其中找到自身的某些部分，来维持其大部分稳定性。过去可能是一种幻相，但对自我而言并非幻相。处理或然性的自我部分并没有这样的过去经验来赋予它们身份感或连续性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The root assumptions upon which physical reality is formed represent secure ground to the ego. We always operate with the ego's consent. It consents to step aside momentarily. It interprets the inner knowledge gained in its own way, true, but it is immeasurably enriched by so doing. Other layers of the self interpret the same inner experiences quite differently.
quotes.translation: 物质实相所赖以形成的根本假设，对自我而言代表着稳固的基础。我们总是在自我的同意下运作。它同意暂时退居一旁。它以自己的方式诠释所获得的内在知识，确实如此，但通过这样做，它得到了无可估量的丰富。自我的其他层面则以截然不同的方式诠释同样的内在经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In Ruburt's years with Zeh, there was severe splitting of the personality. It is not a new thing with him to push aside the subconscious at all. In all cases when he does, an explosion of one kind occurs. His subconscious intuitive self, you see, is extremely vital, alive, and unusually insistent for expression, even for the subconscious which is known for this.
quotes.translation: 在鲁柏跟随泽赫的那些年里，其人格存在严重分裂。对他而言，将潜意识推到一边绝非新鲜事。每当他这样做时，总会引发某种形式的爆发。要知道，他的潜意识直觉自我极为活跃、充满生机，且异常执着地寻求表达——即便以潜意识的普遍特性而言，这种执着也堪称罕见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: But the self is its own best therapist. It knows precisely how many such "shocks" the psyche can take to advantage, which associations to animate through such intense experience and imagery, and which ones to leave alone.
quotes.translation: 但自我本身就是最佳的治疗师。它精确知晓心灵能承受多少此类"冲击"以获益，知道该通过哪些强烈体验与意象激活哪些关联，又该对哪些关联置之不理。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If you read your selves adjacently, you would build up confidence in the body, and in those cooperative consciousnesses that form it. You would have an intimate awareness of the body's healing processes also. You would not fear death as annihilation, and would feel your own consciousness gently disentangle itself from those others that so graciously couched it.
quotes.translation: 若你能毗邻阅读自己的各个自我，便会建立起对身体的信心，以及对构成身体的那些合作性意识的信心。你还会对身体的自愈过程产生亲密觉知。你将不再视死亡为湮灭，而能感受到自己的意识温柔地从那些如此优雅地包裹着它的其他意识中解脱出来。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The ulcer simply can be cured, but this will involve on the part of the personality a disciplined program of self-understanding. Certainly such a program will be worthwhile. We do not want, for example, the personality to plunge into a solution. Instead what is advisable is a gradual but definite program that will result in a legitimate and a long-lasting cure.
quotes.translation: 溃疡完全可以治愈，但这需要人格方面实施一套自律的自我理解计划。这样的计划当然值得尝试。举例而言，我们不希望人格仓促投入某个解决方案。相反，更可取的是循序渐进但坚定不移的计划，最终达成合法且持久的疗愈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The whole self or identity is aware of the experiences of all the egos, and since one identity forms these egos there is bound to be some similarities between them, and characteristics. The material that I have given you on reincarnation in the past is quite valid, particularly for working purposes, but it is a highly simplified version of what actually occurs.
quotes.translation: 整体自我或本体知晓所有自我（ego）的经验，既然同一个本体形成了这些自我，它们之间必然存在某些相似性与特征。我过去给予你们的轮回转世资料相当有效，尤其适用于实际运作，但这只是对实际发生过程的极度简化版本。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: When massive doses of LSD are used, you are artificially creating a disaster area from which you hope to salvage an efficient working self. It is true that the old interactions between an associative pattern of thought and its habitual action may be broken down, but it is also true that the inner-ordered structure has been shocked psychically and biologically.
quotes.translation: 当使用大剂量LSD时，你是在人为制造一个灾难区，并期望从中打捞出一个高效运作的自我。诚然，联想思维模式与其习惯性行为之间的旧有互动可能被打破，但同样真实的是，内在有序结构已在心灵与生理层面遭受冲击。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now it is here that the seeming division in the self occurs, for in physical life the conscious mind must be connected with the brain, and in terms of time that organ itself must grow and develop. So all of your consciousness cannot be physically aware. The portion that must "wait for" the brain's development is the part you call in life "the conscious mind."
quotes.translation: 现在，正是在这里，自我出现了表面上的分裂，因为在物质生活中，意识心必须与大脑相连，而就时间而言，这个器官本身必须成长和发展。所以，你所有的意识无法在物质层面被完全觉察。必须"等待"大脑发展的那部分，就是你生活中所称的"意识心"。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The inner self is always there. You are always aware of it in the same manner that you are aware of what is happening in a trance. This is another excellent analogy, if you'll forgive me for patting myself on the back.
quotes.translation: 内在自我始终存在。你总是能意识到它，就像你意识到出神状态中发生的事情一样。如果你允许我自夸一下，这又是一个极好的类比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The molecular structure indeed is fairly rigid. The inner self is not so bound to such a formal alignment, and is thus free to travel in ways which the body, because of its formal molecular structure, finds impossible.
quotes.translation: 分子结构确实相当固定。内在自我并不受限于如此刻板的排列，因此能够自由地以身体因其固定的分子结构而无法做到的方式旅行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I do not intend to let Ruburt in on any of my plans or intentions, as far as demonstrations are concerned. It is much better all around if he be kept clear of such knowledge. The last session with your friend went off extremely well, and I hope that he follows my advice. If Ruburt had known what was in my mind, he would have been nervous and self-conscious.
quotes.translation: 就示范而言，我不打算让鲁柏知道我的任何计划或意图。让他对这些知识保持无知，对各方面都好得多。上次与你朋友的那节课进行得非常好，我希望他听从我的建议。如果鲁柏知道我的想法，他会变得紧张和自觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json
