quotes.text: Now this distortion may possibly be a hangover from a previous existence, but it is a distortion. Projections in fact should give you an excellent idea of the reality of reincarnations. In an excellent projection you forget the self on the bed. You are in an entirely new environment, but you are still beset by certain personality tendencies that are yours.
quotes.translation: 现在，这种扭曲可能是前世的残留，但它确实是一种扭曲。事实上，投射应该能让你对转世的实相有极好的理解。在一次极好的投射中，你会忘记床上的自我。你处于一个全新的环境中，但你仍然被某些属于你的人格倾向所困扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: We are not attempting to enlighten the intuitions at the expense of the intellect. We are attempting to work in such a manner that added knowledge from the intuitional inner self is also made known to the intellect.
quotes.translation: 我们并非试图以牺牲智性为代价来启发直觉。我们试图以这样一种方式运作，即来自直觉性内在自我的额外知识也能被智性所知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Reality is not limited. There is no past, present and future. These only appear to those who exist within three-dimensional reality. Since I am no longer within it, I can perceive what you do not see. But there is a part of you that is not imprisoned within three-dimensional reality, and that part of you knows that there is no time, that there is only an eternal now; and that part of you that knows is the whole self, the inner personality that knows all of your lives.
quotes.translation: 实相不受限制。没有过去、现在和未来。这些只对存在于三次元实相中的人显现。既然我不再处于其中，便能感知你们所不见。但你们有一部分并不受困于三次元实相，那部分知道没有时间，只有永恒的当下；那知晓的部分就是全我，那个知晓你所有生命的内在人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (And once again, as she'd done for the session of last December 28, she wanted tonight's material to be presented as part of regular Session 393. I was glad to do it--and note that Jane's class sessions usually are in marked contrast to those we hold for ourselves, for books or whatever in the future. As would be expected of a gathering, class sessions were full of energy and repartee and questions and serious thinking both with and without Seth.

quotes.text: Because time is open-ended, as you think of it, you can also affect what you would think of as past reincarnational selves, and at times react in and to their environment. You would usually do this in the dream state, but this is often accomplished just below the level of waking consciousness, and is blotted out by you as you go about your daily business.
quotes.translation: 因为时间如你所想是开放性的，你也能影响你视为过去转世自我的部分，有时还会在他们的环境中做出反应。你通常在梦境状态这样做，但这往往在清醒意识之下完成，并在你进行日常事务时被抹除。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: Your self-reality in any given moment is like that seed, following probable generations that appear in other dimensions as well as this one. In each now-moment, you draw from the vast bank of unpredictable actions certain ones that are "significant" to you; and your private idea of significance will result in what then seems to be predictable action.
quotes.translation: 现在：你在任何特定时刻的自我实相就像那颗种子，遵循着出现在其他维度及此维度的可能世代。在每个当下时刻，你从不可预测行动的庞大银行中，提取某些对你"有意义"的行动；而你对意义的私人概念，将导致随后看似可预测的行动。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: We can and will give a general list, but it is always better if this list be implemented by personal consultation. You have done much better in the overall in health maintenance than you did in the past; since you are both in excellent organic condition you can say that you have both done well. However there is a large difference between a general state that is free of disease and a state of exuberant health, in which the inner and outer selves are perfectly attuned.
quotes.translation: 我们可以且会给出一般性清单，但若通过个人咨询来落实这份清单总是更好。你们在整体健康维护上比过去做得更好；既然你们两人器官状况极佳，可以说都做得不错。然而，无疾病的一般状态与内在自我和外在自我完美协调的蓬勃健康状态之间，存在巨大差异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The practice of psychological time will allow you to reach these portions of the self. The ego is not artificially disorganized by such practice. It is simply, for the moment, bypassed. The experience gained does become a part of the physical structure, but there is no massive disorganization of perception, since the ego agrees to step aside momentarily.
quotes.translation: 心理时间的练习将使你触及自我的这些部分。自我不会因这种练习而被人为瓦解。它只是暂时被绕过。获得的经验确实成为身体结构的一部分，但知觉不会大规模失序，因为自我同意暂时退让。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is no point in time as you know it, when the self is born. It is constantly in a state of becoming. It expands and develops in terms of value fulfillment, in a way that has nothing to do with space and time.
quotes.translation: 在你所知的时间中，没有任何一个时间点是自我诞生的。它始终处于"成为"的状态。它以价值完成的方式扩展和发展，这种方式与空间和时间毫无关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have often said that all these divisions and separations are arbitrary. All exist one within another. Apparent boundaries are not boundaries, but only differences in the focus of attention. Even this inner ego is not the same from one given moment to another, for it is not a static thing, but is a part of continuing action. It is much more familiar with the subconscious and with the dream universe, and with the inner self, than it is with the outside ego, however.
quotes.translation: 我常说过，所有这些划分与分离都是武断的。一切皆彼此相融。表面的界限并非真正的界限，只是注意力焦点的差异而已。就连这个内在自我也并非一成不变，因为它不是静态之物，而是持续行动的一部分。然而，它比外在自我更熟悉潜意识、梦境宇宙以及内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. Some of Fox's suggestions are excellent. They will allow you to take the waking consciousness along with you. As your abilities develop and as you become more accustomed to the experience, the waking consciousness will recall more and more, and not become frightened. When it becomes frightened you see it forces the whole experience to end. If it were not taken along the same experience might have continued, and greater benefits been achieved for the whole self.
quotes.translation: 现在。福克斯的一些建议非常出色。它们能让你带着清醒意识一同前行。随着你能力的发展，并逐渐适应这种体验，清醒意识将回忆起越来越多的事物，而不会感到恐惧。当它感到恐惧时，你会看到它迫使整个体验终止。如果它没有被带着同行，同样的体验本可以持续下去，并为整个自我带来更大的益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Much of "Unknown" Reality is involved with the breaking up of theories that have been long accepted, but that prevent you from perceiving the powerful nature of those absent portions of the self. As you focus upon certain details from a larger field of physical reality, so then you focus upon only the small portion of yourself that you consider "real."
quotes.translation: "未知"实相的大部分内容涉及打破那些长期被接受的理论——这些理论阻碍你感知自我那些缺失部分的强大本质。正如你从更大的物质实相场域中聚焦某些细节，你也只聚焦于自己认为"真实"的那一小部分自我。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 731
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Messages from the inner self if strong enough will pass through the conscious barriers, and the conscious ego is only too happy to receive them. But such intuitions have usually first appeared in dream form, appearing to the ego later; and many such messages appear in dreams ahead of time, to be released to the conscious mind when situations demand it.
quotes.translation: 来自内在自我的讯息若足够强烈，便会穿透意识屏障，而意识自我也乐见其成。但这些直觉通常首先以梦境形式出现，随后才呈现给自我；许多此类讯息会提前在梦中显现，待情境需要时再释放给意识心智。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The emotional energy I use as when I show good spirits, are the same energies that propel themselves outward through the voice. This is somewhat more complicated than it may appear. There is a similarity here between the extension of my self outward through Ruburt, and the extension necessary for example in an individual's projection of a pseudo image.
quotes.translation: 我展现良好精神状态时所使用的情感能量，正是那些通过声音向外推进的相同能量。这比表面看起来要复杂得多。此处存在一种相似性：我通过鲁柏向外延伸自我，与个体投射伪影像所需的延伸过程类似。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I see this composite image myself. It is not registered by Ruburt's eyes (pause), which do not have the multidimensional depth perception necessary. I see the composite image clearly, whether or not I am looking through Ruburt's eyes. I use his eyes because they narrow down the focus for me, to the one "present" self of which the individual is aware.
quotes.translation: 我亲眼看到了这个复合影像。它并非通过鲁柏的眼睛记录（停顿），因为他的眼睛缺乏必要的多维深度感知能力。无论我是否透过鲁柏的眼睛观看，都能清晰地看到这个复合影像。我使用他的眼睛，是因为它们能为我缩小焦点，聚焦于个体所觉察的那个"当下"自我。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It was at this point that the nature of the conscious mind itself became so misunderstood, and those unrecognized or denied powers were assigned to unconscious portions of the self by ensuing schools of psychology. (With emphasis:) Very natural functions of the conscious mind, therefore, were assigned to the "underground" and cut off from normal use.
quotes.translation: 正是在这一点上，意识心智本身的本质变得如此被误解，那些未被认知或否认的能力被后续的心理学派归因于自我的无意识部分。（强调：）因此，意识心智非常自然的功能被归入"地下"，与正常使用隔绝。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now. You are already the self who will paint that portrait. The insights that will lead to it already exist. You could refuse, but the lines of probability so far are against this. The book you are reading puts things simply enough to be immediately practical. You will discover a rather powerful impact upon your lives, both of you, as a result of it.
quotes.translation: 现在。你已经是那个将绘制那幅肖像的自我。将引导你达成它的洞见已经存在。你可以拒绝，但到目前为止的概率线对此不利。你正在阅读的这本书将事物表述得足够简单，以便立即付诸实践。你们两人都会发现，它将对你们的生活产生相当有力的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (Rewritten November/2000: The vision grew out of Seth's saying in the deleted 382nd session, on November 27/67, that I'd do well known painting of Bill Gallagher. It will be based upon the conception of my painting of 1954 that I "sold to Sonja. ''see session 584 in Seth Speaks, held on May 3/71.)

quotes.text: The other portions can be called the inner self. Now all of this inner self cannot become expressed even with its connection with the brain, since the brain must sift perception through the physical apparatus.
quotes.translation: 其他部分可以称为内在自我。现在，所有这些内在自我即使与大脑相连也无法完全表达，因为大脑必须通过物理装置筛选感知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now I come from a long way to speak. You do not have to come a like distance to listen. When through Ruburt's open eyes I observe you, I observe more than the person that you realize that you are, for it is difficult for me to pinpoint you in your time. In your terms therefore, I see both your present and future selves, though probabilities operate.
quotes.translation: 现在，我从遥远的地方前来讲话。你无需走同样远的距离来聆听。当通过鲁柏睁开的眼睛观察你时，我观察到的远比你意识到的你自己更多，因为我很难将你定位在你的时间里。因此，用你们的说法，我既看到你现在的自我，也看到你未来的自我，尽管概率在运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: All experience as I have told you is basically simultaneous, and the dreaming self is simply aware of its experiences in their entirety.
quotes.translation: 正如我告诉过你的，所有经验基本上是同时发生的，而做梦的自我只是完整地觉知到它的经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The ego is your idea of your physical image in relation to the world. Your self image is not unconscious, then. You are quite aware of it, though often you reject certain thoughts about it in favor of others. False beliefs can result in a rigid ego that insists upon using the conscious mind in one direction only, further distorting its perceptions.
quotes.translation: 自我是你对自己与世界相关的物质形象的概念。因此，你的自我形象并非无意识的。你相当清楚它，尽管你常常拒绝关于它的某些想法而偏好其他想法。错误的信念可能导致僵化的自我，坚持只在一个方向上使用意识心智，进一步扭曲其感知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This self-awareness in each atom and molecule determines what sort of cell or combination that the particular atom or molecule will form. The cells then, being a gestalt, contain the individual conscious components, which then form a consciousness greater than the consciousness of any individual component within, and different in scope and ability.
quotes.translation: 每个原子和分子中的这种自我意识决定了该特定原子或分子将形成何种细胞或组合。细胞作为一个完形，包含了个体有意识的组成部分，这些组成部分随后形成一种意识，这种意识大于其中任何个体组成部分的意识，且在范围和能力上有所不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now we shall put this plainly, for his ego has indeed distrusted his intuitional self, and has been jealous of it. There has been a spiritual expansion occurring however that is responsible for these recent gains, and the late difficulty in sleeping has been the result of a flare up, a last struggle, on the part of the ego; a rather weak offensive.
quotes.translation: 现在我们要直截了当地说明，因为他的自我确实不信任他的直觉性自体，并且对此心怀嫉妒。然而，最近发生了一次灵性上的扩展，正是这些近期收获的原因，而近期入睡困难则是自我方面一次爆发、最后一次挣扎的结果；这是一次相当软弱的攻势。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In physical life there is a lag between the conception of an idea and its physical construction. In dream reality, this is not so. Therefore, the best way to become acquainted with after-death reality ahead of time, so to speak, is to explore and understand the nature of your own dreaming self. Not very many people want to take the time or energy.
quotes.translation: 在物质生命中，一个想法的构思与其物质构建之间存在时间差。在梦境实相中则并非如此。因此，可以这么说，提前熟悉死后实相的最佳方式，就是探索并理解你自己做梦自体的本质。并没有太多人愿意花费时间或精力去做这件事。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is why there appears to be two such diverse tendencies that show themselves. The personality is indeed divided. The ego fights the inner self, which means of course that the self fights against itself.
quotes.translation: 这就是为什么会出现两种看似截然不同的倾向。人格确实分裂了。自我对抗内在自体，这当然意味着自体在对抗自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Apexes are therefore formed within each self. These apexes serve as attractions, now opened, through which the magnified potency of the entity can flow. This may appear as erratic energy, however, an analogy being sunspots. Psychologically, great ferment occurs, and often the individual personalities involved organize themselves along new lines.
quotes.translation: 因此，每个自体内部都形成了顶点。这些顶点作为吸引力，现在被打开，让实体被放大的潜能得以流动。这可能会表现为不稳定的能量，打个比方，就像太阳黑子。在心理上，会发生巨大的发酵，通常所涉及的个体人格会沿着新的路线重新组织自己。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Many of you believe that it is safe to make a nuclear bomb, but that it is insane to use your dreams as another method of manipulating daily life; or that it is all right to be consciously aware of your viruses, wars, and disasters, but that it is not all right to be consciously aware of other portions of the self that could solve such problems.
quotes.translation: 你们许多人相信制造核弹是安全的，但认为利用梦境作为操纵日常生活的另一种方法则是疯狂的；或者认为有意识地觉察你们的病毒、战争和灾难是可以的，但有意识地觉察自体能够解决这些问题的其他部分则是不可以的。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Our entity is composed of multitudinous selves with their own identities, many of whom have worked in this behalf. Their material and messages will always be basically the same, though the circumstances and times and places of their communications may be colored accordingly.
quotes.translation: 我们的存有由众多拥有各自身份的自己组成，其中许多自己曾为此事效力。他们的素材与讯息本质上始终如一，尽管沟通时的环境、时间与地点可能有所着色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: These measures, incidentally, will refresh you both and are always excellent provisions against rigidity in any form. They are actually exercises in the spontaneous release of the intuitive portion of the self. I would suggest for awhile that he refrain from wearing black sweaters in general, except that I fear his wardrobe is already depleted.
quotes.translation: 顺便一提，这些措施能让你们俩都焕然一新，始终是抵御任何形式僵化的绝佳预防措施。它们实际上是让自我直觉部分自发释放的练习。我建议他暂时别穿黑色毛衣，除非我担心他的衣柜已经空空如也。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is nothing wrong with the idea of an investigation. Ruburt simply should not be involved in it. It is not his place. It is not his area, and because of his conscientiousness, and hardheadedness. He would be much harder on these women than is necessary. But the thought of him baiting an elderly 72 year-old self-deluded woman is too much.
quotes.translation: 调查的想法本身并无不妥。但鲁柏不应参与其中。这不是他的职责所在，不是他的领域，且因他过于认真固执，他对这些女性的苛责会远超必要。但想到他要诱捕一位72岁自欺欺人的老妇，实在令人难以接受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You have many more than five dreams a night, however. I believe Ruburt's top number of recalled dreams for one night was thirteen. Now there is something else here that must be considered. The very self-suggestions that will enable you to recall your dreams may also change their nature, to some extent, for any action changes any other action.
quotes.translation: 然而你们每晚所做的梦远不止五个。我相信鲁柏一晚回忆梦境的上限是十三个。这里还需考虑一点：那些助你回忆梦境的自我暗示，在某种程度上也可能改变梦境本质——因为任何行动都会改变其他行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: ... Your inner selves will digest what I have said and what I will say... (and this is more important than) 10 pages of notes and dates that you cannot check, since the lives were so long ago. There were however some records... not papers... that exist along the way, and sometime if it will ease your mind we will endeavor to give them to you.
quotes.translation: ……你们的内在自我会消化我已说和将说的一切……（这比）十页无法核实的笔记与日期更重要，毕竟那些生命年代久远。不过沿途确实存在某些记录……并非纸质文件……若能让你们安心，我们会在适当时机尽力提供。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The training is necessary. The results at any given stage may not appear very hopeful, and in your terms there is indeed what seems to be a cumulative effect. There is a system of checks and balances that do operate. These exist within the inner selves. The system of checks and balances will operate up to a point, and maintain some stability.
quotes.translation: 训练是必要的。任何特定阶段的结果可能看似希望渺茫，按你们的说法，确实存在所谓的累积效应。确实存在一套制衡系统在运作。这些系统存在于内在自我之中。制衡系统会在一定限度内运作，维持某种稳定性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Psychological time so-called belongs to the inner self, that is to the mind. It is however a connective, a portion of one of the inner senses, which we will call for convenience the second inner sense.
quotes.translation: 所谓心理时间属于内在自体，即属于心智。然而它是一种连接物，是内在感官的一部分，为方便起见我们称之为第二内在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: If you do not understand that in periods of sleep your consciousness actually does leave your body, then what I have said will be meaningless. Now your consciousness does return at times, to check upon the physical mechanisms, and the simple consciousness of atom and cell -- the body consciousness -- is always with the body, so it is not vacant. But the largely creative portions of the self do leave the body, and for large periods of time when you sleep.
quotes.translation: 若你不明白在睡眠期间你的意识确实离开了身体，那么我所说的一切将毫无意义。现在你的意识确实会不时返回，检查身体机制，而原子与细胞的简单意识——身体意识——始终与身体同在，因此身体并非空置。但自体那些主要具有创造性的部分确实会离开身体，并且在你睡眠时离开很长一段时间。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is the case, but not the case. The choices are small to your way, but choice is not impossible. Actually there is choice, but the manipulation of camouflage is not developed along your lines. This does not mean that there is no consciousness in such species, nor does it mean there is no self-consciousness. There is, to a limited degree.
quotes.translation: 情况如此，却又并非如此。以你们的方式来看选择很小，但选择并非不可能。实际上确实存在选择，只是对假相的操控并未沿着你们的路线发展。这并不意味着这类物种中没有意识，也不意味着没有自我意识。只是程度有限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Study and practice with psychological time will show you the validity and strength of that inner self, so that you will clearly see that it is not completely bound to the so-called objective universe by any means. Matter is not an imprisoning form. It is a means by which consciousness expresses itself within the limits of the physical field.
quotes.translation: 对心理时间的研究与实践将向你展示内在自体的真实性与力量，使你清楚看到它绝不完全受限于所谓的客观宇宙。物质并非禁锢的形式。它是意识在物质场域限制内表达自身的一种方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I mentioned the chemical relationship between your universe and the dream universe. There are like relationships of one kind or another that tie together all fields and systems, from the largest to the most minute. The freedom of the inner self, then, is never determined by time as you know it. It is determined by time as you do not know it.
quotes.translation: 我提到过你们宇宙与梦境宇宙之间的化学关系。各种场域与系统之间，从最宏大到最细微处，都存在着类似的关系将它们联结在一起。因此内在自体的自由，永远不受你所知的时间所决定。它由你所不知的时间所决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The proper purpose should be the development of the self, and the development of abilities, and it is to elude this responsibility that the chase was originated. The excitement of the chase is being substituted for the excitement that is required and demanded by the questioner, and rightly so because of the questioner's psychological makeup.
quotes.translation: 正确的目标应是自体的发展，以及能力的发展，而追逐正是为了逃避这份责任才被创造出来的。追逐的兴奋被用来替代提问者所需求且理应获得的兴奋——这恰因其心理构成使然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I often speak of you and the psyche as if they were separate, yet of course this is not the case. You are that portion of the psyche that you presently recognize. Many people say: "I want to know myself," or "I want to find myself," when the truth is that few really want to take the time or effort. (Pause.) There is one place to begin, however: Try becoming better acquainted with the self you are now. Stop telling yourself that you do not know yourself.
quotes.translation: 我常将你与心灵分开谈论，仿佛它们是分离的，但事实当然并非如此。你是你目前所认知的那部分心灵。许多人说："我想了解自己"，或"我想找到自己"，但真相是很少有人真正愿意花时间或付出努力。（停顿）不过，有一个起点：试着更深入地认识你现在的自己。别再告诉自己你不了解自己。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "I know how to quicken the impetus of the psyche, to give it a gentle nudge in the proper direction, to insert a hint of reassurance, and with this session that is my intent. The sinful self's material serves as a small psychic source at the moment: That is, he still reacts to it, and the same material may appear from different viewpoints."
quotes.translation: "我知道如何加速心灵的驱动力，在正确的方向上给它一个温和的推动，插入一丝安心的暗示，这就是我这节课的意图。有罪自我的素材此刻正作为一个微小的心灵来源：也就是说，他仍在对此做出反应，同样的素材可能从不同的视角显现。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 7. In Chapter 2 of Dreams, in Volume 1, see Note 1 for Session 885, which we held on October 24, 1979. Through a series of misunderstandings, the people at Ankh-Hermes had published an abridged translation of Seth Speaks without having permission for the cutting from Jane and me. We still feel regret that the company had to go to all of that extra expense in order to publish a second edition of the book. I also wrote that "all concerned must wait for at least another year before a full-length version of Seth Speaks will be published in the Dutch language." Actually, almost two years passed before we received our copies of the new edition.

quotes.text: This is in itself an expression of the dualism of which I have spoken. Evolution does not of course apply only to the human species, and as I have said consciousness on your plane exists in all things. When your friend asked his question he was, I believe, referring to the point at which self-consciousness entered into so-called inert form.
quotes.translation: 这本身就是我所说的二元论的一种表现。进化当然不仅适用于人类物种，正如我所说，你们层面上的意识存在于万物之中。当你的朋友提出问题时，我相信他指的是自我意识进入所谓惰性形态的那个点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Some of the basic shapes in your physical universe are, therefore, reflections of these inner psychological structures, more or less reproduced in matter. These are in one sense certainly tangible to the inner self. It is these inner psychological structure patterns to a large degree that determine the shape and form of physical structures.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们物质宇宙中的一些基本形状，是这些内在心理结构的反映，或多或少地在物质中再现。从某种意义上说，这些对内在自我而言无疑是可触知的。正是这些内在心理结构模式在很大程度上决定了物质结构的形状与形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Within their happening there may be a distorted -- to it -- grotesque duration in which action may be seemingly impossible. No separation between self and experience may be allowed. Even an exalted experience can be an assault upon consciousness if it is forced. The price paid is much too high as far as the entire personality is concerned.
quotes.translation: 在其发生过程中，可能存在一种扭曲的——对它而言——怪诞的持续状态，其中行动似乎不可能。自我与体验之间可能不允许有任何分离。即使是崇高的体验，如果是被迫的，也可能成为对意识的攻击。就整个个性而言，付出的代价实在太高了。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The child's ego is not the adult's ego. As a rule you perceive the similarity, and overlook the differences of psychological patterns of this sort. The ego is not the most powerful or the most knowledgeable portion of the self. It is simply a well-specialized portion of the personality, well equipped to operate under certain circumstances.
quotes.translation: 孩子的自我并非成人的自我。通常你们会看到相似之处，而忽略这类心理模式的差异。自我并非自我中最强大或最博学的部分。它只是个性中一个高度专门化的部分，装备精良，能在特定情况下运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Another man in an airplane above sees the whole landscape, and through radio communicates to those below about those conditions which they cannot perceive. The man in the airplane, then, can be compared to the inner self, sending messages to other areas of the subconscious, whose energies and focus are necessarily used in limited fashion.
quotes.translation: 另一人在飞机上俯瞰整个景观，通过无线电向下方无法感知那些状况的人传递信息。那么，飞机上的人可以比作内在自己，向潜意识的其他区域发送讯息，而潜意识的能量和焦点必然以有限的方式运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is a constant give and take between psychic and chemical components which actually cause your daily weather, your weather cycles, seasons, droughts and storms. This physical weather then in its turn affects and changes the psychic atmosphere of each individual. The force that causes your weather can be thought of as self-generating.
quotes.translation: 心灵与化学成分之间持续进行着给予与接收，实际上造成了你们每日的天气、天气周期、季节、干旱与风暴。这种物质天气随后反过来影响并改变每个个体的心灵氛围。造成你们天气的力量可以被视为自我生成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is only because your present existence is so highly focused in one narrow area that you put such stern limits upon your definitions and the self, and then project these upon your concepts of the soul. You worry for your physical identity and limit the extent of your perceptions for fear you cannot handle more and retain your selfhood.
quotes.translation: 仅仅因为你们当前的存在如此高度聚焦于一个狭窄的领域，你们才对定义和自己施加如此严格的限制，然后将这些限制投射到你们对灵魂的概念上。你们担心自己的物质身份，限制感知的范围，生怕无法处理更多而失去自我性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Within your biological experience, however, plant, mineral, animal, and human consciousness intersect. They encounter each other. In the language of the self that you speak, these encounters are like the implied pauses in your verbal language. These other kinds of consciousness then form inner rhythms upon which you superimpose your own.
quotes.translation: 然而，在你们的生物经验中，植物、矿物、动物和人类的意识相互交织。它们彼此相遇。在你们所说的自己的语言中，这些相遇就像你们口头语言中的隐含停顿。这些其他种类的意识于是形成内在节奏，你们将自己的意识叠加其上。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Some of the material may be difficult initially for Ruburt to express, but it is well worth the effort and the momentary outbursts. Such experiences should be followed, however, by reassurances, both on your part, and by self-reminders on Ruburt's part that his being and experience are indeed couched and held securely in safety and love.
quotes.translation: 有些资料最初对鲁柏来说可能难以表达，但这份努力和暂时的爆发非常值得。然而，这类经历之后，你们双方都应给予安慰，鲁柏也应自我提醒：他的存在与经验确实被安全与爱所包裹和稳固地承载。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (I talked about the first session for Jane's symptoms -- the private portion of Session 208, for November 15, 1965 -- yet she said that for her the whole thing really started the day before we went to a party in June 1966 regarding How to Develop Your ESP Power. Our friends wanted to celebrate the publication of her first "psychic" book, her first mention of Seth, but she read poetry at the party and wouldn't talk about the ESP book -- too embarrassed. A strange, protective way to behave.

quotes.text: It is very close to the entity. Largely due to its abilities are the creative processes used, but hardly understood by the ego. In many cases this supraselfis already, so to speak, moving into completely new systems. It is, of course, aware of your reincarnations on the individual's part, but these are not present nor future to the self.
quotes.translation: 它非常接近存有。很大程度上，正是由于它的能力，创造过程才得以运用，但自我几乎无法理解。在许多情况下，可以说这个超我早已进入全新的系统。当然，它知晓个体层面的转世，但这些对自我而言既非现在也非未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Fanaticism abounds, of course, because the human tendencies and experiences that have been denied by the mainline society erupt with explosive force, where the tendencies themselves must be accepted as characteristics of human experience. Iran is an example for the world, in explosive capsule form, complete with historical background and a modern political one. Modern psychology does not have a concept of the self to begin to explain such realities.
quotes.translation: 狂热主义当然比比皆是，因为被主流社会否定的人类倾向与经验以爆炸性的力量喷发，而这些倾向本身必须被接受为人类经验的特性。伊朗就是世界的缩影，以爆炸性的胶囊形态呈现，兼具历史背景与现代政治背景。现代心理学根本没有一个足以解释这类现实的自我的概念。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: Hypnosis is at best a poor tool. A light trance state, self induced, can yield excellent results in a subject who is trained along these lines. Later we will go into other experiments. As I have said, so-called space travel will be mainly divorced from vehicles, and the use of psychological time is the very first step in this direction.
quotes.translation: 催眠充其量只是拙劣的工具。自我诱导的轻度出神状态，在受过此类训练的主体身上能产生极佳效果。稍后我们将探讨其他实验。如我所言，所谓的太空旅行将主要脱离载具，而心理时间的使用正是朝此方向迈出的第一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Obviously then so-called astral projection occurs frequently in the sleeping state. It also occurs however in the waking state, although the ego is not aware of such projection as a rule. When through training there is greater communication between the inner and outer selves, then it is possible for the ego to realize what has happened.
quotes.translation: 显然，所谓的星光体投射在睡眠状态中频繁发生。然而它也会在清醒状态下发生，尽管自我通常意识不到这种投射。当通过训练使内在自我与外在自我之间建立更充分的沟通时，自我才有可能意识到所发生之事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. These various portions of the self of which I speak are just that--portions of the whole self that simply operate in different dimensions of reality, and within different fields of activity.
quotes.translation: 现在。我所说的自我的这些不同部分，正是整体自我中单纯在不同实相维度、不同活动场域运作的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As your daily endeavors have meaning and purpose, so do your dream adventures, and in these also you attain various goals of your own. These you will continue in the after-death experience. The vitality, force, life, and creativity behind your physical existence is generated in this other dimension. In other words, you are in many ways a fleshy projection of your dreaming self.
quotes.translation: 正如你日常的努力具有意义与目的，你的梦境冒险也是如此，在这些冒险中你也达成自己的各种目标。这些将在死后经验中延续。你物质存在背后的生命力、力量、活力与创造力，正是在这个其他维度中生成的。换言之，你在许多方面都是你做梦自我的肉身投射。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Which you? Which world? These questions are to be answered in the "now," as you understand it, through the realization that your power of action is in the present and not in the past. Your only effective point of changing any aspect of your world lies in that miraculous instant connection of spirit and self through neurological impact.
quotes.translation: 哪个你？哪个世界？这些问题必须在"当下"——如你所理解的当下——通过领悟到你的行动力量存在于现在而非过去来回答。你改变世界任何面向的唯一有效点，就在于那通过神经冲击而实现的精神与自我的神奇瞬间连接。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There is no need to divorce the waking and dreaming states in the particular fashion that currently operates -- for they are complementary states, not opposite ones. A good deal of life's normal dimensions are dependent upon your dream experience. Your entire familiarity with the world of symbols arises directly from the dreaming self.
quotes.translation: 无需以当前运作的特殊方式将清醒状态与梦境状态割裂开来——因为它们是互补状态，而非对立状态。生命常态的诸多维度都依赖于你的梦境体验。你对符号世界的全部熟悉感，都直接源自做梦的自身。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You were quite correct, Joseph, in cautioning Ruburt against the poetry session the other evening. He knew this but was obstinate. It is not only a case of being obstinate, however. I have told you that it is extremely limiting to regard the ego as the complete self or personality, or to think that the ego makes up the entire identity.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你前晚劝阻鲁柏参加诗歌聚会是完全正确的。他明知不妥却执意为之。但这不仅是固执的问题。我曾告诉过你们，将自我视为完整的自体或人格，或认为自我构成全部身份认同，是极具局限性的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In order that you understand it is necessary, as I have told you, for me to break down concepts. In this way much of the unity of certain phenomena may escape you. We have spoken at various times about specific portions of action's manifestations. We have discussed to some degree, for example, the nature of matter, the electrical universe, the dream universe, and such other topics as the layers of the subconscious and the nature of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 正如我告诉过你们的，为了便于理解，我必须分解概念。这样一来，某些现象的整体性可能会被你们忽略。我们曾多次讨论行动具体显现的特定部分。例如，我们已在一定程度上探讨过物质本质、电性宇宙、梦境宇宙，以及潜意识层次与整体自性本质等主题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When others are present there is simply more energy available. Yet again, such use of energy does not imply a depletion. I am not stealing energy from others. In actuality Ruburt uses the energy, for it is in a form which is more accessible to him than to me. There is a pooling of energy in such cases, and in such a pooling of energy telepathic communications are facilitated; for the many selves present, in pooling their energy, extend themselves.
quotes.translation: 当他人在场时，只是有更多能量可供使用。但再次强调，这种能量运用并不意味着消耗。我并非在窃取他人的能量。实际上，鲁柏在使用这些能量，因为这种形态对他而言比对我更易获取。在此类情况下会产生能量汇聚，而能量汇聚能促进心电感应沟通；因为众多在场的自身通过汇聚能量，扩展了自身的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is obviously somewhat simplified, in that the ego constantly changes, and the above examples must be read carefully or their meaning could be misinterpreted. Actions may appear to be separate, but they are all part of other actions, this being of course the basis for all organization, including that of the ego and the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这显然有些简化，因为自我不断变化，上述例子需仔细解读，否则其含义可能被误解。行动看似分离，实则都是其他行动的一部分——这当然是一切组织的基础，包括自我与内在自性的组织。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner ego however is to some degree still familiar with their activities. Solutions found by these dream personalities are automatically picked up by the inner ego, and transmitted to the various levels of the self. The dream world changes as the personality changes, so that it is always a part of the mobile personality framework.
quotes.translation: 然而内在自我在一定程度上仍熟悉它们的活动。这些梦境人格找到的解决方案会自动被内在自我拾取，并传输到自身的各个层面。梦境世界会随人格变化而变化，因此它始终是动态人格框架的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is all right, and the effect will be minimized when the newness has worn off. Again, if preferable we want to record the dreams in the sequence in which they occur, so that the self-suggestion should always include "I will recall the first three dreams," or the first five dreams or whatever number you arbitrarily chose to begin.
quotes.translation: 这没问题，当新鲜感消退后，影响就会降到最低。同样，如果可能的话，我们希望按梦境发生的顺序记录，因此自我暗示应始终包含“我会记住前三个梦”，或前五个梦，或你任意选择的起始数量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This does not mean that the word indeed would have no meaning. Psychological frameworks and psychic gestalts form the basis for individual reality regardless of system. All of these do imply a whole, but the very term whole would again be meaningless if the whole, through self conscious individual parts, were not conscious of itself.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着“整体”这个词毫无意义。心理框架和心灵完形构成了个体实相的基础，无论系统如何。所有这些都暗示着一个整体，但“整体”这个术语本身也会失去意义，如果整体通过有自我意识的个体部分，无法意识到自身的话。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Elements, chemicals, cells, atoms and molecules -- these partially compose your living sculpture, but you are the one who directs their activity through your conscious beliefs, which then initiate all of those great creative powers that give your body its life, and insure its constant reflection of the self that you believe you are.
quotes.translation: 元素、化学物质、细胞、原子和分子——这些部分构成了你活生生的雕塑，但你是那个通过自己有意识的信念指导它们活动的人，这些信念随后启动所有那些伟大的创造力，赋予你的身体生命，并确保它不断反映你所相信的那个自我。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Falling dreams also belong to the root dream category. They also represent direct experience, as the inner self once more reenters the physical body. No up or down really exists, you see, but the root assumptions take these directions for granted, and the fear of falling is a learned response. It is learned early, but it is learned.
quotes.translation: 坠落梦也属于根源梦的类别。它们也代表直接体验，因为内在自我再次重新进入物质身体。实际上并不存在上下之分，但根源假设将这些方向视为理所当然，而对坠落的恐惧是一种习得的反应。它很早就被习得，但确实是习得的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I use the word event here to include either object or happening. There is a field that combines both perceiver and perceived event, a communication and a system of similarities set up between them. Obviously this holds true in each case of perception. It is for this reason that the perceptor and the event change each other. The field reaches out from you, say, as a self, to all the things that you perceive --and physical time does not enter in.
quotes.translation: 我在这里用“事件”一词来包括物体或发生的事。存在一个结合了感知者和被感知事件的场域，是它们之间建立的一种沟通和相似性系统。显然，这在每个感知案例中都成立。正因如此，感知者和事件相互改变。这个场域从你，作为一个自我，延伸到你所感知的一切——而物质时间并不介入其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The psychedelic experience under these circumstances transforms the ego also in beneficial ways. Otherwise the ego is left behind, unable to perform, as a rule now, its primary functions. The ego can organize the old data when it undergoes a psychedelic experience as a part of the whole self. Then it can also organize the new data.
quotes.translation: 在这些情况下，迷幻体验也会以有益的方式转化自我。否则，自我会被抛在后面，通常无法执行其主要功能。当自我作为整体自我的一部分经历迷幻体验时，它可以组织旧的数据。然后它也可以组织新的数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is not that the inner self is not aware of all of this, but that it has already chosen a framework, or a given frame of existence, that emphasizes certain kinds of experience over others.
quotes.translation: 并非内在自己不知晓这一切，而是它早已选择了一个框架，或特定的存在架构，强调某些经验类型胜过其他。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (First, after holding session 805 we took a six-week break from sessions of any kind. We didn't plan to do this; it just developed, and we eventually realized that it did so through Jane's simple need for a change in routine. We had plenty of other things to do: I was still occupied daily with writing notes and appendixes for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality; on June 4 Jane received the page proofs for Cézanne, and began correcting them for the printer; on the 14th of the month "our" contractor began converting half of our garage into a writing room for Jane, and adding a large back porch [see the end of Note 2 for Session 801]. All of that building activity was much noisier and more disruptive than the work had been for the front porch, and forced some changes in our schedules, including more night work, as we manipulated around those distractions.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: These probable realities exist within what may be generally termed your own sphere of activity, your own plane. There are many other realities that are far divorced from your own however. Every thought, as I have told you, is an action and must seek to fulfill itself. It is a fragment, therefore. You are literally surrounded by other realities that you do not perceive consciously. Some of these are perceived by the inner self, but all are not.
quotes.translation: 这些可能的实相存在于可泛称为你自身活动范围、自身层面的领域内。然而还有许多其他实相与你的实相截然不同。如我曾告诉你的，每个念头都是行动，必须寻求自我实现。因此每个念头都是个片段。你确实被其他你未意识感知的实相所环绕。其中有些被内在自己感知，但并非全部。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Under the circumstances, to look within would have seemed foolhardy, for they had been taught that this within contained the source of their problems to begin with. Those who could not afford therapy tried the harder to inhibit any messages from the inner self, for fear they would become swallowed by the savage infantile emotions.
quotes.translation: 在此情况下，向内看似乎显得鲁莽，因为他们被教导这个"内在"正是他们问题的根源。那些负担不起治疗费用的人更努力压抑来自内在自己的任何讯息，唯恐被野蛮的婴儿期情绪吞噬。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You no longer perceive the past, therefore you think that it has vanished, and the self that you were has gone. But that particular moment, any particular moment, that you think of as the past, existed before your egotistical perception of it, and is constantly being changed by you, even when you no longer consciously perceive it.
quotes.translation: 你不再感知过去，因此你认为它已消失，你曾是的自己也已逝去。但那个特定时刻——任何你视为过去的特定时刻——在你以自我意识感知它之前就已存在，且即使你不再有意识地感知它，它仍不断被你改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: （Mark is Bill Macdonnel's entity name. See Session 68 in Volume 2.）

quotes.text: The window of each day can be opened or closed, but it is framed by your current psychological experience. Even when it is shut light shines through it, illuminating your daily life. In miniature form each day contains, in its own way, clues to all of your own simultaneous existences. The present self does not exist in isolation.
quotes.translation: 每日之窗可开可关，但它的框架由你当前的心理经验构成。即使窗扉紧闭，光线仍会透入，照亮你的日常生活。每一天都以自身方式，以缩影形式包含着你所有同时性存在的线索。当下自己并非孤立存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (12:02.) In regular sessions, as now, he and I again both make adjustments, and so in sessions I am what I call a bridge personality, composed of a composite self -- Ruburt and I meeting and merging to form a personality that is not truly either of us, but a new one that exists between dimensions. Beyond that is my real identity.
quotes.translation: (12:02) 在常规课中，如现在这样，他和我都再次做出调整，因此在课中我是我所谓的桥梁人格，由复合自己组成——鲁柏和我相遇并融合，形成并非真正属于我们任何一方的崭新人格，存在于维度之间。在那之外才是我的真实身份。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The self will truly utilize the atoms and molecules; the consciousness will travel by this method. The particular physical body will then be known for what it is: a cooperative psychic gestalt, a psychio-physical structure formed together by the inner ego, utilizing atoms and molecules that are in themselves living and conscious.
quotes.translation: 自我将真正利用原子与分子；意识将以此方式旅行。届时，特定的物质身体将被认清其本质：一个合作性的心灵完形，一个由内在自我利用自身具有生命与意识的原子与分子共同形成的心理-物理结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The physical organism is not aware of it. The subconscious does receive the information however, in some of these cases. In other cases the experience is simply not recorded in any way within the physical organism, but it is recorded to deeper layers of the self that are divorced to a large degree from any physical manipulations.
quotes.translation: 物质有机体对此并不知晓。然而，在某些案例中，潜意识确实接收到了这些信息。在其他案例中，这类体验根本未以任何方式记录在物质有机体内，而是记录在自我更深层的部分——那些在很大程度上脱离任何物质运作的层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You cannot for that matter perceive yourselves directly, but only through the sense apparatus which has been adopted by the self. You perceive directly psychological experiences, but you do not perceive these in their undiluted form. You protect yourselves and automatically sift out what is too vivid or intense at any given time.
quotes.translation: 就此而言，你们无法直接感知自身，只能通过自我所采用的感官装置来感知。你们直接感知心理体验，但并非以其未经稀释的形式感知。你们保护自己，并自动筛除任何时刻过于鲜明或强烈的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I am aware of a different kind of experience, not linear, and can focus upon and react to an infinite variety of simultaneous events. Ruburt could not express them, and so they must be leveled out into linear expression if they are to be communicated. This ability to perceive and react to unlimited simultaneous events is a basic characteristic of each whole self or entity. Therefore, I do not claim it as some feat that is exclusively my own.
quotes.translation: 我意识到一种不同的体验，它并非线性，并能聚焦于无限多样的同时性事件并对其做出反应。鲁柏无法表达它们，因此若要沟通，它们必须被拉平为线性表达。这种感知并回应无限同时性事件的能力，是每个完整自我或存有的基本特征。因此，我并不声称这是独属于我的某种绝技。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They were adapted to meet a specific situation in which the inner self found it must operate, and it therefore took unto itself the adoption of these specific constructions. Therefore since dreams are manifestations of inner reality, they cannot be interpreted or investigated with any success through the use of the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 它们被调整以适应内在自我发现必须运作的特定情境，因此它自行采用了这些特定构造。既然梦是内在实相的显现，便无法通过外在感官成功解读或探究。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner senses are connected then to the physical mechanism. Sometimes inner perceptions may be touched off as a result of stimuli received through the outer senses. In many cases however the stimulus comes from the deeper levels of the self, where however it may be translated into terms that the personal subconscious can use.
quotes.translation: 内在感官因此与物质机制相连。有时，内在感知可能因外在感官接收的刺激而被触发。然而，在许多情况下，刺激来自自我的更深层面，但在此处它可能被转化为个人潜意识可用的形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: (11:05.) It does not desert the body for any length of time, however, and it is not this that is projected in cases like the seaside analogy used earlier. You are presently focused not only in your physical body, but within a particular frequency of events that you interpret as time. Other historical periods exist simultaneously, in forms quite as valid; and other reincarnational selves. Again, you simply are not tuned to those frequencies.
quotes.translation: （11:05分）然而，它并不会长时间离开身体，在之前用海边类比的情况中，被投射的也不是它。你目前不仅聚焦于自己的肉身，还聚焦于你解读为时间的特定事件频率中。其他历史时期以同样真实的形式同时存在，其他转世自我也是如此。再次强调，你只是没有调谐到那些频率而已。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "Some of Ruburt's notes that you have not seen have further important insights as to such activity. The main point is the importance of accepting (underlined) a different kind of overall orientation--one that is indeed a basic part of human nature. This involves an entirely different relationship of the self you know with time.
quotes.translation: "鲁柏的一些你尚未看到的笔记，对此类活动有更重要的洞见。关键在于接受（强调）一种不同的整体取向——这确实是人类本性的基本部分。这涉及你所知的自我与时间之间一种完全不同的关系。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 4. In Chapter 2 for Volume 1 of Dreams, see the opening notes for Session 885.

quotes.text: You do have access to the inner self, therefore. You are hardly cut off from your own soul or entity. The ego prefers to consider itself the captain at the helm, so to speak, since it is the ego who most directly deals with the sometimes tumultuous seas of physical reality, and it does not want to be distracted from this task.
quotes.translation: 因此，你确实能接触到内在自我。你与自己的灵魂或存有绝非隔绝。可以说，自我更喜欢将自己视为掌舵的船长，因为正是自我最直接地处理物理实相那有时汹涌的海洋，它不想被这项任务分心。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Therefore the inner self forms, first, the "invisible" body structure which will "later" emerge in flesh. At the event of this mental seeding, the conscious mind, in your terms, is obviously not connected with the brain, which has not yet been formed in flesh. The idea of the body is held and made physical by a conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 因此，内在自我首先形成"隐形"的身体结构，这个结构"后来"会以血肉之躯显现。在你们看来，当这个心智播种发生时，有意识心智显然尚未与大脑连接——因为大脑尚未在血肉中成形。身体的概念是由有意识心智持有并转化为物质的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: None of this is predetermined. An offshoot probable self might leave your reality at age 13, say, but could intersect with you again at age 30 for a variety of reasons -- where to you, you suddenly change a profession, or become aware of a talent you thought you had forgotten, and find yourself developing it with amazing ease.
quotes.translation: 这一切都不是预先注定的。一个分支的可能自我可能在13岁时离开你的实相，但出于各种原因，可能在30岁时再次与你交汇——对你而言，你会突然改变职业，或意识到自己以为早已遗忘的才能，并发现自己以惊人的轻松发展它。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: If your conscious beliefs are causing you great distress, countering beneficial beliefs may be received from this source. Your being, the greater consciousness that is yourself, intersects with space and time; it is born in flesh simultaneously at many [moment] "points." (See the 668th session in Chapter Nineteen.) You would call each of these immersions into three-dimensional existence a life, with its own self. And you are one of these.
quotes.translation: 如果你的有意识信念正导致巨大痛苦，可以从这个源头接收到有益的对抗性信念。你的存在，即你自身那更大的意识，与时空相交；它同时在许多"瞬间"点以血肉之躯诞生。（见第十九章第668节。）你会将每一次沉浸于三维存在的经历称为一个生命，每个生命都有其自我。而你就是其中之一。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You may take a break or you may end the session. And don't say I haven't led you on a merry chase tonight, for when you reread the material you will see that I have. I cannot stress too strongly the benefits you will receive by using psychological time as I have told you. You know now what it is and how to use it to advantage. Not only will it help the physical and mental being on your plane, but it will enable you to meet the whole self.
quotes.translation: 你可以休息一下，也可以结束这堂课。别说我没带你今晚痛快地追逐一番，因为当你重读这些资料时，你会发现我确实如此。我无法过分强调按照我告诉你的方式使用心理时间所能带来的益处。你现在知道它是什么，以及如何善用它。它不仅会帮助你在物质层面上的身心存在，还会让你得以遇见完整的自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. If you will recall our early sessions dealing with value fulfillment, let us now consider what I prefer to call a moment point. This moment point, as you know, refers to any given present instant. If you are thinking in terms of Dunnes theories, then start out with this moment point as it is seen in time one by self one.
quotes.translation: 现在。如果你还记得我们早期关于价值完成的课程，那么让我们现在来考虑一下我更喜欢称之为"瞬间点"的概念。这个瞬间点，如你所知，指的是任何一个给定的当下时刻。如果你以邓恩的理论来思考，那么就从自我一在时间一中看到的这个瞬间点开始。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The subconscious is a doorway into other portions of the self and it must be entered, and free access must exist to it. When it is free in this manner, then there is no need to block messages or distort material. The subconscious does this out of fear or resentment. I could have said more concerning his condition in the past.
quotes.translation: 潜意识是通往自我其他部分的一扇门，必须进入其中，并且必须存在自由通行的通道。当它以这种方式自由时，就没有必要阻挡信息或扭曲资料。潜意识这样做是出于恐惧或怨恨。关于他过去的情况，我本可以多说一些。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The idleness, if prolonged, is not idleness. Concentration upon physical data takes the conscious mind off for a trip, and it gives the inner self greater freedom to initiate new developments and intuitional creations. These, incidentally, can help you understand the true nature of time. Now take your break. (10:17 to 10:31.)
quotes.translation: 这种闲散，如果持续下去，就不是闲散。将注意力集中在物质数据上，会让意识心去旅行，并给予内在自我更大的自由，以启动新的发展和直觉性的创造。这些，顺便说一句，可以帮助你理解时间的真实本质。现在休息一下。（10:17到10:31。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego that ignores too many of the possibilities of the inner self is soon in dire difficulty, and is forced to realize that it has been considering survival in a very limited light.
quotes.translation: 那个忽视太多内在自我可能性的自我，很快就会陷入严重的困境，并被迫意识到它一直以非常狭隘的眼光来看待生存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: ... You have a whole self, a multidimensional self of which your present personality is a small part. It is your responsibility to expand your awareness , to utilize these abilities...
quotes.translation: ……你有一个完整的自己，一个多维度的自己，你当前的人格只是其中的一小部分。扩展你的意识、运用这些能力是你的责任。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I bring about such realignment of molecular patterns through direct manipulation. This will not be possible at your level. Even in the distant future such realignments will involve costly, complicated and almost impossible achievements because you will be trying to approach the problem working from the outside inward. The solution lies in manipulations made upon structures from the inside, or a very direct manipulation of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 我通过直接操控来达成分子模式的重组。这在你们的层面是无法实现的。即使在遥远的未来，这类重组也将涉及昂贵、复杂且几乎不可能达成的成就，因为你们将试图从外部向内解决问题。真正的解决之道在于从内部对结构进行操控，或是对整个自体进行非常直接的操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: (11:00.) It cannot be destroyed then, this inner self of yours, nor can it be diminished. It shares in those abilities that are inherent within All That Is. It must, therefore, create as it is created, for this is the great giving that is behind all dimensions of existence, the spilling-over from the fountain of All That Is.
quotes.translation: （11:00。）这个内在自体既无法被摧毁，也无法被削弱。它分享了万有之内固有的那些能力。因此，它必须像被创造那样去创造，因为这是存在于所有存在维度背后的伟大给予，是万有之泉的满溢。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is cast for you so that it bridges the perception of the psyche and the perception of the dreaming self. Dreams serve as dramas, transferring experience from one level of the psyche to another. In certain portions of sleep, your experience reaches into areas of being so vast that the dream is used to translate it for you.
quotes.translation: 它为你而铸造，以便桥接心灵感知与做梦自体的感知。梦境充当戏剧，将经验从心灵的一个层面转移到另一个层面。在睡眠的某些部分，你的经验会触及如此广袤的存在领域，以至于梦境被用来为你翻译它。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is precisely because the ego is excluded from the psychedelic experience with drugs that difficulties are encountered afterward. Given the opportunity the ego can and does merge with other portions of the self, and yet loosely maintains a psychological framework within which the experience can be translated in your terms.
quotes.translation: 正是因为自我被排除在药物引发的迷幻体验之外，之后才会遭遇困难。若给予机会，自我能够也确实会与自体的其他部分融合，同时松散地维持一个心理框架，使该体验能以你们的术语被翻译。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now. These other selves are more freewheeling. There are indeed limitations inherent within their structure, but in all cases any given identity is more than the dimension in which it finds itself. Its limitations may be great, but the limitations are set not by the identity's nature but by the dimension in which it exists.
quotes.translation: 现在。这些其他自体更为自由奔放。其结构中确实存在固有的限制，但在所有情况下，任何给定的身份都大于它发现自己所处的维度。它的限制可能很大，但这些限制并非由身份的本质所设定，而是由它存在的维度所设定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is obvious that the dream images are not responsible to the ego, however. While they contain within them compositions that are also seen in the physical self, these properties appear in different percentages. As leaves bring vital nutrients to the tree trunk, so also do dream images bring nourishment to the personality.
quotes.translation: 然而，显然梦境意象并不对自我负责。虽然它们包含也在物质自体上看到的构成，但这些属性以不同的比例出现。如同树叶将重要养分输送给树干，梦境意象也将滋养带给人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As you know therefore we have differentiated between an outer ego, who manipulates within physical reality, and an inner ego who directs the activities of the inner self. Now then, the next step should indeed be clear. In the main, the ego deals with secondary realities, and in the main, the inner ego deals with primaries.
quotes.translation: 因此，如你所知，我们区分了在物质实相中运作的外在自我，与指导内在自我活动的内在自我。那么下一步应当很清楚了。大体上，自我处理次要实相，而内在自我处理主要实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: These actions exist nevertheless. It does not take you time to perceive them one by one. You perceive them in their completed fashion. Now this other portion of the self experiences these probable events, consciously, with as much rapidity as you subconsciously perceive the million small actions that make up the handshake.
quotes.translation: 这些行动仍然存在。你不需要逐一感知它们的时间。你以完成的形式感知它们。现在，自我的这一部分有意识地体验这些可能事件，其速度之快，如同你潜意识中感知构成握手的百万个微小动作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Practically speaking, this is seldom done, but it has been on occasion. The brain cannot contain such episodes. A portion of the self would retain these experiences. Now in a creative individual, some of these could be expressed symbolically in a painting or other work of art, but the ego could not consider them as actual.
quotes.translation: 实际上，这很少发生，但偶尔也有。大脑无法容纳这些片段。自我的一部分会保留这些体验。在具有创造力的人身上，其中一些可能以象征形式表现在绘画或其他艺术作品中，但自我无法将它们视为真实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: We are bringing the ego inward, so to speak. It is partaking of this consciousness expansion. In the past the ego has been over exaggerated. It has ruled the roost. This does not mean that the changing pendulum must now attempt to eliminate the ego. Any expansion of consciousness must also include this portion of the self.
quotes.translation: 可以说，我们正在将自我向内引导。它正在参与这场意识扩展。过去自我被过度夸大。它一直占据主导地位。但这并不意味着摆动的钟摆现在必须试图消除自我。任何意识扩展也必须包含自我的这一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Quite literally, the "inner self" forms the body by magically transforming thoughts and emotions into physical counterparts. You grow the body. Its condition perfectly mirrors your subjective state at any given time. Using atoms and molecules, you build your body, forming basic elements into a form that you call your own.
quotes.translation: 确切地说，"内在自我"通过将思想和情感神奇地转化为物质对应物来形成身体。你生长着身体。它的状况在任何特定时刻都完美反映你的主观状态。你利用原子和分子构建身体，将基本元素塑造成你称之为自己的形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In the creation of art forms, both self-consciousness are allowed with certain reservations to work together. The subconscious channel between them is allowed to open to a great degree. The product of such merging is extremely individualistic, and yet more comprehensible to others than say a fragment from the dream world.
quotes.translation: 在艺术形式的创造中，两种自我意识在保留一定限制的情况下被允许共同运作。它们之间的潜意识通道被允许大幅开放。这种融合的产物极具个人特色，但比起梦境世界的片段，却更容易被他人理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Without dreams the outer camouflaged self would lose all touch with inner realities, or would be in danger of thus denying its own heritage; and therefore the physical body is so constructed that excess chemicals must be discharged and transformed into human action, or the physical mechanism would be clogged with poisons.
quotes.translation: 没有梦境，外在伪装自我将完全失去与内在实相的联系，或可能因此否认自身传承；故肉体构造如此，过剩化学物质必须被释放并转化为人类行动，否则生理机制将被毒素堵塞。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The reality of dreams themselves can only be investigated through direct contact. Their reality cannot be probed by scientific devices, for dreams in this respect are as nebulous as the spirit, or soul, or inner self. Dreams are directly experienced. They have no meaning outside of their relationship with the personality.
quotes.translation: 梦境实相本身只能通过直接接触来探究。其真实性无法用科学仪器探测，因为在这方面梦境如同灵体、灵魂或内在自我般缥缈。梦境是直接被体验的，它们与人格的关系之外毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You can enter a trance state in any form, you see. The time element is important when you project from the physical image. It becomes less important the further away you get from the physical form. Since all of these selves are simultaneous, it is also possible to project yourself into one of your own previous identities.
quotes.translation: 你瞧，你可以任何形式进入出神状态。当你从物质形象投射时，时间要素很重要。当你越远离物质形体，时间要素就越不重要。由于所有这些自我都是同时存在的，你也有可能将自己投射到某个前世身份中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Inspiration is often a more or less instantaneous translation, occurring for various reasons which I will give you later, without the benefit of the brain's intervention. It is this strangeness that is often noted. The individual seems not to know where the thought comes from, because he does not recognize the characteristic mark of his brain upon it. And indeed such a mark is lacking, for inspiration originates with the inner self.
quotes.translation: 灵感往往是近乎即时的转译，因各种原因发生（我稍后会说明），无需大脑介入。正是这种陌生感常被注意到。个体似乎不知思想从何而来，因为他认不出大脑在其上的特征印记。确实缺乏这种印记，因为灵感源于内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is true that undisciplined, hysteric flight into such realms can be dangerous, at least in the short run; but disciplined, balanced, curious and open- minded pursuit will lead to self-fulfillment, betterment of the race in general, and will be the means for releasing innate, inhibited energy toward constructive ends.
quotes.translation: 确实，无纪律、歇斯底里地逃入此类领域可能危险，至少短期内如此；但自律、平衡、好奇且开放的追求将导向自我实现、种族整体提升，并成为释放与生俱来被抑制能量以用于建设性目的的手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The conscious self is not aware of this. I instructed Ruburt in the procedure last evening. A man from Kentucky, and woman from Vermont, and an Indian from Quebec were involved.
quotes.translation: 意识自我对此并不知晓。昨晚我指导鲁柏进行此程序。涉及一位肯塔基男子、一位佛蒙特女子和一位魁北克印第安人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Any physician of any kind can only help a sufferer mobilize these energies and direct them. A sufferer has adopted an illness into his own self-image, through suggestion, which to a large degree he himself has given. He has caused the illness, whether it be organic or otherwise, and only suggestion will rid him of it.
quotes.translation: 任何医师都只能帮助患者调动这些能量并引导它们。患者通过自我暗示（很大程度上由自己发出）将疾病纳入自我形象。无论疾病是器质性还是其他性质，都是他自身造成的，唯有暗示才能使其摆脱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We will have a break. I am anxious however to tie in this material on the system of probabilities with dreams, for at times there can be a connection; and something indeed that our friends Priestley and Dunne did not consider--for their self three can indeed wander outside of the dimensions which they assigned to him.
quotes.translation: 我们将稍作休息。但我急于将概率系统的资料与梦境联系起来，因为两者有时存在关联；这确实是普里斯特利和邓恩两位朋友未曾考虑之处——他们赋予的第三自我确实能游走于他们为其设定的维度之外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This automatic procedure works both ways, then, constantly. Various portions of the self retain memory of the information, still in the form in which they have interpreted it. The thoughts and images, while being condensed, are nevertheless then retained in their particular levels of the personality in their own form.
quotes.translation: 这种自动程序于是双向持续运作。自我的各个部分保留着信息的记忆，仍以它们所诠释的形式存在。思想与意象在被浓缩后，仍以其自身形态存留于人格的特定层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The unified units, then stronger, began again the process of joining with other such units through attraction. Some such units closed their boundaries and therefore captured, so to speak, no other psychic inwardness, but were content at this stage; and they became self-contained, relatively changeless physical units.
quotes.translation: 这些更强大的统一单元再次通过吸引力与其他单元结合。某些单元封闭了边界，因此可以说并未捕获其他心灵的内在性，满足于当前阶段；它们成为自足、相对不变的物理单元。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For those of you who wonder where I place the subconscious, as psychologists think of it, you can imagine it as a meeting place, so to speak, between the outer and inner egos. You must understand that there are no real divisions to the self, however, so we speak of various portions only to make the basic idea clear.
quotes.translation: 对于好奇我将潜意识置于何处的诸位（如心理学家所理解的那样），你们可以将其想象为外在自我与内在自我的交汇处。但必须明白自我并无真实的分界，我们谈论不同部分仅为阐明基本概念。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now this is a split of the conscious mind. It does not originate within the inner self. When Augustus Two takes over he is quite conscious. He simply views physical reality through an undeviating system of beliefs. The messages sent to the body are not in the least contradictory. The body is under excellent control.
quotes.translation: 这是意识心智的分裂，并非源于内在自我。当奥古斯都二号接管时，他完全清醒。他只是通过一套不变的信念系统观察物质实相。发送给身体的指令毫无矛盾之处，身体处于极佳的控制状态。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You do not know it now. When that point is reached, you will be able, if you prefer, to experience any"Reality-illusion" at your will, but the self who experiences these"reality-illusions" will know itself as reality. There is no place for it to go, because it is the only reality and will create its own environment.
quotes.translation: 你此刻尚不知晓。当达到那个境界时，你若愿意，便能随心体验任何"实相-幻相"，但体验这些"实相-幻相"的自我将知晓自身即为实相。它无处可去，因它即是唯一的实相，并将创造自己的环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are various levels all operating, various levels of consciousness and identity. They cannot be forcibly restrained, for they would learn nothing. What they do learn however is always retained. This does not mean that each succeeding earth experiment will be made up of selves who have been through these cycles.
quotes.translation: 存在多个运作中的层次，多个意识与身份层次。它们不能被强行约束，否则将一无所获。然而它们所学到的一切始终被保留。这并不意味着每一次后续的地球实验都将由经历过这些循环的自我构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is also possible that these secondary personalities, emerging, give access to buried abilities and benign constructive abilities which had been buried beneath heavier fears that weighed them down. In any case this level represents the last division of what we may call the present personal subconscious, and still only accounts for a small dimension of the inner self, being composed of only the most easily accessible portions.
quotes.translation: 这些次人格浮现时，也可能让人接触到被沉重恐惧压抑的、深埋的良善建设性能力。无论如何，这个层次代表我们可称为当前个人潜意识的最末划分，且仅由最易触及的部分构成，仍只占内在自我的一小部分维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now: This is a personal god, in your terms. It is a personal god because this god represents the part of that which is, which is yourself, you see. No one else can speak to this particular portion of this god. You are your own entity. The part of you that is formed from All That Is, is this god; is aware of all your needs because god is also, in this respect, yourself. Though hardly the self that you will recognize in a mirror.
quotes.translation: 现在：以你们的说法，这是位人格神。它是人格神，因为这位神代表"一切万有"中属于你自身的那部分，你明白吗？没有人能与这位神的这个特定部分对话。你是自己的存有。由"一切万有"所成的那部分你，即是这位神；它知晓你所有需求，因为在此意义上，神即是你自己。尽管这绝非你在镜中能认出的那个自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json
