quotes.text: You, dear reader, are in the process of expanding your psychic structure, [of] becoming a conscious participator with the soul, in certain terms, [of] becoming what your soul is. As cells multiply and grow -- within their own nature and the physical framework -- so do selves "evolve" in terms of value fulfillment.*
quotes.translation: 亲爱的读者，你正在扩展自己的心灵结构，在某种意义上正成为灵魂的有意识参与者，正成为你的灵魂所是。如同细胞在其本性与物质架构内增殖生长，自我也在价值完成的意义上"演化"。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your emotional feelings are, as you know, the inner senses as they appear close to the physical plane. These are the directives. You form in your own personal perspective the data that exists within the inner self, but you do this on an individual basis in line with your own expectations, suggestions and attitudes.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，你的情绪感受即是靠近物质层面的内在感官。这些是指令。你以个人视角形成内在自我中存在的资料，但这是基于你个人的期望、暗示与态度来进行的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （This "hanging before" appearance, it will be remembered, is remarkably similar to the effect I observed when the same three of us experimented with our first and only seance. See the 11th session, page 56. In this one, as Bill, Jane and I stared into a mirror, the reflection of Jane's head changed in size and shape, and finally appeared to hang in space just forward of the rest of her reflection. That appearance had taken place in much poorer light than tonight's event, however. This time I could see in detail the changes taking place, and their end. [Session 11 is in Vol. 1.]

quotes.text: The very involvement of the ego with the inner self will be of great benefit. Nothing would be gained if I told you now that the ego would allow the ulcer to vanish, for there would still be a definite need on your part to understand. And it is indeed the understanding itself which will allow you to let it vanish.
quotes.translation: 自我与内在自性的这种深度交融，将带来莫大的裨益。若我此刻告诉你，自我能让溃疡消失，你反而一无所获，因为你仍需透彻理解。而正是这份理解本身，才能让你真正放下它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality is given the greatest gift of all; you get exactly what you want to get. You create from nothing the experience that is your own. If you do not like your experience, then look within yourself and change it. But realize also that you are responsible for your joys and triumphs, and that the energy to create any of these realities comes from the inner self. What you do with it is up to the individual personality.
quotes.translation: 人格被赋予了最珍贵的礼物：你得到的，恰恰是你想要得到的。你从虚无中创造出属于自己的体验。若你不喜欢自己的体验，那就向内审视并改变它。但也要明白，你对自己的喜悦与成就负有责任，而创造这些实相的能量皆源于内在自性。如何运用它，则取决于个体人格。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This alone will cause adverse experience, making you reject the very basis of your own framework of experience. You will consider the body as a thing, a fine vehicle but not in itself the natural living expression of your being in material form. Many such Eastern schools also stress -- as do numerous spiritualistic schools -- the importance of the "unconscious levels of the self," and teach you to mistrust the conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 仅此一点便会招致负面体验，使你否定自身经验架构的根本基础。你会将身体视为一件物品、一具精良的载具，而非你存有在物质形态中自然鲜活的表达。许多东方学派——如同众多灵性学派——也强调"自性无意识层面"的重要性，并教导你质疑意识心。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now, the love that binds you all is a close, sometimes open... (words missed again)...that which is too much for him at this time... (and again.)... This sort of session is not primarily to tell you what you should do, Stephen. It is not a means of helping you avoid decision, my good friend. The purpose of such a session is instead to help you develop, to grow in self confidence and strength through making your own decisions.
quotes.translation: 维系你们所有人的爱是紧密的，有时是敞开的……（部分字句缺失）……此刻对他而言过于沉重……（再次缺失）……这类课程的首要目的，并非告诉你该做什么，斯蒂芬。它并非帮你逃避决策的手段，我的挚友。相反，此类课程旨在助你成长，通过自主决策来增强自信与力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The great value of the conscious mind lies precisely in its ability to make decisions and set directions. Its role is dual, however: It is meant to assess conditions both inside and outside, to handle data that comes from the physical world and from the inner portions of the self. It is not a closed system, then.
quotes.translation: 意识心的伟大价值，恰恰在于其决策与定向的能力。然而它的角色具有双重性：它既要评估内外境况，处理来自物质世界与自性内在层面的信息。因此，它并非封闭的系统。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The beliefs whose energy generated this "alternate self image" then appeared in the daylight, acting out their natural results in physical reality. Augustus One, now in manhood, was forced to perceive the nature of these beliefs to some extent, yet when he was here visiting Ruburt he still would not examine them.
quotes.translation: 那些催生"另类自我形象"的信念能量，随后浮现于光天化日之下，在物质实相中展现其自然结果。现已成年的奥古斯都一世，被迫在一定程度上看清这些信念的本质，但当他造访鲁柏时，仍不愿审视它们。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is not true, of course, that before the time of modern psychology man had a concept of himself that dealt with conscious exterior aspects only, although it has been written that until that time man thought of himself as a kind of flat-surfaced self -- minus, for example, subconscious or unconscious complexity.
quotes.translation: 当然，在现代心理学出现之前，人类对自我的认知并非仅涉及意识外在层面，尽管有文献记载，在此之前人类将自己视为一种扁平表面的自我——例如，缺乏潜意识或无意识的复杂性。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: Anything less than complete unpredictability will ultimately result in stagnation, or orders of existence that in the long run are self-defeating. Only from unpredictability can any system emerge that can be predictable within itself. Only within complete freedom of motion is any "ordered" motion truly possible.
quotes.translation: 任何缺乏完全不可预测性的系统最终都会导致停滞，或产生长期来看自我挫败的存在秩序。唯有从不可预测性中，才能诞生出内在可预测的系统。唯有在完全自由运动中，任何"有序"运动才真正可能。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This can work, and should work, to your advantage. However when there is a distortion, as when an ulcer is created, then we begin what can indeed be a vicious circle, for the idea and the reality of the ulcer is then accepted as part of the self-image. And as such it is then more or less automatically recreated.
quotes.translation: 这可以且应当为你所用。但当出现扭曲时——例如溃疡形成时——我们便开始了真正的恶性循环，因为溃疡的观念与实相随后被接纳为自我形象的一部分。如此一来，它便或多或少被自动地重新创造出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is also something you forget. You are your subconscious self, and oftentimes what makes no sense to the ego makes good sense to the overall personality. Still, there are psychological balances that always operate when the overall personality gestalt is operating effectively, as it is in both of your cases.
quotes.translation: 还有一点你忘了：你就是你的潜意识自我。常常让自我感到毫无意义的事物，对整体人格而言却意义重大。不过，当整体人格完形有效运作时——正如你们两位的情况——总有心理平衡机制在持续运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is somewhat easier for the artist or poet to find this center of the self. The intuitive symbols can be better recognized. Now you can grab a hold of the original inspiration for a painting, and ride it outward, or you can look at your own completed painting and ride it inward to its source. Do you follow me?
quotes.translation: 艺术家或诗人更容易找到这个自我中心。他们能更好地识别直觉性象征。现在，你可以抓住一幅画作的原始灵感，顺着它向外延伸；也可以凝视自己完成的画作，顺着它向内追溯至源头。你明白我的意思吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The original source of the Speaker data is the inner knowledge of the nature of reality that is within each individual. The Speakers are to keep the information alive in physical terms, to see that men do not bury it within and dam it up, to bring it -- the information -- to the attention of the conscious self.
quotes.translation: 演讲者资料的原始来源，是每个人内在对实相本质的认知。演讲者的职责是让这些信息在物质层面保持鲜活，确保人们不将其埋藏于内或堵塞其流，并将这些信息——带到意识自我的注意中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Much of this is very difficult to verbalize. (Long pause.) You are not subordinate to some giant consciousness. While you think in such terms, however, I must speak of reincarnational selves and counterparts, because you are afraid that if you climb out of what you think your identity is, then you will lose it.
quotes.translation: 这些内容大多极难用言语表达。（长停顿。）你并非从属于某个巨大的意识。然而，当你以这样的方式思考时，我必须谈及转世自我与对应体，因为你害怕——如果你爬出你所认为的自我身份，你就会失去它。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 740
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The idea that I want to portray is a difficult one, for as you know everything that is, is conscious. And everything that is, is also self-conscious, in degree according to its abilities; and everything that is therefore contains identity and separation, even while it is part of a large and complicated gestalt.
quotes.translation: 我想描绘的这个概念很困难，因为如你所知，一切万有皆有意识。一切万有也皆有自我意识，程度依其能力而定；因此一切万有都包含身份与分离，即便它同时是一个庞大而复杂的完形的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Direct experience alone will bring you such knowledge, and yet it will not be held by the conscious mind or by the ego, although flashes of the experience may be momentarily projected within these realms. Such knowledge indeed is communicated to the various levels of the self through dreams, as you should know.
quotes.translation: 唯有直接体验能带给你这样的知识，然而它不会被意识心或自我所把持，尽管体验的闪光可能暂时投射到这些领域。如你所知，这样的知识确实通过梦境传达给自我的各个层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: His observations were not complete enough, for there are changes occurring now that he did not perceive. Therefore he did not project them into these other times. The becoming self grows more and more aware of its own portions, and of these various aspects of time in which these portions are or will be focused.
quotes.translation: 他的观察不够完整，因为现在正发生着他未曾察觉的变化。因此他没有将这些变化投射到这些其他时间中。正在形成的自我越来越意识到自身的各个部分，以及这些部分正在或将要聚焦的种种时间面向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The other, older perceptive mechanisms still linger on however. The ego does not and cannot make use of them. Indeed the ego is almost entirely formed by the physical senses method of perception. Other layers of the self biologically respond to the older, more generalized but less limited perceptive mechanisms.
quotes.translation: 然而，其他更古老的感知机制仍然残留着。自我无法也不去利用它们。事实上，自我几乎完全由物质感官的感知方式所形成。自我的其他层面在生物学上回应着那些更古老、更普遍但限制更少的感知机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Again, this is not symbolic. Only by the use of the inner senses can you obtain a viewpoint that is to some extent free of your own system. The inner self realizes the nature of its own reality, is sure of its identity and well aware of its power in the creation of actions which it projects outward from itself.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这并非象征性的。唯有通过内感官的运用，你才能获得一个在某种程度上脱离自身系统的视角。内在自我认识到自身实相的本质，确信自己的身份，并清楚知晓自己在向外投射的行动创造中所拥有的力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: When the offending emotion is recognized as a part of the self it can then be rather harmlessly dispensed with. It takes its place along with other personality traits. It gains its power and strength only when it is forcibly isolated, for it then cannot merge with the normal ebb and flow of subjective activity.
quotes.translation: 当冒犯性的情绪被认出是自我的一部分时，它就能无害地消散。它与其他性格特质各安其位。只有当它被强行孤立时，它才会获得力量，因为它无法再融入主观活动的自然涨落。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In one way you are the steps leading up to yourself, or the spirals leading in to yourself. The painting spirals outward from your inner reality, and it brings forth energy and previous connections and interpretations. You form these anew, however, adding to them the knowledge and vitality of your present self.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度看，你是通往自我的阶梯，或是通向自我的螺旋。画作从你的内在实相向外螺旋延伸，它带来能量、先前的关联与诠释。然而，你重新塑造这些，将当下自我的知识与活力注入其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We have to a very brief extent begun to explain that phenomena in a recent session. The inner self has a vast and infinite reservoir from which to draw knowledge and gain experience. (Pause.) All kinds of choices are available, and the diversity of physical matter is a reflection of this deep source of variety.
quotes.translation: 在最近的一节课中，我们已开始简要解释这种现象。内在自我拥有一个浩瀚无垠的宝库，从中汲取知识、获取经验。（停顿）所有种类的选择都唾手可得，物质世界的多样性正是这深层源头多样性的反映。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Divisions between portions of the self are primarily arbitrary however. They do not exist. It is only to speak of them to make meanings clear that we use such divisions.
quotes.translation: 然而，自我各部分之间的划分主要是人为的。它们并不真实存在。我们使用这些划分，只是为了阐明意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In some personalities they will lead to what you call a mystic experience. They will carry the personality into new realms of perception. They will momentarily break up usual patterned organizations of perception. You will see with new inner eyes. To some extent you will view some aspects of reality apart from the usual physical structures that you impose upon it as a whole. There is therefore a freedom for the inner self.
quotes.translation: 在某些人格中，它们会导向你们所谓的灵性体验。它们会将人格带入全新的感知领域。它们会暂时打破惯常的感知组织模式。你将用新的内在之眼观看。在某种程度上，你将看到实相的某些面向，脱离了你通常强加于其上的整体物理结构。因此，内在自我获得了自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You have been examining others, rather than examining the self. What you see of others is the materialization of what you think, subconsciously, that you are: not necessarily what you are. For example: if others seem deceitful to you it is because you deceive yourself and then project this outward onto others.
quotes.translation: 你一直在检视他人，而非检视自我。你所看到的他人，是你潜意识中认为自己是什么的具现化——未必是你真正的样子。例如：若他人对你显得虚伪，那是因为你欺骗了自己，然后将此投射到他人身上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This is a last-ditch escape so to speak, but dangerous because its signs are not obvious. "Well, all right, I will close you out then." This is the Emotional feeling behind it. Such a recourse, again, is only a desperate final one, but with his stubbornness it would be very final, and a means of self defense.
quotes.translation: 这可以说是最后的逃避手段，但很危险，因为其迹象并不明显。“好吧，那我就把你排除在外。”这是其背后的情绪感受。这种手段同样只是绝望中的最后选择，但以他的固执而言，这将是最终极的手段，也是一种自我防卫的方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There will be a core within your own paintings, from which the whole composition springs, and it is here that you can find rapport with the center of your self. The center contains condensed knowledge, not only of seemingly past lives, but also of the future. of this, in your work, you create a new dimension.
quotes.translation: 在你的画作中会有一个核心，整个构图由此而生，而正是在这里，你能与你的自性中心建立共鸣。这个中心凝聚了浓缩的知识，不仅关乎看似过去的生活，也关乎未来。在你的作品中，你由此创造了一个新的维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now this sense, like all other inner senses, is being used by the inner self-conscious ego, but the outer ego is not permitted awareness along these lines. A minimum amount of information from these inner senses is given to the outer ego after it is sifted through the subconscious. But only a minimum amount.
quotes.translation: 现在，这种感官如同所有其他内在感官一样，正被内在有意识的自我所使用，但外在自我不被允许沿着这些线索获得觉知。这些内在感官的信息在通过潜意识筛选后，只有极少量的部分被传递给外在自我。但仅仅是极少量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: ("Connection with something green as a meadow." The same article describes in some detail how the Dominican order in Portugal now has converted an old farm into a new seminary, which is"largely self supporting, having its own kitchen, laundry, reservoir, farm, fruit and vegetable garden, and vineyards," etc.
quotes.translation: （“与草地般的绿色相连。”同一篇文章详细描述了葡萄牙的多明我会如何将一座旧农场改造成新的神学院，该神学院“基本自给自足，拥有自己的厨房、洗衣房、水库、农场、果蔬园和葡萄园”等。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: These then form physical objects, physical matter. Matter is the shape that basic experience takes when it intrudes into three dimensional systems. Matter is the shape of your dreams. Your dreams, emotions, feelings, thoughts, are (underlined) transformed into physical matter purposefully by this inner self.
quotes.translation: 这些随后形成物质客体、物质。物质是基本经验侵入三维系统时所呈现的形状。物质是你梦的形状。你的梦、情绪、感受、思想，都被这个内在自性有目的地转化为物质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego's false ideas prevent it from accepting this energy, but once the ego is aware of its position as a portion of the self, then it should not be shunted aside, but can take its place. It is sometimes referred to almost as if it stood entirely outside of basic reality. It is, of course, within it also.
quotes.translation: 自我的错误观念阻止它接纳这股能量，但一旦自我意识到它作为自性一部分的位置，它就不应被弃置一旁，而是可以各安其位。有时它被描述得仿佛完全置身于基本实相之外。当然，它也在实相之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying that as you create physical reality you also form the other planes of existence in which you operate. You do operate simultaneously within all levels of reality and if you become familiar with various coordinates, the self that you know could become aware of your own other existences.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，当你创造物质实相时，你也同时形成了你运作其中的其他存在层面。你确实在所有实相层面中同时运作，若你熟悉各种坐标，你所知的自己便能觉察到你自己的其他存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You can see now how a subjective experience can have an electrical reality, and through this reality directly affects the human physical structure. Dreams, also being electric actualities, depend upon an electric system of patterns to communicate their data to the various levels or areas of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 你现在可以明白，主观经验如何具有电性实相，并通过这种实相直接影响人类的身体结构。梦境作为电性实相，依赖一套电性模式系统，将其数据传递给内在自我的不同层面或区域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is constant creation. The initial creation provided the energy, the dimension, of possibility itself, but every particle of consciousness will always attempt to express itself within as many possibilities as possible. The inner self therefore creates the physical body and the land upon which it moves.
quotes.translation: 这是持续不断的创造。初始创造提供了可能性本身的能量与维度，但每一个意识粒子始终试图在尽可能多的可能性中表达自己。因此，内在自我创造了物质身体及其所行走的大地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: A complete change from intense focus outward to intense focus inward is most beneficial, but this does not mean that every few minutes found available be spent in psychological time experiments. Brisk walks should be a daily part of Ruburt's schedule in any case, and walking also refreshes the inner self.
quotes.translation: 从强烈的外在专注完全转向强烈的内在专注最为有益，但这并不意味着要把每一分钟空闲都花在心理时间实验上。无论如何，轻快的散步应成为鲁柏日常安排的一部分，散步也能使内在自我焕然一新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You often excel in situations that utterly escape you at a physical level. These accomplishments still operate through the focus of your present, since you are physically aware of but one line of probable events, so the meaning of many dream events escapes you. But in dreams you often do work quite as valid as any performed in the day, and in the dream state you meet and interact with your own reincarnational selves.
quotes.translation: 你常常在完全无法从物质层面理解的境况中表现出色。这些成就仍通过你当下的焦点运作，因为你仅从物质层面意识到一条可能事件线，所以许多梦境事件的意义对你而言难以捉摸。但在梦中，你常从事与白天任何活动同样有效的工作，并在梦境状态中与你自己的转世自我相遇互动。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Using it, he is only now in the process of assimilating the newly available energy. He understands that he is the self who holds all of those beliefs, and does not identify so completely with the one core belief any longer. That association was what had prevented its natural motion and expansion earlier.
quotes.translation: 运用它，他现在才正在吸收新可用的能量。他明白自己是持有所有这些信念的那个自己，不再完全认同于单一核心信念。正是那种认同，先前阻碍了其自然的运动与扩展。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In his art we have the nostalgia of the ego for past time, and for lost control of a self that has already vanished, and changed into something new. It is ego who plans for the future, trying to anticipate the environment in which it must operate. Its anticipations, of course, then form that environment.
quotes.translation: 在他的艺术中，我们看到了自我对过去时光的怀旧，以及对早已消逝并转变为新事物的自性的失控。正是自我在规划未来，试图预判它必须运作的环境。当然，它的预判随后便形成了那个环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In our dream experiments therefore, this is one of the purposes that we hope to achieve. The ego is not equipped of itself to delve directly into nonphysical realities. If the ego is trained to be flexible however, it will accept such knowledge from the subconscious, and other wider horizons of the self.
quotes.translation: 因此，在我们的梦境实验中，这是我们希望达成的目的之一。自我本身并不具备直接深入非物理实相的能力。然而，如果自我被训练得灵活，它便会从潜意识以及自性的其他更广阔视野中接受这类知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Dream experiences often, very often, change the course of human events. Again, all this takes place through the operation of electromagnetic systems. There is a definite connection between this constant dream activity undertaken by the unconscious self, and what you call inspiration or creative activity.
quotes.translation: 梦境体验常常——非常频繁地——改变人类事件的进程。再次强调，这一切都通过电磁系统的运作而发生。无意识自性持续进行的这种梦境活动，与你所谓的灵感或创造性活动之间存在着明确的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. You must not take too literally that which you read, but leave it to the inner self to interpret and decide, and leave it to our material also. For the material represents the very best of your knowledge as it is given to you. Do not let terms confuse you. They are by nature confusing and distorted.
quotes.translation: 现在。你切不可过于字面地理解你所阅读的内容，而应将其交由内在自性去诠释和决断，同时也交由我们的资料去处理。因为这份资料代表了在你所获知范围内最卓越的知识。不要让术语混淆你。它们本质上是令人困惑且扭曲的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The classes(ESP) will be of immediate benefit, and will represent a strong bridge toward an effective and satisfactory meeting of psychic and physical dimensions. Their success will serve his self confidence. Their financial success will go a long way toward the start of a new phase of your relationship.
quotes.translation: 这些课程（ESP）将带来立竿见影的益处，并将成为一座坚实的桥梁，通向心理维度与物理维度的有效且令人满意的交汇。它们的成功将增强他的自信。它们在经济上的成功，将大大有助于开启你们关系的新阶段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There are close psychological connections in all cases--psychological webworks, and psychic recognitions that bring together the slayer and his victim, and these are known to the inner self. The stature and meaning behind the victim adds to the horrible nature of the act, and of course this is the point.
quotes.translation: 在所有案例中都存在着紧密的心理关联——心理网络以及心灵层面的识别，这些将凶手与受害者联系在一起，而内在自性知晓这一切。受害者背后的地位与意义，加剧了这一行为的恐怖性质，而这当然正是关键所在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: One part of the self is (underlined) pure truth. The other portions of the personality need translation and interpretation. They do not understand what they are.
quotes.translation: 自我的一部分是（强调）纯粹的真理。人格的其他部分需要翻译和诠释。它们不明白自己是什么。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: One point: the spontaneous self is the healer. Tell Ruburt that. (Pause.) I will now then close our session, and leave you, I hope, in anticipation for our next.
quotes.translation: 有一点：自发性自我就是疗愈者。告诉鲁柏这点。（停顿）我现在将结束我们的课，并离开你们，希望你们期待我们的下一次。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is therefore theoretically possible for you to see the world through a frog's eye, or a bird's or an ant's. We are speaking here of physical senses. The inner self has also latent inner senses beside the ones that it normally uses while the consciousness is tuned into a particular camouflage system.
quotes.translation: 因此理论上，你可以通过青蛙、鸟或蚂蚁的眼睛看世界。我们这里说的是物质感官。内在自我除了在意识调谐到特定伪装系统时通常使用的感官外，还拥有潜在的内在感官。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Again, while the conscious mind is meant to direct the flow of your experience through your beliefs, and to materialize them, the actual mechanics are taken care of automatically by other portions of the self. You must indeed trust that your new beliefs will work as completely for you as your old ones.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，虽然意识心旨在通过你的信念引导你的经验流向，并将其物质化，但实际运作是由自我的其他部分自动处理的。你必须确实相信你的新信念会像旧信念一样完全为你运作。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There is no reason why mankind cannot be aware of this transformation, if once he admits into existence the whole self which makes this possible. As I mentioned earlier the process of breathing seems automatic, and yet some part of you is aware of the most minute portions of air that inflate the lungs.
quotes.translation: 人类没有理由不能意识到这种转化，只要他承认使这成为可能的完整自我的存在。如我之前提到的，呼吸过程看似自动，但你的一部分却意识到充盈肺部的空气最细微的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Part of the limitations set upon the self are cultural, and vary according to civilizations, but the basic cause is the absolute reliance upon the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 加诸自我的部分限制是文化性的，并随文明而异，但根本原因是对外在感官的绝对依赖。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You may wonder why so many forms of life would be involved in what might seem to be self-destructive behavior, often leading to death -- but remember that no consciousness considers death an end or a disaster, but views it instead as a means to the continuation of corporeal and noncorporeal existence.
quotes.translation: 你或许会疑惑，为何如此多生命形式会参与看似自我毁灭的行为，往往导致死亡——但请记住，没有意识将死亡视为终结或灾难，反而将其视为延续肉体与非肉体存在的手段。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (I talked about the first session for Jane's symptoms -- the private portion of Session 208, for November 15, 1965 -- yet she said that for her the whole thing really started the day before we went to a party in June 1966 regarding How to Develop Your ESP Power. Our friends wanted to celebrate the publication of her first "psychic" book, her first mention of Seth, but she read poetry at the party and wouldn't talk about the ESP book -- too embarrassed. A strange, protective way to behave.

quotes.text: When the ego is of such a rigid nature that it distorts physical reality out of all context, then however the personality had better rely upon the subconscious even in this respect, for the subconscious will at least perceive those elements of physical reality that immediately threaten the whole self.
quotes.translation: 当自我本质僵化到扭曲物质现实、脱离所有脉络时，那么人格最好连这方面也依赖潜意识，因为潜意识至少能感知到直接威胁整体自我的那些物质现实要素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Joseph, you can help yourself considerably by giving yourself suggestions, beginning tonight, as you fall off to sleep, to the effect that your head will be clear tomorrow. Suggest that while you sleep your inner self will make whatever corrections or adjustments are necessary to bring about this end.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，你可以通过自我暗示大大帮助自己，从今晚入睡时开始，暗示你的头部明天会保持清醒。建议你在睡眠时，内在自我会进行必要的修正或调整以实现这一目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The consciousness of atoms and molecules can be likened to the subconscious as you now know it, in that it is generalized to a large degree, but energy-propelled. You should perhaps realize by now that the inner self, the mind and its components, is composed or forms a unitary force field of its own.
quotes.translation: 原子与分子的意识可类比为你所知的潜意识，它在很大程度上具有普遍性，但受能量驱动。你现在或许该明白，内在自我、心智及其组成部分，本身构成或形成一个统一的力场。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: But in its overzealous behavior we find that it is instead threatening the self. Secondary personalities are caused by repressed emotions on a psychological basis that attempts to maintain an ascendancy. Your ulcer is indeed the same sort of growth, but on a physical and not on a psychological level.
quotes.translation: 但在其过度热切的行为中，我们发现它反而威胁着自我。次要人格是由压抑的情绪在试图维持主导地位的心理基础上造成的。你的溃疡确实是同类型的增生，只是发生在生理层面而非心理层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: On a very basic level, as consciousness with a self （but no conscious "I" exists in the most minute division of consciousness）, all action and all sensations and all stimuli are instantly and automatically and joyfully accepted, regardless of their nature. At this level no knowledge of threat exists.
quotes.translation: 在非常基础的层面，作为具有自我意识（但在意识最细微的分化中不存在有意识的"我"），所有行动、所有感觉、所有刺激都会被立即、自动且喜悦地接纳，无论其性质如何。在此层面，不存在对威胁的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Consciousness creates form. It is not the other way around. All personalities are not physical. It is only because you are so busily concerned with daily matters that you do not realize that there is a portion of you who knows that its own powers are far superior to those shown by the ordinary self.
quotes.translation: 意识创造形态，而非相反。所有的人格并非都是物质性的。只因你过于忙碌地关注日常事务，才未能意识到自身有一部分知晓其能力远超普通自我所展现的范畴。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In terms of energy, intent is stabilizing. There is a center to the self, again, that acts as a nucleus. The nucleus may change, but it will always be the center from which physical existence will radiate. Physically, intent or purpose forms that center, regardless of its reality in terms of energy.
quotes.translation: 就能量而言，意图具有稳定作用。自我存在一个如同核心般的中心。这个核心可能改变，但始终是物质存在向外辐射的中心。从物质层面看，意图或目的构成了这个中心——无论其在能量层面的实相如何。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The getting out of oneself that is involved is excellent therapy, and therapy that does others good, as well as the self involved. There is much more here, however. Culturally speaking, there is a strong connection with pagan intuitions, deep and meaningful, that found newer and broader expressions.
quotes.translation: 这种"走出自我"的过程是绝佳的治疗，既能造福他人，也能疗愈自我本身。但其中蕴含的远不止于此。从文化层面而言，这与异教直觉有着深刻而富有意义的联结，并找到了更新更广阔的展现形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: They are adopted to meet the particular requirements of the environment in which they are used. In some dreams individuals see what they imagine to he the image of their own dead self. Instead they have been projecting, and see one of their own projected forms that they have themselves just vacated.
quotes.translation: 它们被调整以适应使用环境的特定需求。在某些梦境中，人们会看到自己想象中已故自我的形象。实际上他们一直在投射，并看见了自己刚刚脱离的某个投射形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: At the same time, in psychoanalysis you are often programmed to believe that the "unconscious," being the source of such dark secrets, cannot be counted upon as any bed of creativity or inspiration, and so you are denied the help that the inner portions of the self could give to your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 与此同时，在精神分析中你常被预设为相信"无意识"作为此类黑暗秘密的源头，无法被视为创造力或灵感的温床，因此你被剥夺了内在自我部分本可给予意识的帮助。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now. The inner self and the subconscious are not present in the physical universe, insofar as they take up no space within it. They exist within the electrical system. They affect the physical system and operate closely allied with it. Nevertheless they will not be found within the physical system.
quotes.translation: 现在。内在自我与潜意识并不存在于物质宇宙中——就其在其中不占据空间而言。它们存在于电性系统内，影响着物质系统并与之紧密协作。然而，在物质系统中是找不到它们的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Otherwise I should be all life force and no self. Now, I communicate through this level of Ruburt's consciousness. It is subconscious to him or to his ego, but it is not without consciousness by any means. And again, I communicate through that level. At my own level this is not in itself difficult.
quotes.translation: 否则我将全是生命力而没有自己。现在，我通过鲁柏意识这一层面沟通。这对他或他的自我而言是潜意识，但绝非没有意识。我再次通过那个层面沟通。在我自己的层面，这本身并不困难。

quotes.text: In your present daily life the same process continues. Most of these dreams are very disconnected from the ego, and will seldom be recalled. The self who pursues these divergent paths is actual however. These are legitimate projections. They represent systems of reality of which you are not aware.
quotes.translation: 在你当前的日常生活中，同样的过程仍在继续。这些梦大多与自我非常脱节，很少会被记起。然而，追求这些不同路径的自己实际上是真实的。这些是合法的投射。它们代表了你尚未意识到的实相系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The seance affair (last session) frightened the ego to some extent. As a whole personality now, Ruburt has found himself operating at prime efficiency in several late incidents, when the ego and intuitive self have worked in harmony. This is a promise of what he can expect with growing regularity.
quotes.translation: 降神会事件（上次课程）在某种程度上吓到了自我。作为一个整体人格，鲁柏在最近几起事件中发现自己以最高效率运作，当自我和直觉自己和谐共处时。这是对他未来能越来越规律地体验这种状态的承诺。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: These characteristic responses have been built up through past existences, and because the self is not limited the core can at any time expand and project.
quotes.translation: 这些特征性反应是通过过去的存在累积而成的，因为自己不受限制，核心随时可以扩展和投射。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is great cooperation behind such momentous productions, and in playing his role, each actor first actualizes himself within three-dimensional reality. The multidimensional self cannot act within three-dimensional reality until it materializes a portion of itself within it. Do you follow me?
quotes.translation: 在如此重大的创作背后存在着巨大的合作，每个演员在扮演角色时，首先在三维实相中实现自己。多维自己无法在三维实相中行动，除非它将自己的一部分物质化在其中。你明白我的意思吗？
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Your father's inventiveness would also be used in the same manner, as source material, by whichever self you chose to become. There are many choices. I am using here three only to show you how those primary aspects of your personality operate now in your present condition ...
quotes.translation: 给我们一点时间……你父亲的创造力也会以同样的方式被用作素材，无论你选择成为哪个自己。有很多选择。我在这里只用了三个来向你展示你人格的这些主要方面如何在当前状态下运作……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: n mentioning my "sportsman self," Seth referred to information he'd given about three of my probable selves in a private session on January 30, 1974 -- just a few days before starting "Unknown" Reality. The session contains many personal insights that I now recognize as being quite true. But even without Seth's help, interesting results can flow from an awareness of the probable-self concept: The reader can begin to intuitively consider his or her own probable selves, or those of others who may be closely related psychically or physically. I'm not writing here about rationalizing the existence of one or more probable selves to account for personal shortcomings in this reality, however, but of simply using the idea to enlarge our basic notions of the human potential. See Note I for Session 679.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This is difficult to put into words. Feel toward us rather than think at us, and let us see how we do. Self-suggestion may be most beneficial when possible, when used to put you in this more intuitive frame of mind. Turn your emotions towards us, and I think we'll be able to pick up your objects.
quotes.translation: 这很难用言语表达。请用情感而非思维朝向我们，让我们看看效果如何。当可能时，自我暗示若能让你进入这种更直觉的心境，将大有裨益。将你的情绪转向我们，我想我们就能接收到你的目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There are shadings and variations and that is all. The inner ego is that part of the inner self which is closely allied with the outer ego, in that it is to some degree a director of function and activity. But it is not sharply focused. It looks inward. Here we run into some language difficulty.
quotes.translation: 只有层次与变化，仅此而已。内在自我是内在自体的部分，与外在自我紧密相连，因为它在一定程度上是功能与活动的指挥者。但它并非聚焦清晰，而是向内观照。在此我们遇到了语言上的困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Electromagnetic reality belongs to the inner self. It is not a property that belongs to physical matter, although it does appear in physical terms. （Pause.） The second and third projection forms have electromagnetic realities. （Pause.） We are going slow here to get this material through clearly.
quotes.translation: 电磁实相属于内在自体。它并非物质属性的特性，尽管确实以物质形式显现。（停顿）第二和第三投射形态具有电磁实相。（停顿）我们在此放慢速度，以确保这些资料清晰传达。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I have used Andrea because so many typical Western beliefs coincide in her reality -- the idea that aging is disastrous; that women are relatively powerless without a man beside them; that life is, practically speaking, highly difficult while it should be ideally simple. All of these ideas obtain their charge from a basic belief in the powerlessness of the conscious self to form and regulate its experience.
quotes.translation: 我选用安德莉亚，是因为她身上凝聚了太多典型的西方信念——衰老是灾难性的；女性若无男性相伴便相对无力；生活实际上困难重重，本应简单却并非如此。所有这些观念都源于一个基本信念：有意识的自我无力塑造和调节自身经验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It may be thought of in an analogy, as a shadow, in that you create it or project it, but without conscious knowledge. It is a natural consequence of your own existence. But it does not vanish when the ego blots out the inner light from the whole self. Its existence is as permanent as your own.
quotes.translation: 可以将其类比为影子——你创造或投射它，却毫无意识。它是你自身存在的自然结果。但当自我遮蔽了整体自体的内在之光时，它并不会消失。它的存在与你自身同样永恒。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In such a case it is not necessary that the conscious self recall the dreams which it requests. In many cases, in fact, it is to the ego's advantage that it remain unaware of the actual dreams involved; for the ego is indeed touchy, rigid and querulous as an old arthritic gentleman, and cranky.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，有意识的自我无需记住它所请求的梦境。事实上，在许多情况下，自我对实际梦境保持无知反而有利；因为自我确实像个患关节炎的老绅士般敏感、固执、爱抱怨，且脾气暴躁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: All of this may seem to have little to do with the nature of reincarnation, as you think of it, or with counterparts as I have explained them. Yet it is vital that you throw aside old concepts of the self and of the soul before you can begin to understand the freedom of your own selfhood.
quotes.translation: 现在：这一切似乎与你所认为的转世本质，或与我解释过的对等人物关系不大。然而，在你们开始理解自身自性的自由之前，必须抛弃关于自我和灵魂的旧有概念。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 730
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The so-called war of the sexes originates in the artificial divisions that you have placed about the nature of the self. The psyche's reality is beyond such misunderstandings. Its native language usually escapes you. It is closely connected with what can be loosely called the language of love.
quotes.translation: 所谓的两性战争源于你们对自我本质所设立的人为划分。心灵实相超越此类误解。其本然语言通常不为你们所理解，它与可泛称为爱的语言紧密相连。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is the main problem. The reason that these energies are being used against the self must and will be uncovered. I will also have, if I am asked, suggestions for the woman in their relationship, that will be most beneficial. I mentioned that the reason for the difficulty had been built up.
quotes.translation: 这是主要问题。这些能量被用来对抗自我的原因必须且终将被揭示。若有人询问，我也会为女性在关系中的处境提供最具裨益的建议。我曾提及，困境的成因是逐渐累积而成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When he is at work he thinks "This is not me, this is not myself." The inner self has not so far recognized this other portion of the personality. When our friend Philip sells he is thinking "This is me. You can like it or not, but buy what I am selling." But he believes in what he is selling.
quotes.translation: 当他工作时，他想着"这不是我，这不是我自己"。内在自我至今尚未认可人格的这一其他部分。当我们的朋友菲利普推销时，他想着"这就是我。你可以喜欢或不喜欢，但请购买我正在推销的东西。"但他深信自己所推销之物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Energy not utilized upon one level is simply utilized on a different level. All energy is basically self-activating, but different energy potentials are required for effective utilization in various electromagnetic fields.
quotes.translation: 未在某一层面被利用的能量，只是被用于不同层面。所有能量本质上都是自我激活的，但在不同电磁场中有效利用需要不同的能量潜能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In this case also your reality colors your beliefs, and your experience is a direct result of your conscious attitudes. By such attitudes as these just mentioned you put clamps upon your inner self, purposely hamper your experience, and reinforce beliefs in the negative aspects of your being.
quotes.translation: 在此案例中，你们的实相同样会着色你们的信念，而你们的经验是意识态度的直接结果。通过上述这类态度，你们给内在自我套上枷锁，刻意阻碍自身经验，并强化对存在负面面向的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: These experiences, deeply subjective, reassure the whole personality of its complete nature. It knows it is more than the self that it has for a time chosen to be. At our next session we will go into these matters more completely, for there is an inner logic that may not be at first apparent.
quotes.translation: 这些深具主观性的体验，向整个人格确认了其完整本质。它知道自己远不止于那个暂时选择成为的自我。下次课程我们将更完整地探讨这些议题，因为其中存在着一开始可能并不明显的内在逻辑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: At this point of course the self moves beyond or through the particular mid-plane involved. The term itself merely applies to a reference point duration that has meaning only in so far as it is related to a specific personality that is in a transitional frame between dimensional actualities.
quotes.translation: 此时自我自然超越了或穿越了所涉的特定中层面。这个术语本身仅适用于一个参考点持续期，其意义仅在于与某个处于维度实相间过渡状态的具体人格相关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I would definitely suggest that some of the items we mentioned in this session be used in connection with our sessions, for a beginning. There are obviously connections between the psychic and physical self, and there is no reason why you should not begin to investigate these for yourselves.
quotes.translation: 我强烈建议将本次课程提到的某些要点，作为我们课程的初步运用。心灵自我与物质自我之间显然存在关联，你们没有理由不开始自行探究这些联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The whole organism operates more effectively, generally speaking, in such a position, but more than this, the whole self operates more as a single unit. The intellectual processes are to some extent diminished in other positions. This has to do as I have said with electromagnetic properties.
quotes.translation: 整体而言，整个有机体在这种状态下运作得更有效率，但更重要的是，整个自我更像一个单一单位在运作。在其他状态下，智性过程会在某种程度上减弱。如我所言，这与电磁特性有关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: "... certainly it must seem to you both that you begin many therapeutically designed programs only to have them disappear. There is a rhythm to such programs, however, and it is natural for the self to rouse at certain times, begin such activities, then apparently (underlined) discard them.
quotes.translation: "...对你们两人而言，必定觉得你们开启了许多治疗性计划，却只能任其消失。然而这类计划有其节奏，自我自然会在特定时刻苏醒，开始这类活动，随后又显然（强调）将其舍弃。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

Six months ago, I described how Floyd Waterman had helped me rebuild a narrow old straight chair for Jane, and equip it with casters, so that I could more easily steer her into certain parts of the hill house. In Session 931 for Chapter 9, see the opening notes following superscript number 14.

quotes.text: In dreams the inner "I" changes its point of focus, and this is important. It is therefore able to view the self as a whole, with its past and present life. And because the focus brings it outside of camouflage time and space, it is also able to project itself into what you call the future.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，内在的"我"会改变其焦点，这一点至关重要。因此它得以将自我视为一个整体，连同其过去与现在的人生。由于焦点将其带出伪装时空之外，它也能将自己投射到你们所谓的未来之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Two of these statements may appear at first glance to contradict themselves, but you shall shortly see that they do not, and you are left for now with a pretty question: for does the self, or identity, then form the perceptive dimension in which it exists, or is it created by the dimension?
quotes.translation: 这两句话乍看之下可能相互矛盾，但你们很快会发现它们并不矛盾，现在留给你们一个有趣的问题：自我或身份认同，究竟是形成了它存在的感知维度，还是被这个维度所创造？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Again: a change of schedules and habits. It is good that you are making these changes. If some were not made, they would be demanded by other portions of the self. They are breakthroughs, and therapeutic. The ego is working with you now, for it grew frightened and is taking steps to change.
quotes.translation: 再次强调：改变日程和习惯。你们正在做出这些改变是件好事。如果某些改变没有发生，自我的其他部分也会要求它们。这些改变是突破性的，且具有疗愈作用。现在自我（小我）正与你们合作，因为它曾感到恐惧，正在采取措施改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Practically speaking, three other forms are available to you in projections beside the physical, though others are theoretically available. It goes without saying that the consciousness works as hard at night as in the daytime, and always the experiences become part of the whole inner self.
quotes.translation: 实际上，在投射中除了物质形态外，你们还可以获得其他三种形态，尽管理论上还有更多。不言而喻，意识在夜晚与白天同样活跃，这些经历始终成为整个内在自我的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Dreams are an example of Mental activity that has its origin within the physical organism, but exists in a dimension which is not mainly physical. Dreams are an example of the inner self's basically independent nature.
quotes.translation: 梦是精神活动的例子，它源于物质有机体，却存在于一个主要非物质的维度中。梦是内在自我本质上独立性的例证。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, I can be playful because I am not as serious and mystical as the rest of you. I am myself, and if you were yourselves,28 you would not be so self-consciously profound about your beliefs and the nature of your reality. (Humorously, to a certain student:) You would trust your mustache!
quotes.translation: 现在，我可以带着玩心，因为我不像你们其他人那样严肃和神秘。我就是我自己，如果你们也能做自己，就不会对自己的信念和实相本质如此故作深沉。（幽默地对某位学生说：）你会信任你的胡子！
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json
