quotes.text: This hidden self-consciousness can also at times look out through your outer senses upon your camouflage world. At these times you get something of the same effect as when you look through a telescope, and you may think of the long tube of the telescope as the channel of the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 这种隐藏的自我意识有时也能通过你们的外在感官看向你们的伪装世界。此时你们会得到类似透过望远镜观察的效果，可以把望远镜的长管视为潜意识的通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Without the determination of the inner ego, cohesion of identity would be impossible. The self as you know it is many things, and contains many more vestibules and rooms than you now imagine. Even the outer ego contains multitudinous chambers and interconnections of which you are unaware.
quotes.translation: 若无内在自我的决断，身份认同的凝聚便不可能。你所认知的"自己"包含诸多层面，其内在的厅室与门廊远比你想象的更为繁复。就连外在自我也蕴藏着无数你未曾察觉的密室与关联网络。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In physical existence usually you simply do not perceive it. There is a psychic structure also that has a form. This is the self as it appears within what you may call for now fifth-dimensional reality, but it does not exist at all in terms of matter. On occasion you travel in this form.
quotes.translation: 在物质存在中，你通常无法感知它。但存在一种具有形态的心灵结构——这便是你暂且可称之为第五维度实相中的自我，但它完全不以物质形态存在。你偶尔会以此形态游历。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now where the ego operates you will always find chemical repercussions; to some extent or another then the physical body will be involved. Deeper or less familiar portions of the self exist without a chemical manifestation. These usually take electromagnetic forms to some degree however.
quotes.translation: 凡有自我运作之处，必伴随化学反应的涟漪；物质身体或多或少都会参与其中。然而，更深层或更陌生的自我部分无需化学显化即可存在，不过它们通常仍会呈现某种程度的电磁形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now, you arbitrarily decide on the personal physical image as the exterior boundary of the self. As you know, in actuality, no such physical boundary exists. It is the result of your perception. Even physically, you see, no such boundary exists. You can see this for example in epidemics.
quotes.translation: 你武断地将个人物质形象视为自我的外在边界。如你所知，实际上并不存在这样的物质边界——它只是你感知的产物。即便从物理层面看，这种边界也不存在，流行病现象便是明证。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: She fears, for one thing, that you could run the house more efficiently than she can, and basically that you do not need her. She is not certain of her own merit, and achieves her self-approval through your auspices.
quotes.translation: 她恐惧的根源之一，是认为你能比她更高效地操持家务，本质上觉得你并不需要她。她对自己的价值缺乏确信，唯有通过你的认可才能获得自我肯定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now: I want to emphasize again that while all this sounds difficult in the telling, it becomes much more clear intuitively when you learn to experience what you are, for if you cannot travel inside your physical body to find your identity, you can travel through your psychological self.
quotes.translation: 现在我要再次强调：尽管这些论述听起来艰涩难懂，但当你学会体验真正的自己时，直觉会令一切豁然开朗——若你无法穿越物质躯体寻找身份认同，便可借由穿越心理自我来达成。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such self knowledge is in itself highly advantageous, and in one way is its own reward. It is impossible, however, to look inward with any clearness if you are unwilling to change your attitudes, beliefs, or behavior, or examine those characteristics that you consider uniquely your own.
quotes.translation: 这种自我认知本身就极具价值，从某种角度而言，它本身就是回报。然而，若你不愿改变自己的态度、信念或行为，也不愿审视那些你认为完全属于你自己的特质，那么你便无法清晰地内观。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is almost impossible to begin with concepts of one isolated universe, one self at the mercy of its past, one time sequence, and end up with any acceptable theory of a multidimensional soul or godhead that is anything else but a glorified personified concept of what you think man is.6
quotes.translation: 几乎不可能从孤立宇宙、受制于过去的自我、单一时间序列这些概念出发，最终得出任何可接受的多维灵魂或神性理论——除非那只是你所认为的人类形象的荣耀化人格化概念。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 684
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: First of all, in your terms "pure" identity has no form. You speak of one self within one body because you are only familiar with one portion of yourself. You suppose that all personhood in one way or another must have an equivalent of a human form, spiritual or otherwise, to "inhabit."
quotes.translation: 首先，用你们的说法，“纯粹”的身份没有形态。你们谈论一个身体内的一个自我，是因为你们只熟悉自己的一部分。你们假设所有的人格，无论以何种方式，都必须拥有某种人类形态的对应物——无论是灵性的还是其他形式的——来“居住”。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The information is sifted often through the dreaming self to the subconscious, which has intimate knowledge of the ego with which it is closely connected. The subconscious makes its own value judgments here, and passes these on to the ego. But then the ego must come to its own decision.
quotes.translation: 信息常常通过做梦的自我过滤到潜意识，而潜意识与它紧密相连的自我（小我）有着密切的了解。潜意识在此做出自己的价值判断，并将这些判断传递给自我。但最终，自我必须做出自己的决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is indeed. The separation process is illusion; nevertheless in this way a depth perception is achieved. You are all one self, but you are all individuals and no individuality is lost. There is no merging. There is no need for merging, since what you are already is a part of all else.
quotes.translation: 确实如此。分离的过程是幻相；然而，通过这种方式，一种深度感知得以实现。你们都是同一个自我，但你们都是个体，没有个体性会丧失。没有融合。也不需要融合，因为你们所是的，已然是万有的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Therefore you accept them for they make senseto the physical mechanism. The inner self has the knowledge behind these physical perceptions. The brain is responsible for these physical symbols. The mind has no need of them, but passes the information to the brain, who then interprets it.
quotes.translation: 因此你们接受它们，因为它们对物质机制而言是合理的。内在自我拥有这些物质感知背后的知识。大脑负责这些物质符号。心灵不需要它们，但将信息传递给大脑，然后大脑对其进行诠释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Very nicely in class, she personifies the feelings that each of you have to some degree, involving your inner self.... She shows her feelings in an exaggerated fashion for you to look at, and so when she speaks it is not only for herself but for everyone in this room, including Ruburt.
quotes.translation: 课堂上她非常生动地将你们每个人或多或少都有的、涉及内在自我的感受拟人化……她以夸张的方式展现这些感受供你们观察，因此她说话时不仅代表自己，也代表这个房间里的每个人，包括鲁柏。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Because there are bleed-throughs and interconnections, it is possible for you to tune into a "future event," say of an unfortunate nature, an event for which you are headed if you continue on your present course. A dream about it, for instance, may so frighten you that you avoid the event and do not experience it. If so, such a dream is a message from a probable self who did experience the event.
quotes.translation: 由于存在渗透与互联，你们有可能调频到某个"未来事件"——比如具有不幸性质的事件，一个若继续当前路线就会遭遇的事件。例如，关于它的梦境可能令你惊恐万分，从而避开该事件而不去经历它。若是如此，这样的梦便是来自确实经历过该事件的可能自我的讯息。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I will never either suggest or condone a wholesale letting go of outer personality defenses. I am attempting to build up your outer personalities in their dealings with the outside world, while at the same time teaching the inner self spontaneity and freedom. This is quite a project.
quotes.translation: 我绝不会建议或纵容彻底放弃外在人格的防御机制。我正试图在你们外在人格与外界打交道时强化它们，同时教导内在自我自发与自由。这确实是个大工程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your unconscious self is a strong portion of our sessions, and it was for this reason that Ruburt sensed this absence. And now, good evening.
quotes.translation: 你们的无意识自我是我们课程的重要部分，正因如此鲁柏才察觉到它的缺席。那么，晚安。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Remove as many limitations as possible. The spontaneous self is remarkably resilient, and bounces back from its own errors when it makes any.
quotes.translation: 尽可能移除限制。自发自我具有非凡的韧性，即便犯错也能从错误中迅速恢复。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: While you have highly limited concepts about the nature of the self, you cannot begin to conceive of a multidimensional godhood, or a universal reality in which all consciousness is unique, inviolate -- and yet given to the formation of infinite gestalts of organization and meaning.
quotes.translation: 只要你们对自我本质持有高度局限的概念，就无法开始构想多维度的神性，或一个所有意识皆独特、不可侵犯——却又参与形成无限组织与意义完形的宇宙实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Every so often I've thought of averaging Jane's dictation time for Seth Speaks and Personal Reality in the same way, but haven't done so. I'm somewhat puzzled to note, however, that her very short working times for the Seth books seem to be either ignored or taken for granted by practically everyone -- or, perhaps, those factors just aren't understood in terms of ordinary linear time. Maybe I'm alone in my interest here, for even Jane doesn't express any great curiosity about the time she has invested in the Seth material; she just delivers it. But given her abilities, I think her speed of production is a close physical approach to, or translation of, Seth's idea that basically all exists at once -- that really there is no time, and that the Seth books, for example, are "there" to be had in final form for just the tuning in. (In Section 3 of this volume, Note 2 for Session 692 contains information on another way by which we can move closer to Seth's idea of simultaneity from our physical reality, but that method grows out of material not discussed here.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Our communications are not of this type. As an overall personality, I have always been concerned with ideas. I am not emotionally in strong connection with any personalities known to Frank Watts, for example. He is a part of, or a fragment of, my whole self, and an independent one.
quotes.translation: 我们的通讯并非此类。作为一个整体人格，我一向关注理念。例如，我与弗兰克·瓦茨所知的任何人格都没有强烈的情感联系。他是我的整体自性的一部分或一个片段，且是一个独立的片段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The self is far from a simple psychological structure, and your psychologists are barely beginning to have any understanding of what it is.
quotes.translation: 自性远非简单的心理结构，你们的心理学家才刚刚开始对它有所理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The subconscious is a self-conscious portion of the whole self. It is called subconscious because the ego as a rule is not conscious of it.
quotes.translation: 潜意识是整体自性中具有自我意识的部分。它被称为潜意识，是因为自我通常意识不到它的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This can easily be proven by a simple experiment with any small object, such as a book of matches. No one of you can see a book of matches from exactly the same perspective, for the simple reason that it does not exist for you except in the self-perspective in which you create it.
quotes.translation: 这可以通过一个简单实验轻易证明，比如用一盒火柴。你们中没有一个人能从完全相同的视角看到一盒火柴，原因很简单：它只存在于你们创造它的自我视角中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These informal tests are an excellent method of building up his self-confidence. And his self-confidence is absolutely necessary to us.
quotes.translation: 这些非正式测试是建立他自信心的绝佳方法。而他的自信心对我们来说绝对必要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. While I am not Ruburts number six self, and I should know, this is not to say that I may not be Ruburts number eight or nine self.
quotes.translation: 现在。虽然我不是鲁柏的第六号自性——这点我清楚——但这并不表示我不可能是鲁柏的第八或第九号自性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Having determined upon physical reality as a dimension in which it will project itself, the inner self therefore first of all takes care to form and maintain the physical basis upon which all else must depend--those Physical properties of earth that can be called natural ones.
quotes.translation: 内在自体在决定将物质实相作为投射自身的维度后，首先会精心构建并维持所有其他事物赖以存在的物质基础——那些可被称为自然属性的地球物质特性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The physical image does not immediately disappear, for a number of reasons. The personality, through the inner self, has indeed created or constructed the physical form, but the very material from which it was constructed also contains its peculiar consciousness, as you know.
quotes.translation: 物质形象不会立即消失，这有多重原因。人格通过内在自体确实创造或构建了物质形态，但如你所知，构建该形态的原始材料本身也蕴含着其独特的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am making this discussion as simple as possible, and using the conscious self simply because less difficulties are presented in explanation. It is obvious, for example, that some events are experienced by the subconscious also, that may or may not be experienced by the ego.
quotes.translation: 我尽可能简化此次讨论，并选用意识自我作为范例，仅因其在解释时遇到的阻碍较少。举例而言，某些事件可能同时被潜意识所经验，而自我意识却未必能感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Your psychological life is dependent upon your ability to perceive and react to such action events. Your reaction, of course, creates new ones. Your identity, your inner self, is a main action event, forming other such events that are the various portions of your personality.
quotes.translation: 你的心理生命取决于你感知并回应此类行动事件的能力。你的回应自然又会创造新的事件。你的身份认同、你的内在自体，本身就是一个主要的行动事件，并持续形成构成你人格各部分的其它事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Never think of it as static. There is constant give and take between all portions of the self, and the entity changes as it interacts with other levels of the personality. Any given thought experienced by you is experienced by all possible yourselves, though in various forms.
quotes.translation: 切勿视其为静止状态。自体各部分之间持续进行着给予与接收，当存有与其他层面的人格互动时，它本身也在发生变化。你所经验的任何特定思想，都会被所有可能的你以不同形式所经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The outer ego then remains at the end a controller and director of those strengths which it gathered about itself during its particular existence. But even this is not the end. It, that is it meaning the outer ego, can even continue growth and development after a particular existence, according to its inherent ability and according to its ability to communicate with the basic inner self.
quotes.translation: 外在自我最终会成为其特定存在期间所聚集力量的掌控者与引导者。但即便如此也并非终点。这个外在自我——即外在自我本身——甚至能在特定存在结束后，根据其固有天赋以及与基本内在自体的沟通能力，继续成长与发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You will in all cases attempt to construct as physical reality your inner conception of what reality is. Your physical environment and conditions are a mirror of your own basic conceptions of reality. If the environment changes it is because your inner conceptions have changed, and no smallest alteration is made within physical reality, that has not first been made within the inner self.
quotes.translation: 你将在所有情况下试图将你对实相的内在概念构建为物质实相。你的物质环境和状况是你对实相基本概念的镜子。如果环境改变了，那是因为你的内在概念已经改变，物质实相中没有任何最微小的改变不是首先在内在自我中发生的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The physical environment can be seen in many ways as direct extensions from the physical self. Physical formations of other images, you see, radiating outward; these subject to continual change, as is the physical image, and all of this reflecting the inner and basic action.
quotes.translation: 物质环境在许多方面可以被视为物质自我的直接延伸。你看，其他意象的物质形态向外辐射；这些形态如同物质形象一样不断变化，而这一切都反映了内在的基本行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: "The entire structure of fears, of course, is based upon a belief in the sinful self and the sinful nature of the self's expression.
quotes.translation: "当然，恐惧的整个结构基于对有罪自我以及自我表达的有罪本质的信念。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth's comments of February 17 also reflect upon Jane's own ideas as she described them just 11 days ago; see the excerpts in Note 4. Then in this Chapter 9 of Dreams, see Note 8 for Session 920.

quotes.text: You must, then, project or materialize the dream universe outside of the physical self in an electric reality, and then reinterpret it, because the original dream experience has an electric reality that cannot be perceived or used, even by its creators, until it is decoded.
quotes.translation: 因此，你必须将梦境宇宙投射或物质化到物质自我之外的电性实相中，然后重新诠释它，因为原始的梦境体验具有电性实相，除非被解码，否则即使其创造者也无法感知或使用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Here knowledge is sifted through self structures. (Pause.) Pure knowledge is not impersonal. To the contrary (smile; pause), it is meaningless unless it is (smile; gesture; pause), experienced intimately within every part of an identity. But to you it would seem impersonal.
quotes.translation: 在这里，知识通过自我结构被筛选。（停顿）纯粹的知识并非非人格化。相反（微笑；停顿），除非它（微笑；手势；停顿）被身份中的每个部分亲密地体验，否则它是无意义的。但对你而言，它似乎是非人格化的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is Seth's way of making still more information available. None of this is meant to deny the reality of your own physical system for you. The very nature of our sessions should show you that self structures are indeed transparent, and communications can flow through them.
quotes.translation: 这是赛斯提供更多信息的方式。这一切并非要否认你自己的物质系统对你的实相。我们课程的实质应该向你展示，自我结构确实是透明的，沟通可以流经它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Despite all your own tendencies to avoid such contact, you are bringing it about through our sessions, and the importance of the material--the inner self placing you in a position where such contact will come about. This is for your own good, and the same is true of Ruburt.
quotes.translation: 尽管你自身有种种回避这类接触的倾向，但你正通过我们的课程促成它，而资料的重要性——内在自体将你置于一个必然发生这类接触的位置。这对你有益，对鲁柏亦然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In the same manner, other constructions are affected. It is true that what becomes matter must be dealt with as matter, and yet the inner vitality and the inner self have their own ability to heal. The trouble is, these abilities are little utilized and seldom appreciated.
quotes.translation: 同理，其他建构也会受到影响。确实，成为物质的东西必须被当作物质来处理，然而内在活力与内在自体自有其疗愈能力。问题在于，这些能力极少被运用，也鲜少被珍视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （Jane's Jan. 10/64 trance is described in Session 14, Vol. 1.）

quotes.text: You are not speaking of basic issues. You are flying paper dragons to be punctured, but these are not the real dragons. You must learn to listen to the voice of your inner self, for if you know the use you are to this man, you do not recognize the nature of his use to you.
quotes.translation: 你谈的并非根本问题。你是在戳破纸龙，但这些并非真龙。你必须学会倾听内在自体的声音，因为若你明白你对这个人的用处，你便尚未认清他对你的用处之本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. As you know, the inner senses belong to that part of human personality that is not physically materialized. At various times I have spoken concerning the reality of what you refer to as the astral body. You must remember that over a year ago we discussed tissue capsules. The astral body is of this nature. It is composed of electromagnetic components. It is simply the unseen self.
quotes.translation: 现在。如你所知，内在感官属于人格中未物质化的部分。我曾多次谈及你们所谓的星光体的实相。你必须记得，一年多前我们讨论过组织囊。星光体即属此类性质。它由电磁成分构成，不过是那不可见的自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The idea that sparked the book came to him, though he may forget, in two ways. First as intuition; in other words from his inner self as he sat down to write poetry, and in a dream the following night.
quotes.translation: 激发这本书的念头以两种方式降临于他——尽管他可能遗忘。首先作为直觉：换言之，当他坐下写诗时来自内在自体；其次在次夜的梦境中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Hypnotism is important merely as a tool to release the conscious personality from the camouflage inhibitions. It then allows knowledge to rise up. In ordinary circumstances the conscious self deals mainly with camouflage existence. This is after all primarily its purpose.
quotes.translation: 催眠术的重要性仅在于作为释放意识人格脱离伪装抑制的工具。它随后让知识浮现。在通常情况下，意识自体主要处理伪装存在。毕竟这首先是它的目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: All action will be expressed. Now to some degree you have a root nature, then, and many of your dreams will be similar. You are far from identical with these probable selves, and yet if you met them you would instantly know that you had found unknown portions of yourself.
quotes.translation: 所有行动都将被表达。因此，在某种程度上你拥有一个根本本性，而你的许多梦境也会相似。你远非与这些可能的自己等同，但若你遇见他们，你会立刻意识到自己找到了未知的自我部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Ours is the voice that whispers through the corridors. The very matter of your physical brain has its greater reality in the mind, and behind that mind is another mind, and behind that another, and yet all of this is your mind. The mind of the larger self you do not know.
quotes.translation: 我们的声音是那在走廊中低语的声音。你物质大脑的实质本身在心灵中拥有更宏大的实相，而在这心灵背后是另一个心灵，再背后还有另一个，然而这一切都是你的心灵。你并不知晓那个更大自己的心灵。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now we come to see one of the main points of this discussion. These therapeutic dreams, with practice, can be brought about through self-suggestion. To some extent this is not unknown. Various old cults have used this method, but it can be quite practical in modern life.
quotes.translation: 现在我们触及这场讨论的要点之一。这些疗愈性梦境，通过练习，可借由自我暗示引发。在某种程度上这并非未知。各种古老教派曾使用此法，但在现代生活中它仍相当实用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I will have more to say along these lines, for we shall shortly be considering the psychological structures in terms of action, and in their relationship to time. We will first relate them to this emerging self that you can sense personally, and then we shall go further.
quotes.translation: 关于这些方向我还会说更多，因为我们很快将以行动的角度来考量心理结构，并探讨它们与时间的关系。我们将首先将它们与你个人能感知到的这个浮现的自我关联起来，然后我们会更进一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Our material on the nature of action will be helpful here. The ego, the physically-oriented ego, is a convenient figurehead. It represents only an imperfect glimpse of a given momentary appearance--the portion of the self that happens in any given instant to show itself.
quotes.translation: 我们关于行动本质的资料在此会有帮助。自我，那个以物质为导向的自我，是一个便利的象征性代表。它仅代表对某个特定瞬间表象的不完美一瞥——那是自我在任一特定时刻恰好显现的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: They can confuse you as to the nature of your own identity. You become the role. There should be a standing back within yourself for a while. The problems which you have set yourself can be solved, or the challenges you have set yourself can be met, in several ways. You have choices. There is not one way. It is your attitude that is important, and the flexibility of your inner self.
quotes.translation: 它们可能混淆你对自身身份本质的认知。你变成了那个角色。你应当暂时在内心保持一段距离。你为自己设定的问题可以解决，或你为自己设定的挑战可以应对，有多种方式。你有选择。并非只有一条路。重要的是你的态度，以及你内在自我的灵活性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is natural to live after death, and natural to return the body to earth and [then to] form another. It is natural for your thoughts to be as quick, responsive, and alive as viruses. It is natural for you to have probable selves as well as reincarnational existences.*
quotes.translation: 死后继续存在是自然的，将身体归还大地再形成另一具身体也是自然的。你的思想像病毒一样敏捷、有回应且充满活力是自然的。你拥有可能的自己与转世存在也是自然的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In your dream3 you were, of course, in the process of forming new ideas about the nature of the magical self (through my art) and also in your way working that idea out through imagery. The dream is above all an example of "work" being done at other levels of awareness.
quotes.translation: 在你的梦境3中，你当然正在通过我的艺术形成关于神奇自性的新观念，并以你的方式通过意象来实践那个观念。这个梦首先是意识在其他层面进行“工作”的一个范例。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: （Self- Friday 5/22, 9:30 PM: Few instances of my sensation after the suggestion to myself that I felt light. This is coming to be a dependable effect at such times. I seem now to be able to know in advance when the sensation will manifest itself during such experiments.
quotes.translation: （自性-周五5月22日，晚上9:30：在我对自己暗示“我感觉轻盈”之后，有几次体验到这种感觉。这在此类时刻正成为一种可靠的效果。我现在似乎能预先知道这种感觉何时会在这类实验中显现。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is obvious that physically there is no one self, since the molecules and atoms that construct the cells, that construct the organs, change constantly. And yet we say that identity is retained, and yet even what we mean by the core of identity also constantly changes.
quotes.translation: 显然，从物理层面来说并不存在单一的自己，因为构成细胞、构成器官的分子和原子在不断变化。然而我们却说身份认同得以保留，但甚至我们所谓的身份核心也在不断变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In this final version the basic experience is converted as nearly as possible into physical terms. It is therefore distorted. This final touching-up process is not done by deeper layers of the self however, but is much more nearly a conscious process than you realize.
quotes.translation: 在这个最终版本中，基本体验被尽可能转化为物理术语，因此它被扭曲了。这个最后的修饰过程并非由自性的更深层完成，而是比你意识到的更接近一个意识过程。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your inner self adopts the physically conscious, physically focused mind as a method of allowing it to manipulate in the world that you know. The conscious mind is particularly equipped to direct outward activity, to handle waking experience and oversee physical work.
quotes.translation: 你的内在自性采用具有物理意识、聚焦于物理的心智，作为允许它在你所知的世界中运作的方法。意识心智特别装备来指导外在活动、处理清醒体验并监督物理工作。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is not to minimize the importance of the intellect that I once again repeat: Inner reality will only be known directly through the inner self, and the inner senses. The intellect must deal and interpret the realities of camouflage existence, this being its purpose.
quotes.translation: 我再次重申，这并非贬低智性的重要性：内在实相只能通过内在自我与内在感官直接认知。智性必须处理并诠释伪装存在的实相，这正是其目的所在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The event is actual all the same, and is experienced in variation. The whole self therefore perceives and is affected by probabilities, and experiences these as action, regardless of whether or not the ego has chosen to accept any given event as a physical occurrence.
quotes.translation: 事件本身始终是真实的，并以不同变体被体验。因此，整体自我感知并受到可能性的影响，将这些可能性体验为行动，无论自我是否选择将任何特定事件接受为物质性发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Your own experiments in psychological time have allowed you, to some extent, to experience within yourselves such unimpeded action. You know now that the ego, because of its nature, attempts to set itself aside from action. It obviously cannot do so. The ego, being part of action, nevertheless affects the nature of action as seen in the various manifestations of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 你们在心理时间中的实验，已使你们在一定程度上于内在体验了这种无阻的行动。你们现在明白，自我因其本质试图将自己与行动分离——它显然无法做到。作为行动的一部分，自我仍影响着行动的本质，这体现在整体自我的各种显化中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The process is gradual, individual and determined by experience in other lives. It is particularly dependent upon emotional characteristics -- not necessarily of the last incarnated self, but the emotional tensions present as a result of a group of past existences.
quotes.translation: 这个过程是渐进的、个体化的，并由其他生命中的经验所决定。它尤其依赖于情感特质——未必是最后转世自我的情感，而是因一系列过去存在而产生的当下情感张力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Oh yes, this happens in countless cases, and could happen to your plane. It would in no way affect other planes. The vitality on your plane and on or in all planes in your grouping displays itself in terms of self-consciousness to some degree, as you understand it.
quotes.translation: 哦，是的，这种情况发生在无数案例中，也可能发生在你们的层面。它绝不会影响其他层面。你们层面以及你们所属群体中所有层面的生命力，都以你们所理解的某种程度的自我意识来展现自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have tried to explain the distortions which make such questions seem intrinsically valid, but it is only from your own perspective that you think in terms of beginning and end, and only because of your self-adopted limitations that you continue along these lines.
quotes.translation: 我曾试图解释那些使此类问题看似具有内在合理性的扭曲，但只有从你们自己的视角出发，你们才会以开始与结束的思维来思考；也正因你们自我施加的限制，你们才沿着这些思路继续下去。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is a temporary and initial, barely perceivable enlargement, a deep pulsing in the manner of a beating forth of cells and molecules--actually a sort of pulsation resulting in a minute but definite enlargement of tissue. You experience this in slow motion. Completed, the process would represent what would appear to be a propulsion of consciousness or self from the tissues.
quotes.translation: 存在一种暂时且初始的、几乎难以察觉的扩张，一种深沉的脉动，如同细胞与分子向外搏动——实际上是一种导致组织产生微小但明确扩张的脉动。你以慢动作体验这一过程。若完成，这个过程将呈现为意识或自体从组织中推进而出。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Psychic sympathy can be expanded in some space of the mind, of any mind, of any inner mind. All things are known, for in the depths of the inner self emotional sympathy is endless. By sympathy I refer to an inner connection, an attraction, not necessarily a pity.
quotes.translation: 心灵共鸣可以在心灵的空间中扩展，在任何心灵、任何内在心灵中扩展。一切皆被知晓，因为在内我的深处，情感共鸣是无尽的。我所说的共鸣，指的是一种内在连接、一种吸引力，不一定是怜悯。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is a matter of Ruburt's own forces, that must always work in balance. Some rather harmless diversities of purpose, and temporary imbalance, may most probably be expected at various times while the whole self becomes acquainted with a new level of achievement.
quotes.translation: 这是鲁柏自身力量的问题，必须始终在平衡中运作。当整个自体逐渐熟悉新的成就层次时，很可能在不同时期出现一些相当无害的目标分歧与暂时失衡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The information was perceived through the inner senses, and though Ruburt is not consciously aware of the dream's importance the inner self has assimilated the knowledge. He will most likely have several other dreams of this nature within a short period of time.
quotes.translation: 这些信息是通过内在感官感知的，尽管鲁柏并未有意识地意识到这个梦的重要性，但内我已吸收了这些知识。他很可能在短时间内再做几个类似性质的梦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Once before, in the first and 18th envelope experiments, an object was used that was similar but not identical by any means. In the first experiment in the 179th session, Seth came through with one accurate impression. In the 18th experiment, held during the 212th session, a few more impressions were obtained; but overall the results were interfered with by other factors in a way that doesn't seem to happen these days. See Session 179 in Volume 4, and Session 212 in Volume 5.

quotes.text: These make up the basic identity structure of one whole self. Again, this does not mean that the portions are not independent and individual. Also, the divisions are arbitrary to a large degree, for they can indeed be carried further, for example, to the entity.
quotes.translation: 这些构成了一个完整自体的基本身份结构。再次强调，这并不意味着这些部分不是独立且独特的。同时，这些划分在很大程度上是任意的，因为它们确实可以进一步延伸，例如延伸到存有层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is nothing contradictory in the overall in supposing that these multitudinous selves exist simultaneously. And any law of physics that appears to make this supposition incorrect is a law that is an illusion, and that in itself leads to false perceptions.
quotes.translation: 假设这些众多的自体同时存在，整体上并无矛盾。任何看似使这一假设不成立的物理定律，都是幻象，其本身会导致错误的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This, again, is not to say that it is not real, but that it is not a primary reality that is more or less constant for the inner self. If an experience is a part of all levels of consciousness--this includes the trance state--then it is a primary experience.
quotes.translation: 这再次说明，它并非不真实，而是对于内在自体而言，它并非一种或多或少恒常不变的原初实相。如果某个体验存在于所有意识层面——包括出神状态——那么它就是原初体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It recognizes its position as a part of the whole self. This is indeed a released, free consciousness. It does represent a giant step forward. It opens doors otherwise closed, and it automatically brings with it a state of excellent, buoyant physical health.
quotes.translation: 它认识到自身作为整体自体一部分的位置。这确实是一种释放的、自由的意识。它代表着向前迈出的一大步。它打开了原本关闭的门户，并自动带来一种极佳、蓬勃的身体健康状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The outer personality must be a strong yet resilient framework, able to dispense with its boundaries and allow the inner self its freedom, and yet strong enough to spring back and maintain its control over outward experience. This is certainly a discipline.
quotes.translation: 外在人格必须是一个强大而富有弹性的框架，能够放下其界限，允许内在自体获得自由，同时又足够强韧，能够弹回并维持对外在体验的控制。这无疑是一种纪律。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The field of probable events exists as a reality. From it the self chooses those actions which shall become a part of physical reality. Here indeed free will enters into the matter. This is a pun. I would be disappointed if it were missed. It is a good one.
quotes.translation: 可能事件的场域作为实相存在。自体从中选择那些将成为物质实相一部分的行动。自由意志确实在此介入其中。这是一个双关语。如果被错过，我会感到失望。这是个不错的双关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. In projections the inner self is free to travel within its capabilities--underlined, within its capabilities.
quotes.translation: 现在。在投射中，内在自体可以在其能力范围内自由旅行——强调一下，在其能力范围内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You create your life through the inner power of your being (pause), whose source is within you and yet beyond the selves that you know. Use those creative abilities with understanding abandon. Honor yourselves and move through the godliness of your being.
quotes.translation: 你通过你存有的内在力量创造你的生活（停顿），其源头在你之内，却又超越你所知的诸自体。以理解的放纵运用那些创造能力。尊重你们自己，并穿越你们存有的神性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: All of the information of the inner self is highly condensed and codified, and exists in electromagnetic purity.
quotes.translation: 内在自我的所有信息都高度浓缩与编码，并以电磁纯态存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The inner senses perceive the psychic reality and transmit messages from it. We speak of these as separate, again, only for convenience, for we have but various abilities and various aspects of a self. The divisions are arbitrary. This is very important.
quotes.translation: 内在感官感知心灵实相并传递其讯息。我们再次将这些能力分开讨论仅为方便起见，因我们拥有的不过是同一个自我的不同能力与面向。这些划分是武断的，这点非常重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Yet within the dream state the familiar physical props sometimes disappear. The inner I operates very well without them. In order to manipulate a physical reality however, the inner I needs a self that is acclimated to physical conditions; hence the ego.
quotes.translation: 然而在梦境状态中，熟悉的物质支撑有时会消失。内在我在没有它们的情况下运作得非常好。但为了操控物质实相，内在我需要一个适应物质条件的自我，于是便有了自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. I have been helping Ruburt. The energy that I would put into sessions has gone into some private talks to him while he slept. These have resulted in necessary insights on his part that will themselves cause the release of energy from the inner self.
quotes.translation: 现在。我一直在协助鲁柏。本应用于课程的能量，已在他睡眠时转化为一些私人对话。这些对话使他获得必要的洞见，这些洞见本身将促使内在自我释放能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now: Each of your reincarnational selves is born as a creature in flesh, like you. Each one has its own "points of power," or successive moments in which it also materializes daily existence in a linear manner from all the probabilities available to it.
quotes.translation: 现在：你们每一个转世自我都像你一样，是血肉之躯的造物。每个转世自我都有其"力量点"，或连续的时刻，在这些时刻中，它也从所有可用的可能性中以线性方式物质化日常存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The dream world is indeed a natural by-product of the relationship of the inner self and the physical being. Not a reflection, therefore, but a by-product involving not only a chemical reaction but the transformation of energy from one state to another.
quotes.translation: 梦境世界确实是内在自我与物质存在关系的自然副产品。因此它并非反映，而是涉及化学反应的副产品，更包含能量从一种状态到另一种状态的转化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Energy cannot be imprisoned for long within one form. The individual whole self, by its very nature, will not restrain itself indefinitely to the particular set of necessities and perceptions necessary for survival within any one given field of reality.
quotes.translation: 能量无法长久被囚禁于单一形态中。个体全我，就其本质而言，不会无限期地自我限制于任何特定实相领域内生存所需的特定感知与需求组合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This analogy is not a very good one however, since the child does eventually leave the parent, but it is a true one because the inner self does indeed leave the physical image with which the ego is so concerned, when it passes beyond the physical field.
quotes.translation: 然而这个比喻并不十分恰当，因为孩子终究会离开父母，但它的确真实——因为当内在自我超越物质领域时，确实会离开那个自我如此关切的物质形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The energy used in constructing dreams is every bit as intense as the energy used in the waking state, but there is no depletion because the sleeping self uses energy more naturally, realizing that it is available, and being more free in its operation.
quotes.translation: 构建梦境所使用的能量，其强度丝毫不亚于清醒状态所使用的能量，但不会产生耗竭，因为睡眠中的自我更自然地运用能量，明白能量随时可得，运作时也更加自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: For this projection of inner into outer is automatic. Understanding the processes involved is of great benefit. The physical self seems(underlined) to react to physical stimuli. Actually, of course, it is reacting to its own reality, projected outward.
quotes.translation: 因为这种内在向外在的投射是自动发生的。理解其中涉及的过程大有裨益。物质自我看似（强调）对物质刺激做出反应，但实际上，它是在回应自身投射向外在的现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is believed that the self must shed its ego and die symbolically in order that the inner self can be free.
quotes.translation: 人们相信自我必须舍弃其自我，象征性地死去，内在自我才能获得自由。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Nevertheless a freedom from the ego must be permitted to some extent, so that the inner self can most freely operate. I have spoken of tests and experiments that can be conducted, and which will yield physical results that will be ultimately accepted.
quotes.translation: 然而，必须允许在一定程度上摆脱自我的束缚，以便内在自我能最自由地运作。我曾提及可进行的测试与实验，这些实验将产生最终能被接受的物质性结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The conditions of our sessions allow us, on the one hand, more freedom, and on the other hand more control. Also they add to the value of the sessions themselves. We will have much more to say concerning the limitless self, in connection with action.
quotes.translation: 我们课程的条件一方面允许我们拥有更多自由，另一方面也赋予我们更多控制。同时，它们也增加了课程本身的价值。关于与行动相关的无限自性，我们还有更多要说的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In some respects this dissipates the energy, of course. In the dream state you manipulate energy more directly. This is what you are doing of course in self-hypnosis: Rut, used for therapy, you are still trying to affect or change something physical.
quotes.translation: 在某些方面，这当然会耗散能量。在梦境状态中，你更直接地操控能量。这正是你在自我催眠中所做的：但用于治疗时，你仍在试图影响或改变某些物质层面的东西。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Again, this is an important point. The ego has accepted the goals of the inner self. Its identity has already changed, so that its main concern, underline main, is no longer primarily with physical manipulation, but with inner growth and development.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这是重要的一点。自我已经接受了内在自性的目标。它的身份已经改变，因此其主要关注——强调"主要"——不再是物质层面的操控，而是内在的成长与发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: When the lessons are learned there is no need for physical reality. The survival instinct, strongly connected with the physical self, keeps it anchored in focus within your system. Without it consciousness would tend to float free. It is your anchor.
quotes.translation: 当功课学成之后，物质实相便不再必要。与物质自性紧密相连的生存本能，将其锚定在你的系统焦点中。没有它，意识往往会自由漂浮。它是你的锚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: （Next, I seemed to look down a narrow lighted corridor at the back of myself as I sat at a desk or table. My second self answered a question I had asked: "Why certainly don't you see how it works by now?" or words to that effect. Again my sensation.
quotes.translation: （接着，我似乎沿着一条狭窄的发光走廊向下看，看到自己坐在书桌或桌子前的背影。我的第二个自性回答了我提出的问题："你到现在怎么还不明白它是如何运作的？"或类似的话。再次是我的感觉。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These are in the process of vanishing, but the lingering nature has expressed indeed his lingering doubts. Of late he has to some extent freed him self. He has taken definite steps, and made positive gestures that he would not have made in the past.
quotes.translation: 这些正在消失的过程中，但残留的性质确实表达了他残留的疑虑。最近他在某种程度上解放了自己。他采取了明确的步骤，做出了过去不会做出的积极姿态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: (11:10.) You are doing the same thing now constantly and automatically with whatever beliefs you have, and they are being as constantly and automatically translated. It is the separation of self from beliefs that is so important initially, however.
quotes.translation: （11点10分）你现在正持续且自动地对所持的任何信念做着同样的事，而这些信念也在同样持续且自动地被转化。然而，将自我与信念分离在最初阶段至关重要。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Philosophies that teach denial of the flesh must ultimately end up preaching a denial of the self and building a contempt for it, because even though the soul is couched in muscle and bone it is meant to experience that reality, not to refute it.
quotes.translation: 那些教导否定肉体的哲学，最终必然走向否定自我并滋生对自我的蔑视，因为即使灵魂栖居于肌肉与骨骼之中，其本意也是体验这一实相，而非否定它。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I close by saying, as I have said before: You are given the gift of the gods; you create your reality according to your beliefs; yours is the creative energy that makes your world; there are no limitations to the self except those you believe in.
quotes.translation: 最后我重申此前所言：你被赋予神祇的礼物；你依信念创造实相；你的创造力能量构筑你的世界；自我除了你所相信的限制之外，别无局限。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: What I have said applies to what you just said. In one context what you call physical reality is a dream, but in a larger context it is a dream that you have created. When you realize that you form it you come into the memory of your whole self.
quotes.translation: 我所说的正适用于你刚才所言。在某个语境中，你所谓的物质实相是一场梦，但在更广阔的语境中，这是你创造的梦。当你意识到自己塑造了它，你便忆起了完整的自我。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. I am doing this for you: I have the impression of a six in regard to the nonphysical self book. Now this is not six years. I do not know however whether it is six weeks you see, or six months. I cannot cur it that fine, for various reasons.
quotes.translation: 现在。我为你做此说明：关于非物质自我的书，我得到"六"这个印象。这并非六年。但我不确定是六周还是六个月。由于种种原因，我无法精确到这种程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Projection then is aggression. The self thrusts forward into new dimensions, and this is creative. Painting a picture is aggressive. You are thrusting energy into new forms. All this you see implies a destruction, but only in your limited terms.
quotes.translation: 投射即是攻击。自我向前突入新的维度，这是创造性的。绘画是攻击性的。你将能量注入新的形态。这一切在你看来暗示着毁灭，但这仅存在于你有限的认知中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This is not the result of any inherent egotistical quality. It is true that the egos responsibility is with the relationship between the self and the physical environment. It must of necessity be focused within the confines of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这并非源于任何固有的自我中心特质。的确，自我的职责在于处理自体与物质环境之间的关系。它必然要聚焦于物质实相的范畴之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Identity of the inner self operates very well within primary conditions. It is dependent upon primary conditions. Its manipulation of primary conditions gives it the knowledge of itself. Identity is retained within the dream state, is it not?
quotes.translation: 内在自体的身份认同在原始条件下运作得非常好。它依赖于原始条件。它对原始条件的操控使其得以认识自身。身份认同在梦境状态中得以保留，难道不是吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Such a state is far from impossible, and we shall see that you achieve it. The rules that I have given you are an absolute necessity if that state is to be achieved. And it is only in that state that the inner self can utilize its abilities.
quotes.translation: 这种状态绝非不可能达成，而且我们将看到你确实能实现它。若要达成这种状态，我所给予你的规则是绝对必要的。也唯有在这种状态下，内在自体才能运用其能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: "You do not perceive the consciousness within the self. You do not perceive the consciousness within a star, either--yet the star is the physical materialization in your reality of another kind of consciousness, and all you perceive of it."
quotes.translation: "你并未感知到自体之内的意识。同样，你也未感知到星辰之内的意识——然而星辰是另一种意识在你们实相中的物质化显现，而你所感知到的不过是它的表象。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 2. Sometimes together, sometimes separately, Jane and I listen to portions of the tapes students had made of the sessions and other exciting happenings in her ESP classes. I'd hardly put into shape for Session 933 my musings about the workings of consciousness than I heard Seth come through with these two passages; at once they reminded me of what I'd just been writing about.

quotes.text: You will learn through experience many and excellent methods that can be utilized for your advantage. Through projections you will become acquainted with the mobility and stability of the inner self, as separate from the physical apparatus.
quotes.translation: 你将通过经验学到许多极佳的方法，这些方法可为你所用。通过投射，你将熟悉内在自体的流动性与稳定性，认识到它独立于物质机制之外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You seem to perceive exclusively through your physical senses, and yet you have only to extend your egotistical idea of reality, and you will find even your egotistical self accepting quite readily the existence of nonphysical information.
quotes.translation: 你似乎完全通过物质感官来感知，然而你只需扩展你对实相的自我观念，就会发现即便是你的自我，也会相当轻易地接受非物质信息的存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They are aware of your egotistical self, but very dimly. You are their environment, so to speak, and they are aware of your health and vitality as it affects them and their own well being. Some are stronger than others. Some are intrusive.
quotes.translation: 他们能感知到你的自我，但相当模糊。可以说，你是他们的环境，他们能感知到你的健康和活力，因为这会影响他们自身及福祉。有些个体较强，有些则具侵入性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Your parties were helpful. The moderate drinking helped reunite the conscious and subconscious as a total self, knocking out the unwholesome identification with the mother. The swearing bears a direct relationship to the mother's language.
quotes.translation: 你的聚会很有帮助。适度饮酒有助于将意识与潜意识整合为完整的自我，消除与母亲的不健康认同。咒骂与母亲的语言有直接关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: He fully believes he will become ill if he eats the forbidden foods, and so he does. It never occurs to him to dispense with the belief -- to realize that it alone sets up the conditioning process through the operation of self-hypnotism.
quotes.translation: 他坚信若食用禁忌食物就会生病，结果果真如此。他从未想过要摒弃这个信念——意识到正是这个信念通过自我催眠的运作，单独建立了制约过程。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You will remember that we said that atoms and molecules contained consciousness, a generalized consciousness first of all, in which data is suspended in condensed mental genetic code, and also a self-consciousness to some limited degree.
quotes.translation: 你会记得我们说过，原子与分子包含意识——首先是普遍意识，其中数据悬浮于浓缩的心灵遗传密码中，同时也包含某种有限程度的自我意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is something else I wanted to mention briefly. It is that the sixth inner sense, of which we have spoken briefly, can be likened in some respects to the instincts of the inner self. This will be discussed also at our next session.
quotes.translation: 还有件事我想简要提及：我们曾简略讨论过的第六内在感官，在某些方面可类比于内在自我的本能。这将在下次课中继续探讨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have told you that dreams are a continuing process, whether or not the ego wakes or sleeps, and whether or not it has, or retains, any knowledge of the dreaming. So also the astral self journeys often, whether the ego wakes or sleeps.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你，无论自我清醒或沉睡，无论它是否知晓或保留梦境记忆，梦都是持续进行的过程。同样地，无论自我清醒或沉睡，星光体也时常旅行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Organized action is an excellent method of exerting influence, but only when each member is self-activating; only when he or she extends individuality through group action, and does not mindlessly seek to follow the dictates of others.
quotes.translation: 有组织的行动是发挥影响力的绝佳方式，但唯有当每个成员都能自我启动时才能成立；唯有当每个成员通过群体行动扩展个体性，而非盲目追随他人指令时才能奏效。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (With amusement:) The male scientist considers the rocket his private symbol of sexual power. (Pause.) He feels he has the prerogative to use power in any way he chooses. Now many scientists are "idealists." (Pause.) They believe that their search for answers, however, justifies almost any means, or sacrifices, not only on their parts but on the parts of others. They become fanatics when they ignore the rights of others, and when they defile life in a misguided attempt to understand it (see Session 850, with Note 3).
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The self is indeed a more complicated and a more delicate construction than any of you know.
quotes.translation: 自我确实是一种比你们任何人所知的更为复杂、更为精妙的建构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The Nature of the Psyche. Seth reveals a startling new concept of self, answering questions about the inner reality that exists apart from time, the origins and powers of dreams, human sexuality, and how we choose our physical death.
quotes.translation: 《心灵的本质》。赛斯揭示了一个令人震惊的自我新概念，解答了关于独立于时间之外的内在实相、梦的起源与力量、人类性征，以及我们如何选择肉身死亡等问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A primary construction is a psychic gestalt, formed into matter by a consciousness of itself. Such a primary construction is an attempt to create, in the world of matter, a replica of the inner psychic construction of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 初级建构是一种心灵完形，由对其自身的意识塑造成物质形态。这种初级建构试图在物质世界中复制整体自我的内在心灵建构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Indeed. Remember, this is your entire identity of which we are speaking. It is only you who are presently aware of but one portion of it; and this portion you insist upon calling yourself. You are the self who makes these decisions.
quotes.translation: 确实如此。请记住，我们正在谈论的是你的完整身份。你目前仅意识到其中一部分，却执意将这一部分称为"你自己"。你正是做出这些决定的那个自我。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This portion is conscious, aware, alert. It is you, so focused in physical reality, who do not listen to its voice, who do not understand that it is the great psychological strength from which your physically oriented self springs.
quotes.translation: 这一部分是有意识的、觉知的、警觉的。正是你——如此聚焦于物质实相的你——没有倾听它的声音，不明白它正是你物质导向的自我所源自的伟大心理力量。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is to be expected as minor adjustments are made. Without them there would be dangers. Too much smooth sailing could then lead to overconfidence, before the whole self had mastered the controls and disciplines really necessary.
quotes.translation: 这是意料之中的微小调整。没有这些调整反而会有危险。过于一帆风顺可能导致过度自信，在整体自我尚未掌握真正必要的控制与纪律之前。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The painting itself, and any painting, rises out of the empty board through the force of your own emotions, and the board becomes the focal point that collects, draws together and directs the energy from your inner self, into form.
quotes.translation: 这幅画本身，以及任何画作，都从空白的画布中经由你自身情感的力量浮现而出，画布成为聚焦点，收集、凝聚并引导来自内在自我的能量，使之化为具体形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

I'd also called our optometrist and asked his secretary to have him return my call so I could ask him a couple of technical questions about a note I'm writing for Session 901 for Dreams. Since I had to wait for his call -- which never came -- I couldn't leave the house to get Jane's typewriter. I want to try it out to make sure it's okay before I turn my own in for repair, which it needs.

quotes.text: Now, self 3 has been your inner inspiration often, and it is possible that you will find little difficulty in subjectively contacting Joseph.
quotes.translation: 现在，自我3常常是你们内在的灵感来源，你们很可能在主观上联系约瑟夫时不会遇到太大困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now, the material is new, as you yourselves are new. It is old, as the heritage of your selves is old. There is no old knowledge, however!
quotes.translation: 现在，这资料是新的，正如你们自己是新的。它也是旧的，正如你们自我的传承是旧的。然而，并没有旧的知识！
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 724)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Then the integration will take place, and you will realize that the various incarnated selves were as but days in your present existence.
quotes.translation: 然后整合将会发生，你们会意识到各种转世的自我，在你们当前的存在中，不过如同几天而已。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is after all the you from which you spring, and the impetus within the present self. You may take your break and we shall continue.
quotes.translation: 它终究是你们所源出的那个你，也是当前自我内在的推动力。你们可以休息一下，我们稍后继续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Through such feelings the psyche breaks through all misconceptions, hinting at the nature of the self and of the universe at once.
quotes.translation: 透过这类感受，心灵突破了所有误解，同时暗示了自性及宇宙的本质。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Quite literally, the "inner" self forms the body by magically transforming thoughts and emotions into physical counterparts ...
quotes.translation: 确切地说，"内在"自性通过将思想与情感神奇地转化为物质对应物，从而构建了身体……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (So far we've been dealing with the idea of counterparts in our own physical reality. By way of contrast, however, Seth stated last month in the 713th session, after 10:32:) Nothing exists outside the psyche, however, that does not exist within it, and there is no unknown world that does not have its psychological or psychic counterpart. (Before that, from Session 712:) To some extent or another, there are counterparts of all realities within your psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The self that you shall be already exists. It you will realize your potential them you will find it is already accomplished.
quotes.translation: 你将成为的那个自性已然存在。若你意识到自己的潜能，便会发现它早已实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is true that the whole personality, or whole self, does not directly manifest itself within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 确实，完整的人格或完整的自性，并不会直接显现在物质实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: My instructions concerning projection should tell you a good deal about the true nature of the self.
quotes.translation: 我关于投射的指示，应能让你对自性的真实本质有相当深入的了解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now. The EE units are the forms basic experience takes when directed by this inner self.
quotes.translation: 现在。EE单位是当经验受此内在自性引导时，所采取的基本形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: But the idea of self betrayal can lead to distortions.
quotes.translation: 但自我背叛的观念可能导致扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json
